subject: A SAVE Act update:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
With free and fair elections being undermined on multiple fronts, there’s never been a more urgent time to pitch in.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105968435/539985095/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI5OWRmMGU3LTFlMWItZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lKL7nIZQ9z5XKXq7XueEJ-FnUGs_knOhZZy5vGrpDBs=&emci=2c9bdb1e-e91a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=b99df0e7-1e1b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, Last week, the GOP-controlled House of Representatives passed the SAVE Act — an extreme anti-voter bill that would make it significantly harder, if not _outright impossible,_ for millions of eligible voters to register to vote and have their voices heard. **This is one of the biggest threats to voting rights we’ve seen in a generation. And it isn’t an isolated incident: it’s part of a broader far-right agenda to silence voters — **through laws that make it harder to vote, maps that make it impossible for communities to elect candidates of their choosing, and outright attempts to steal elections (like what’s happening in North Carolina’s state supreme court race right now). **The fair maps movement is fighting back — and we need your help.** [**Rush a donation of $31 or more now to help defeat anti-voter attacks and power our nationwide fight for a truly representative democracy. With voting rights being undermined on multiple fronts, there’s never been a more urgent time to pitch in.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105968437/539985098/1925646595?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_SAVEActUpdate_email_20250416-NDRC-Tier1-SAVEActUpdate_31&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250416-NDRC-Tier1-SAVEActUpdate_31&utm_campaign=SAVEActUpdate&amount=31&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI5OWRmMGU3LTFlMWItZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lKL7nIZQ9z5XKXq7XueEJ-FnUGs_knOhZZy5vGrpDBs=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

The SAVE Act isn’t about saving anything — it’s about stripping away rights by:
* ❌ Requiring all eligible Americans to provide proof of citizenship by presenting a passport or birth certificate when registering to vote
* ❌ Upending online voter registration (a practice in 42 states!)
* ❌ Making it impossible for Americans to register to vote by mail
* ❌ Putting an end to voter registration drives nationwide

The positive-sounding name is a not-so-sly attempt to sugarcoat the idea of making it harder for millions of eligible Americans to cast their votes. We aren’t falling for it, Peter. And we’re pushing back against the MAGA attempts to dismantle democracy.
**The NDRC is leading the fight for fair representation through fair maps — electing Democracy Defenders, stopping gerrymandering, and exposing and preventing threats to free and fair elections.**
[**Now, we need you with us. So please, make a donation of $31 or more today to help power the NDRC’s democracy-saving work nationwide.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105968450/539985111/1925646595?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_SAVEActUpdate_email_20250416-NDRC-Tier1-SAVEActUpdate_31&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250416-NDRC-Tier1-SAVEActUpdate_31&utm_campaign=SAVEActUpdate&amount=31&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI5OWRmMGU3LTFlMWItZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lKL7nIZQ9z5XKXq7XueEJ-FnUGs_knOhZZy5vGrpDBs=)

## Denver’s Sanctuary Policies Are Costing Colorado—It’s Time for Action
|
---

Colorado families are paying the price for dangerous sanctuary policies—and SAFE Co-Founder and former ICE Field Office Director **John Fabbricatore** is sounding the alarm. In his latest **commentary in _The Daily Gazette_**, John outlines how Denver’s refusal to cooperate with federal immigration enforcement has put **public safety at risk** and cost **millions in taxpayer dollars**. "With Colorado’s state budget already facing a $1 billion deficit for FY 2026, failing to apply for federal dollars exacerbates an already dire fiscal situation. It’s not just a fiscal issue, though; public safety is at stake as criminal migrants are shielded from deportation and reintroduced into communities." **Read the full article here (or at the bottom of this email):**
**[Denver’s sanctuary policies leave Colorado vulnerable and cost taxpayers millions](https://rpgdxp.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyOTI0MjMsXCJsXCI6MTUxODg0MTYyNjAwNTM1MjUxLFwiclwiOjE1MTg4NDE3NzI5NjMyODQwN30iLCJzIjoiMDk1NWM4ZjMwODcyZWE3ZiJ9)** At SAFE Colorado, we believe in **law and order, transparency, and accountability**. John's piece underscores exactly why we must empower law enforcement to enforce our immigration laws—not tie their hands with reckless sanctuary policies. **We need your help** to push for policy change at every level of government. Here’s what you can do today: ✅ **Read and share the article**
✅ **Sign the Pledge** (if you haven't already)
✅ **Support SAFE Colorado** so we can continue advocating for common-sense immigration enforcement****

**Full Article:** Denver has long been at the forefront of sanctuary policies, officially becoming a "sanctuary city" around 2013 and pioneering a trend that has transformed Colorado into a full-blown "sanctuary state." And Coloradans are paying the price. Legislation enacted by Democrat-dominated state lawmakers prohibits sheriffs from cooperating with federal Immigration and Customs Enforcement in identifying and deporting criminal migrants. This policy shields convicted criminals from deportation, releasing them back into Colorado communities instead of adhering to federal immigration laws. This blanket approach to sanctuary policies not only weakens public safety but imposes significant hidden costs on Coloradans. Denver's leadership, particularly under current Mayor Michael Johnston, has championed and defended these policies, leaving taxpayers to pick up the tab. Johnston and other pro-sanctuary officials don't make it easy to figure out the number of criminal migrants who are convicted of serious crimes and then serve jail terms in dozens of Colorado counties and prison terms in the state's Department of Corrections. Fortunately, though, there does exist adequate real-world data we can check. That data is contained in the records of a federal government cost-reimbursement program for local jails and state prison facilities, which the U.S. Department of Justice administers under the "State Criminal Alien Assistance Program," or SCAAP. SCAAP reimburses states and counties for the costs of incarcerating criminal migrants--funds that could ease Colorado's financial burden but remain largely untapped due to political posturing. In 2005, Colorado received $5 million in SCAAP reimbursements, with Denver accounting for $950,665 of this total. However, Denver is missing from the most recent 2024 SCAAP reimbursement total. The city did not apply for reimbursement. In fact, there is no record of a Denver SCAAP reimbursement in any year since 2016. Why has Denver stopped seeking these funds? Could it be to obscure the number of criminal migrants in its jail system? In some cases, officers reportedly use "XX" instead of the correct two-letter code for a person's place of birth--a deliberate manipulation of data. This lack of transparency raises critical questions about Denver's motivations and the impact on its citizens. The ongoing refusal to apply for SCAAP funding, combined with the steadfast enforcement of sanctuary policies, suggests that Denver's leadership is prioritizing ideology over fiscal responsibility and public safety. With Colorado’s state budget already facing a $1 billion deficit for FY 2026, failing to apply for federal dollars exacerbates an already dire fiscal situation. It’s not just a fiscal issue, though; public safety is at stake as criminal migrants are shielded from deportation and reintroduced into communities.

|
---
|
##### SAFE Colorado
www.SAFEColorado.org |

body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105969311/539993431/1561815853?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDQ5MDdiNy0yMDFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8loDpnOOL4mxDjNwotqNZVq8UbXneJvVBf9FLH5ICOk=&emci=02bf9f7f-061b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=144907b7-201b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=12666102) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105969312/539993432/2033110592?refcode=email_041625_launch-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDQ5MDdiNy0yMDFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8loDpnOOL4mxDjNwotqNZVq8UbXneJvVBf9FLH5ICOk=) Hi Peter, I want to tell you personally:

**I’m officially running for Congress to win back Colorado’s 8th District.**

I was proud to be the first person to represent Colorado’s 8th – and the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress.

**[I’ll explain more about why I’m running, but if you’re with me, will you donate right now to get our campaign off the ground? This will be one of the most competitive House races in the country, so every dollar makes a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105969313/539993433/2033110592?refcode=email_041625_launch-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDQ5MDdiNy0yMDFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8loDpnOOL4mxDjNwotqNZVq8UbXneJvVBf9FLH5ICOk=)** | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105969314/539993434/2033110592?refcode=email_041625_launch-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDQ5MDdiNy0yMDFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8loDpnOOL4mxDjNwotqNZVq8UbXneJvVBf9FLH5ICOk=)
---
Let me start from the beginning: my parents’ dream.

My parents came to this country from a small town in Mexico. They didn’t come with much, but they came in search of the American Dream. They raised me to believe that with hard work, perseverance, and care for others, anything was possible. That belief led me to become the first in my family to graduate from college and later, become a pediatrician in Adams County.

But as a doctor, I saw families struggling with the rising costs of healthcare and prescription drugs, and I knew I needed to do more. The American Dream my parents worked so hard for was slipping away for too many.

So, I took that fight to the state legislature and then Congress. I forced Big Pharma to lower prescription prices, helped pass a first-in-the-nation cap on the price of insulin, and pushed to allow Medicare to negotiate lower prices.

**But our representative in Congress, Gabe Evans, is trying to rip away health care from tens of thousands of Coloradans, including the very families I served as a pediatrician.**

I won’t stand by while Gabe Evans makes life harder for working families, all while giving tax cuts to billionaires. So I’m getting back in the ring and running for Congress, and I hope I can count on your support.

**[CO-08 was one of the closest House races in the country in both 2022 and 2024, so if we’re going to win what’s bound to be one of the toughest races in 2026, we need a strong grassroots team from the very beginning. Will you donate now to launch this campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105969315/539993435/2033110592?refcode=email_041625_launch-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDQ5MDdiNy0yMDFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8loDpnOOL4mxDjNwotqNZVq8UbXneJvVBf9FLH5ICOk=)**

name: Joe Hagerty - Political Director
subject: LB89 "Stand with Women Act" Call to Action!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
LB89 safeguards rights, opportunities, safety of women in Nebraska by establishing sex-specific standards in sports, schools, & state facilities. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a94b8dbfc91a/n41kepo7ku-12766608?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=0b73e0e4a8&e=25844e23a8)
---
|
---
| |
# LB89 the "Stand With Women" Act Will Be Debated at the Nebraska Legislature on April 22nd.

It is a crucial time to support this bill to restore an even playing field in women's sports and protect women from physical and mental harm by males in women's spaces.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=a5372ea16a&e=25844e23a8)
---
|
# What is LB89 the "Stand with Women" Act?
---
| The "Stand With Women Act" is designed to safeguard the rights, opportunities, privacy, and safety of women and girls in Nebraska by establishing simple, sex-specific standards in sports, schools, and state facilities. It protects the privacy of students and citizens in restrooms and locker rooms, preserves the integrity of female sports, and secures fair opportunities for competition and scholarships.

We _each _have a responsibility in protecting our sisters, daughters, granddaughters, and all women against the insanity that is attempting to replace commonsense with misplaced compassion and virtue signaling.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=f9adabf952&e=25844e23a8)
---
|
# Ride the Bus to the Capitol
---
| A generous donor and concerned citizen has graciously agreed to provide buses to pick-up supporters to be a powerful presence at the capitol on Tuesday afternoon. **Join** **us. **To support Senator Kauth's legislation, we invite you to ride the bus with us from Omaha to the capitol. The bus will be provided **FREE of charge. **

The bus will pick up in a parking lot at Westroads Mall in Omaha at 11:30 am and will pick up in a parking lot at the Nebraska Crossing Outlet Mall in Gretna around 12:00 pm. The first 100 people to sign-up to ride the bus will receive a complimentary "Stand with Women" t-shirt. Dinner will be provided at the capitol at 5pm for supporters of the bill.
---
|
### **Bus Schedule:**
**The Bus Departure Schedule is as Follows:**
* Load Buses at Westroads Mall: 11:30 am
* Buses Leave Westroads Mall: 11:45 am
* Buses Arrive at Nebraska Crossing Outlet Mall: 12:03 pm
* Buses Leave Nebraska Crossing Outlet Mall: 12:15 pm
* Buses Arrive at Capitol: 1:00 pm

**The Return Bus Schedule is as Follows:**
* Load Buses at Capitol: 7-7:30 pm
* Buses Leave Capitol: 7:30 pm
* Buses Arrive at Nebraska Crossing Outlet Mall: 8:15 pm
* Buses Leave Nebraska Crossing Outlet Mall: 8:30 pm
* Buses Arrive at Westroads Mall: 8:48 pm

---
| [Sign-Up To Ride the Bus](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=aa6db25b0d&e=25844e23a8 "Sign-Up To Ride the Bus")
---
| **RSVP to Ride the Bus by 10 am on Monday, April 21st to secure your spot!**
---
|
---
| [ ](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=599797de4a&e=25844e23a8)
---
|
# Support LB89 "Stand With Women" Act
---
| [LB89 "Stand with Women" Act](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=488a60c3c1&e=25844e23a8) takes a commonsense approach to address growing concerns from parents and athletes about fairness and safety in female sports and the protection of private spaces. Even if you cannot ride the bus or be at the capitol on Tuesday, we urge you to contact your Senator to encourage them to vote **"YES"** to LB89. You can contact your Senators by phone or email using [this contact info.](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=f23be9355d&e=25844e23a8)
**[Read the Full Bill Text here](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=6e948a6273&e=25844e23a8).**
---
|
---
|
# Additional Info
---
| **REMINDERS:**
1. Be kind when talking with your Senator and provide specific examples of why you are encouraging them to support LB89.
2. The Nebraska State Patrol and security will be on sight at the capitol for your safety.
3. Be prepared for protesters, but do not respond to them. If confronted by media and wish to make a statement, please keep it positive and stress your support for protecting women's rights.
4. You are powerful and your voice matters!

**Questions? Contact Jeanne Reigle, the NEGOP Director of Government Relations.**
Jeanne M. Reigle
Director of Government Relations
Nebraska Republican Party
govrelations@ne.gop
---
| |
---
| No imagery or video is a paid promotion between the NEGOP or entities included in this email.
---
| [PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2025 Nebraska Republican Party, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Nebraska Republican Party1610 N StLincoln, NE 68508-1871
[Add us to your address book](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/vcard?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=72fdf24cb0)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=72fdf24cb0&e=25844e23a8&c=b39666e37a) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=72fdf24cb0&t=b&e=25844e23a8&c=b39666e37a).

name: Emerge HQ
subject: Defending the right to vote for ALL Americans 🗳️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America
body:
Emerge women are using every tool at their disposal to protect our most fundamental right to vote!

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105969764/540017314/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-04-16_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE2ZDIwYTZmLTI3MWItZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FsnyUSw5F0TJMhETIem-b1FAM1xwpqPwKDgxyBYWUKk=)
---
| Peter,

Since losing the 2020 election, Donald Trump has relentlessly pushed dangerous election lies and conspiracy theories about widespread voter fraud to sow distrust in our democracy.

Last week, House Republicans doubled down and passed the so-called “**SAVE Act** ,” a voter suppression bill that requires voters to show proof of citizenship in person in order to register to vote, despite the fact that non-citizens are already prohibited from voting in American elections.

**This bill would disenfranchise _millions_ of eligible voters, including troops serving overseas, Native Americans, women whose married name doesn’t match their birth certificates, and disabled people.**
---
| [FIGHT BACK → ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105969765/540017315/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-04-16_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE2ZDIwYTZmLTI3MWItZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FsnyUSw5F0TJMhETIem-b1FAM1xwpqPwKDgxyBYWUKk=)
---
Not only that, but when Emerge alum **Rep. Maxine Dexter (OR-03)** introduced an amendment to ensure that the _69 million women voters_ who changed their name after marriage would not be harmed by this bill because their birth certificates would not match their current legal name, _House Republicans blocked it!_

It’s clear that this bill isn’t about election security – it’s about silencing voters.

Emerge women are using every tool at their disposal to protect our most fundamental right to vote! We’re training the next class of Emerge women to run bold, community-driven campaigns and join our alums in office on the frontlines so we can defend the right to vote for ALL Americans!

[_**Will you activate your 2025 membership and renew your support for Emerge women so we can fight back and protect our democracy?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105969766/540017316/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-04-16_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE2ZDIwYTZmLTI3MWItZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FsnyUSw5F0TJMhETIem-b1FAM1xwpqPwKDgxyBYWUKk=)
| [CONTRIBUTE $5 ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105969767/540017317/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-04-16_1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE2ZDIwYTZmLTI3MWItZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FsnyUSw5F0TJMhETIem-b1FAM1xwpqPwKDgxyBYWUKk=)
---

clean_body: Emerge women are using every tool at their disposal to protect our most fundamental right to vote! | = | Peter, Since losing the 2020 election, Donald Trump has relentlessly pushed dangerous election lies and conspiracy theories about widespread voter fraud to sow distrust in our democracy. Last week, House Republicans doubled down and passed the so-called “SAVE Act ,” a voter suppression bill that requires voters to show proof of citizenship in person in order to register to vote, despite the fact that non-citizens are already prohibited from voting in American elections. This bill would disenfranchise millions of eligible voters, including troops serving overseas, Native Americans, women whose married name doesn’t match their birth certificates, and disabled people. | = Not only that, but when Emerge alum Rep. Maxine Dexter (OR-03) introduced an amendment to ensure that the 69 million women voters who changed their name after marriage would not be harmed by this bill because their birth certificates would not match their current legal name, House Republicans blocked it! It’s clear that this bill isn’t about election security – it’s about silencing voters. Emerge women are using every tool at their disposal to protect our most fundamental right to vote! We’re training the next class of Emerge women to run bold, community-driven campaigns and join our alums in office on the frontlines so we can defend the right to vote for ALL Americans! = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Emerge HQ * | | = Paid for by Emerge America Emerge America 818 Connecticut Avenue NW, Suite 450 Washington, DC 20006 United States | = =

name: James Carville
subject: Mallory has a spine. That’s rare in this business.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
When I tell you Mallory’s a fighter, I damn well mean it.
#
_You are receiving this email because of your past support for Democrats in competitive races. If you would like to unsubscribe,[please click here to opt out.](https://act.statedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_state-democrats-committee?t=1&akid=8885%2E614464%2EyBoFc-)_
---
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87905?refcode=em20250416-8885&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8885%2E614464%2EyBoFc-)
Here’s the deal, Peter –
**[I’ve seen a lot of Democrats. But Mallory McMorrow, who just announced her Senate campaign in Michigan, is something else. And I need you to help her come out of the gates swinging. Will you rush a gift split between her campaign and State Democrats Committee today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87905?refcode=em20250416-8885&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=8885%2E614464%2EyBoFc-)**
I’ve known my good friend Mallory for a while now. She made waves back in 2022 with a viral speech—and let me tell you something: I’ve been in this business a long time, and that was one of the best political moments I’ve ever seen.
She stood up on the Senate floor, called out the absolute garbage coming from the far-right, and did not flinch. She told the truth. With fire. With heart. And people listened.
Hell I told everyone I’d show that speech as an instruction manual, and I meant it.
That’s the kind of leadership we need right now.
So when I tell you Mallory’s a fighter, I damn well mean it. She flipped a Republican state Senate seat that nobody thought was winnable. Then she helped flip the entire chamber for the first time in 40 years.
And now? She’s stepping up again — because Donald Trump and Elon Musk and the rest of that billionaire boys club are lighting our democracy on fire. **_And they’d love nothing more than to take back Michigan while they’re at it._**
**Here’s the truth: Michigan might just be the closest swing state this year.**
National Republicans are gearing up to spend more than EVER this cycle in Michigan, and if we don’t crush our grassroots fundraising, we’ll spend the whole campaign playing catch up to their war chest.
If Mallory’s going to fight back — and win — we’ve gotta get her campaign off to a hell of a start.
**[So I’m asking, Peter — will you rush a donation right now to help my friend Mallory crush her fundraising goals and show the GOP we’re not messing around?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87905?refcode=em20250416-8885&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=8885%2E614464%2EyBoFc-)**
Let’s go win this thing.
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87906?refcode=em20250416-8885&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=5&akid=8885%2E614464%2EyBoFc-) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87906?refcode=em20250416-8885&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=6&akid=8885%2E614464%2EyBoFc-) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87906?refcode=em20250416-8885&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=8885%2E614464%2EyBoFc-) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87906?refcode=em20250416-8885&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=8885%2E614464%2EyBoFc-) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87906?refcode=em20250416-8885&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=8885%2E614464%2EyBoFc-) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87906?refcode=em20250416-8885&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=8885%2E614464%2EyBoFc-) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87905?refcode=em20250416-8885&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=8885%2E614464%2EyBoFc-)

subject: Police officer used as a pawn for a special election
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMtuwjAQRb_G3hHZYzsOCy94KBFFINFduzOOU9zGJLHzEHx9BaXZzpyZe3S1b2tX3RSSawRwcWVEAIitEED3MfkwfPt9sWiLt9WiS49ePLaweaEjzPDV6FCsN6eC7H7i6fy-W95lN9IZ72-tneFXaGK9dvVjKre4VKwqCcdWUcl5JhhjAl8Uy9I0NZW0VSasYEJLOAtigVqqtV4CdgoICMKpJBQkY4nNQPPKgKiWVJqSIE6eOYn2NjijaewnHULT-MQ0Htfq0vdtfIrlCPIpNMl1MLUd4t-ZaTyC_KWMIB8R5IdtO3Zw3N8PiOXP0thWfNLjQFbrgIMq28nVtYupRJx8_b_Bo4LfAAAA__8BEm5a)

| | I’m reaching out to you today because another brave police officer is being targeted by a vicious political attack -- one that could cost him everything.
---

---
[](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j02PmzAQhn-NuYHM2Njh4EMSAtp2W3XTaquekOOPjVsciIGg9NevHKFcLPmZR_POK_3QOXsXiO8QwNnpEQEgskUA1z-LD_Nf_7VJh-bLNr2y776IU9iv6g2e8kXJ0Oz2bw1--Te-nY4v5X9-veVPfboP5imvoZnx0nWR8irRgliNaWJEzindFISQIjkLRim2m5yCLW0plbT8JAttsNWYWap14gRgKDDNOc6BE5KZDUhqFRS2zLnSGFH8yMmkN8EpmY_TIkPoe5-p3iedOE_TMD4OqxHUo1FzMJm8GN1P0UBQd6bTFkG9KTAwoDY1mJxSqilLSyzLVBMChgOUkp3iFlLPk2_Hfg7KIFLtqiY9Ht4RsIi90W72iFSHbyuZTIj_JeQrUNIP0n1cEKnWckW7q5r29fBa1e3v_Y_2eHhvf_7aHtP4JEHoYXFd50bGEcUfj7qx3E3AZwAAAP__WWOPfA)
---
Patriot, I’m reaching out to you today because another brave police officer is being targeted by a vicious political attack -- one that could cost him everything. Sergeant Robert Warrington is **facing unjust charges of Attempted Second-Degree Murder and First-Degree Assault** , because a Soros-backed prosecutor saw his case as an opportunity to advance her political agenda. **[We’re running out of time to act, and your response is critical](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j02PmzAQhn-NuYHM2Njh4EMSAtp2W3XTaquekOOPjVsciIGg9NevHKFcLPmZR_POK_3QOXsXiO8QwNnpEQEgskUA1z-LD_Nf_7VJh-bLNr2y776IU9iv6g2e8kXJ0Oz2bw1--Te-nY4v5X9-veVPfboP5imvoZnx0nWR8irRgliNaWJEzindFISQIjkLRim2m5yCLW0plbT8JAttsNWYWap14gRgKDDNOc6BE5KZDUhqFRS2zLnSGFH8yMmkN8EpmY_TIkPoe5-p3iedOE_TMD4OqxHUo1FzMJm8GN1P0UBQd6bTFkG9KTAwoDY1mJxSqilLSyzLVBMChgOUkp3iFlLPk2_Hfg7KIFLtqiY9Ht4RsIi90W72iFSHbyuZTIj_JeQrUNIP0n1cEKnWckW7q5r29fBa1e3v_Y_2eHhvf_7aHtP4JEHoYXFd50bGEcUfj7qx3E3AZwAAAP__WWOPfA),** but first let me share what happened. Last September, while on routine patrol, Sgt. Warrington noticed a car pulled over on the side of the highway and stopped to help. As he approached, he saw a man walking toward the car with his hand suspiciously near his waistband. Sgt. Warrington asked the man if he was there to help, but the man didn’t respond. Just as the man passed, he suddenly turned toward the officer and reached into his coat, pulling out a black object. Fearing for his life and acting on his training, Sgt. Warrington drew his firearm and discharged a single shot. It didn’t hit anyone. Afterwards, he discovered the man was unarmed. But with mere seconds -- either react or be killed -- his training and experience told him to act fast. Now, he is facing trumped up criminal charges that fail to recognize the facts of the case. Patriot, the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF) is doing everything we can to scrape together enough money to help Robert with his legal fees. **[**Will you help us defend this honest man with a $35 donation today?**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j02PmzAQhn-NuYHM2Njh4EMSAtp2W3XTaquekOOPjVsciIGg9NevHKFcLPmZR_POK_3QOXsXiO8QwNnpEQEgskUA1z-LD_Nf_7VJh-bLNr2y776IU9iv6g2e8kXJ0Oz2bw1--Te-nY4v5X9-veVPfboP5imvoZnx0nWR8irRgliNaWJEzindFISQIjkLRim2m5yCLW0plbT8JAttsNWYWap14gRgKDDNOc6BE5KZDUhqFRS2zLnSGFH8yMmkN8EpmY_TIkPoe5-p3iedOE_TMD4OqxHUo1FzMJm8GN1P0UBQd6bTFkG9KTAwoDY1mJxSqilLSyzLVBMChgOUkp3iFlLPk2_Hfg7KIFLtqiY9Ht4RsIi90W72iFSHbyuZTIj_JeQrUNIP0n1cEKnWckW7q5r29fBa1e3v_Y_2eHhvf_7aHtP4JEHoYXFd50bGEcUfj7qx3E3AZwAAAP__WWOPfA)** _Robert's case is as political as it gets._ A Soros-backed prosecutor, looking to make a name for herself during a special election, decided to make him the target of her campaign by charging him with attempted murder. This is a corrupt abuse of power. And now LELDF is doing everything they can to clear Robert’s good name. As a non-profit we support and defend law enforcement officers who have devoted their lives to upholding the Constitution and serving the United States and its citizens. We also educate the public about the many risks and threats to law enforcement officers -- like sham prosecutions by left wing prosecutors. Sgt. Warrington is being used as a pawn in a political game. **[**Will you take a stand against Soros-backed prosecutors who abuse their power to target police officers?**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j02PmzAQhn-NuYHM2Njh4EMSAtp2W3XTaquekOOPjVsciIGg9NevHKFcLPmZR_POK_3QOXsXiO8QwNnpEQEgskUA1z-LD_Nf_7VJh-bLNr2y776IU9iv6g2e8kXJ0Oz2bw1--Te-nY4v5X9-veVPfboP5imvoZnx0nWR8irRgliNaWJEzindFISQIjkLRim2m5yCLW0plbT8JAttsNWYWap14gRgKDDNOc6BE5KZDUhqFRS2zLnSGFH8yMmkN8EpmY_TIkPoe5-p3iedOE_TMD4OqxHUo1FzMJm8GN1P0UBQd6bTFkG9KTAwoDY1mJxSqilLSyzLVBMChgOUkp3iFlLPk2_Hfg7KIFLtqiY9Ht4RsIi90W72iFSHbyuZTIj_JeQrUNIP0n1cEKnWckW7q5r29fBa1e3v_Y_2eHhvf_7aHtP4JEHoYXFd50bGEcUfj7qx3E3AZwAAAP__WWOPfA)** Patriot, Robert was born and raised in Bowie, MD and has served his community in the Bowie Police Department for 12 years, earning multiple awards for his dedication and service. He’s no stranger to hardship and sacrifice. In 2020, he tragically lost his wife to a long battle with breast cancer. Now, he’s facing down political attacks that could destroy his career and his life. Robert’s trial starts this September and to give him the best defense possible, we need your help. **[**Stand with Sgt. Robert Warrington by supporting his defense with a donation of $35 or more.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j02PmzAQhn-NuYHM2Njh4EMSAtp2W3XTaquekOOPjVsciIGg9NevHKFcLPmZR_POK_3QOXsXiO8QwNnpEQEgskUA1z-LD_Nf_7VJh-bLNr2y776IU9iv6g2e8kXJ0Oz2bw1--Te-nY4v5X9-veVPfboP5imvoZnx0nWR8irRgliNaWJEzindFISQIjkLRim2m5yCLW0plbT8JAttsNWYWap14gRgKDDNOc6BE5KZDUhqFRS2zLnSGFH8yMmkN8EpmY_TIkPoe5-p3iedOE_TMD4OqxHUo1FzMJm8GN1P0UBQd6bTFkG9KTAwoDY1mJxSqilLSyzLVBMChgOUkp3iFlLPk2_Hfg7KIFLtqiY9Ht4RsIi90W72iFSHbyuZTIj_JeQrUNIP0n1cEKnWckW7q5r29fBa1e3v_Y_2eHhvf_7aHtP4JEHoYXFd50bGEcUfj7qx3E3AZwAAAP__WWOPfA)** Your support will ensure that he has the resources needed to fight these politically motivated charges. We can’t let our men and women in blue be sacrificed for the sake of political agendas Thank you for your time and for being a patriot who backs the blue. Sincerely,
---
[](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j02PmzAQhn-NuYHM2Njh4EMSAtp2W3XTaquekOOPjVsciIGg9NevHKFcLPmZR_POK_3QOXsXiO8QwNnpEQEgskUA1z-LD_Nf_7VJh-bLNr2y776IU9iv6g2e8kXJ0Oz2bw1--Te-nY4v5X9-veVPfboP5imvoZnx0nWR8irRgliNaWJEzindFISQIjkLRim2m5yCLW0plbT8JAttsNWYWap14gRgKDDNOc6BE5KZDUhqFRS2zLnSGFH8yMmkN8EpmY_TIkPoe5-p3iedOE_TMD4OqxHUo1FzMJm8GN1P0UBQd6bTFkG9KTAwoDY1mJxSqilLSyzLVBMChgOUkp3iFlLPk2_Hfg7KIFLtqiY9Ht4RsIi90W72iFSHbyuZTIj_JeQrUNIP0n1cEKnWckW7q5r29fBa1e3v_Y_2eHhvf_7aHtP4JEHoYXFd50bGEcUfj7qx3E3AZwAAAP__WWOPfA)
---

clean_body: | | | | I’m reaching out to you today because another brave police officer is being targeted by a vicious political attack -- one that could cost him everything. | | Patriot, I’m reaching out to you today because another brave police officer is being targeted by a vicious political attack -- one that could cost him everything. Sergeant Robert Warrington is facing unjust charges of Attempted Second-Degree Murder and First-Degree Assault , because a Soros-backed prosecutor saw his case as an opportunity to advance her political agenda. , but first let me share what happened. Last September, while on routine patrol, Sgt. Warrington noticed a car pulled over on the side of the highway and stopped to help. As he approached, he saw a man walking toward the car with his hand suspiciously near his waistband. Sgt. Warrington asked the man if he was there to help, but the man didn’t respond. Just as the man passed, he suddenly turned toward the officer and reached into his coat, pulling out a black object. Fearing for his life and acting on his training, Sgt. Warrington drew his firearm and discharged a single shot. It didn’t hit anyone. Afterwards, he discovered the man was unarmed. But with mere seconds -- either react or be killed -- his training and experience told him to act fast. Now, he is facing trumped up criminal charges that fail to recognize the facts of the case. Patriot, the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF) is doing everything we can to scrape together enough money to help Robert with his legal fees. Robert's case is as political as it gets. A Soros-backed prosecutor, looking to make a name for herself during a special election, decided to make him the target of her campaign by charging him with attempted murder. This is a corrupt abuse of power. And now LELDF is doing everything they can to clear Robert’s good name. As a non-profit we support and defend law enforcement officers who have devoted their lives to upholding the Constitution and serving the United States and its citizens. We also educate the public about the many risks and threats to law enforcement officers -- like sham prosecutions by left wing prosecutors. Sgt. Warrington is being used as a pawn in a political game. Patriot, Robert was born and raised in Bowie, MD and has served his community in the Bowie Police Department for 12 years, earning multiple awards for his dedication and service. He’s no stranger to hardship and sacrifice. In 2020, he tragically lost his wife to a long battle with breast cancer. Now, he’s facing down political attacks that could destroy his career and his life. Robert’s trial starts this September and to give him the best defense possible, we need your help. Your support will ensure that he has the resources needed to fight these politically motivated charges. We can’t let our men and women in blue be sacrificed for the sake of political agendas Thank you for your time and for being a patriot who backs the blue. Sincerely, Jason C. Johnson President, Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | | | | More such officers who sacrifice so much for willface similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit www.leldf.org. And remember - Blue Lives Matter! ** | | | ---|---|--- © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 |

I have a bit of a problem: rather than having too few topics to pick from, I have too many! So, today, you get to vote on which of the following three politically hot issues I should go deeper on next.
I'll introduce each issue below with a title and a quote, and then you vote!
Lucas's Substack is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9sdWNhc2t1bmNlLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.B6w1C4IxI4ZJE8g8eofKo8Z8Y6UtL1zHImalO-_y55s?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=161506756)
1. **Denial and Politics**

["The [MMR] vaccine ain't worth a damn. My brother's family got it and they all still got sick -- worse than my unvaccinated kids."](https://substack.com/redirect/6687bd9d-7e40-418b-a826-3d15b4885e8e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
\- The father of 8-year old Daisy Hildebrand, who recently died of Measles
2. **Elite Institutions**

["Harvard has set an example for other higher-ed institutions - rejecting an unlawful and ham-handed attempt to stifle academic freedom, while taking concrete steps to make sure all students at Harvard can benefit from an environment of intellectual inquiry, rigorous debate and mutual respect. Let's hope other institutions follow suit."](https://substack.com/redirect/63c4a2b7-751a-49c3-a933-ca61eba88bbd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
\- Barrack Obama
3. **The Shortcomings of Bully Foreign Policy**

["I spent most of March in China prior to the tariff announcement and it was clear the Chinese aren't going to pay tribute to another emperor."](https://substack.com/redirect/a52fe103-f2d0-4365-aa21-766278b1478b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
-Rick Waters, former coordinator of the State Department's China House --the U.S. government's focal point for China policy -- and now director of Carnegie China, the China arm of a centrist think tank
| | POLL

And now the vote!

body:
#
**Something special is happening:**
Los Angeles, CA: 36,000+

Salt Lake City, UT: 20,000+

Nampa, ID: 12,500+

Bakersfield, CA: 4,450

Folsom, CA: 30,000+

Missoula, MT: 9,000+

Working people are coming together to fight for the future of our democracy and country.
We’re hoping to hold more town halls soon, but it takes major resources to hold events of this size across different states.
[ Will you make a $5 donation today to help us add more stops soon? body:

**[➣ I've even been called a "sorry excuse for an American" by Hollywood elitist and failed talk show host Jimmy Kimmel.](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/tMrfzYMiI_zSDCydouzrmA~~/AAVLBhA~/lsTG1GG-sFtk317coCE93pCtBD3IOzqCAnVf6zN1xfLBkHZg6TQIIDQmk_20hShqlBXbZmSAMWkebASfgkCaS9_fEk5Pahq0Xp11S4RxkoE8Y8OINTIYhXI5Bi_LAXB6YXhn1bD6T9zED669Mlh8kIZnkDtLzfUYTaaDYeVjaSD4jxs1g9IoeKQQXCAfJrvAreskzacHP5tzQy3JJafpLXYZ4X1KHyCj7jpxtzFKeAT9oBdaSxKEIV5EjPt-jRY2VSC6v0Wn3Kp_MpL1f40DdmvTWTvknT1usvxdgsFJXOuRz2OrXEMSk07NOySlfqKnEHnLOlZeaVvUa3__IYFMjvYIUD1b4v7rF1cobWS1eog5Vc48vfzragib4dk_9un0GenbnDbbsqPr04TspPqvuw~~)**

But none of that compares to the depths one progressive extremist just plunged to:

**[Representative Jasmine Crockett recently was quoted in an interview saying you should "punch" your opponents before going on to call for me to be "knocked over the head, like, hard."](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/tMrfzYMiI_zSDCydouzrmA~~/AAVLBhA~/lsTG1GG-sFtk317coCE93pCtBD3IOzqCAnVf6zN1xfLBkHZg6TQIIDQmk_20hShqlBXbZmSAMWkebASfgkCaS9_fEk5Pahq0Xp11S4RxkoE8Y8OINTIYhXI5Bi_LAXB6YXhn1bD6T9zED669Mlh8kIZnkDtLzfUYTaaDYeVjaSD4jxs1g9IoeKQQXCAfJrvAreskzacHP5tzQy3JJafpLXYZ4X1KHyCj7jpxtzFKeAT9oBdaSxKEIV5EjPt-jRY2VSC6v0Wn3Kp_MpL1f40DdmvTWTvknT1usvxdgsFJXOuRz2OrXEMSk07NOySlfqKnEHnLOlZeaVvUa3__IYFMjvYIUD1b4v7rF1cobWS1eog5Vc48vfzragib4dk_9un0GenbnDbbsqPr04TspPqvuw~~)**

**[SUPPORT TED](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/tMrfzYMiI_zSDCydouzrmA~~/AAVLBhA~/lsTG1GG-sFtk317coCE93pCtBD3IOzqCAnVf6zN1xfLBkHZg6TQIIDQmk_20hShqlBXbZmSAMWkebASfgkCaS9_fEk5Pahq0Xp11S4RxkoE8Y8OINTIYhXI5Bi_LAXB6YXhn1bD6T9zED669Mlh8kIZnkDtLzfUYTaaDYeVjaSD4jxs1g9IoeKQQXCAfJrvAreskzacHP5tzQy3JJafpLXYZ4X1KHyCj7jpxtzFKeAT9oBdaSxKEIV5EjPt-jRY2VSC6v0Wn3Kp_MpL1f40DdmvTWTvknT1usvxdgsFJXOuRz2OrXEMSk07NOySlfqKnEHnLOlZeaVvUa3__IYFMjvYIUD1b4v7rF1cobWS1eog5Vc48vfzragib4dk_9un0GenbnDbbsqPr04TspPqvuw~~)**

**It 's official:** the return of President Trump and the Republican Senate Majority has _BROKEN_ the Democrats. They realize they've lost the policy debate so now they've turned to violence as their last resort!

_**[I won't stand for more liberal threats to go unchallenged, and that's why I'm taking the fight back to them in the upcoming midterm elections.](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/tMrfzYMiI_zSDCydouzrmA~~/AAVLBhA~/lsTG1GG-sFtk317coCE93pCtBD3IOzqCAnVf6zN1xfLBkHZg6TQIIDQmk_20hShqlBXbZmSAMWkebASfgkCaS9_fEk5Pahq0Xp11S4RxkoE8Y8OINTIYhXI5Bi_LAXB6YXhn1bD6T9zED669Mlh8kIZnkDtLzfUYTaaDYeVjaSD4jxs1g9IoeKQQXCAfJrvAreskzacHP5tzQy3JJafpLXYZ4X1KHyCj7jpxtzFKeAT9oBdaSxKEIV5EjPt-jRY2VSC6v0Wn3Kp_MpL1f40DdmvTWTvknT1usvxdgsFJXOuRz2OrXEMSk07NOySlfqKnEHnLOlZeaVvUa3__IYFMjvYIUD1b4v7rF1cobWS1eog5Vc48vfzragib4dk_9un0GenbnDbbsqPr04TspPqvuw~~)**_

📣 Hands off our healthcare 📣
Fighting against cuts to Medicaid and SNAP
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/SickOfItTX%20healthcare%20event%20-%204142025.jpg]
FIRED UP: It was great to connect with community members Monday night in Dallas on the importance of fighting back against drastic proposed federal budget cuts to Medicaid and SNAP. Shout-out to allies Children's Defense Fund - Texas, Every Texan, Popular Democracy, and Friendship-West Baptist Church for helping make the event a success!
The House has yet to take up a final vote on the federal budget, so there's still time to call out these reckless cuts and spread the word about how they will harm Texans of all walks of life.
TAKE ACTION:
- Fill out this quick form to contact your member of Congress and send them an email demanding they oppose these drastic cuts.
- Go to TOP's Instagram post [https://click.everyaction.com/k/105071098/537300156/-1392960534?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNVE8vMS80NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGM4MDBjMi0zYzEwLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRiYXJyZXJhQG9yZ2FuaXpldGV4YXMub3JnIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7sKEHIU--bMHW-ac_J2Vh1bwkrk7nG5jypNbqweTdKE=&emci=979a30d7-2d10-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=64c800c2-3c10-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=13522] and tag your member of Congress ( find out who they are here [https://click.everyaction.com/k/105071100/537300158/-56469833?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNVE8vMS80NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGM4MDBjMi0zYzEwLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRiYXJyZXJhQG9yZ2FuaXpldGV4YXMub3JnIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7sKEHIU--bMHW-ac_J2Vh1bwkrk7nG5jypNbqweTdKE=&emci=979a30d7-2d10-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=64c800c2-3c10-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=13522] ) to demand they reject Medicaid cuts and protect Texans' access to healthcare. Comment: 'No Cuts to our Care! #SickofitTX'
Contact Tiffany at thogue@organizetexas.org [thogue@organizetexas.org] to learn more about TOP's work with the #SickOfItTX coalition.
Keep up the pressure!
Make calls to oppose bad, right-wing legislation in Texas
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Make%20calls%20image.png]
Let’s keep it up! – Bad right-wing bills attacking bail reform and our constitutional rights are making their way through the legislative process at the Texas Capitol, but with your help we can slow them down. We need to ramp up pressure against SJR1 and its House companion HJR16 -- awful legislative proposals that only restrict our rights and instill fear, while not making our communities any more safe. Make calls with us!
What you can do:
1. LIKE and SHARE TOP’s Facebook post [https://www.facebook.com/OrganizeTexas/posts/pfbid0BzEjthvjTecYKrTEy3HwiJogdJQgE1TP7onWAw2uE18rwAUJ34SGMNdytakdhNMZl] calling out SJR1 and HJR16.
2. Use the script in the Facebook post to call and urge your Texas state representative to OPPOSE both SJR1 and HJR16 ( find out who your state rep. is here [https://wrm.capitol.texas.gov/home] ).
Email Laquita at lgarcia@organizetexas.org [lgarcia@organizetexas.org] to find out how you can plug into our fight against these and other dangerous right-wing bills in our state legislature.
Get ready to vote:
Local elections coming up across Texas
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Black%20woman%20vote%20booth.jpeg]
DALLAS and SAN ANTONIO! It's voting time once again, this time for municipal elections . Early voting starts next week, Tuesday, April 22, and goes through Tuesday, April 29. Election Day is Saturday, May 3. Click here for more information about these elections and what will be on your ballot. [https://www.texastribune.org/2025/04/01/texas-local-voter-guide-2025-san-antonio-denton-el-paso-dallas/]
EVERY election matters and impacts our communities. The candidates and local propositions we vote for at the municipal level shape our everyday lives and those of our families. As voters and community members, WE have the power to elect leaders committed to progress and a future where every Texan can thrive — no matter their age, race, income level, or ZIP Code.
Make your voice heard at the polls, and remind your friends and family to do the same!
TOP Tip: Have family fun with the kids this Earth Day[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Earth%20Day%202025%20kids.png]
It's never too soon to instill in your kids an appreciation for our environment. This Earth Day – Tuesday, April 22 – mark the occasion by trying some at-home activities. Check out these quick family-friendly ideas. [https://parade.com/1014585/marynliles/earth-day-activities-adults-kids/]
Español
📣 No toquen nuestra atención médica 📣
Luchando contra los propuestos recortes federales a Medicaid y SNAP
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/SickOfItTX%20healthcare%20event%20-%204142025.jpg]
ENERGIZADOS: Fue un placer conectar con miembros de la comunidad el lunes por la noche en Dallas sobre la importancia de luchar contra los drásticos recortes propuestos al presupuesto federal de Medicaid y SNAP. ¡Un agradecimiento especial a nuestros aliados, Children's Defense Fund - Texas, Every Texan, Popular Democracy y Friendship-West Baptist Church, por contribuir al éxito del evento!
La Cámara aún no ha votado el presupuesto federal, así que aún hay tiempo para denunciar estos recortes imprudentes y difundir cómo perjudicarán a los tejanos de todos los ámbitos.
ACTÚA :
- Completa este breve formulario para contactar a tu congresista [https://everytexan.salsalabs.org/ProtectMedicaidandSNAPNow/index.html] y envíele un correo electrónico exigiéndole que se oponga a estos drásticos recortes.
- Visita la publicación de TOP en Instagram [https://www.instagram.com/p/DHo__H2REdR/?img_index=1] y etiqueta a tu congresista (descúbrelo aquí) para exigir que rechace los recortes a Medicaid y proteja el acceso de los tejanos a la atención médica. Comenta: "¡No a los recortes en nuestra atención médica! #SickofitTX"
Contacta con Tiffany en thogue@organizetexas.org [thogue@organizetexas.org] para obtener más información sobre el trabajo de TOP con la coalición #SickOfItTX.
Mantengan la presión:
Hagan llamados contra la mala legislación de derecha en Texas
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Make%20calls%20image.png]
¡Sigamos así! – Los proyectos de ley de derecha que atacan la reforma de la fianza y nuestros derechos constitucionales se están abriendo paso en el proceso legislativo del Capitolio de Texas, pero con tu ayuda podemos frenarlos. Necesitamos aumentar la presión contra la SJR1 y su equivalente en la Cámara de Representantes, la HJR16: propuestas legislativas terribles que solo restringen nuestros derechos e infunden miedo, sin mejorar la seguridad de nuestras comunidades. ¡Haz llamadas con nosotros!
Qué puedes hacer:
1. Dale "Me gusta" y COMPARTE la publicación de Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/OrganizeTexas/posts/pfbid0BzEjthvjTecYKrTEy3HwiJogdJQgE1TP7onWAw2uE18rwAUJ34SGMNdytakdhNMZl] de TOP que critica la SJR1 y la HJR16.
2. Usa el guion de la publicación de Facebook para llamar e instar a tu representante estatal de Texas a que se OPONGA tanto a la SJR1 como a la HJR16 ( descubre quién es tu representante estatal aquí [https://wrm.capitol.texas.gov/home] ).
Envía un correo electrónico a Laquita a lgarcia@organizetexas.org [lgarcia@organizetexas.org] para saber cómo puedes sumarte a nuestra lucha contra estos y otros proyectos de ley de derecha peligrosos en nuestra legislatura estatal.
Prepárate para votar:
Se acercan las elecciones locales en todo Texas
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Black%20woman%20vote%20booth.jpeg]
¡DALLAS y SAN ANTONIO! Es hora de votar una vez más, esta vez para las elecciones municipales. La votación anticipada comienza la próxima semana, martes 22 de abril, y se extenderá hasta el martes 29 de abril. El día de las elecciones es el sábado 3 de mayo. Haz clic aquí para obtener más información sobre estas elecciones y lo que aparecerá en tu boleta. [https://www.texastribune.org/2025/04/01/texas-local-voter-guide-2025-san-antonio-denton-el-paso-dallas/]
CADA elección importa e impacta a nuestras comunidades. Los candidatos y las propuestas locales por las que votamos a nivel municipal moldean nuestra vida diaria y la de nuestras familias. Como votantes y miembros de la comunidad, tenemos el poder de elegir líderes comprometidos con el progreso y un futuro donde cada tejano pueda prosperar, sin importar su edad, raza, nivel de ingresos o código postal.
¡Haz oír tu voz en las urnas y recuérdales a tus amigos y familiares que hagan lo mismo!
Consejos de TOP: Diviértete en familia con los niños este Día de la Tierra
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Earth%20Day%202025%20kids.png]
Nunca es demasiado pronto para inculcar en tus hijos el aprecio por el medio ambiente. Este Día de la Tierra, martes 22 de abril, celebra la ocasión con algunas actividades en casa. Descubre estas ideas rápidas para toda la familia. [https://parade.com/1014585/marynliles/earth-day-activities-adults-kids/]

San Antonio, TX 78207

name: Gary Sinise
subject: 20 years of the National Memorial Day Parade
body:
Now, I’m grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.

It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.
| | | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z2phokno9ajfcv5f9iano30r0ioqjp1qb7ie4gmg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ge2o34c9h2bs)
---
Friend, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 __and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.** This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. **[Friend, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z34pcplbbc7acbc1dbis4a2i4lcnr9at5vhmfej8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ge2o34c9h2bs)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zt9qm6r8arh091gsl1b6bbab8lpjtqivf6k55pr8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ge2o34c9h2bs)
---
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zse2q2g7kknmdic06ps501fpsggf477jejp5k1d0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ge2o34c9h2bs)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded _entirely_ by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zvjfh66f3h931aptfvqcif0u62plcud8b0kvtu28_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ge2o34c9h2bs)[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z2hf9sg7rd6k9uigpgfk0qklorqus165okds9sb0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ge2o34c9h2bs) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._** ** **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. ** So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us.
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zpglaaan8ebj7eou30aaj4i9m5vtj4njol90d8p0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ge2o34c9h2bs)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ _**[Friend, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2ztckt68ojoie80gc48m8kip7k987gheatmqqofj0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ge2o34c9h2bs)**_ Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade
---
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zirdcao77c5hnm3skflnre1a3k182mmbt74dtem8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ge2o34c9h2bs)
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zjeotkhf3nu0ptgp8lb4bopmmk7v6k7dtd1h8oso_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ge2o34c9h2bs)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

Pop Acta Media | Real American Reporting
---

I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. | | | Friend, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event. But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded entirely by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country. Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like: Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever. Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam. Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom. If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get. You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade. That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us. And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. ** Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201 Pop Acta Media | Real American Reporting PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: My situation is in your hands right now, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I wrote this email to give you an update

| | | | | | | [](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zu9nctebnlcopgfjf94tv95osfd73ub286r4v2co_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ge2o36cph2bs)
---
Our future rests in your hands, friend. I wrote this email to give you an update and to make a plea from the heart. _This is a humble from the heart, so _please_ read it all the way through._In 2021, my team and I put together a historic victory to help flip every one of Virginia's highest offices RED! Ever since taking office as Lieutenant Governor, I have been notching big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every one of my fellow Virginians.Now, I'm running for Governor so that we can keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history once again.**Unfortunately, I 'm facing a few _SERIOUS_ challenges right now:**
---
**While I was in the Virginia legislative session, I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign. **But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising _**BIG TIME**_ while I've been working hard in our capital. **Seriously,_a Soros-backed, far-Left group dumped $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a single thing I could do to respond!_**
---
Now Spanberger has a _**GIGANTIC**_ fundraising advantage, friend. Polls show that my race is tied, but Spanberger has a _serious_ cash advantage. Look, if we can't make up the difference, our conservative mission __**will**__ be cut short. **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a faithful Christian, a mother, and a Marine; __please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!__**
---
[ DONATE TO SUPPORT WINSOME >>](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z3emo11jvf0g70a95vc8d4u85qrl80oqdj3hgtj8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ge2o36cph2bs)
---
I am not exaggerating one bit when I tell you this: **without your support, we will fall even _further_ behind. **The Democrat elitists will log a win and the Commonwealth will regress down a path to _irreversible socialism!_ I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think the battle was worth it. And friend, I _**know**_ we will win if we hold strong and fight this together. **[I'm not asking you to write a big check; all I'm asking is that you send in a few dollars to support me and my team in this CRITICAL battle!](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zdql9b0r6l4gvr8vooraet3iu334rc1mh49j6kq8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ge2o36cph2bs)**

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Defeat DEI Survey
body:
DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmsf0hslpr4p8icqeg0d9sh7b1g5bftdcnrgou60_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ge2o32cjh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend of Liberty,

[I'm writing to ask you to participate in Hillsdale College's **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6dfserm482kv4qr4bue8fbdimueiufgvm85jc4o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ge2o32cjh2bs).

DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications. They have even spread into the hard sciences and the military.

These policies endanger lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself.

I'm sure, like a lot of Americans, you want to know what you can do to stop DEI. One of the most fundamental steps is ...

**Countering the far-Left ideologies that are being taught to students in K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.**

Please join Hillsdale College in our defense of Western Civilization by taking your **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** today. You can find it at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/defeat-dei-survey**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcse3qtj7bs8t5rdp52vc7edl1q2q7pe89sopie0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ge2o32cjh2bs)

With your help, we will continue our work to defeat the tyranny of low standards and to restore excellence in America.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zp2hsp8bq08etcclsssr84k96jcemt1u5eeef3e8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ge2p72chh2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zue2lnmsvhiha854gbfksnhtsmcs609k25blrm78_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ge2p72chh2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zenkn2vim6dmovondnj72dogpm0p7b1oq724nsio_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ge2p72chh2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztuom86v8s82pl4uu9qcdce2rvi25iggi64e5hb8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ge2p72chh2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zf0mdrktfbar1fll65nk92s8njtgrl3jj2po920g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ge2p72chh2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0a5tieh5fafgfe1bojqj6jhto77ouhn8vhkkk78_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ge2p72chh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zi60j1leqj2tat7in0i1ksgtsh97o55e3ec6rod0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ge2p72chh2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zo66qnk91rbpe52t0pf8ueqdn1aji9c2lqfb3cuo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ge2p72chh2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfopmed9o1u7u6n24dpuqdd3l5eelkvvst8h6ugg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ge2p72chh2bs)
---

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: My situation is in your hands right now, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I wrote this email to give you an update

| | | | | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvi2bvdlqeeri0cb5ncu0qtgl16kaoeeblcf7osg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ge2p72chh2bs)
---
Our future rests in your hands, friend. I wrote this email to give you an update and to make a plea from the heart. _This is a humble from the heart, so _please_ read it all the way through._In 2021, my team and I put together a historic victory to help flip every one of Virginia's highest offices RED! Ever since taking office as Lieutenant Governor, I have been notching big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every one of my fellow Virginians.Now, I'm running for Governor so that we can keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history once again.**Unfortunately, I 'm facing a few _SERIOUS_ challenges right now:**
---
**While I was in the Virginia legislative session, I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign. **But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising _**BIG TIME**_ while I've been working hard in our capital. **Seriously,_a Soros-backed, far-Left group dumped $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a single thing I could do to respond!_**
---
Now Spanberger has a _**GIGANTIC**_ fundraising advantage, friend. Polls show that my race is tied, but Spanberger has a _serious_ cash advantage. Look, if we can't make up the difference, our conservative mission __**will**__ be cut short. **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a faithful Christian, a mother, and a Marine; __please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!__**
---
[ DONATE TO SUPPORT WINSOME >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z72u1mbsfkfi63qctmkt6avvock4sgcsm6a3u6l0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ge2p72chh2bs)
---
I am not exaggerating one bit when I tell you this: **without your support, we will fall even _further_ behind. **The Democrat elitists will log a win and the Commonwealth will regress down a path to _irreversible socialism!_ I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think the battle was worth it. And friend, I _**know**_ we will win if we hold strong and fight this together. **[I'm not asking you to write a big check; all I'm asking is that you send in a few dollars to support me and my team in this CRITICAL battle!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlgtbs9hb9ckg80dbjg3eq7a6fa9otfimo9u3ad8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ge2p72chh2bs)**

---

---

---
[ DONATE $47 >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zem9vv8q9anjs5qtdpb1k4dc9npkna7cf7rdi1pg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ge2p72chh2bs)

[ DONATE $33 >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi6ui0ehuen5igt6sonhmv1c0b733nqb3sl8ajf8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ge2p72chh2bs)

[ DONATE ANY AMOUNT YOU CAN SPARE >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8va6i729js1qocba7dpvsjlj3bane188ckevqb8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ge2p72chh2bs)

name: D.O.G.E. Alerts
subject: Elon EXPOSED the Democrats. Read more:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
This is alarming.

| | | Peter,

Elon Musk just blew the lid off the Democrat's dirty secret: **they're exploiting Social Security, disability, and Medicaid to buy voters and rig our democracy.**

"It's a giant voter fraud scam," Elon said. They're importing voters to swing states to turn them blue, and if they succeed, they'll control the House, Senate, and presidency.

But Elon didn't back down. He stood up for what was right and supported President Trump because he knew the stakes.

**Now, they're hell-bent on destroying Elon for his bravery.** That's why we need your help to defend him and his groundbreaking work with DOGE, which is shedding light on the federal government's wasteful spending.
