name: Team WisGOP
subject: RESPONSE REQUESTED: WisGOP Launches Post-Election Commission
body:
No images? [Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-e-ckjitdk-didthutlhu-iy/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ckjitdk-didthutlhu-r/) **WisGOP Launches 2025 Post-Election Commission** The Republican Party of Wisconsin is launching the **2025 Post-Election Commission** to analyze the 2025 Supreme Court race and identify areas for improvement as we prepare for 2026. Wisconsin State Treasurer John Leiber will chair the commission.This review will examine each facet of the campaign, party, and third-party group strategies--including messaging, field, minority outreach, election integrity, data, spending, and advertising. Based on this analysis, the Commission will develop a set of recommendations to guide strategy for future Supreme Court races and beyond. These strategies will be shared with future campaigns and groups.**" Conservatives must learn from past elections and make adjustments to be successful in future Spring Elections. While Conservatives came up short in the most recent race, we're not backing down,"** said Chairman Brian Schimming. **" That's why I'm launching the 2025 Post-Election Commission and appointing State Treasurer John Leiber to lead the commission as its Chairman. John will head a team tasked with evaluating our efforts and identifying a path moving forward."****" I'm honored to serve as Chairman of this Commission,"** said John Leiber. **" We'll leave no stone unturned as we analyze this election. Our mission is clear: identify what worked, what didn't work, and provide recommendations for the state party and future candidates."**Now, **the commission needs your help.** Your insight is critical to this process. We're asking Republicans across the state to share feedback with the Commission by completing the [survey](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ckjitdk-didthutlhu-y/) below by April 30th. All responses will remain confidential. Your voice will help shape the strategies we develop to secure future victories.**Be part of building the path to victory --starting now.** [Take the Post-Election Survey](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ckjitdk-didthutlhu-j/) **Upcoming Events** 4/17: [St. Croix County Volunteer Activation Meeting](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ckjitdk-didthutlhu-t/)

5/27: [St. Croix County Membership Meeting](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ckjitdk-didthutlhu-tr/) **May 16th-17th: WISGOP State Convention** **EARLY BIRD TICKET SALES END FRIDAY, APRIL 18th** [REGISTER HERE](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ckjitdk-didthutlhu-ty/) **In Case You Missed It** Earlier this week, the Republican Party of Wisconsin passed two new bylaws. These changes, driven by volunteers and local leaders, aim to enhance accountability and governance within our party structure. We have established these bylaws at the request of party activists and leaders.There have been some misconceptions about these bylaws that our team would like to clarify:
* **Fact:** Many county parties in Wisconsin have similar codes of conduct, including the Milwaukee County GOP and Brown County GOP.
* **Fact:** State parties across the nation have similar codes of conduct, including Iowa, North Carolina, Florida, Georgia, and Kentucky.
* **Fact:** Leadership can still bring constructive criticism to the party. The only change these bylaws make is to require that these criticisms be shared respectfully. This allows for strategies and improvements to be discussed, debated, and implemented in a well-thought-out manner, not through personal attacks and inappropriate remarks.
* **Fact:** RPW is a private organization. Most organizations have employee manuals or codes of conduct that prohibit employees from disparaging their organization or doing something that would reflect negatively on the organization. These codes of conduct _are_ constitutional.
* **Fact:** RPW wants to ensure that all of its members in leadership positions are setting a good example. This is common among many organizational boards.
* **Fact:** Those in leadership positions need to be held to a higher standard for the benefit of all Republicans. This higher standard comes with the position, as party leaders have more eyes on them from Democrats and news organizations.
* **Fact:** These issues do not violate First Amendment rights of citizens. It sets clear expectations for those in _leadership positions_. Members not in leadership can continue to advocate for anything they like publicly.
* **Fact:** Defamation is clearly defined in law as someone stating something knowingly untrue about another person with malicious intent. Fair criticism delivered in a respectful manner would not fall under defamation.
* **Fact:** There is no silencing of the grassroots in these bylaws. Anyone is allowed to criticize the State Party, but if you want to serve in a leadership position, you cannot be _publicly_ disparaging the party.

You can find the bylaw language below or [on our website](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ckjitdk-didthutlhu-tj/).
# **Worth the Read**
[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ckjitdk-didthutlhu-tt/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ckjitdk-didthutlhu-ti/)
# **Top Shareable Content**
[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ckjitdk-didthutlhu-td/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ckjitdk-didthutlhu-th/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ckjitdk-didthutlhu-tk/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ckjitdk-didthutlhu-tu/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ckjitdk-didthutlhu-il/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ckjitdk-didthutlhu-ir/) | [ Share ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-fb-ckjitdk-didthutlhu-ij/) | [ Tweet ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-tw-ckjitdk-didthutlhu-it/) | [ Forward ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.forwardtomyfriend.com/y-didthutlhu-931243C5-ckjitdk-l-ii)
---|---|---

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: My situation is in your hands right now, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I wrote this email to give you an update

| | | | | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl4g9m6nla1ascg5memdf9mnqr79ocmcqlp25jsg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3geeor4cth2bs)
---
Our future rests in your hands, friend. I wrote this email to give you an update and to make a plea from the heart. _This is a humble from the heart, so _please_ read it all the way through._In 2021, my team and I put together a historic victory to help flip every one of Virginia's highest offices RED! Ever since taking office as Lieutenant Governor, I have been notching big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every one of my fellow Virginians.Now, I'm running for Governor so that we can keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history once again.**Unfortunately, I 'm facing a few _SERIOUS_ challenges right now:**
---
**While I was in the Virginia legislative session, I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign. **But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising _**BIG TIME**_ while I've been working hard in our capital. **Seriously,_a Soros-backed, far-Left group dumped $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a single thing I could do to respond!_**
---
Now Spanberger has a _**GIGANTIC**_ fundraising advantage, friend. Polls show that my race is tied, but Spanberger has a _serious_ cash advantage. Look, if we can't make up the difference, our conservative mission __**will**__ be cut short. **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a faithful Christian, a mother, and a Marine; __please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!__**
---
[ DONATE TO SUPPORT WINSOME >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr186sbsco02pb5tvja450oqirctm3661bvh15n8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3geeor4cth2bs)
---
I am not exaggerating one bit when I tell you this: **without your support, we will fall even _further_ behind. **The Democrat elitists will log a win and the Commonwealth will regress down a path to _irreversible socialism!_ I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think the battle was worth it. And friend, I _**know**_ we will win if we hold strong and fight this together. **[I'm not asking you to write a big check; all I'm asking is that you send in a few dollars to support me and my team in this CRITICAL battle!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoqob39018m58qcnarqkuhd7hafcpag8tm78ncsg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3geeor4cth2bs)**

I am not exaggerating one bit when I tell you this: without your support, we will fall even further behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and the Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism! I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think the battle was worth it. And friend, I know we will win if we hold strong and fight this together. If you cannot afford to keep fighting for the future of our Commonwealth, our children, and our nation, all I ask is you please keep me and my team in your prayers!I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving!Ever Forward,Lt. Governor Winsome Earle-Sears Immigrant Marine First black female Lt. Governor of VA If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, . PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | Immigrant. Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor. I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1kkmf0qopr62pe256j7l8ifqdhjfhgojota5le0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3geeor4cth2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcl74g30q7l60dmjeavo7vioc9ea92nhgon8cv20_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3geeor4cth2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3fi1eq88k20ak87st5rd0hn79qdnj4cg48ta190_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3geeor4cth2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zip4vkas3jokd4dfd4kagv534gchdo5ifhgsjj4g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3geeor4cth2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmv205ovkg7sdr4jim8fsvjknasksi44m368dhn0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3geeor4cth2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zq09s0pqgu9etu4ev0n3ol5r7tqlp7n0f2vnk2o8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3geeor4cth2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zna6jee158vgr8rg60i7ickts6agcf0nl7geeg18_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3geeor4cth2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z37v7j72glsjjhlpei7lanrmun32ls8lmded39f0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3geeor4cth2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---

name: Cory Mills
subject: The Left just declared war on me.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY MILLS FOR CONGRESS
body:
It’s Cory Mills. Please read everything.

| | | | **__From the Desk of Congressman Cory Mills__**
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9s5eeg363ebjbdhobq0vlcd3jkv0qc06qupnca0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ge1pb1chh2bs)

Friend,
This is Congressman Cory Mills - former veteran & Bronze Star Recipient, MAGA Patriot, and one of President Trump’s strongest supporters in the House of Representatives.
_I’m not going to sugarcoat this:_ **the radical Left has officially declared war on me.**
A far-left Super PAC just added me to their “target list” — because I refuse to bow to their anti-American agenda and because I’ve never stopped fighting for President Trump, our constitutional rights, and the America First movement.
I wear their threats like a badge of honor. But here’s the cold, hard truth — if we don’t fight back NOW, they _will_ flip the House.
Our Republican Majority is hanging by a thread. If they take me out, they take the MAGA Movement down with it — the socialist squad _will_ be back in full control.
That’s not a future I’m willing to accept.
[But I can’t do this alone. My campaign is up against a flood of Democrat dark money.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zba2gter511cg4k2hn0ubt2hg7miaq8c09dgekg0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ge1pb1chh2bs)

[>> CHIP IN TO DEFEND THE HOUSE](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zo343sbn2m9qr5sbbfsl1fkelurs3gk2jjff0e1g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ge1pb1chh2bs)

If you believe in President Trump... if you believe in defending our country, our freedoms, and our values — I’m asking you to take a stand with me right now.
[Rush an emergency contribution today and help me stop the Left from crushing our movement >> ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zhpqqnrn1nuu889u5ampr36mt6kulhbevsiepct0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ge1pb1chh2bs)

name: Gary Sinise
subject: Celebrating the 20th Anniversary of the National Memorial Day Parade
body:
Now, I’m grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.

It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0fs05tm6eeom3n69muegmof54s3g63ofeemq730_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ie8oj2cth2bs)
---
Friend, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 __and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.** This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. **[Friend, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8mj3n8022lr9ikrc116nsjkoeeqqm1qndsdd69o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ie8oj2cth2bs)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z16jmi55nuekdme8kpn56gf3d1nvg4n9h62e9llo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ie8oj2cth2bs)
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2hlu8rprpedsjbp3muj9l3sahs2gk9e13b1oe2g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ie8oj2cth2bs)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded _entirely_ by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zicv6dvd0m97vq2ub9uaeqg6t885nl7q22njlgbg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ie8oj2cth2bs)[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znk3eqjuftfqi4vg1mm4pm5otaivnobirnntifhg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ie8oj2cth2bs) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._** ** **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. ** So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us.
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdk0ouj4rd41se0avicdkfpag2v03foq8dvd71kg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ie8oj2cth2bs)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ _**[Friend, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfq5bh18rlr97o6qj7277han6qjojeuu4i4r2lao_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ie8oj2cth2bs)**_ Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade
---

---

name: 4Patriots
subject: Oh no! We're embarrassed...
body:
This is not ordinary food.

**Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN!** With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you [**stock up today with this exclusive deal**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0p6h4hqm6q7hnn989dkb9th2kn754rlgu41h9f8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ie8oj2cth2bs), you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2dolf800arcgr82nhq1v15d52744ogfnbgu8elg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ie8oj2cth2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi774gllnlr4fqt7tobthuvq06vmjb9ap5u05a90_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ie8oj2cth2bs) **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food.** This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmoeqefv7ol1rhk7lt32j5274schh617nhq0uh6g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ie8oj2cth2bs) **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeebp3tt2rtt2p6npps3nfqdpnk461og7mc9bue0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c3ie8oj2cth2bs)

name: Concealed Carry
subject: Your CCW Permit is approved! download here ✅
body:
Plus you can complete the entire certification process online...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21160/6374453/ed027fe24843d2d5a998eb189dd2d878db7154a2/0ec469a8d5ff857e36406a4be883f73d28176012)
---
| | |
---
_April 17th, 2025_
---
| | |
---
| | It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good.

Due to increased pressure from lawmakers, a website offering you a certificate for America’s Top CCW Gun Permit **could be shut down at any moment.**

Which is why it’s important you download your **Concealed Carry Certificate ASAP**.

Wait even one more day and we won’t be able to guarantee this certificate will be available to download.

This certificate is great for gun owners because it takes advantage of a little-known (but 100% legal) loophole - **[allowing you to get a CCW certification from this website](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21160/6374453/fc8816edd8b600085c71a5bc629e7f70df2b8615/0ec469a8d5ff857e36406a4be883f73d28176012). You don’t even have to leave your house to do it!**

This loophole ensures you encounter: Zero government red tape (and no exposing your private info to the Feds)... Zero lines, classroom time or books to read... Zero gun range time (you don’t even need to fire a gun to get this permit). **[It’s as simple as visiting this site and answering a few questions (they’re simple)](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21160/6374453/fc8816edd8b600085c71a5bc629e7f70df2b8615/0ec469a8d5ff857e36406a4be883f73d28176012).**

Plus you can complete the entire certification process online.

Download it directly to your phone or computer in as little as 30 minutes.

**You don’t even need to own a gun to get this permit...** that’s why it’s named America’s #1 Concealed Carry Permit.

31 states have agreed to accept this permit so far. That’s because it’s simply the closest and easiest path to a semi-nationally recognized permit that’s available right now.

This permit isn’t just a basic concealed carry permit either. **It’s one of a kind... and is available to you No Matter what state you reside in.**

**Hurry and get it now.**

**[There are no guarantees this website](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21160/6374453/fc8816edd8b600085c71a5bc629e7f70df2b8615/0ec469a8d5ff857e36406a4be883f73d28176012)** will be able to legally deliver this certificate to your email address after today!
---
|
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21160/6374453/ed027fe24843d2d5a998eb189dd2d878db7154a2/0ec469a8d5ff857e36406a4be883f73d28176012)

name: No Dem Left Behind
subject: Across the Country: April 17th, 2025
body:
Trump is waging war on free speech, and it’s only getting worse.
| | | | | |
---
**_Across the Country_**
---
Hello, friend! Welcome back to Across the Country with Zoltan Nemeth. Every Thursday, we break down how political decisions are reshaping the lives of working Americans. This week, we’re turning our attention to **Trump’s full-scale attack on free speech.** From banning reporters to threatening news outlets with billion-dollar lawsuits, Trump isn’t just targeting the press, **he’s using the power of the presidency to silence anyone who disagrees with his MAGA agenda.** **Let's dive in.**
---
| | | | **Trump's War on Free Speech**
---
|
---
Trump claims to be a “free speech” warrior. But let’s be honest, his actions prove he’s only interested in protecting speech that praises him and silencing anyone who dares to disagree. Just weeks after kicking the Associated Press out of the White House press room, Trump has _escalated_ his war on the free press. He’s now threatening to strip CBS News of its FCC license and fine the network, all because **“60 Minutes” aired coverage critical of him.** Trump is suing CBS, Paramount, and “60 Minutes” for **$20 billion** , alleging they edited an interview with Kamala Harris to hurt his chances in the 2024 election. And now he wants the government to punish them. That’s not free speech. That’s an authoritarian crackdown. These actions**silence government scientists, journalists, teachers, LGBTQ+ Americans, and anyone who won’t bend to his agenda**. Under his leadership: 1.) Health experts were told to _stop_ talking about bird flu during a national emergency. 2.) Federal employees were banned from discussing gender identity or environmental justice. 3.) LGBTQ+ Americans are being _erased_ from government websites and official documents. 4.) Journalists are labeled “enemies of the people,” and lawsuits are piling up against any outlet that doesn’t flatter Trump. Let’s call this what it is: **a full-blown assault on the First Amendment.** We can’t let Trump rewrite the rules of our democracy.
---
|
---
In solidarity, Zoltan Nemeth
---

body:

# Thursday, April 17, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1964, [the Ford Mustang](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyU0DtuhDAUheHVmM7ILx5TuEhDN2lTogu2hxsZjOw7Y7H7aKJsIPUnnSP9X_f5DhjxeHzC7i2FNK_pIL-fRFv2QBXiDpnWVJdZCdVxYbgcZgcYr9k0zgbvldeNt3IwZhyN1l2zWemUc0tvVgXruAS4LWPog9CwKOgHJxu07zVh5CCF6LRux071RvdhgUGGcAvMCO-QUm6_Ex60-RCv9PK5XdPeRLsRnYXpD6YmpqZaa7thoZSvtzM10YaFO7g4HvxPmJrgzBi5HJiaQsqO789CcDy488uTCgfiNeXoCg-AucnWnRVjxNIPzIjHDhh_7-n_oV5W_QQAAP__YTx5-A) was introduced at the World’s Fair in Flushing Meadows, New York, and was simultaneously launched in Ford showrooms across America, where nearly 22,000 Mustangs were quickly sold. **Big Announcement:**_The Flyover Podcast_ is launching on April 28, and we need your help! Before we make episodes available to the public, we're inviting our readers to join our focus group. Starting this Monday, April 21, you’ll get an exclusive first look (and listen) at episodes on YouTube. You'll have the chance to help shape the podcast by giving feedback to our hosts, Ayla and Amy, regarding content, format, delivery, and new ideas. Your voice is essential in helping shape the future of _The Flyover Podcast_. To help, [click here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyUzztuwzAQBNDTSJ0EflYiXbBI486pArgUVuTSZECZhrw24dsHTk6QdgbzgDmflhPmkq-XT9zIcayLr1em7cacdkJuWDbc2de2LkqoaRAwSLMEzOW1QB9cJFKke3LSAFgLWk99cjqoKLwlKclEGaI1XlkAgXLGg1mxz-6tCZBGCjFpPdpJzaDnuKKRMR5iB4JC5rqP3zVfOVEsr_qkffR164tLzLd7pz86dezUsbU2vuqDHyu9-3cI4ozs0_CVaDj-TfvdhVvLpeT7bDoQlw1z-fX4_8-fTv0EAAD__5QeZ60) and then click the subscribe button on _The Flyover_ YouTube page (bottom left-hand corner). We'll email you a private episode link starting this coming Monday. Thanks for your help! Plan your next vacation this summer with today’s sponsor, [FinanceBuzz,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyUkbuO3DoMhp9G7jSwLr5M4eIAA3e77SkNWqJsBbpBpnew8_SBs1kkbVp-xPf_IP9_W97AB5-2d4g4kcuLyYkwFqK9ItATQoRKJj_XRbay463mYlgs-PC56MZODlGianASg9bjqJXqmn0yesCuE-OoHQyiGzWsHXQg7qvt76LVjZ8uW6vFINq2U-o2drLXqncrDMK5u2O6Resp19uP7BPt6MJn_sB6Mzk2YdqJysHUf0zOTM7OJ0gG1_P1ujiTc4Bkfdq4qZeFG6iWmx0O5AeUsvuKvFR0WCtaHigzNZ8UlyOf1SBTjz-B3K0vJvuLRrT-jEw9CnjLEz6PgERYeT1-bxDWi9f8PTAQC_gtMfWYv3xM9mC3ms_iLVOPdyCfEwT-HfdX4-OrcqDM9U0MTZ1sefoQ_NEPTLdbBB9-3YP-_XMfk_wZAAD___OOrgk) offering exclusive deals on top travel credit cards.
|
---
## Judge: Trump Officials Face Contempt Charges
U.S. District Judge James Boasberg found probable cause to [hold the Trump administration in contempt of court](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyU0L1ugzAUBeCngc3Iv4EMHrqwpWtHdI2vwZHByL4JzdtXqdQH6Hykc46-r9t0g5jivnzChpZCnua8E24H0VoQ6IS0QaE5n26SXBrGNRP95CGm16RbbwOiRNWiFb3Ww6CVMu1qhRTGKDEog1w4bWbwvTNOATjTXzm00b7buBa94Nwo1Q1GXrS6BAe9COEaGs3RR8qlu-e404ohvfITSzfnrU12JTpqoz4aOTZyPM-zC_l7x7O-80aOR06R4lwbOQb0WCCx-8MvyO6wYWUuQ3VYFhbi7is7SnbgErIZHhXZmpNnVB7bwf402HubeTxyIaCYdxZSXFaqbbH-OGNKsV76RvNlg5h-T9L_OZ9W_gQAAP__Qi-ItA) after it failed to comply with a March 15 order halting deportation flights to El Salvador under the Alien Enemies Act. The case focuses on planes carrying over 260 migrants, many of them Venezuelan nationals, to El Salvador, despite the court ordering their return after they had already left the U.S. Boasberg criticized the administration’s [“willful disregard” of the court’s order](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyUkLGuozAQRb_GdEZmbAwpXGxDl223RIYZB0cGIzOJlb9f5f3B66_uOTr_7vPdxxSPx1-_k-OQ5zUfTPvJvBXyXH3afeE112UGBb1URnbDjD6mz2wadIEISDfkusGYcTRa983mCHuFBoYRcF0AVzRh0dauC1pAjWMT3fdNmW7olOq1bscerNE2LH7oQrgFYRRh5FzaZ44HbxTSJ7-ptGvem-Q25vMS-o-AScBUa23PnCLHNX8HAqaD6iVg-lIETMoImDorYOLy2k-JdObCnmM-JCV5-fT2mIsMhFR8ks8XPkgqBTetBtsUh2eNKcXLDsKox-5j-hHh3yd7O_gfAAD__3Uieg8) and instructed officials to submit explanations by April 23 or face potential prosecution. The White House responded that it plans to appeal, defending its actions as necessary for national security.
## UK Court: Trans Women Are Not Legally Women
The U.K. Supreme Court ruled unanimously that the legal definition of "woman" under that country's Equality Act [is based on biological sex, excluding transgender women](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyUzztu6zAQheHVUJ0FPoamXLC4jTrfNqXAx9BiQokKPTBhrz5wdpDuAAf4gP_julxdLnm__XcbWkp1CXUn3A6itaGj7srmGoXa_SK51CcOJ2GW6HJ5LjBEmxAlqgGtMADTBErpYbUQPWAUHvRFa-3AaOF5EqCU0WZCGLJ9axyEEZxrpcZJyzOoc_LOiJQuiQHHmKm28bPmnVZM5Vkf2MZQt6HYlei4M_WPyZnJufc-eh_eH5Pzjv3O5Owa5VDwPcPjZo7v1xeYVx2ajUfPpeT72TDgt83l8qvS3_sfVv4EAAD__2hbaQo). The case stemmed from a dispute over Scottish legislation that included transgender women in gender quotas for public boards. The ruling clarifies that single-sex spaces, such as shelters and changing rooms, can legally exclude transgender individuals, though U.K. anti-discrimination protections remain in place. Supporters, including author [J.K. Rowling](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyUkL2OqzAUhJ_GdI78i7mFi9u4y7ZbIgPHwYmxkTkE8fYrsk-w7czo08x83_u7jynmx5dfwGIo_VgywrIizhU8Hj4tvuJYjqEXTGjKFOWmn3xMZ6-ayQYAAbIBy41SXaek1M1svVIguDZ6MGIKo1faaBM4Z51mbTvIJtqLxhQ3nDEt5a3TolWyDYM3PIR_gSgGU8RSb88SM84Q0lneUG9jWZpkZ8R1I_I_EY4Il8-1bHhZRLgLTIRjigjHWyLcUWqaaIZjI8I9X7SW41pMR0gwVI-w0f1Ft32tsAAdy16R1v0TwdkjxerzRo-yQKa-As0FaYKHT-n8VYlwTbXTesSU4tYaothj8TF9uuLfX31b8RMAAP__ToSHPw), hailed it as a victory for clarity and women’s rights; trans advocates and groups including Amnesty International condemned the judgment as a setback for equality.
## List: Best States for Older Workers
A [2025 analysis ranked the best states for older workers](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyU0L1u5CAUxfGnwR0WXPBXQbGNu9l2SwvDZcwGmxHcDJq3jyZSHiD9X0c_nX-37WZjitf9rz3RUMibyxfh-SA6ClpqNp22kMtt30DAwIXmctq8jem16c6bgAioOjRy0nqetVJDd5jgrPbBLssspx28XHBx0oV51BCCAuiiea8JLScpxKBUPw8wajWG3U4yhCUwLdBHyqX_n-NFB4b0yk8svctnl8xB9KhM_WGwMlhba33FK-aSXu-AwVqw5s_ikDu8CAuD9SfgF7bKYN2xEq9kCSsPufCcPBbecvnAUvmb1xXjHy2mFOs4MS3up43pG0C_v-pp4CsAAP__JNd6eQ), as a record 11.2 million Americans age 65 and up remain in the workforce—a number projected to hit nearly 15 million by 2033. Washington tops the list, followed by New Hampshire, Alaska, Maryland, and Colorado, thanks to factors that can include no income tax, strong remote work culture, or high senior household income. At the bottom are Mississippi, Arkansas, Alabama, West Virginia, Kentucky, and Louisiana, with high rates of age discrimination, low labor force participation, and weak business environments. According to the study, older adults thrive in flexible, experience-based roles—especially in education, healthcare, and real estate. See [state-by-state ranking here.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyU0L1u5CAUxfGnwR0WXPBXQbGNu9l2SwvDZcwGmxHcDJq3jyZSHiD9X0c_nX-37WZjitf9rz3RUMibyxfh-SA6ClpqNp22kMtt30DAwIXmctq8jem16c6bgAioOjRy0nqetVJDd5jgrPbBLssspx28XHBx0oV51BCCAuiiea8JLScpxKBUPw8wajWG3U4yhCUwLdBHyqX_n-NFB4b0yk8svctnl8xB9KhM_WGwMlhba33FK-aSXu-AwVqw5s_ikDu8CAuD9SfgF7bKYN2xEq9kCSsPufCcPBbecvnAUvmb1xXjHy2mFOs4MS3up43pG0C_v-pp4CsAAP__JNd6eQ)

UK Court: Trans Women Are Not Legally Women The U.K. Supreme Court ruled unanimously that the legal definition of "woman" under that country's Equality Act . The case stemmed from a dispute over Scottish legislation that included transgender women in gender quotas for public boards. The ruling clarifies that single-sex spaces, such as shelters and changing rooms, can legally exclude transgender individuals, though U.K. anti-discrimination protections remain in place. Supporters, including author , hailed it as a victory for clarity and women’s rights; trans advocates and groups including Amnesty International condemned the judgment as a setback for equality. name: History Facts
subject: The longest period of rain Earth has ever seen
body:
If you think Seattle in November is rainy, try living through the Carnian Pluvial Episode.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68eq54zmpw5kmx4er39x2r12q1n7aqeyw53yt6lwfnas7v0pkcni83i0xpx77iz8b1nvr0ar0p6o3dahg6ow4bidcjtjuz8mz8jc3wmhjgxfnln1bxszrcp4mt5fw000krkzqeaax4yxxkxbk&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suuy32&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [It rained heavily on Earth for a million years.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suuy32&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Science & Industry](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suuy32&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suuy32&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| I f you think Seattle in November is rainy, try living through the [Carnian Pluvial Episode](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suuy32&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). Taking place some 232 million years ago, during the Triassic Period, it was a time of intense rainfall that lasted between 1 million and 2 million years. The prolonged, world-altering event was first discovered by geologists in the 1970s and ’80s. While studying ancient carbonate rocks in such far-flung locations as the Eastern Alps and the United Kingdom, they came across evidence of a deposit known as [siliciclastic sedimentation](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suuy32&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) that suggested unusually wet conditions. When it rains, it pours.
---
This period was preceded by an era of arid weather and coincided with the rise of the dinosaurs; the lush conditions that resulted helped the dinos thrive for another 150 million years or so. The Carnian Pluvial Episode wasn’t without its downsides, however. It appears to have been triggered by a series of massive volcanic eruptions that led to acid rain and an influx in greenhouse gases, which eventually brought about rapid climate change and mass extinctions.

## The rainiest place in the world is in India.
With an average of 39.4 inches of precipitation each year, Seattle isn’t actually that rainy in the grand scheme of things, despite its reputation. It doesn’t even crack the [top 10](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suuy32&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) nationwide, because although it’s frequently damp, the city doesn’t see the heavy rains found in more humid areas or places where hurricanes are common. On a global scale, it’s even drier. Consider the wettest place on Earth for comparison: Mawsynram, India, which receives an incredible [467 inches](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suuy32&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) of rainfall per year. Much of this comes during the monsoon season between July and September, which contributes to how lush and verdant the area is. Nearly as rainy is nearby Cherrapunji, also in the state of Meghalaya, as well as Tutunendo, Colombia.

clean_body: If you think Seattle in November is rainy, try living through the Carnian Pluvial Episode. | I f you think Seattle in November is rainy, try living through the . Taking place some 232 million years ago, during the Triassic Period, it was a time of intense rainfall that lasted between 1 million and 2 million years. The prolonged, world-altering event was first discovered by geologists in the 1970s and ’80s. While studying ancient carbonate rocks in such far-flung locations as the Eastern Alps and the United Kingdom, they came across evidence of a deposit known as that suggested unusually wet conditions. When it rains, it pours. This period was preceded by an era of arid weather and coincided with the rise of the dinosaurs; the lush conditions that resulted helped the dinos thrive for another 150 million years or so. The Carnian Pluvial Episode wasn’t without its downsides, however. It appears to have been triggered by a series of massive volcanic eruptions that led to acid rain and an influx in greenhouse gases, which eventually brought about rapid climate change and mass extinctions. | By clicking a link in this email, you're agreeing to our and . With an average of 39.4 inches of precipitation each year, Seattle isn’t actually that rainy in the grand scheme of things, despite its reputation. name: Team Evergreen
subject: Let's mobilize and go All Out On Earth Day
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
Make good trouble and find an event near you
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3498729/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Hi there,

In the wake of everything happening right now, something powerful has been unleashed.

Across the country, millions have poured into rallies, protests, trainings, and mass calls asking the same urgent question: _What’s next for the climate and environmental movement?_

**The answer is clear—we fight.** ✊

Trump and his GOP-controlled Congress are preparing their biggest attack yet—a massive bill jammed through “reconciliation” that would gut life-saving climate programs, shred social safety nets, and flood billionaires and corporate polluters with tax breaks and handouts.

It’s a brazen power grab by the worst people in the country—and they’re coming for everything.

This isn’t politics as usual. This is an assault on our climate, our communities, and our democracy. And on our right to lead free and healthy lives.

If you’re as outraged as we are, do something about this Earth Month by attending **“All Out on Earth Day,”** a national mobilization organized by our friends at the Green New Deal Network, starting April 19. Events are happening all month, so make sure to [**find one near you and sign up!**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3498730/87SdQ4wZ) |
| [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3498731/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
[GO ALL OUT ON EARTH DAY](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3498732/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| With Trump and his billionaire allies coming after our clean energy future, our workers, and our wages, **now is the time to rise.** To take the fight to the streets. To show the world that we will not back down. |
---
| **All Out on Earth Day Demands:**
1. Defend workers. Defend democracy.
2. Lower costs for communities—stop handouts for corporations.
3. Make polluters pay. End the welfare for billionaires.

|
---
| We’re not waiting. We’re organizing. We’re mobilizing. We’re taking back our future—before they burn it down. [**I hope you’ll join our mass mobilization by finding an event near you.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3498733/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
| Thanks for fighting alongside us.

— The team at Evergreen Action |

# Thursday, April 17, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1871, the legislature authorized the establishment of the [Texas Agricultural and Mechanical College](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyc0DGOgzAQQNHTmA5kDw4DhYtt6LLtlsjgIYxi7Mj2hnD7VXKEvcB_0v-5TlfLnsPt2-5kymuN00y5PGy65zWmg73zvNLiY6YJJFxqqWuFk7Psz0lXzszSDaoio1DrvscOodqM1Yu8IA7oBrr02K56ITnYjhzodh5cxeYdk1qhUlLJoWklzEpKwL7vOkQUWpLjElNTNir0snn1Z3xSapa4V95spTyyaL8EjALG4ziakjcbg-dATUw3AeNmg5tjvAsYKZTElAWMn1Rt673-DfyklLmcVTLucbD3nLs3fNst-49T_rHkaeAvAAD__yE5cN8), allocating $75,000 for the construction of the institution. A 2,416-acre site near Bryan was selected as the home of Texas A&M University, which opened its doors in October 1876. The Texas House passed two major education bills yesterday. Check out today's _Roundup_ section for details. **Big Announcement:**_The Flyover Podcast_ is launching on April 28th, and we need your help! Before we make episodes available to the public, we're inviting our readers to join our focus group. You’ll get an exclusive first look (and listen) at episodes on YouTube starting this Monday, April 21st, and you'll have the chance to help shape the podcast by giving feedback to our hosts, Ayla and Amy, regarding content, format, delivery, and new ideas. Your voice will be essential in helping shape the future of _The Flyover Podcast_. To help, [just click HERE](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJycj7FuwyAURb_GbLbew68GBoYu2dKpUkYLm0eMSkpkSBz_feX2D7req3uuzuU8nl1M8fv64W5s6yvkceJS7279KiGvW0w-xcBzyoVHCfKtBWpRjd7FtI8kvJ3AGxRsURFprQYlxWIpSHADmoAzSCOJAAz1BoxGjbPuRbQHDAgVIiCYrgc5IYBUWg-DUqohYB9rXru6cOWXKyHt-clrN-ebSHap9V6a_r2Rp0aetm3r9vyoj4mP_ggJLq7OS_u5cHv6m4rV-vsWU4plOA6uNxfTL6_-Q_1p5U8AAAD__19rZdE) and click the subscribe button on the Flyover YouTube page (bottom left-hand corner). We'll email you a private episode link starting Monday, the 21st. Thanks for your help! ## Texas House Passes Education Bills
The Texas House [passed legislation yesterday](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckLGOszAQhJ8GOiN7w2-TwsXf0OXaK9FiL2EVx0bYQPL2J3JvcO2MvtGn-b4NN-TA8f6FT7LlNaVhpFwWXB95SuvBwQeeyIWUaQAJ_4RshTKDRw7voa29HaW_qpqsMm3bdUYbqGfrRqXcKDvQE0LXTqQNogZHoDRcR1mzPcdkq4xSUslrc5EwKinBdJ3WxpiqleS5pLUpMxV6YZ7CO-20Ni4962DnUpZcXf5X0FfQH8fRPF4Yz7KCPtKRK-g_mFhS4MLuDALvJLbFY6EsyG8OC6coMu4c71mgc2mLJYsURZlJ_PJz2jKJKaS0VtDXq_XLwSFw1qfk_YkcPk7lD_ftFn4CAAD__0IwgS8) to provide an additional $7.7 billion in public school funding and allocate $1 billion to a new school choice program that would establish parent-directed education savings accounts for up to 100,000 eligible students in its first year. House Bill 2 increases the state’s base funding per student from $6,160 to $6,555. It also [raises teacher salaries](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckD2O5CAQRk9jZ7Sg_AMEDjZxNptuaIEp2qWpNhbg9sztV55gD7BZ6ZX0pPf9-Vg-HDHtz9_uhVP9imnxWOrh8meJKV_EgSniyqngAhIGIXuh9BIc8ffSt2HyMljV4qR03xujRw3tNlnotLFGdQPG3gzdYJU2Dgx0gwcE39J0y2SvtFJSSfvoJHglJWhjxlFr3fQSA9WUH3XDil-uRP5Ob8yPNb1anrZaj9J0vxqYG5iv63p8vk-8nw3MLldaGRuYd7xKA_ORmCqt9_njEoxPKuzqmfEf29JZUByuFCzCE7Ogfc3obnh6plWUdUuJRTz3QPuzgRlGK7x3GNFJEYwzojdWCwsgRQfeBmNMkNG3eQrHRcxUxjvt-XLEPyX1P0Z_T_A3AAD__4OLj5E) between $3,500 and $7,000, limits the hiring of uncertified teachers, and allocates special education funding. The measure received preliminary approval in a 144-4 vote. Senate Bill 2 would provide participating families [with 85% of the amount public schools receive](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckEuO4jAUAE-T7BI9P5vYXngRwUSzYTQakKZ3kb9gtcFRbBG4fYs-Ql-gqlT_j_NRxxTvlz_65lV9hjwbX-qi188S8rrF5FIM3qZc_IyAuw5YR_jsdEyvmbVOGXCStF4RzpgQfODYXtVgqXRBIgnUSbRksOAt4Q6MsEJ62kb1hgEjnBAgIHsKaAgAciGGgXPeMPAu1rz29eqrf-oS0is__NrbfGuTuta6lIaODU4NTtu29fdcY773JTc4nX99jKfutP83nve__46HzqATSHwwID0DB1LQHaIOOxyAM2saOi2P0tADknZVbtliSrEM74zLTcf0ba0_GPRQ-BUAAP__9fVv4Q) for each student, which currently amounts to a little more than $10,000 a year. Homeschoolers would receive a lesser amount, and the program would prioritize special needs and low-income students. Prior to debate, President Donald Trump [held a phone call with Republican members](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckEuO4jAUAE-T7BI9P5vYXngRwUSzYTQakKZ3kb9gtcFRbBG4fYs-Ql-gqlT_j_NRxxTvlz_65lV9hjwbX-qi188S8rrF5FIM3qZc_IyAuw5YR_jsdEyvmbVOGXCStF4RzpgQfODYXtVgqXRBIgnUSbRksOAt4Q6MsEJ62kb1hgEjnBAgIHsKaAgAciGGgXPeMPAu1rz29eqrf-oS0is__NrbfGuTuta6lIaODU4NTtu29fdcY773JTc4nX99jKfutP83nve__46HzqATSHwwID0DB1LQHaIOOxyAM2saOi2P0tADknZVbtliSrEM74zLTcf0ba0_GPRQ-BUAAP__9fVv4Q) urging them to support the bill, and dozens of protesters gathered in the State Capitol to oppose it.
## Mayra Flores Challenging Henry Cuellar
Mayra Flores, a former Republican congresswoman who briefly flipped a Democratic district in South Texas after the incumbent resigned in 2022, announced she is [running for the congressional seat](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyc0LGupCAUxvGn0Q4DyIhTUGxjN9tuaRAOejIoBM6Mzttv5j7Crb_kyy__f4_5YTHisf61Oxi6QpoXqJRtedaQyonRRwzgYqowSy5vjCsm9Owtxs-sWm8W7u-iBSO0UuOoBy3bzdwgDA5G7awFKYUIQvNeOt9bocRdqhbN94wroYXggt-7nstFcC71OA6D1rpRHDxSKh1tQHDZGuInvaF0Lu1tNBtRrk3_p5FTI6fzPLuQrgPO-t0bOeUUkdDVRk4BSyW2w4UusSWVgxXIjGxZgSrDw6OjHQ5iOdr1BZ552JMrltiWXhXYmjJzaYfFuidb0LfF-HxijFiHr3PdLcYfFv2i4NvI_wEAAP__DjmC7g) occupied by Rep. Henry Cuellar (D-Laredo). Cuellar was indicted last year on federal bribery charges. Flores won a special election for Texas’s 34th Congressional District in June 2022, but she lost to Democrat Vicente Gonzalez in November and again in 2024. Following her announcement that she intends to challenge Cuellar, Flores was briefly [hospitalized for an unknown reason](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyc0LHO2yAUxfGnwRsW3BCDB4Yu3tK1o3VtLgEVGwtoHL99lTzCtx_99dP585gfGFPcn79xI9vePs8L1XZg-Vt9LmdMLkVPa8qVZhBw50JxqWeHMV2z6pxdhBtlR1ZqpYzRg4YuWEVeOSLlzaAXYxwJY0Yv76uREpBEF-0nJpTUUgopxv4mYJFCgDZmGLTWTAlyseXSt0CN3lh9uvKLSr_mrUs2tHZUdvvFYGIwnefZb1fFHfeW95g_IwbTTmdlMNX8rwX-jTCYsLS4JmIwbXgV5D7lQpUHwtQCrysW4iBAj3CH_ghHV6w7zphSrMOH9dwwpq-i_eCwl4X_AQAA___fPXqG). Cuellar has represented [Texas’s 28th Congressional District](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyczz1uwyAUAODTmC0WfwF7YKgqRV3StSN6mGcb9TlYQJP49lV6hF7gk76vq79ConRbPmFD155z9gFr26F81zmXR6JIacaJckUvuTyfuD4J6yMkOrxm0QUeR8HQCav1MFhjJVvdeTR6mmY9QeAgUYHSGM7KCmUCDqNkyb0wroUVggs-9orLIDiXdhiMsdZ2mmNMLZe-rdjwCXWmI9-x9FPeGLm1tb126q2Tl05eAhDltmNM0OeydPLygbdy-PcfJILCiov7IxGlal7yskGiP6j943x38jcAAP__Eudlgw)—since 2005. He previously served as Texas Secretary of State and as a member of the Texas House. He has described himself as a “moderate centrist.” Last May, Cuellar was accused of [accepting nearly $600,000](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckLFuwyAURb8Gb7bgQQAPDFGrqB3SoVXV0QLznKBiY2GaxEu_vYq7dup2hqOro_tx7I42xDCdXuyIptyG1Dlcymzz5zKkfA3RxzBgH9OCHVDY1VTUTHXehrh2ovLGUd-yCg1TQmitpILqbPTOaWAoKHDtXK96bqVrdd9iL52UugrmPkYFU4xRRtuGU3CMUlBaS6mUIoKiDyXlppyx4M0uQ1zTBXPTp7GK5lzKvBC-J3AgcPjDIXAY0-TtWts5h1jLGiiITeeE778J3xe8FcIf35u3hsAO6CvOv_CEU143evjCGG3e-HnyoS_oq2z8fA0xhkXeO0-jDXHLKv948GLgJwAA__9woXt8) from Azerbaijan and a Mexican commercial bank in exchange for legislative influence.
## Texas National Parks Among Best for Wildlife
Both of the state’s national parks—Big Bend National Park and Guadalupe Mountains National Park—ranked in the top 10 for wildlife watching, according to a [recent analysis](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckMGOgyAURb9GdhigCLpgMZvuOttZGtRnfSmCgWdt_35ik_mB2d6bnNxzf279zWPAeP_2Kzh6zakfoNDm86PMKR8YpoAzjCEV6JVQDReaS9tPHsO712xyg5g6ycBJq3XbWmMVW1zXGKGkGceh89Ap3cyilaMx3usGOukZuhMmtLRSCim6-iLUIIVQtm2NsdZWWsCElHJNCxC8fJnDOz0h12NaWXAL0Vaqy1elrpW6HsdRP_YlnGWlrkPKESMtsKY9ksdYzhAK8b3w6AlT9IF_JPmcMv_T5GVLRBjvLLtpOzAELOaccl89fuCM_nHS06nfAAAA__-DSngn) by outdoor apparel brand KÜHL. The top spot went to Grand Canyon National Park, while Big Bend ranked third and Guadalupe Mountains ranked sixth. The rankings were determined by [species diversity and visitor interest](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckL2OqzAQhZ8GOiN7AA8ULm5Dl9tuifwbRutgZKyQvP3K0T7BdqMZ6ZvvnK_betMUab__1w-vyiuk1fizHDp_nyHli6KLFLyN6fQrcBgZH5jA1WmK73VonTLczaL1SuAwTBNKhHZTvTVgEGc5umC5Dn0A43C0vQx9GP3UkqowPggUggs-dz0HIzgHnCYpEbEZuHdUUu7K5ot_6TPEd3r63Nn0aKPaSjnOpv_XwNLAcl1XZ7ec9nptYKnOdf2r38CicyEb6_SBMUN3Zvzu2K4LpV1HVjMz4IBS4twd29Fm5Y6LYqRTVp_7Q1P8vC9_aOqp4CcAAP__Vr93hw) in eight wildlife categories, including mammals, birds, reptiles, insects, and mollusks. With 59 reptilian species—including desert tortoises and Texas horned lizards—Big Bend ranked first in that category. It came in second for birdwatching, contributing to the state’s No. 1 overall ranking for that activity in a [separate study](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckL2uozAQhZ8Gd0a2cTApXGxDl223RIM9hFEMjuxJSN5-xX2E254jnZ_v3226ASXa739hQ8-fJU8zVn5CedQll4NSTLRgSLniZJS5SGWldlMESt_JiuhnFa9aoNfO2mFwvTNi9d0l9G6wuFhnOz1oMGZW18UZ6yCg0oL8Gaasdlorra5tp8yslTJuGPreOddYhZE4l5ZXZPxAXdI3v7G0IW8i-ZX5WZvuT2PGxozHcbSP15pOszHjnMtOO6-45dfOQHttzAgbFgpQ5XlQzlTiARxW2u-yMjBWCSHkEk-Bs4zAIIqPz4NSotqfi-4b0E-H4F-wenvzPwAA__99BHpN). Guadalupe Mountains boasts 47 species of mollusks, ranking fourth in that category. It is also home to 43 species of reptiles and 69 mammal species, including mule deer, elk, and porcupines.
| Flying together with our sponsor [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckMtuwyAQRb8GdrGGR4y9YFG1yi7ddmlhGGLUcYgA5fH3FfmErmfuOVf357ycXaJ0vXy7HW17xrysWNvNld8ac3kkCpQiesoVFwnyeAB9EGYJLtFr0TzYFcIsOFphtJ4mMxrJNzuuepYuKgNKRHR-PkaYI3qUfjIePE-2w0ALIwQImAcFchUA0kzTOBpjmAYMqeUytA0bPl2N9Mp3LIPPOye7tXarTH0weWLylK53rG3YkCiXV8X-1C_q1K5ux8rUV88y-fmuf-hyXmy4PRJRqmPXXXaX6E1v_xjibuVfAAAA__8xC2rb) [**Could RYSE be the next Ring?**](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckMtuwyAQRb8GdrGGR4y9YFG1yi7ddmlhGGLUcYgA5fH3FfmErmfuOVf357ycXaJ0vXy7HW17xrysWNvNld8ac3kkCpQiesoVFwnyeAB9EGYJLtFr0TzYFcIsOFphtJ4mMxrJNzuuepYuKgNKRHR-PkaYI3qUfjIePE-2w0ALIwQImAcFchUA0kzTOBpjmAYMqeUytA0bPl2N9Mp3LIPPOye7tXarTH0weWLylK53rG3YkCiXV8X-1C_q1K5ux8rUV88y-fmuf-hyXmy4PRJRqmPXXXaX6E1v_xjibuVfAAAA__8xC2rb) Imagine skipping out on Ring before its **$1.2B buyout** by Amazon That’s exactly what happened to all the sharks, including Kevin O’Leary, missing a [**66,756% return..**](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckMtuwyAQRb8GdrGGR4y9YFG1yi7ddmlhGGLUcYgA5fH3FfmErmfuOVf357ycXaJ0vXy7HW17xrysWNvNld8ac3kkCpQiesoVFwnyeAB9EGYJLtFr0TzYFcIsOFphtJ4mMxrJNzuuepYuKgNKRHR-PkaYI3qUfjIePE-2w0ALIwQImAcFchUA0kzTOBpjmAYMqeUytA0bPl2N9Mp3LIPPOye7tXarTH0weWLylK53rG3YkCiXV8X-1C_q1K5ux8rUV88y-fmuf-hyXmy4PRJRqmPXXXaX6E1v_xjibuVfAAAA__8xC2rb) By the time we hear about industry-changing companies, it’s usually **too late**. clean_body: Both of the state’s national parks—Big Bend National Park and Guadalupe Mountains National Park—ranked in the top 10 for wildlife watching, according to a by outdoor apparel brand KÜHL. | | | | | | Thursday, April 17, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1871, the legislature authorized the establishment of the , allocating $75,000 for the construction of the institution. A 2,416-acre site near Bryan was selected as the home of Texas A&M University, which opened its doors in October 1876. The Texas House passed two major education bills yesterday. Check out today's Roundup section for details. Big Announcement:The Flyover Podcast is launching on April 28th, and we need your help! Before we make episodes available to the public, we're inviting our readers to join our focus group. You’ll get an exclusive first look (and listen) at episodes on YouTube starting this Monday, April 21st, and you'll have the chance to help shape the podcast by giving feedback to our hosts, Ayla and Amy, regarding content, format, delivery, and new ideas. Your voice will be essential in helping shape the future of The Flyover Podcast. To help, and click the subscribe button on the Flyover YouTube page (bottom left-hand corner). We'll email you a private episode link starting Monday, the 21st. Thanks for your help! We're sponsored today by , offering an opportunity in new smart home technology. Abilene 🌥️ 93/65° | Amarillo 🌤️ 90/58° | Austin ☁️ 89/65° | Brownsville ☁️ 88/71° | Corpus Christi ☁️ 84/71° | DFW 🌥️ 87/64° | El Paso 🌥️ 91/65° | Houston ☁️ 83/68° | Laredo ☁️ 97/69° | Lubbock ⛅ 94/62° | Midland 🌤️ 94/64° | San Antonio ☁️ 90/65° | Tyler 🌥️ 85/63° | Waco ☁️ 89/64° | Texas House Passes Education Bills The Texas House to provide an additional $7.7 billion in public school funding and allocate $1 billion to a new school choice program that would establish parent-directed education savings accounts for up to 100,000 eligible students in its first year. House Bill 2 increases the state’s base funding per student from $6,160 to $6,555. It also between $3,500 and $7,000, limits the hiring of uncertified teachers, and allocates special education funding. The measure received preliminary approval in a 144-4 vote. Senate Bill 2 would provide participating families for each student, which currently amounts to a little more than $10,000 a year. Homeschoolers would receive a lesser amount, and the program would prioritize special needs and low-income students. Prior to debate, President Donald Trump urging them to support the bill, and dozens of protesters gathered in the State Capitol to oppose it. Mayra Flores Challenging Henry Cuellar Mayra Flores, a former Republican congresswoman who briefly flipped a Democratic district in South Texas after the incumbent resigned in 2022, announced she is occupied by Rep. Henry Cuellar (D-Laredo). Cuellar was indicted last year on federal bribery charges. Flores won a special election for Texas’s 34th Congressional District in June 2022, but she lost to Democrat Vicente Gonzalez in November and again in 2024. Following her announcement that she intends to challenge Cuellar, Flores was briefly . Cuellar has represented —since 2005. He previously served as Texas Secretary of State and as a member of the Texas House. He has described himself as a “moderate centrist.” Last May, Cuellar was accused of from Azerbaijan and a Mexican commercial bank in exchange for legislative influence. Texas National Parks Among Best for Wildlife Both of the state’s national parks—Big Bend National Park and Guadalupe Mountains National Park—ranked in the top 10 for wildlife watching, according to a by outdoor apparel brand KÜHL. The top spot went to Grand Canyon National Park, while Big Bend ranked third and Guadalupe Mountains ranked sixth. The rankings were determined by in eight wildlife categories, including mammals, birds, reptiles, insects, and mollusks. With 59 reptilian species—including desert tortoises and Texas horned lizards—Big Bend ranked first in that category. It came in second for birdwatching, contributing to the state’s No. 1 overall ranking for that activity in a . Guadalupe Mountains boasts 47 species of mollusks, ranking fourth in that category. It is also home to 43 species of reptiles and 69 mammal species, including mule deer, elk, and porcupines. | Flying together with our sponsor Imagine skipping out on Ring before its $1.2B buyout by Amazon That’s exactly what happened to all the sharks, including Kevin O’Leary, missing a By the time we hear about industry-changing companies, it’s usually too late. But right now, there’s a smart home startup making their way to homes in America. , and unlike Ring, you can still invest early—before it takes off. | ➤ Dallas: The suspect accused of shooting four students at Wilmer-Hutchins High School on Tuesday, 17-year-old Tracy Haynes Jr., has turned himself in to police and is detained on a $600,000 bond. The victims are expected to recover. () ➤ San Antonio: A teenage student was shot and killed yesterday near a public alternative school when a fight broke out among a group of at least eight students. () ➤ Liberty County: The Texas Commission on Jail Standards ordered the county jail to shut down temporarily due to several “non-compliance issues.” () ➤ State Sen. Mayes Middleton (R-Galveston) announced he is running to replace Attorney General Ken Paxton, who is challenging U.S. Sen. John Cornyn in the upcoming election. The president of an independent oil and gas company, Middleton announced he plans to spend $10 million of his own money on the campaign. () ➤ Fort Bend County: Taral Patel, a former county staffer and a candidate for county commissioner in last year’s election, pleaded guilty to misdemeanor charges related to posting racist comments about himself using a fake social media account in an attempt to garner voter sympathy. () ➤ Corpus Christi: Coastal restoration company Natrx has partnered with The Nature Conservancy to install 3D-printed breakwater structures off the coast of Shamrock Island, which currently loses about 14 feet of land per year to erosion. () ➤ Galveston County: Commissioners voted to end toll collections for a bridge that was paid off years ago. Over half of the $500,000 collected annually was spent on staffing the bridge’s toll booths, which only accepted cash. name: 4Patriots
subject: Oh no! We're embarrassed...
body:
This is not ordinary food.

**Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN!** With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you [**stock up today with this exclusive deal**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/T75i7tZXrTQx4fuML6Bvrw~~/AARclBA~/sPWjtBgwsW8Pi8XCI9G9L9csY4RsRHcuhGGEssJOIEowPijgivOY051lSF94dflg6h0IeQ22CzrTq3bAwxq2kevkRGrCI6jObQO9fjnyHY2KsulJnfIZMnIdqPOINLTwHX9o-n74aZSCLExfIiidvqFnHMpLFNfT6Cknn28XIFQIAlVwc6oYMNRrGZ9kNcepttaz7W3pZrS9IXD7YNM7_4HH3iqn34agknQlkRFzEBVh0rwUBNFQDKhQ09Z0cZL8uB1hkbpjWpC_v4dA-89NKmqZjpKU_dfvd2H9kQAoiB8~), you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/T75i7tZXrTQx4fuML6Bvrw~~/AARclBA~/sPWjtBgwsW8Pi8XCI9G9L9csY4RsRHcuhGGEssJOIEowPijgivOY051lSF94dflg6h0IeQ22CzrTq3bAwxq2kevkRGrCI6jObQO9fjnyHY2KsulJnfIZMnIdqPOINLTwHX9o-n74aZSCLExfIiidvqFnHMpLFNfT6Cknn28XIFQIAlVwc6oYMNRrGZ9kNcepttaz7W3pZrS9IXD7YNM7_4HH3iqn34agknQlkRFzEBVh0rwUBNFQDKhQ09Z0cZL8uB1hkbpjWpC_v4dA-89NKmqZjpKU_dfvd2H9kQAoiB8~) [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/T75i7tZXrTQx4fuML6Bvrw~~/AARclBA~/sPWjtBgwsW8Pi8XCI9G9L9csY4RsRHcuhGGEssJOIEowPijgivOY051lSF94dflg6h0IeQ22CzrTq3bAwxq2kevkRGrCI6jObQO9fjnyHY2KsulJnfIZMnIdqPOINLTwHX9o-n74aZSCLExfIiidvqFnHMpLFNfT6Cknn28XIFQIAlVwc6oYMNRrGZ9kNcepttaz7W3pZrS9IXD7YNM7_4HH3iqn34agknQlkRFzEBVh0rwUBNFQDKhQ09Z0cZL8uB1hkbpjWpC_v4dA-89NKmqZjpKU_dfvd2H9kQAoiB8~) **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food.** This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/T75i7tZXrTQx4fuML6Bvrw~~/AARclBA~/sPWjtBgwsW8Pi8XCI9G9L9csY4RsRHcuhGGEssJOIEowPijgivOY051lSF94dflg6h0IeQ22CzrTq3bAwxq2kevkRGrCI6jObQO9fjnyHY2KsulJnfIZMnIdqPOINLTwHX9o-n74aZSCLExfIiidvqFnHMpLFNfT6Cknn28XIFQIAlVwc6oYMNRrGZ9kNcepttaz7W3pZrS9IXD7YNM7_4HH3iqn34agknQlkRFzEBVh0rwUBNFQDKhQ09Z0cZL8uB1hkbpjWpC_v4dA-89NKmqZjpKU_dfvd2H9kQAoiB8~) **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/T75i7tZXrTQx4fuML6Bvrw~~/AARclBA~/sPWjtBgwsW8Pi8XCI9G9L9csY4RsRHcuhGGEssJOIEowPijgivOY051lSF94dflg6h0IeQ22CzrTq3bAwxq2kevkRGrCI6jObQO9fjnyHY2KsulJnfIZMnIdqPOINLTwHX9o-n74aZSCLExfIiidvqFnHMpLFNfT6Cknn28XIFQIAlVwc6oYMNRrGZ9kNcepttaz7W3pZrS9IXD7YNM7_4HH3iqn34agknQlkRFzEBVh0rwUBNFQDKhQ09Z0cZL8uB1hkbpjWpC_v4dA-89NKmqZjpKU_dfvd2H9kQAoiB8~)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day.
