name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 4/17/2025
body:
Can the America-First movement win in Colorado?
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
🚨 A new episode of _Unleashed_ is out today, and you won't want to miss it! Heidi Ganahl talks with Rasmussen’s lead pollster Mark Mitchell about Colorado’s GOP identity crisis. From crossover voters and Trump’s lasting influence to the uphill battle in 2026, they break down exclusive polling and tough questions: **Can a MAGA message win in a deep-blue state?** This episode brings the data, the strategy, and a whole lot of truth. [Listen here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)!
Listen to today's **Mountain Minute Podcast** [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
**🏛️ Colorado Legislative Session Updates...** House Republicans are urging AG Bondi to review Colorado’s [new semi-auto gun ban](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), SB25-003, calling it unconstitutional. Meanwhile, Polis faces backlash over HB25-1321, a $4M legal fund critics say sidelines the AG and fuels a [partisan power grab](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Dozens of Colorado school board members are urging CHSAA to [bar biological males](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) from girls’ sports, citing fairness, safety, and federal funding risks. Meanwhile, Rep. Gabe Evans has introduced [six bills in his first 100 days](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), focusing on fraud, border security, and public safety—three have already advanced.
🇺🇸 **On the National Stage...** A judge ordered the EPA to [release $20B in green energy funds](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), dealing a blow to Trump’s freeze on nonprofit grants. Meanwhile, Biden stumbled through his [first post-Trump speech](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).
🗣️ **Commentary Spotlight...** C. J. Garbo discusses Tulsi Gabbard's warning of a “silent coup” via [compromised voting systems](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), urging urgent reform.
This is the Mountain Minute for Thursday, April 17, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Can the America-First movement win in Colorado? Heidi Ganahl and Rasmussen pollster break down Colorado’s GOP identity crisis](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY RMV STAFF, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
With Colorado’s 2026 elections on the horizon, Republicans are once again asking the question: What kind of candidate can actually win statewide?
On the latest episode of Unleashed, Rocky Mountain Voice founder Heidi Ganahl sat down with Mark Mitchell, head pollster for Rasmussen Reports, to dig into exclusive polling data—and the identity crisis facing Colorado’s GOP.
“This is one of the biggest quandaries,” Mitchell said. “How do you unpack this very particular issue in Colorado?”
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Self-defense on hold: House GOP announces letter to AG Bondi at capitol press conference](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Colorado House Republicans held a press conference announcing a letter to U.S. Attorney General Pam Bondi, urging a constitutional review of SB25-003, the state’s new semi-automatic weapons law.
* Lawmakers warned the bill places burdens on low-income families—requiring permits, fees, and training—making self-defense inaccessible to those in high-crime areas.
* Republicans criticized the bill’s vague language and the legislature’s refusal to allow a state Supreme Court review, saying it sets a dangerous precedent that undermines constitutional rights.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Polis’s $4M legal fund to fight Trump? GOP Senators say it’s a political power grab](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* HB25-1321 would divert $4 million from infrastructure funds into a discretionary legal fund under Gov. Polis to challenge federal policies—particularly those tied to a possible second Trump term.
* Critics say the bill bypasses the Attorney General, allows unchecked spending on lawsuits and defense for state officials, and serves more to elevate Polis’s political profile than protect state sovereignty.
* Republicans call it a partisan “shell game” that repurposes taxpayer dollars meant for roads and bridges into a legal slush fund, warning it sets a dangerous precedent for executive overreach.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Garbo: A silent coup threatens democracy and our votes — Gabbard called it. Now we must act.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard warned that systemic vulnerabilities in U.S. election systems pose an existential threat to democracy—what Garbo calls a “silent coup” that undermines the legitimacy of every vote cast.
* Garbo argues that electronic voting machines are susceptible to manipulation and calls for a return to paper ballots, hand counts, and full transparency to restore trust in elections.
* He criticizes media silence on Gabbard’s warning and urges Americans to act now to protect self-governance before it’s lost to technology-driven tyranny.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[Tristan: Politics came between me and my daughter – love and faith brought us back](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY GEORGE TRISTAN****| COMMENTARY | APRIL 15** _A fundamental hallmark of the saga of human history, has been and continues to be, invention. Take communications for example. Less than 200 years ago, we relied on the Pony Express to send and receive communications over long distances._
**[In first 100 days, Evans introduces six bills focused on fraud, safety and immigration](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY RMV NE CO NEWS ROOM | STATE | APRIL 15** _Colorado’s 8th Congressional District—a nationally watched swing district—just saw its freshman Congressman, Gabe Evans, cross the 100-day threshold in office. The milestone highlights a flurry of legislative action, bipartisan wins, and scrutiny over constituent accessibility._
__
**[The COvid Chronicles: Fifteen days that changed Colorado forever](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY MICHAEL HANCOCK | COMMENTARY | APRIL 14** _Colorado changed overnight. In the first two weeks of April 2020, headlines shifted from public health to public control. Behind the fear and mandates were decisions—made daily—that reshaped lives and redefined freedom._ __

name: GOP Alerts
subject: Last Stand: Can Trump’s tax cuts survive the Left’s attacks?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
“In this world nothing can be said to be certain, except death and taxes.”

| | | Peter,

President Trump’s bold tax plan is ready to go–and it’s precisely what Americans need to take our country back. He’s locking in the 2017 tax cuts, cutting corporate taxes even more, and putting tariffs on foreign goods to protect American workers.

The radical left is terrified. They see this as a direct threat to their pocketbooks. **They’ll stop at nothing to undermine President Trump’s agenda and destroy the progress we’ve made.** But we can’t let that happen. The more we stand united behind this plan, the more power we give President Trump to fight for everyday Americans.

GOP leaders need to hear from YOU. Do you stand with President Trump’s tax plan? [**We need your answer NOW.**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._nQ)
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
[ **ANSWER HERE**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._japlA)
---
Together, we can make sure that the left doesn’t get its way and that President Trump’s plan becomes a reality.

Thank you for standing with us.-GOP Alerts

name: Senator Bill Cassidy
subject: The American Dream is worth protecting.
body:
I’m not in this for politics. I’m in it for YOU.

| | | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zab26ogm4nlp37k3cm7tbgugtjlla1ha32rp9k1o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjg6aor4chh2bs)
---
| | | | Friend, I didn’t come to Washington to climb the political ladder. I came here to work — **for YOU.** As a doctor, I spent decades caring for patients in Louisiana’s public hospitals — people who didn’t have fancy insurance or political connections. _Just hardworking Americans trying to get by._ [_**_And now, as your Senator, that mission hasn’t changed. >>_**_](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zbbjg3buvdpletblor3e6felehlmqgercg44pvjo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjg6aor4chh2bs)
* I’m working to _Make America Healthy Again._
* I’m standing up to protect your paycheck from wasteful government spending.
* I’m leading with one goal: **to preserve the American Dream** – for you, your kids, and your grandkids.

Because the truth is simple: **If we lose that dream, we lose what makes this country great.** _But the Left is doing everything they can to tear it apart._ _They want dependency, not opportunity. Control, not freedom._ **I won’t let them win. But I need you with me.** Will you stand with me today and help preserve the American Dream?
---
| | | [YES – I’M STANDING WITH CASSIDY](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zqjbpn3i7e1m08il9l7h1titm6og8v1eh33unub8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjg6aor4chh2bs)
---
| | Every single day, I’m doing the work. Not for politics. Not for headlines. **For YOU.** Let’s keep pushing forward — together. God bless,
---
| | | | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z1jko8d9ruorlblm5o29bquartb7p4eja7vuo5ug_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjg6aor4chh2bs)
---
| |
---
| | Senator Bill CassidyUnited States Senator, Louisiana
---
| | | [CHIP IN TO DEFEND THE AMERICAN DREAM](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z4hcaprup8htd5ts1n44cae6f1burv1j65mvp798_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjg6aor4chh2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z8uql1s5bhkmef71f3iu906eanibg9is258fu0qo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjg6aor4chh2bs)
---
| | _Bill grew up in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, and is a proud LSU graduate. He worked in Louisiana’s charity hospital system for over 25 years, ensuring that the less fortunate in our state were able to receive quality health care. Later, Bill co-founded the Greater Baton Rouge Community Clinic, providing free dental and health care to working families without insurance. In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, Bill led a group of volunteers to convert an abandoned K-Mart building into an emergency healthcare facility._ _As a conservative in the Senate, he focuses on the issues Louisiana families care about the most. Bill is working to lower the cost of health care, make flood insurance affordable, and save Social Security from a 24% cut if Washington fails to act._ _Bill, and his wife, Laura, live in Baton Rouge and attend church at the Chapel on the Campus. They are blessed with three children and one grandchild._
---

name: Cory Mills
subject: The Left just declared war on me.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY MILLS FOR CONGRESS
body:
It’s Cory Mills. Please read everything.

| | | | **__From the Desk of Congressman Cory Mills__**
---

name: Senator Bill Cassidy
subject: The American Dream is worth protecting.
body:
I’m not in this for politics. I’m in it for YOU.

| | | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdgs8vnir9pi8ig6e2p7jiggmmop06qcs9eh7n10_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjg66pb1c9h2bs)
---
| | | | Friend, I didn’t come to Washington to climb the political ladder. I came here to work — **for YOU.** As a doctor, I spent decades caring for patients in Louisiana’s public hospitals — people who didn’t have fancy insurance or political connections. _Just hardworking Americans trying to get by._ [_**_And now, as your Senator, that mission hasn’t changed. >>_**_](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zfr12fn5idimhnt44n9ln8jr9k7r4d2spklvuk70_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjg66pb1c9h2bs)
* I’m working to _Make America Healthy Again._
* I’m standing up to protect your paycheck from wasteful government spending.
* I’m leading with one goal: **to preserve the American Dream** – for you, your kids, and your grandkids.

Because the truth is simple: **If we lose that dream, we lose what makes this country great.** _But the Left is doing everything they can to tear it apart._ _They want dependency, not opportunity. Control, not freedom._ **I won’t let them win. But I need you with me.** Will you stand with me today and help preserve the American Dream?
---
| | | [YES – I’M STANDING WITH CASSIDY](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zgdvcdavrs5gq9rjgde64lo4eol3q8ekoqin6np8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjg66pb1c9h2bs)
---
| | Every single day, I’m doing the work. Not for politics. Not for headlines. **For YOU.** Let’s keep pushing forward — together. God bless,
---
| | | | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ze1f0e4tpp761s9aaej3vt6d5i3n7c2qchrg9gi8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjg66pb1c9h2bs)
---

---

---

---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zguh45q42polqv8u0cji86i7oreqated9ob7rngg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjg66pb1c9h2bs)
---
| | _Bill grew up in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, and is a proud LSU graduate. He worked in Louisiana’s charity hospital system for over 25 years, ensuring that the less fortunate in our state were able to receive quality health care. Later, Bill co-founded the Greater Baton Rouge Community Clinic, providing free dental and health care to working families without insurance. In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, Bill led a group of volunteers to convert an abandoned K-Mart building into an emergency healthcare facility._ _As a conservative in the Senate, he focuses on the issues Louisiana families care about the most. Bill is working to lower the cost of health care, make flood insurance affordable, and save Social Security from a 24% cut if Washington fails to act._ _Bill, and his wife, Laura, live in Baton Rouge and attend church at the Chapel on the Campus. They are blessed with three children and one grandchild._
---
| | | [LEARN MORE ABOUT BILL](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z889veajo7jinjvccf3e0jbf6isrs8h0mhrtt408_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjg66pb1c9h2bs)

#### **Frozen Odds -**
**Alaska — vast, untamed, and unpredictable. Beneath its snow-covered peaks and icy rivers lies a political battlefield unlike any other. This is the story they didn’t want you to know.****Powerful names — Lisa Murkowski, Hansjörg Wyss, Arabella Advisors, and George Soros — echo through the corridors of influence, shaping the future of the Last Frontier. From the manipulation of Ranked Choice Voting to the backdoor funding of initiatives like the Minimum Wage Increase, Alaska has become a testing ground — a proving ground — for tactics designed to tilt democracy itself.****Groups like Salmon State, Outdoor Alliance, and the Alaska Venture Fund, Alaskans For Better Elections, No on 2, etc. have operated quietly, weaving a web of influence across the state's political landscape. What seemed like grassroots efforts were anything but — and the connections go far deeper than anyone imagined.****This isn't just about Alaska. It’s a warning to the rest of America.****Help bring this story to life, flying experts to Alaska, traveling the state for interviews. We have already raised nearly 50% what we expected for the entire film to cost.****A huge Thank You,****Phil Izon**

name: Riley Lee
subject: “I want readers to know that it’s okay to be half human and half cat.”
body:
I was at a regional conference for librarians when I heard the quote in the subject line from one of the keynote speakers...

|
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zef6upcr2k7tl9gduc2l6t7eht4agdvth9h486b8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjg6eob6chh2bs "SkyTree Book Fairs")
Friend,

I was at a regional conference for librarians when I heard the quote in the subject line from one of the keynote speakers...

I was shocked — mainly because the speaker wasn’t joking. He was dead serious.

This is why I’m excited every day I get to lead SkyTree Book Fairs, the nation’s leading alternative to Scholastic. Children need access to wholesome literature that makes reading fun again without telling them it’s _“okay to be half human and half cat!”_

A shocking new report by the National Literacy Trust (NLT) just confirmed what we’ve all sensed: kids aren’t reading anymore!
* Just 1 in 3 kids say that they enjoy reading in their free time.
* Only 20.5% of children reported reading daily in their free time, compared with 28% last year.
* This represents an 8.8% drop in children’s reading habits since last year.

**The number of children who enjoy reading has dropped to its lowest level in almost two decades. **

_Why?_

Because too many books today focus on victimhood, mental health disorders, confusing concepts like _“it’s okay to be half human and half cat,”_ and even inappropriate sexual content — rather than **letting kids be kids**.

SkyTree Book Fairs is changing that.

Our book fairs bring uplifting, values-driven books directly into schools so kids can discover wholesome stories about heroes, critical thinkers, and problem-solvers.

As the President and CEO of SkyTree Book Fairs, I am on a mission to give 150,000 students an incredible SkyTree Book Fair experience this year. To make this happen, we need to urgently raise $50,000.

[Your gift today will put the right books into the hands of kids who need them. Will you step up and help?](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zhmvf9eboamovb9o585h6ggt8dq893rmo5p9jf58_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjg6eob6chh2bs)
[Donate](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zks9laqfud2ooku6l5gtorfvdgu1qrprja74bfeo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjg6eob6chh2bs)
Why is giving children inspiring books so important?

Children who read for just 20 minutes per day learn 1,800,000 words per year and children who read for fun experience greater academic achievement.

But with children’s enjoyment of reading at an all-time low and a high number of students leaving school without the reading skills they need to thrive, we are putting the futures of a generation at risk.

**SkyTree’s guiding philosophy is that every child — regardless of circumstance or socioeconomic status — deserves access to quality literature.**

We carefully screen every title in our collection to ensure they contain no sexually explicit content or storylines that promote gender confusion. The books found in SkyTree Book Fairs ignite the imagination, teach courage, and inspire kids to become the leaders of tomorrow.

[Every dollar you give will help bring life-changing books into schools and inspire kids to dream bigger, think deeper, and build a brighter future for themselves.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z82o5fcgc8qa9ikjhc8llbjgtmn84qop1f9g0mug_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjg6eob6chh2bs)

clean_body: I was at a regional conference for librarians when I heard the quote in the subject line from one of the keynote speakers... | | | "SkyTree Book Fairs" Friend, I was at a regional conference for librarians when I heard the quote in the subject line from one of the keynote speakers... I was shocked — mainly because the speaker wasn’t joking. He was dead serious. This is why I’m excited every day I get to lead SkyTree Book Fairs, the nation’s leading alternative to Scholastic. Children need access to wholesome literature that makes reading fun again without telling them it’s “okay to be half human and half cat!” A shocking new report by the National Literacy Trust (NLT) just confirmed what we’ve all sensed: kids aren’t reading anymore! Just 1 in 3 kids say that they enjoy reading in their free time. Only 20.5% of children reported reading daily in their free time, compared with 28% last year. This represents an 8.8% drop in children’s reading habits since last year. The number of children who enjoy reading has dropped to its lowest level in almost two decades. Why? Because too many books today focus on victimhood, mental health disorders, confusing concepts like “it’s okay to be half human and half cat,” and even inappropriate sexual content — rather than letting kids be kids. SkyTree Book Fairs is changing that. Our book fairs bring uplifting, values-driven books directly into schools so kids can discover wholesome stories about heroes, critical thinkers, and problem-solvers. As the President and CEO of SkyTree Book Fairs, I am on a mission to give 150,000 students an incredible SkyTree Book Fair experience this year. To make this happen, we need to urgently raise $50,000. Why is giving children inspiring books so important? Children who read for just 20 minutes per day learn 1,800,000 words per year and children who read for fun experience greater academic achievement. But with children’s enjoyment of reading at an all-time low and a high number of students leaving school without the reading skills they need to thrive, we are putting the futures of a generation at risk. SkyTree’s guiding philosophy is that every child — regardless of circumstance or socioeconomic status — deserves access to quality literature.** We carefully screen every title in our collection to ensure they contain no sexually explicit content or storylines that promote gender confusion. The books found in SkyTree Book Fairs ignite the imagination, teach courage, and inspire kids to become the leaders of tomorrow. For the next generation, Riley Lee SkyTree Book Fairs is a 501(c)(3) not-for-profit organization. Copyright SkyTree Book Fairs, 2023. Pop Acta Media | First Look News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

body:

---
Friend, The worst lies are the lies we tell ourselves.

It’s time we stop lying to ourselves about the radical left!

It’s Mike Rogers. I spent years as an FBI special Agent, coming face to face with some of the most corrupt and dangerous human traffickers, mobsters, and politicians.

I saw the dirtiest, most disgusting side of politics.

But I’ve never seen something like the far left’s total war on President Trump.
---
[](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=b4493a2ba77d41ca9d56b27828a0d9d7&_e=7uI3HEd0FLFl0E0yqrYrDq0KA92j8ukwwx7eBfBcegS8dRUJKXSmiYXccQx_Bex5sUoAPAaeWU6kNxISc1gCsrbq00iQtj4QSqllA4q3zpodQ6w5aVk5O2SCWP6cMM0XcTeAo3lCFPmsUTqswsZYxZHQ_KbP4U_uPAEqc552RC0hRD3LmuG8gFi0eYECHW5TFsx2LmNCI3A4MC7Q66LXRqUK6gBwI-PFRC3DCv9lWalgUbg4nepUjmSnuN0kZY1jDJKZPYc7PFzq5zrz28-xVdtqNSyAXOijJy1T-1td0bOKEjhUsij8wPmco5rac9-9M_PMdLnYUXhQ0CdOoZEJzgn9LTQbJ_foqcL9cc8b4_yeif9n0nhmTJTulBeg-98T8Xl_wdwyKOd6hz4_UUpoFHyAiPCya3bRqMacpxnQZNboXuqQSUX5fvcuK3_-FezC5ncP9qAGugZ8xi4ILvLYBVaH7zXKWrZJem7udXb_QaiSCryXVkM9MktWD5ecQlP8)
---
[**Here's the thing: Their dirty tactics didn’t work on him. And they won’t scare me off either. I didn’t fear corruption when I was in the FBI, and I sure as hell don’t fear it now. **](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=b4493a2ba77d41ca9d56b27828a0d9d7&_e=7uI3HEd0FLFl0E0yqrYrDq0KA92j8ukwwx7eBfBcegS8dRUJKXSmiYXccQx_Bex5sUoAPAaeWU6kNxISc1gCsrbq00iQtj4QSqllA4q3zpodQ6w5aVk5O2SCWP6cMM0XcTeAo3lCFPmsUTqswsZYxZHQ_KbP4U_uPAEqc552RC0hRD3LmuG8gFi0eYECHW5TFsx2LmNCI3A4MC7Q66LXRqUK6gBwI-PFRC3DCv9lWalgUbg4nepUjmSnuN0kZY1jDJKZPYc7PFzq5zrz28-xVdtqNSyAXOijJy1T-1td0bOKEjhUsij8wPmco5rac9-9M_PMdLnYUXhQ0CdOoZEJzuoRLWIFj6rHuMHpHoqC3o1spCHub42TtNjMlSbkwbORo67vCusEW5_ahJtSqrFXGrvE0yJ05JIyW5QEFUZFTC9IDE6QWd1YYVL8NDmAm1D4dexhIB7uwg4ztIPj6pfmz9iYXwmwp1HIePYCwPybIhxo2PWtS_4giarSnDwky6Wu)

[**Last year, my Senate campaign in Michigan was a top target of the Democrat Machine’s massive war chest. They attacked me. They attacked my values. They even attacked my family!**](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=b4493a2ba77d41ca9d56b27828a0d9d7&_e=7uI3HEd0FLFl0E0yqrYrDq0KA92j8ukwwx7eBfBcegS8dRUJKXSmiYXccQx_Bex5sUoAPAaeWU6kNxISc1gCsrbq00iQtj4QSqllA4q3zpodQ6w5aVk5O2SCWP6cMM0XcTeAo3lCFPmsUTqswsZYxZHQ_KbP4U_uPAEqc552RC0hRD3LmuG8gFi0eYECHW5TFsx2LmNCI3A4MC7Q66LXRqUK6gBwI-PFRC3DCv9lWalgUbg4nepUjmSnuN0kZY1jDJKZPYc7PFzq5zrz28-xVdtqNSyAXOijJy1T-1td0bOKEjhUsij8wPmco5rac9-9M_PMdLnYUXhQ0CdOoZEJzpvUVpVyFUVlLVMbeqJf7m553CBa5g1ysdqYjHKE-KxFmX7s9iyLmez6EiMvd-hOP_PZ1POvBVvCjSSzLgXz2jFbxZSIY4xBS6-vkVRTKdzM2mLq3auVb7VluZ-XMEefAwq2mE-FLt3Q5TMU3aXe0mjcuerWoMtQKF4ecu1RMb_g)

_**[_**The biggest thing I learned through it all is that the American people are WAKING UP!**_](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=b4493a2ba77d41ca9d56b27828a0d9d7&_e=7uI3HEd0FLFl0E0yqrYrDq0KA92j8ukwwx7eBfBcegS8dRUJKXSmiYXccQx_Bex5sUoAPAaeWU6kNxISc1gCsrbq00iQtj4QSqllA4q3zpodQ6w5aVk5O2SCWP6cMM0XcTeAo3lCFPmsUTqswsZYxZHQ_KbP4U_uPAEqc552RC0hRD3LmuG8gFi0eYECHW5TFsx2LmNCI3A4MC7Q66LXRqUK6gBwI-PFRC3DCv9lWalgUbg4nepUjmSnuN0kZY1jDJKZPYc7PFzq5zrz28-xVdtqNSyAXOijJy1T-1td0bOKEjhUsij8wPmco5rac9-9M_PMdLnYUXhQ0CdOoZEJzuYX3qxh2TBeVRqqHTOXCs7jWhhFQ5qf4YRFweSugwCazvy3eVM69Xs9i4ASxH36h3ClFFtbQL3ffmQxlbjrBeShpNssVaEjTVDrtMWtfjB4_jmUjClxRhxPTco6LP2Q3wcQFqHUX_lrcMDqWwtNHH6qHnDU6HvRhF9pBWDZzKmy)**_ You see, the radical left is in desperation mode.

They won’t stop until they get what they want...They’ve been foaming at the mouth to impeach President Trump from day 1!

But they’re coming to realize patriots like you and I won’t stand for their corrupt deranged LIES!

**[Now I’m prepared to step back into the arena to go to battle for President Trump’s agenda. My race will be the closest Senate race on the map in 2026. ](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=b4493a2ba77d41ca9d56b27828a0d9d7&_e=7uI3HEd0FLFl0E0yqrYrDq0KA92j8ukwwx7eBfBcegS8dRUJKXSmiYXccQx_Bex5sUoAPAaeWU6kNxISc1gCsrbq00iQtj4QSqllA4q3zpodQ6w5aVk5O2SCWP6cMM0XcTeAo3lCFPmsUTqswsZYxZHQ_KbP4U_uPAEqc552RC0hRD3LmuG8gFi0eYECHW5TFsx2LmNCI3A4MC7Q66LXRqUK6gBwI-PFRC3DCv9lWalgUbg4nepUjmSnuN0kZY1jDJKZPYc7PFzq5zrz28-xVdtqNSyAXOijJy1T-1td0bOKEjhUsij8wPmco5rac9-9M_PMdLnYUXhQ0CdOoZEJzghQolk_pX_7evUVNTm_25Xjc4e4IoykqFTUvQKf10kqnsotnX_ag9q3bbhKjNWcmm3-oajehmEsStR0gRSWxTTfFGSHOH1WAxyN9J2esC88Ck8bh4DhLDQK6zxLLXJKnHNjbTHmPzKtcsUVRey3Te_EBpwmLpDkceQeb_5v3nD0)**

name: Gary Sinise
subject: Celebrating the 20th Anniversary of the National Memorial Day Parade
body:
This could be the last chance to honor WWII veterans on Memorial Day
It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.
| | | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=92cfb2bc723d45d2ada9fc2869158a06&_e=IP1y_zmg_1ifBp3JmTNPHTruJQ1WLXqJQG8kaG_s3AAoDTfPWxFXk8olWaowthCGvBzJb1xR_ARtieYrTfnM2Rb2kYGRRPP_JdQ7t7CGDddqYfyh7gCPfk44GLWLravKWd0N11w2dV24Z42NLSDIsFO5KCnIMSqaACMkD7eVpOPYdoR5WzU-8G2PUcwfBmscHFxaJ29m1x5mpxODjAKgmDvUsh0O2vc4AWCGrLomjNELYkzs4wzrAmtS8VxHMFVW2qA37uO3wY6Yk0iUrJUxtnSet8x-anNuYHd4R25q-Nn_AgdG5gPZlgFw5jXkPL7W)
---
Peter, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 __and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.** This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. **[Peter, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=92cfb2bc723d45d2ada9fc2869158a06&_e=IP1y_zmg_1ifBp3JmTNPHTruJQ1WLXqJQG8kaG_s3AAoDTfPWxFXk8olWaowthCGvBzJb1xR_ARtieYrTfnM2Rb2kYGRRPP_JdQ7t7CGDddqYfyh7gCPfk44GLWLravKWd0N11w2dV24Z42NLSDIsFO5KCnIMSqaACMkD7eVpOPCggA7brpjAKhnHe_r6vSZyl5EEgRahr6RmFVTqJqP8vn_wKt6S9Elg2Yi_5ya6WJ7ij08TddorApGvq927OiVGnoymDmc6cE-lernVUE9HpckecxFLnyMcPSIEzi85cxeK_z83ZOvQTbyO_4y2iso)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=92cfb2bc723d45d2ada9fc2869158a06&_e=IP1y_zmg_1ifBp3JmTNPHTruJQ1WLXqJQG8kaG_s3AAoDTfPWxFXk8olWaowthCGvBzJb1xR_ARtieYrTfnM2Rb2kYGRRPP_JdQ7t7CGDddqYfyh7gCPfk44GLWLravKWd0N11w2dV24Z42NLSDIsFO5KCnIMSqaACMkD7eVpOOWAh33sWqhKu5LQpIK52oo-fmoKtVFJe0d1vAyQl8TuqGjfc6FsXj_bvwlSs2r_u3wabOMBTiW4v_0Ob0e3T8MvIdXj0yJUhnQ1lQtfJVTvXKxCFqOZ4SZ342ElYEFrJAVmMP_KVsFagK9hiW4Zf5o)
---
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=92cfb2bc723d45d2ada9fc2869158a06&_e=IP1y_zmg_1ifBp3JmTNPHTruJQ1WLXqJQG8kaG_s3AAoDTfPWxFXk8olWaowthCGvBzJb1xR_ARtieYrTfnM2Rb2kYGRRPP_JdQ7t7CGDddqYfyh7gCPfk44GLWLravKWd0N11w2dV24Z42NLSDIsFO5KCnIMSqaACMkD7eVpONrM9tD5irRdAPTBrIqiGxc0b7yb0AbhjePgEybRwSMOzGdmWbIcLrykCijWBjBs_50Lln1lZ1249m484fhcm9Isy5GRdJgZMdf_1YlJFDE_XVX5BQEzUS9z0q_vAC5EOhIo0lyv_81Wihu1a8NX6sn)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded _entirely_ by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=92cfb2bc723d45d2ada9fc2869158a06&_e=IP1y_zmg_1ifBp3JmTNPHTruJQ1WLXqJQG8kaG_s3AAoDTfPWxFXk8olWaowthCG-xLPq2c6RfYRG7QJVuRg359Lyqn369g-qKj9KbdTtFA9PLdpUMZe-lx-17Y6oVF3M5Xz_2fUJOUQnHbnv-dXbcKigqyTZ_zawcv28NaXyUlkv-UMqL0dmTYStKErMzNeskotxGXxe4lLsPxaU80ZH7563kG-6RJhrRXfCCBz8TqSuh4yz9PETqiuuQ3iGSoDGKvvP67Gzg395Z97ybi9vNPwKpoUr5BUoCd99M_HD9M%3D)[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=92cfb2bc723d45d2ada9fc2869158a06&_e=IP1y_zmg_1ifBp3JmTNPHTruJQ1WLXqJQG8kaG_s3AAoDTfPWxFXk8olWaowthCGvBzJb1xR_ARtieYrTfnM2Rb2kYGRRPP_JdQ7t7CGDddqYfyh7gCPfk44GLWLravKWd0N11w2dV24Z42NLSDIsFO5KCnIMSqaACMkD7eVpOPQiFsKNw5t4IrNVgI4EJy0qRFybpB_vid0r6vglS-4Rsk5bXtkGqjKqxs_FYYOMtekJtYKVMbRi1xYjiNGUuDPfynRVLetGgkCG2blPo3JRWEH-bVAan0-ije9jOBWOlhFC6VJUK9dCYE3KhehgL2L) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._** ** **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. ** So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us.
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=92cfb2bc723d45d2ada9fc2869158a06&_e=IP1y_zmg_1ifBp3JmTNPHTruJQ1WLXqJQG8kaG_s3AAoDTfPWxFXk8olWaowthCGvBzJb1xR_ARtieYrTfnM2Rb2kYGRRPP_JdQ7t7CGDddqYfyh7gCPfk44GLWLravKWd0N11w2dV24Z42NLSDIsFO5KCnIMSqaACMkD7eVpOM6akxqmtipIlIM2HlvMAcx7z0tBb28GZreeIIGykEvn0EKbB1Ch_J6EZ50WETY6unitX_oRfhjNS12M0NtJjkW-DOwK-Cjy3xB6qmoqd0F7wFdr0nCjHJ7oOG02v1EWT1yu0lbaHYEuzvGlEzKjiYE)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ _**[Peter, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=92cfb2bc723d45d2ada9fc2869158a06&_e=IP1y_zmg_1ifBp3JmTNPHTruJQ1WLXqJQG8kaG_s3AAoDTfPWxFXk8olWaowthCGvBzJb1xR_ARtieYrTfnM2Rb2kYGRRPP_JdQ7t7CGDddqYfyh7gCPfk44GLWLravKWd0N11w2dV24Z42NLSDIsFO5KCnIMSqaACMkD7eVpOMtnhBeqz-29AIl1eTQo3PlgxuxWe-VH3cmUdbZPpa7nflGIqASTpT4OZ6h9JU4AvHHTD2r1i_5WEbfdYTr__eY8mmYF2RTIcsVDxMwMSVj0H6M9FvUKRLqtQdMaVluc0WxG1UGLvScrvXWlu9h46a0)**_ Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=92cfb2bc723d45d2ada9fc2869158a06&_e=IP1y_zmg_1ifBp3JmTNPHTruJQ1WLXqJQG8kaG_s3AAoDTfPWxFXk8olWaowthCGvBzJb1xR_ARtieYrTfnM2Rb2kYGRRPP_JdQ7t7CGDddqYfyh7gCPfk44GLWLravKWd0N11w2dV24Z42NLSDIsFO5KCnIMSqaACMkD7eVpOPBqEcPhayyEOCKHqAkr0QbFe_FwLwlFVCO_UkTse2TKYdrYs9eEeQjTnWLewaJsGC11fR7CFY32bahqGbv4KAzZXmHLdz-ISKM7DLHQgUHUr_sc4oW_wZdWxJ_hLf_fXWLyAMiZFHVJ0YSDQtgw6aK)
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=92cfb2bc723d45d2ada9fc2869158a06&_e=IP1y_zmg_1ifBp3JmTNPHTruJQ1WLXqJQG8kaG_s3AAoDTfPWxFXk8olWaowthCGvBzJb1xR_ARtieYrTfnM2Rb2kYGRRPP_JdQ7t7CGDddqYfyh7gCPfk44GLWLravKWd0N11w2dV24Z42NLSDIsFO5KCnIMSqaACMkD7eVpOMn0R12erARJ5wHgqrWW5KtXpCOWJuW0B5JLAMiYHBTAXj2piMSb8jQ1KvDHvfak-pO67v4Le6wWqLZ3QhIUPkXW-Y_9412FfZ_UgSl29Jxn50MH3kVrwnmjaHu9QcH-A6y6eVGBgZfPxvXsRBRHMtV)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

[Unsubscribe](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_s=92cfb2bc723d45d2ada9fc2869158a06&_t=54Ar5yJcxAk-BDmrq46P5HFkvXkqlIJ9_LaQOFsM49bl1I-wka9LU03utGvaG1yvN-o8_1AD9v4US0WIBmdSxulsHI_6JX0Dudbs0zEytFmq1xjdWmLI-Gm_PKxNcQIi)

body:
There has never been a more important moment to have a strong Democratic Party.
# [](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/2780?t=1&akid=518%2E2563979%2EjNTAhI)

🌤️ To all Kamala Harris supporters, 🌤️
Please don't click away from this important message.

As you read this, Republicans are preparing to pass massive, permanent tax cuts for the richest people of this country -- paid for by huge cuts to programs the rest of us rely on like Medicaid, Medicare, Head Start and more.
The Democratic Party needs your help to stop them.

If everyone reading those donated even just $5 to the Democratic National Committee they’d have the resources they needed to organize in districts we can convince moderate Republicans to vote no. We only need a few of them.
But not everyone gives; that's why we need people who understand the importance of this moment to chip-in today.

The amount of the donation isn't as important as the donation itself. If you can give $5, we're asking you to give $5. If you can give $50 or more, give that. This is a large and difficult effort. We will be taking on the entire Republican Party and we need your help.
If stopping Republicans from passing destructive tax cuts for billionaires seems worth $5, $50, or whatever you can afford, please make a well-timed, generous donation today:

[**Can Kamala Harris count on you to contribute directly to the Democratic National Committee today? Their average online donation is around $50. Many give more. Some give less. All that matters is that you are helping Democrats stop Trump's tax cuts for billionaires.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc?refcode=em250417&refcode2=518_2563979_jNTAhI&akid=518%2E2563979%2EjNTAhI)

This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. Thank you so much for being a supporter. But we don't want to bother you. If you’d like to unsubscribe, you can **[click here.](https://harris.actionkit.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=518%2E2563979%2EjNTAhI)**
clean_body: There has never been a more important moment to have a strong Democratic Party. 🌤️ To all Kamala Harris supporters, 🌤️ Please don't click away from this important message. As you read this, Republicans are preparing to pass massive, permanent tax cuts for the richest people of this country -- paid for by huge cuts to programs the rest of us rely on like Medicaid, Medicare, Head Start and more. The Democratic Party needs your help to stop them. If everyone reading those donated even just $5 to the Democratic National Committee they’d have the resources they needed to organize in districts we can convince moderate Republicans to vote no. We only need a few of them. But not everyone gives; that's why we need people who understand the importance of this moment to chip-in today. The amount of the donation isn't as important as the donation itself. If you can give $5, we're asking you to give $5. If you can give $50 or more, give that. This is a large and difficult effort. We will be taking on the entire Republican Party and we need your help. If stopping Republicans from passing destructive tax cuts for billionaires seems worth $5, $50, or whatever you can afford, please make a well-timed, generous donation today: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | 🙏🙏 Every contribution matters -- especially right now. Team Kamala Paid for by Harris Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Harris for President, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY.

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: The DCCC targeting me?
body:
https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/poll-in-the-field-/?utm_campaign=20250416&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

Peter,

Did you see the huge news from the DCCC last week?

House Democrats are planning to try and FLIP Republican-held districts right here in Texas – even some districts that President Trump won by more than 15 points,

And if that isn’t bad enough, my campaign just intercepted a poll trying to gauge the best lines of attack against me.

I fear that these lying attacks are imminent, and after the DCCC broke fundraising records last month, their warchest will be bottomless.

But with your help, we will fight these lies with the truth and the truth will win.

[So with lying attacks coming any day now, PLEASE make a contribution so that I’m able to fight back and hold the line for our shared America First values.](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/poll-in-the-field-/?utm_campaign=20250416&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A )

https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/poll-in-the-field-/?utm_campaign=20250416&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

[CONTRIBUTE >> $25](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/poll-in-the-field-/?utm_campaign=20250416&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A /&amount=25)

[CONTRIBUTE >> $50](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/poll-in-the-field-/?utm_campaign=20250416&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A /&amount=50)

[CONTRIBUTE >> $75](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/poll-in-the-field-/?utm_campaign=20250416&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A /&amount=75)

[CONTRIBUTE >> $100](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/poll-in-the-field-/?utm_campaign=20250416&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A /&amount=100)

[CONTRIBUTE >> $250](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/poll-in-the-field-/?utm_campaign=20250416&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A /&amount=250)

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/poll-in-the-field-/?utm_campaign=20250416&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A /&amount=other)

Nancy Pelosi, Hakeem Jeffries, and the DCCC will do everything in their power to take me out and flip this district BLUE.

They want to destroy my reputation, take this seat, and send a message that strong conservatives — especially Trump allies — aren’t welcome in Congress.

But I’ve faced worse enemies than these.

As a Navy SEAL, I learned that you never win a fight alone — you win it with a team that has your back.

That’s why I’m asking: will you stand with me today?

Your support is how we punch back — with the truth, with strength, and with American grit.

[DEFEND THIS DISTRICT](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/poll-in-the-field-/?utm_campaign=20250416&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A)

When the radical Left targets a fighter like me, they won’t hold anything back. This district will be flooded with desperate attacks to defeat me.

But if we hold the line together — if patriots like you rise up — we will win.

[Please make a contribution so that I’m able to fight back and hold the line for our shared America First values.](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/poll-in-the-field-/?utm_campaign=20250416&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A )

In Service,

https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/poll-in-the-field-/?utm_campaign=20250416&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

Dan Crenshaw

[Twitter](https://twitter.com/DanCrenshawTX)

clean_body: Peter, Did you see the huge news from the DCCC last week? House Democrats are planning to try and FLIP Republican-held districts right here in Texas – even some districts that President Trump won by more than 15 points, And if that isn’t bad enough, my campaign just intercepted a poll trying to gauge the best lines of attack against me. I fear that these lying attacks are imminent, and after the DCCC broke fundraising records last month, their warchest will be bottomless. But with your help, we will fight these lies with the truth and the truth will win. /&amount=25 /&amount=50 /&amount=75 /&amount=100 /&amount=250 /&amount=other Nancy Pelosi, Hakeem Jeffries, and the DCCC will do everything in their power to take me out and flip this district BLUE. They want to destroy my reputation, take this seat, and send a message that strong conservatives — especially Trump allies — aren’t welcome in Congress. But I’ve faced worse enemies than these. As a Navy SEAL, I learned that you never win a fight alone — you win it with a team that has your back. That’s why I’m asking: will you stand with me today? Your support is how we punch back — with the truth, with strength, and with American grit. When the radical Left targets a fighter like me, they won’t hold anything back. This district will be flooded with desperate attacks to defeat me. But if we hold the line together — if patriots like you rise up — we will win. In Service, Dan Crenshaw No longer want to receive these emails? . Team Crenshaw, 12645 Memorial Drive, STE F1, Box 211, Houston, TX 77024

Patriot,

**I just had to share this with someone else who will understand.**

The result of what the Democrats have done to our country over the past four years is absolutely **APPALLING**. What they've done to destroy our great nation is just totally and completely unacceptable.

Radicals spent four years straight shredding constitutional freedom after constitutional freedom in favor of their woke policies, like DEI, Bidenflation, and Catch-and-Release.

**Whether you 're a Democrat or a Republican -- the state of our country as a result of those far-left politicians should bother you.** I want to live in a country where we can all offer different perspectives, but at the end of the day, put America FIRST and don't spend years trying to throw someone in jail for winning an election.

**[Stand with me to hold the Democrats accountable NOW.](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=f19f7bbc65db47d4a265fd813c8ee57f&_e=F2ZUrAv9qcn-qNX75fhni2RK-pSVbe20Owv2CxlHWi7QxX3AGD9yy-Ol_IbyNqCW05Embo1-hCk1UozbDQi8_YHDHkZHTNBSZp_caouw7QYB3EbKO2VclAYikdXVN2j0QQ1I3dY0ivjludcoWf44eRIdoLBXKeJ5eJWAPGTbzJNcLCTr0TBx8LnNMFWksVkezihSGUqNqCqfg1N0otqgNxG0wIFVYFwuWvg132FZv42dRgW2RF2_pK8h1eAbISbUEbxhZAFDeasVj41Htcr2uyglaZdiFZAtJUfnNQ_SUvfcHstvAKxxkZ3gFwUMcfPgklPH8s2ecbZWecv4yUy0f3CJmL7eQm9eabGocpUArz8%3D)** For America,

** ****I’m pissed, Peter.** ** ** You’re bombarded every single day — texts, emails, pop-ups — all begging you to take a survey, sign a petition, or chip in a few bucks to “stop the Democrats.” ** ** And what actually happens, Peter? **NOTHING.**** ** The same RINO cowards fold like cheap suits. The spending gets worse. The lies keep piling up. And you — the one actually footing the bill — are left betrayed and ignored.** ** They take your hard-earned dollars and then turn around and vote for the same damn policies that wrecked your savings, crushed your community, and left you wondering if _anyone_ in D.C. actually gives a damn about you. ** **_**You want the truth?**_** ** When they scam you out of a donation, they pat themselves on the back, head to some fancy cocktail party, and LAUGH at you behind closed doors. **They don’t respect you. They don’t fear you. And they sure as hell don’t represent you.** I’ve had it. With the lies. The games. The sellouts. I know what you're probably thinking right now: _"Who the hell is this guy?"_ My name is Chip Roy.** ** You may have seen me getting trashed by some spineless RINO on Fox News for not “playing for the team.”** ** Well guess what, Peter? ** ****Damn right I’m not a team player.**** ** Because I don’t work for _them_.** ** **[I work for YOU](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/Ub5i5GiNMie7PpLvvHCsOyyX1W0HvBilaAxPawQYlHxhLNIAaJmcII2-H7F3xwnj4znRK692c9RdeG5ZEJxDeE7uAkNDGr1AWhsXWnqQJb_SZ35RFqXdAdO_7_mFiVcXfO6bYU2RuwpChoZ85t-BrqMX7jwZEZwUg49sEQDCF9X8NGZ4nRhPudNIvlojOpptrptF4KxX2cpMQW42KGJyEcwVgjXfbro9vNJPI-zkbK2hDCwtDpLZy_gUgJp-9b3lwr8MANjuMd5RESIjRpvXvuR9FdJO8mWAXv9MX5qOoOZrAM9W167BeYxEctEziFPfh8kuLbKtqfL1WIW35SlQqwIqj5BMVZ0D46vV2szQ2DyH0e61V5LZhZWraknAu_-0LhydR1by1i7Ni23zlX_nc8j_2nr3F7VSdBQzxEGAlKtKpv1sBWH3jEWrdms7Y_VQapP8mb5RZYqEAvFZICo1eI3KPURemAP1MHAm3Bg5jwyTxJRtDYWQLzA/U2iYchIK-D8RyvBcWhFrSoNXefzUujnc/8).** ** ** I see your posts. I hear your calls. I _feel_ the same betrayal that lights a fire in your gut every time you turn on the news and watch our country circling the drain. ** ** President Trump gave us real hope for real change. But these DC swamp rats — **Republicans and Democrats alike** — are trying to feed him the same old garbage from the last 30 years.** ** So here’s what I’m doing, Peter: **I’m fighting like hell to blow up this broken status quo.** I’m helping elect people who will **stand with Trump** and finally put **YOU first**. It’s not easy. I’ve got the entire **Uniparty** gunning for me. But I’m not backing down — not now, not ever.** ** Now let me be straight with you — no gimmicks, no BS. ** ** I won’t lie and say there’s a 2500% match. I won’t trick you into taking a fake survey just to ask you for money. And I’m not going to pretend I’m Trump or Elon or JD Vance. I’m just a man — a father, a patriot — asking you directly: **[Can you chip in $25, or whatever you can afford, to help me fight back](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/a-FSlIMrZ44iiOh2voQ8QLNDjyyD-61r7qt7d3wG_F5BxN1BsWxw5iW319qfVCZVcHWcU-vfLaAeNFaaqtvaYd_fxwtme_XiAvYxzOy4zpCkIXbdxC4NdlStatEafnh46WU4BjPI53fLsJmPKSIyT5hIUYTemSyTwSfg_556SuclAwHGLanpZ2tJHV0-S-6qlCXvaVH30HtXxRoVB1dvmIGwbUKy7vjitq2QmR-TtxILpybYos6cxtN_dbuR16NGDeCcHXhJDeR13FC9ITXT_bPaF9K435MChV22Q_VD7koFUPJjZKFyYM9aDLWShqyVYh42LZduPNfD2iMAmTp720Cc1wryRelRq8nynjnIPHKbW_GWuCXNz6VdJWS404GSt95Mb6K90FUcY8SU6VFFn06WH5QYx5bkJugl7YgMSQGw0S072mn9YrDJjZ8RD_hj4f1FSLiVZtBBKbPtw13UET4vns9v6thDLTyDwAKsTUz6Hieia2h-vqQ/bavYF_VUFIv0vi2mmKPwvzth1ayFjQko/8)?** That’s it. You have my word, Peter:
✔ I will never stop fighting for you.
✔ I will never stop listening to you.
✔ And I will NEVER sell you out — not for a vote, not for a check, not for anything. This is my promise to you. As a man. As a father. As someone who actually gives a damn. **[I would be honored to earn your support today](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/I-pnzE3RltJWZTPOwytPepAuhDFV4X0l7zUlMtSyn5JYpvRYiNEazYOcZkphWe_KP3T_8PoRZTwTweXycHuUpu158ZagSKEf5wD9Tf432I809OO2LHCMPqNog2mLWb78llJWMZVvt3WqV8vEGHjYJ4Dq5ECS2_gUiZ3FmrlichLKr5vpgE2USgnr53tYD0mmWB5HbHwKBADSD8x06ljvj8A1KoTt16MZO5hFxaBQcrmpOHURtZiKyfZQAIFBU6qvbXsL71JtCrK8eK2324FxTgwKhfrkUAVeDJk4BhIAGEu-HciaAPXhGb3Y6rqJoqE17asmdFUovSNjsonhdeVemctqkgYdxlZEH_1mAKuFWbUbNeZSyn2nA4MkFpz8UBeU7mwjlDl69DYDcQziPRv0svhM2o1bZgEcbyMJ0X7yvaTR_msEqhhHf90MwXgLFV4y6PzanCvyPH087uD_EEkLSEUVg2yJLjmZV9yaOpqo21c17ghaag8S5nE/t_vhpWNv19w4bySHlvuaDLP7EDBLNA-L/8). ** **Together, we can rip the mask off this corrupt system and start winning again — for YOU!** Thank you and God Bless,
---

## Is Trump the Most Honest Politician in Washington?
It’s been 15 days since “Liberation Day,” the day President Donald Trump announced a slew of tariffs on foreign goods. After unexpected movement in the bond market—bond yields rose rather than fell—Trump announced a 90-day pause on many of his April 2 tariffs. Since Liberation Day, however, the administration claims more than 130 countries have [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/gqctfzA1GRwg52-ghRxZb3001UY34f7Sx8F9qqbNv422y3dxivGGHINh8f7gpgBUexxc7ONW5Vcv6CxHTfnNUl3zPRTyuW_jOy9mcxKCxe0-cqQKzPNOuDCkoy5yIKXLQJJF8zuSs7-miVaMlmSREDkwZ-JjkarkrbQISiXiQABO3gBT7U5iirFsoijEUorw3gTU7F1HgU6zARH_zY0MxPb3Eo-CxLexo9ylYoNRoxrJKNka-r3pNrVGU8HjvKpiR20Vg-Lo6tE4-oyCAIXXGSo9qlpag5hqda8G6bFm4bjEV5n8f81Acv9BhKNgH0W2hueUyovqVIZf7A/xLARynEBAssqsEaOa8BQd8oYyrie2Y_4/8)

## Democrats have NO IDEA who their leader is * WorldNetDaily * by Ben Shapiro
Ben Shapiro Ben Shapiro's new collection, "Facts and Furious: The Facts About America and Why They Make Leftists Furious," is available now. Shapiro is a graduate of UCLA and Harvard Law School, host of "The Ben Shapiro Show," and co-founder of Daily Wire+. He is a three-time New York Times bestselling author. name: MTG
subject: Regarding the attack on my town hall meeting
body:
Deranged protestors attacked my town hall meeting. The media is twisting the story so I need you to hear it directly from me.

| | | | |
---
Friend,
At my recent town hall in Georgia, I went to fulfill my promise to serve my constituents and listen to them as I represent their interests in Congress.
Unfortunately, deranged leftist protestors immediately sought to turn the event violent.
**This wasn’t just a protest...**
**This was much more deliberate, and much more dangerous.**
****It was so violent that one of the attackers was charged with Terroristic Threats and Acts, a serious felony under Georgia law.****
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/alqX/?__vbtrk=Mjg1ODc5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg1ODc5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_A real image of a leftist fighting the police at my town hall._
They **resisted arrest**.They **assaulted police officers**.And they made it clear: **they came for me**.
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/alqX/?__vbtrk=Mjg1ODc5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg1ODc5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_A violent leftist attacking a police officer who asked him to leave the event._
They wanted to send a message to me, and to you, and to everybody else in our movement: _“Back down, or else.”_
The only thing standing between me and real harm was the brave law enforcement officers who stepped in... **And thank God they did.**
But here’s the hard truth, friend: _Those officers aren’t with me 24/7._
I’ve had sitting Members of Congress go on CNN and call for “actual weapons” to be used against me. I routinely get death threats sent to my home, my office, and to my family.
In fact, I receive the most death threats of anyone in Congress.
**I know how it feels to carry on with a smile while knowing there are people who would celebrate if I didn’t make it home.**
The threats don’t stop when these events end. They don’t stop when the cameras turn off. They don’t stop when I go home.
**I face these threats every single day a****nd the more I speak the truth, the more the radical Left tries to shut me down.**
It’s becoming clearer than ever that I need to step up my security detail until things calm down, but as a rank and file Member of Congress I have to pay for that with campaign funds or out of pocket. _And after this has happened so many times I don’t know how much longer I’ll be able to keep funding it on my own._
**_[That’s why I need your help to boost my security detail – not out of fear, but out of necessity](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/alqX/?__vbtrk=Mjg1ODc5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg1ODc5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
I don’t say that lightly and I don’t ask for help casually.
[DEFEND MTG](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/alqX/?__vbtrk=Mjg1ODc5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg1ODc5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
When I walk to my car, when I lay down at night, I know the threats don’t clock out just because the cameras do.
That night I had law enforcement between me and the people who came to shut me down but the police aren’t always there – and the people that sent those agitators to wage violence know that.
I wouldn’t ask if this wasn’t very, very real. If you’re able to help, I hope you know how much it means to me and to this movement.
_With strength and gratitude,_

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/alqX/?__vbtrk=Mjg1ODc5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg1ODc5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Marjorie Taylor Greene**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/alqX/?__vbtrk=Mjg1ODc5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg1ODc5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

_[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/alqR/?__vbtrk=Mjg1ODc5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg1ODc5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_
| [Unsubscribe](https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=285879&trkid=655566168&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
---
215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Team Fight Like Hell PAC
subject: More than just statistics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
Slashing Medicaid will only hurt those who need it the most while doing nothing to lower our healthcare costs. |
#
---
Here are some important numbers for you, team: Medicaid covers **2.8 million** people in Michigan. Of those 2.8 million, **1 million** are kids, **300,000** have disabilities, and **168,000** are seniors. **Republicans in Congress are rushing to terminate the program and jeopardize health care for millions of Michiganders anyway.** The people who will be affected by Republican attacks on Medicaid are more than just statistics — they’re our friends and neighbors who are battling cancer, disabled veterans, and our children. Slashing Medicaid will only hurt those who need it the most while doing _nothing_ to lower our healthcare costs. Governor Whitmer has made protecting Medicaid one of her top priorities. Why? **Because _every_ Michigander deserves access to high-quality and affordable health care and the peace of mind that comes with it.** [**If you support Governor Whitmer’s work to defend Medicaid from extremist Republicans and expand affordable health care in Michigan, add your name to our petition today >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105994447/540073380/1737248176?refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250417_AM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDJjMmM5MTMtOTMxYi1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JFKrp7h8GR9l3I4WKgXdcFXtcf0vaztg9_7XgomHrFM=&emci=75f19194-921b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=02c2c913-931b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=1028753) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105994448/540073381/1737248176?refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250417_AM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDJjMmM5MTMtOTMxYi1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JFKrp7h8GR9l3I4WKgXdcFXtcf0vaztg9_7XgomHrFM=&emci=75f19194-921b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=02c2c913-931b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=1028753)

In it, I explain how the Swamp uses a "playbook". Despite there being 50 Swamps in the 50 State Capitols, they all use this same "playbook" to restrict our freedoms and grow government. This a sober look at how legislative bodies work, but the great news is that the **State Freedom Caucus Network** was created to defeat the Swamp precisely because we know how they use their playbook against the public. **We know how the enemy operates, and thus, we know how to beat them.** I hope you enjoy reading this, and we hope you and your family have a blessed Passover and Easter weekend!

clean_body: | | | | Dear Friend, Below is I wrote last week that went viral on X (formally known as Twitter). In it, I explain how the Swamp uses a "playbook". Despite there being 50 Swamps in the 50 State Capitols, they all use this same "playbook" to restrict our freedoms and grow government. This a sober look at how legislative bodies work, but the great news is that the State Freedom Caucus Network was created to defeat the Swamp precisely because we know how they use their playbook against the public. We know how the enemy operates, and thus, we know how to beat them. I hope you enjoy reading this, and we hope you and your family have a blessed Passover and Easter weekend! | Do you know of a better "Return on Investment" than supporting the State Freedom Caucus Network? When you support the Network, you are helping us support our state freedom caucuses and all of the amazing work that they are doing. Please consider making a donation RIGHT NOW. It will help us plan and prepare for the rest of the year. You can give a one time gift or a monthly gift to our Foundation that is completely tax-deductible. Or you can support the Network so that you can help State Freedom Caucuses pass strong, pro-liberty legislation. To give, please click on one of the links below. For stock donations or IRA distributions, contact Dana Craycroft at mailto:sprinzi@statefreedomcaucus.org "sprinzi@statefreedomcaucus.org" or Sara Prinzi at mailto:sprinzi@statefreedomcaucus.org "sprinzi@statefreedomcaucus.org". We'll be back with another update next week. Until then, please be sure to our efforts so that we can support our State Freedom Caucuses!In Liberty, Andy RothPresidentState Freedom Caucus Network |

name: PoliticsPA
subject: Game changer in PA economy
body:
Tune into the latest installment of the Voices of Reason podcast. | | | |
---
| | | Welcome to the latest edition of _Voices of Reason_ where we’ll recap exclusive news and data featured in our most recent podcast.

This segment dives into A.I. in Pennsylvania and social media protections for kids, discussing how, in today's ever-changing landscape, the goal of the Commonwealth and the public should be to use A.I. safely, not stifle it.

PA State Senator **Tracy Pennycuick** , Chair of the State Senate Communications and Technology Committee, shared views and insights you want to know.
---
| **Big Names Make News**
---
| **PA State Senator Tracy Pennycuick** emphasizes that she “doesn’t want to stifle innovation with A.I.” and believes both “industry and government should be able to use A.I. so that everyone can improve their processes,” while also making it clear she doesn’t “want A.I. to be used to scam Pennsylvanians.” [[Watch](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=1b2d25490d&e=b7b3eddce2)]

**PA State Senator Tracy Pennycuick** highlights recent legislation aimed at addressing the dangers of A.I. and social media for young children, noting that “PA is the first in the country to pass a bill outlawing A.I.-generated child pornography,” while also emphasizing that it’s ultimately up to parents to stay involved and monitor what their children are consuming. [[Watch](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=8f8aadea12&e=b7b3eddce2)]
---
|
* * *
---
| **Numbers You Need to Know**
---
| _Social Media_
* Nearly half of U.S. teens **(46%)** say they're on the internet almost constantly. ([PewResearch](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=2e0aaf1993&e=b7b3eddce2))
* Social media use is also growing among young people, with **38%** of tweens using it, nearly **18%** reporting daily use, and teens spending an average of **1.25 hours** on it each day. ([CommonSenseCensus](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=bb1ab79a19&e=b7b3eddce2))

_Screen Time_
* On average, tweens use about **5.5 hours** of screen media per day, while teens use about **8.5 hours** of screen media. ([CommonSenseCensus](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=43ec2d132f&e=b7b3eddce2))
* By age 2, **40%** of children already have a tablet, and nearly **25%** own a personal cellphone by age 8. Children aged 0–8 spend an average of about **2.5 hours** per day on screens. ([CommonSenseCensus](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=af8089b067&e=b7b3eddce2))

_Voter Interests_
* Government employees reported a highly positive experience with ChatGPT, saving an average of **95 minutes** per day on tasks like writing, research, summarization, and IT support. ([CommonWealth](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=0675c6ff36&e=b7b3eddce2))
* By the end of the 2023-2024 school year, **60%** of PA districts said they planned to train teachers about AI use. ([The74](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=55b4365731&e=b7b3eddce2))

---
|
* * *
---
| **A.I. and Social Media Protections for Pennsylvania Kids**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7aae850fad&e=b7b3eddce2 "Your guide to A.I.'s surprising impacts in PA | Voices of Reason – PA Sen. Tracy Pennycuick")
---
|
* * *
---
| **In Case You Missed It...**
---
| The _Voices of Reason_ podcast has covered the most important issues in Pennsylvania politics – from [education funding](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=91d8124de5&e=b7b3eddce2) to [trust in elections](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=444dff1573&e=b7b3eddce2). Secretary of the Commonwealth [Al Schmidt](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=517c285214&e=b7b3eddce2), PA Treasurer [Stacy Garrity](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e17f03316d&e=b7b3eddce2), and House Appropriations Chairman [Jordan Harris](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=39fd5f815e&e=b7b3eddce2) are just a few of many influential guests who have joined us for exclusive interviews and roundtable discussions.
Visit the _Voice of Reason_ [YouTube page](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=0c1792bbf8&e=b7b3eddce2) to experience all the great moments you missed.
---
|
* * *
---
| **Get in Touch**
---
| We like smart ideas and want to hear from you.

Send feedback and inquire about appearing on _Voices of Reason_ , at [press@politicspa.com](mailto:press@politicspa.com?subject=Voices%20of%20Reason%20Podcast%20Inquiry).
---

---

---
[](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=db702a1e32&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
[](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=267dfcd125&e=b7b3eddce2)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/profile?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7902855e75&e=b7b3eddce2&c=d1eb98e214) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7902855e75&t=b&e=b7b3eddce2&c=d1eb98e214).

In the first year of Donald Trump’s presidency, he predicts America

This shortage could send tech stocks spiraling...

Bring inflation roaring back...

And dramatically increase America’s energy bills.

“I’m shocked,” Trump said. “We have to produce massive

Any serious investor needs to be aware of this situation.

body:
But here goes nothing...
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=5245dc9054cf408aa09fae64b41ad1a2&_e=bOzcXwtTDyGxz61x-ucFWwlbet-kVAulEBYr7eLo_4samIT8r3x7PAO-CVfutftTuzXs6MjQhGwdHOpXJzK_leUmTfJrqdJhul199DZ2fyPC34tSL7CL8tGe-2PKlO8-iakvW--yV-PRfBoKew-N7rPSAw2UI3B4eLZeBq5EUB1kVKwqzqmaqS2csnZ_UkIVbtllmk3MafSNG-jz0xV156bOUU34tqSJ_NKRXZ-t07neoc1YShxWfexC9ZyW3jPFxdefAqItSCN6GRT2fBCpnk5I7rOWR6YKUirJ9oVu98bu_4nkEBPu_q3oxvy7JUIBZmM2U04ISFkhppj_NZHWbSEE_jKeL1yhtXdl0JBxLZeL8lvfSLakeCnQaHApIGOK)
---
Friend,
---
None of this is easy for me to say, but here it goes...
---
All my life I’ve been known as a fighter.
---
I fought the mob head on in New York as America's mayor. I fought the sham witch hunts against President Trump. I’ve fought to defend my good name against the Left’s vicious lies, smears, and attacks.
---
**But over the past few years – and I hope you’ll agree – _I’ve fought the hardest of my ENTIRE life for my freedom and true justice._ **
---
The Radical Democrats and their accomplices labeled me a “ _DEAD_ _MAN_ _WALKING_ ,” _RAIDED_ my home, _ARRESTED_ me, took a _MUGSHOT_ of me, and forced me into _BANKRUPTCY_.
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=5245dc9054cf408aa09fae64b41ad1a2&_e=bOzcXwtTDyGxz61x-ucFWwlbet-kVAulEBYr7eLo_4samIT8r3x7PAO-CVfutftTuzXs6MjQhGwdHOpXJzK_leUmTfJrqdJhul199DZ2fyPC34tSL7CL8tGe-2PKlO8-iakvW--yV-PRfBoKew-N7rPSAw2UI3B4eLZeBq5EUB1kVKwqzqmaqS2csnZ_UkIVbtllmk3MafSNG-jz0xV156bOUU34tqSJ_NKRXZ-t07llv79kbtaDc7MhCatmjCmmWMuaPbPO3gwBmBGxpmP4Iv0UVwv6EAW8e8VCzFy7NoIDyOQ-ZyfQjNIgkSrS0vMhZwCfYWN7sR_9Bli4UPHO7UELl8RniebTrUu4k57c4u0befcnzgFgNN7IX7HJr3T5)
__
---
_But every step of the way I’ve fought with every fiber of my being – supported by generous patriots like _YOU_ – and here I am, still standing!_
---
**However, the truth is, through every sham indictment, false arrest, and bogus charge where I’ve had to defend my innocence and good name, I’ve been saddled with enormous legal bills, unimaginable costs, and debts.**
---
**And if we’re being honest with each other, it’s a cost I simply cannot bear on my own.**
---
Make no mistake, this was the vindictive Democrats’ plan all along...
---
_This latest sham criminal case in Arizona – where if the Democrat Attorney General gets her way, I could take my last breath in prison – is designed to bleed me dry._
---
That’s why I now have no choice but to set a goal to raise $50,000 before week’s end for my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – so that I can continue fighting to remain a FREE man.
---
I hate reaching out like this, and this is difficult for me to say, but right now, my fate is truly in _your_ hands.
---
_But let me make something perfectly clear: If you’re struggling right now or can’t afford to contribute, please know I understand. I would never want you to suffer hardship in your wish to alleviate my hardship. Take care of your family and yourself first! Your kind thoughts and prayers are more than enough. God Bless you!_
---
[**Please make a grassroots contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to help me raise the $50,000 I need to continue fighting for my freedom and justice as the Democrats try to JAIL me for LIFE as an innocent man.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=5245dc9054cf408aa09fae64b41ad1a2&_e=bOzcXwtTDyGxz61x-ucFWwlbet-kVAulEBYr7eLo_4samIT8r3x7PAO-CVfutftTuzXs6MjQhGwdHOpXJzK_leUmTfJrqdJhul199DZ2fyPC34tSL7CL8tGe-2PKlO8-iakvW--yV-PRfBoKew-N7rPSAw2UI3B4eLZeBq5EUB1kVKwqzqmaqS2csnZ_UkIVbtllmk3MafSNG-jz0xV156bOUU34tqSJ_NKRXZ-t07mjNvSBUe7_4YPSNJeK7sJbuhDgd1bfPQ3s2aiNitHQ9xx48EFYVxYfLaphQ34MghB1LmeLq5rrSCsPax20PlvPiweB25zBEgv6rZC9CAN6HlHyCPs1gowTLyK1MmwvDOzJ6-BxArsuvbcI8Q39KWPD)

clean_body: But here goes nothing... | Friend, None of this is easy for me to say, but here it goes... All my life I’ve been known as a fighter. I fought the mob head on in New York as America's mayor. I fought the sham witch hunts against President Trump. I’ve fought to defend my good name against the Left’s vicious lies, smears, and attacks. But over the past few years – and I hope you’ll agree – I’ve fought the hardest of my ENTIRE life for my freedom and true justice. The Radical Democrats and their accomplices labeled me a “ DEAD MAN WALKING ,” RAIDED my home, ARRESTED me, took a MUGSHOT of me, and forced me into BANKRUPTCY. But every step of the way I’ve fought with every fiber of my being – supported by generous patriots like YOU – and here I am, still standing! However, the truth is, through every sham indictment, false arrest, and bogus charge where I’ve had to defend my innocence and good name, I’ve been saddled with enormous legal bills, unimaginable costs, and debts. And if we’re being honest with each other, it’s a cost I simply cannot bear on my own. Make no mistake, this was the vindictive Democrats’ plan all along... This latest sham criminal case in Arizona – where if the Democrat Attorney General gets her way, I could take my last breath in prison – is designed to bleed me dry. That’s why I now have no choice but to set a goal to raise $50,000 before week’s end for my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – so that I can continue fighting to remain a FREE man. I hate reaching out like this, and this is difficult for me to say, but right now, my fate is truly in your hands. But let me make something perfectly clear: If you’re struggling right now or can’t afford to contribute, please know I understand. I would never want you to suffer hardship in your wish to alleviate my hardship. Take care of your family and yourself first! Your kind thoughts and prayers are more than enough. God Bless you! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: Team All On The Line
subject: Extremists want to silence voters in Florida
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
We need to keep fighting back against attempts to silence voters and threaten democracy
|
---

Peter,
ICYMI: State lawmakers in Florida are trying to make it nearly impossible for regular folks to put constitutional amendments on the ballot.
Anti-democracy lawmakers have introduced multiple pieces of legislation designed to take power away from the people. And earlier this month, one of these bills — HB 1205 — was passed by the Florida House.
**Constitutional amendments are a way for everyday people to make direct change and push forward meaningful reform. It’s already tough to pass one in the state — the only reason extremists want to make it harder is to ensure they can rig the system in their favor. Now is a time to fight back.**
[**Donate today to help ensure we can keep fighting back against attempts to silence voters and attack democracy in Florida and beyond.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105997420/540082623/-877614143?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_FLLift_email_20250417-AOTL-Tier1-FLLift_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250417-AOTL-Tier1-FLLift_&utm_campaign=FLLift&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFlOWRkYTNiLTk0MWItZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=z2bsLZqEmO8Gd21j86hRP5YGcz0E9ERRrpiqRPd0MSA=)

The All On The Line Team
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Sofia, All On The Line
Date: Thur, Apr 3, 2025
Subject: These Florida bills are a clear attack on democracy. We’re fighting back.
> **State lawmakers are trying to make it significantly harder for Floridians to put constitutional amendments on the ballot. We’re fighting back.**
> Team,
> Citizen-led democracy is under attack in my home state of Florida, where extremist lawmakers are trying to make it nearly impossible for everyday people to put constitutional amendments on the ballot.
> Multiple bills would place extreme barriers on the initiative process, including:
> • Imposing excessive fines for small violations in the process
> • Creating new layers of government review before signature petitions can even move forward
> • Reducing the number of days a sponsor would have to deliver signatures from 30 to 10
> All in all, they’d create an uphill battle for grassroots movements like ours seeking to make change. Floridians have a long history of using the ballot initiative process to drive meaningful reform — including on redistricting in 2010. These bills represent an attempt to shut down that process, silence voters, and attack our democracy.
> **We still have time to fight back, but we have to move fast.**
> **All On The Line has mobilized Floridians to contact their lawmakers and call on them to oppose these pieces of legislation. And we need your help to sustain our work pushing back against similar anti-democracy efforts across the country.**

> The new proposed obstacles aren’t about election integrity — they’re about limiting public participation.
> They’re about keeping power out of the hands of the people.
> And they don’t seem to have popular support. A GOP pollster found that 55% of the state’s **Republicans** oppose making it more difficult to put constitutional amendments on the ballot — just 17% support it. And nearly 3 in 4 Republican primary voters broadly favor the current citizen-led system.
> **Here’s something else you should know: protecting the constitutional amendment process is critical for fair maps going forward.**
> To back up a little: Our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation, initiated a recent legal challenge to Florida’s congressional map, which clearly violates the state constitution — specifically one of the amendments passed by voters in 2010 — by diluting the political power of Black Floridians.
> We are still awaiting the results of that challenge. Either way, fair maps advocates like All On The Line will rely on direct democracy as a backstop to ensure we have fair maps and a fair redistricting process for 2030 and beyond.
> **But if the legislature makes it virtually impossible to do that type of organizing, they could push reform out of reach and lock manipulated maps into place for years to come.**
> **We must stop Florida lawmakers’ calculated attempts to subvert the will of voters. So we’re doing everything we can to prevent these bills from passing.**
> [**Will you make a donation now to help fight back against attacks on our democracy and our freedom to make our voices heard, in Florida and beyond?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105997432/540082636/-877614143?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_FLLift_email_20250417-AOTL-Tier1-FLLift_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250417-AOTL-Tier1-FLLift_&utm_campaign=FLLift&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFlOWRkYTNiLTk0MWItZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=z2bsLZqEmO8Gd21j86hRP5YGcz0E9ERRrpiqRPd0MSA=)

> Sofia Pedroso
