body:
Majorities are built seat-by-seat, year after year, and we’re counting on Democrats like you to step up to the plate with a donation today. | | |
---
| |
---|---
We need your help more than ever – here’s why:
* With full legislative control, Virginia Democrats have fended off the worst of the MAGA agenda; protecting abortion access, investing in public education, and supporting federal workers impacted by DOGE’s mass layoffs. **But we hold a narrow, one-seat majority in the House – and every seat in the chamber will be on the ballot this fall.**
* Our best opportunities to build power and fight back against Trump’s far-right policies are in state legislative races. By building power in our statehouses, we can block the MAGA agenda from spreading through states like yours and elect leaders who will fight for our fundamental freedoms and expand economic opportunity.
* Expanding our Democratic power will take patience, strategic investments, and – above all else – grassroots support from people like you. **Majorities in our statehouses are built seat-by-seat, year after year, and we’re counting on Democrats like you to step up to the plate.**

[ Will you step up on behalf of local Democrats and commit to this fight with a $3 donation to expand Democratic power in state legislatures nationwide? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDSCrqP7HuqdVbYWeROcw0Lr7bZem6kcFYIzhY-9pifmUpc7PAIz5SJ4Tp7YmznwAAN0h-8QkkIJ7ydBO8CvrvO4suYRsUaAazLd4Puj5eSWT9a_0Rvps_G28OwfVdelmcIKU0MO8oB9zEEphmXPSmSJ0vPfaD2ZgTdkXw3cMSYVBXsuk9END4xqPdBrCVSHx9wz8tRn5bKpdk08bBPihml5rA_F66HwsT4mmZM-x_X7k3moCBObldrJMewd1ugHgp_Gk2DxoPdsMQ_JHhyqxVlqYhKVD9bHMkFaGKQICvMr1K4f9cTAh8o1swzvpl-WVVb1q735LeaqVgo9AVc6gXkHINzRrPJ74hJhXKVVbRx1wXPr1BwoikobHAtMutwXAwnnJJWU560QvULAihFgBMCA/4fq/yR3FPcCsSmiebwShBDuJUg/h0/h001.jg_untes3OVx16OAwLmnPs09XW0bbQpMh1h_qixpgIc) **[Contribute $3 →](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDSCrqP7HuqdVbYWeROcw0Lr7bZem6kcFYIzhY-9pifmUpc7PAIz5SJ4Tp7YmznwAAN0h-8QkkIJ7ydBO8CvrvO4suYRsUaAazLd4Puj5eSWT9a_0Rvps_G28OwfVdelmcIKU0MO8oB9zEEphmXPSmSJ0vPfaD2ZgTdkXw3cMSYVCECHyDP1yxcf1pon2MSXyuJTAGrOm07bJUZr39KYQWAXIl4a6vcc1lf-W4vvJqRoTgZXJ-11ZZGFnR2lOK1DF_cVLxSx1egDgI6WvGXHgwui-3pG7_Ictdhm7ljmRu3dYz3WyjM_rDjP1VE3DlH9s5qpZnyM5LIPhEMO8Du-LQnC3D8ZQBRDhE0lT9m7J4N0JJ4ETnvt6EgqgN1dh_ZqErkcer_mNjynByjooTv1Pi9Q/4fq/yR3FPcCsSmiebwShBDuJUg/h1/h001.P6Mur_kWB7nb4HOS69_IsX--08SV2D5guRYu-5nIkLw)** Donations to emails like this help fuel our work in the states – supporting candidates, sending resources to caucuses, supporting in-state digital programs, connecting candidates with opportunities to boost their campaigns, and so much more. When we say grassroots donors are the driving force behind our movement, we mean it. Ninety-eight percent of our donors give less than $200, and two-thirds give less than $20. Any amount you can spare today helps move the needle for state Democrats nationwide. [Will you please chip in $3 to help power our work in the states to elect Democrats to state legislatures across the country this year, in 2026, and beyond? Your donation will provide the critical funds we need as we gear up for special elections and this fall’s ultra-competitive elections in Virginia, and critical races all over the country in 2026. ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDSCrqP7HuqdVbYWeROcw0Lr7bZem6kcFYIzhY-9pifmUpc7PAIz5SJ4Tp7YmznwAAN0h-8QkkIJ7ydBO8CvrvO4suYRsUaAazLd4Puj5eSWT9a_0Rvps_G28OwfVdelmcIKU0MO8oB9zEEphmXPSmSJ0vPfaD2ZgTdkXw3cMSYVCVAirDBrZqBOjV0huo5kTlj-SvPni2oXzcRJ95ZTTrJmXVSELCumaPEY1BbTpROSvc9qRW6SpVNimB9lX4prKU_dM_2wlRKGx0wGTgLYdsGbNcjZ4LadaptcBIV43K4eh455FniOXiNM2-xxVxDoER7xdwc08kmIQ9MCpCv8WsCs3kiTYQ0NaWmHWKN8zJZ3Et0I9Mgtl7xQv5M2upWXy2ex8VxZ7O7qplQ5xinmY5gg/4fq/yR3FPcCsSmiebwShBDuJUg/h2/h001.pjNOZybPHv2N24fS43Gs3vWHbEpTI7K6MM_-q2HmEWM) Thanks for hearing us out. name: Randy Villegas
subject: Who I am, and why I have made this decision.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Villegas for Congress Villegas for Congress
body:
|
#
Friend, **I just launched my campaign to unseat David Valadao in California’s 22nd District -- one of the most competitive House races in the country. ** This is one of the biggest decisions of my life, so before I ask for your support, I want to share my story. It’s the story of so many in the Central Valley -- a story of hard work, sacrifice, and hope. [**It’s my hope that you’ll take a moment to read it, then consider donating $3, $35, or even $100 to help us build a grassroots campaign that puts the working people of this district -- and the entire country -- first.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106006490/540109586/701031030?refcode=em-4.17.25-launch-3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTEzNTk1ZTYtYTIxYi1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4OHtE4R6s_zZbDAgHzjF_SAMK-I2cb-h4AI6fYBluS8=) | | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106006491/540109595/701031030?refcode=em-4.17.25-launch-3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTEzNTk1ZTYtYTIxYi1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4OHtE4R6s_zZbDAgHzjF_SAMK-I2cb-h4AI6fYBluS8=)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106006492/540109601/701031030?refcode=em-4.17.25-launch-3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTEzNTk1ZTYtYTIxYi1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4OHtE4R6s_zZbDAgHzjF_SAMK-I2cb-h4AI6fYBluS8=)
_Alongside my family after graduating from CSU Bakersfield._
I’m the son of Mexican immigrants who came to this country with nothing but their work ethic and a hope for a better future.
I grew up poor, folks, and life wasn’t easy. I remember sleeping on the top bunk in the living room of a one-bedroom apartment.
I started working with my parents as a kid -- selling odds and ends at the swap meet on weekends, then learning to change oil and fix brakes in my dad’s auto shop when I got older.
**My parents never finished high school, but they taught me what mattered: dignity, family, community, and work. **
I was the first in my family to graduate college, and I earned a PhD because I wanted to come back home and teach Valley kids like me.
Today, I’m a college professor and an elected school board trustee. I ran for office to give back to the place that raised me -- and to make sure more students get the kind of shot my parents fought so hard to give me.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106006493/540109609/701031030?refcode=em-4.17.25-launch-3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTEzNTk1ZTYtYTIxYi1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4OHtE4R6s_zZbDAgHzjF_SAMK-I2cb-h4AI6fYBluS8=)
I know what it’s like to hold a flashlight under the hood of a car. I’ve stood next to students crying in my office because they couldn’t afford rent and tuition -- and I’ve made it my life’s work to fight for families like mine.
**The truth is so many in our Valley are still struggling. Our communities are working harder than ever, and still falling behind. Meanwhile billionaires and corporations hoard more than they’ll ever need.**
I never want to look back and feel like I stayed quiet while my students and my community were under attack.
Some stay silent because it’s easier -- or because they’re paid to. But I’ve made a different choice:**to show up, speak out, and fight back -- no matter what it costs.**
[**That’s why I’m in this race, and it’s why I’m asking for your trust and support. Will you pitch in $3, $35, or even $100 today to help launch this campaign with strength?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106006494/540109615/701031030?refcode=em-4.17.25-launch-3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTEzNTk1ZTYtYTIxYi1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4OHtE4R6s_zZbDAgHzjF_SAMK-I2cb-h4AI6fYBluS8=)
__If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106006495/540109622/701031030?refcode=em-4.17.25-launch-3&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTEzNTk1ZTYtYTIxYi1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4OHtE4R6s_zZbDAgHzjF_SAMK-I2cb-h4AI6fYBluS8=)

clean_body: | Friend, I just launched my campaign to unseat David Valadao in California’s 22nd District -- one of the most competitive House races in the country. This is one of the biggest decisions of my life, so before I ask for your support, I want to share my story. It’s the story of so many in the Central Valley -- a story of hard work, sacrifice, and hope. = | | = = Alongside my family after graduating from CSU Bakersfield. I’m the son of Mexican immigrants who came to this country with nothing but their work ethic and a hope for a better future. I grew up poor, folks, and life wasn’t easy. I remember sleeping on the top bunk in the living room of a one-bedroom apartment. I started working with my parents as a kid -- selling odds and ends at the swap meet on weekends, then learning to change oil and fix brakes in my dad’s auto shop when I got older. My parents never finished high school, but they taught me what mattered: dignity, family, community, and work. I was the first in my family to graduate college, and I earned a PhD because I wanted to come back home and teach Valley kids like me. Today, I’m a college professor and an elected school board trustee. I ran for office to give back to the place that raised me -- and to make sure more students get the kind of shot my parents fought so hard to give me. = I know what it’s like to hold a flashlight under the hood of a car. I’ve stood next to students crying in my office because they couldn’t afford rent and tuition -- and I’ve made it my life’s work to fight for families like mine. The truth is so many in our Valley are still struggling. Our communities are working harder than ever, and still falling behind. Meanwhile billionaires and corporations hoard more than they’ll ever need. I never want to look back and feel like I stayed quiet while my students and my community were under attack. Some stay silent because it’s easier -- or because they’re paid to. But I’ve made a different choice:to show up, speak out, and fight back -- no matter what it costs. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = This community deserves someone who knows this Valley -- and who’s ready to fight like hell for it. Thank you for being part of this. Con gratitud, Randy | With deep ties to our community and a lifelong commitment to justice and equity, Randy is running for Congress in California’s 22nd District to bring bold, compassionate leadership to Washington. To support Randy's campaign = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Paid for by Villegas for Congress Villegas for Congress PO Box 1346 Visalia, CA 93279 United States

| | | Hi friend, it's Senator Gillibrand. I'll keep this quick: **I need you to sign my urgent petition telling Trump he CANNOT shut down the Department of Education.**

Trump signed an order to do exactly that -- putting countless schools, educators, and young people's educations at risk -- and it is **_completely_** WRONG.

**We MUST act now.** I'm hoping to review the next 100,000 signatures by midnight tonight, so please add your name before then. **The most secure link to use is right here:** **[www.dscc.org/Education](http://go.dscc.org/go/21472?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250417-KirstenGillibrand-EDSignOn-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250417-KirstenGillibrand-EDSignOn-Pros-sl1&akid=20049%2E9716520%2E5AtIbi)**

With gratitude,

Kirsten

clean_body: | | | Hi friend, it's Senator Gillibrand. I'll keep this quick: I need you to sign my urgent petition telling Trump he CANNOT shut down the Department of Education. Trump signed an order to do exactly that -- putting countless schools, educators, and young people's educations at risk -- and it is completely WRONG. We MUST act now. I'm hoping to review the next 100,000 signatures by midnight tonight, so please add your name before then. The most secure link to use is right here: With gratitude, Kirsten Kirsten Gillibrand DSCC Chair If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded. | | The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please . to receive fewer emails. to unsubscribe. name: Del. Sam Rasoul
subject: GIVE Roanoke 2025, Blue Ridge Kite Festival, Earth Day Celebration, and more!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized By Friends of Sam Rasoul for Delegate
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Email%20Logo.png] [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Sam%20Headshot.png]
ACROSS THE COMMONWEALTH
VOTE TODAY! [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Make%20A%20Plan%20To%20Vote.png]
You can vote for November's elections NOW! Vote at your Registrar's office during business hours. Saturday early voting is available October 28th and November 4th. Learn More [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
Find your local Registrar's office here: https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/VWCC.jpeg] 15 years of the Community College Access Program at VWCC
Learn More [https://www.wdbj7.com/2023/09/26/virginia-western-celebrates-15th-anniversary-ccap-program/] CCAP is a successful public/private partnership that pays the cost of tuition for three years at Virginia Western Community College if a qualified student does not have sufficient financial aid to pay tuition costs.
This program has helped over 4,200 students achieve higher education!
CANDIDATE SPOTLIGHT
https://karenforvirginia.com/ [https://karenforvirginia.com/] Karen Jenkins for HB-89
Donate Here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/karenforvirginia] Karen Jenkins is a life-long resident of the City of Suffolk. Throughout her lifetime she has passionately advocated for others and currently serves on the Suffolk School Board with a proven track record and history of accomplishments. She is running for the House of Delegates for the 89th District to continue delivering results for the people of Virginia.
She is a champion for education, public safety and mental health. As your next Delegate for the 89th District, she will continue to fight and vote for meaningful policies and legislation to support the needs of the district. At the state level, she will be positioned to write and sponsor bills and laws to benefit the schools and communities in the 89th District and throughout the commonwealth.
LOCAL CANDIDATE EVENTS
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/lily%20canvass.png]
Canvass for Lily Franklin!
On Sundays, join Team Lily at the South County Library Parking Lot from 12 - 12:30 pm for a Roanoke canvassing event!
Bring your walking shoes, a charged cell phone, and water. When you arrive to their launch location you will receive a brief training and literature before being sent out to turf. Questions? Email Beth at egunter3@gmail.com [egunter3@gmail.com] or call 540-353-3645.
South County Library Parking Lot, 6303 Merriman Rd, Roanoke, VA 24018
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/sam%20and%20trish.jpg]
Canvass for Sam and Trish!
*this is a place holder until the new facebook event is created*
Join us Sunday to canvass for Sam and Trish! Meet our Field Coordinator, Dom, on September 3rd at the Williamson Road Library, 12:00pm.
Located at 3837 Williamson Rd, Roanoke, VA 24012.

Carilion Clinic vs. Lewis Gale Charity Softball Game - Oct. 1 Henrietta Lacks Statue Unveiling - Oct. 4
Join us for the 6th Annual Carilion Clinic vs. Lewis Gale Charity Softball Game, being held at the Home of the Salem Red Sox - Carilion Clinic Field. A dignified sculpture will commemorate the ongoing and long unrecognized contributions of Roanoke native Henrietta Lacks, who unknowingly provided the world with the HeLa cell, fueling decades of life-saving and life changing research.
Physicians, nurses and administrators will suit up for each hospital during the nine-inning contest. Proceeds will benefit the American Heart Association. Unveiling is October 4th at 11 am at Henrietta Lacks Plaza.
Admission is $5 at the gate, kids under 10 free. Gates open at 1pm and the game starts at 2pm. 410 3rd St SW, Roanoke, VA 24011

clean_body: [] [] ACROSS THE COMMONWEALTH VOTE TODAY! [] You can vote for November's elections NOW! Vote at your Registrar's office during business hours. Saturday early voting is available October 28th and November 4th. Learn More [] Find your local Registrar's office here: [] [] 15 years of the Community College Access Program at VWCC Learn More [] CCAP is a successful public/private partnership that pays the cost of tuition for three years at Virginia Western Community College if a qualified student does not have sufficient financial aid to pay tuition costs. This program has helped over 4,200 students achieve higher education! CANDIDATE SPOTLIGHT [] Karen Jenkins for HB-89 Donate Here [] Karen Jenkins is a life-long resident of the City of Suffolk. Throughout her lifetime she has passionately advocated for others and currently serves on the Suffolk School Board with a proven track record and history of accomplishments. She is running for the House of Delegates for the 89th District to continue delivering results for the people of Virginia. She is a champion for education, public safety and mental health. As your next Delegate for the 89th District, she will continue to fight and vote for meaningful policies and legislation to support the needs of the district. At the state level, she will be positioned to write and sponsor bills and laws to benefit the schools and communities in the 89th District and throughout the commonwealth. ## **[Stop Religious Discrimination Against Faith-Based Charter Schools](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=8bd1ee0ffabb4cf9baaeb15071c8bbcc&_e=RTcrlLEt-c35v-OEzPfBRrRcHVJ572OPwrPqksc-B7BA3xG2HW65wLIi3n7XjCtamHx85ibP_FVT7KY5oL5qBIQdhdEQcVn3h9wsgQ17KsD2Yph8bauxD2R4bT1f9NfHs9RERWovdSDHVYAeabkQR5Ym_z5CUlYnZY0WkiVBRw_BBmDepDMBE-orNxZP1VECShlHV7tIB5tt9aphEopC8sYGyEoKOkBMwlR6oaIDPGv5h4jGGhhDNvXysx_fau8yDWEMVEtsdBMhCAdCgIpTjBZ2jYWwHu_RVpztNitS5RFlOOBQbl7pO3jQhWxbLmR0CottpG-DstwlyPMHM9QrY0f8JHGb_lz3XkKmo4uEsZsZ_6FZDKxFnmcGmuHCIbek)**
Oklahoma actively discriminates against religion in its charter-school program.

St. Isidore of Seville Catholic Virtual School wants to be part of Oklahoma's charter-school program, and they're just as qualified as any non-religious charter school.

But because St. Isidore is religious, Oklahoma's Attorney General sued to force the Board to cancel St. Isidore's contract after the Board accepted its application. And the Oklahoma Supreme Court sided with the Attorney General.

That's why we're proud to defend the Board all the way to the Supreme Court.

We'll argue _Oklahoma Statewide Charter School Board v. Drummond_ this spring.

We're standing up to religious discrimination in Oklahoma to protect religious freedom in states across the country.

And we'd love for you to join us.
[ Give Now](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=8bd1ee0ffabb4cf9baaeb15071c8bbcc&_e=RTcrlLEt-c35v-OEzPfBRrRcHVJ572OPwrPqksc-B7BA3xG2HW65wLIi3n7XjCtamHx85ibP_FVT7KY5oL5qBIQdhdEQcVn3h9wsgQ17KsD2Yph8bauxD2R4bT1f9NfHs9RERWovdSDHVYAeabkQR5Ym_z5CUlYnZY0WkiVBRw_BBmDepDMBE-orNxZP1VECShlHV7tIB5tt9aphEopC8sYGyEoKOkBMwlR6oaIDPGuCCkACrX9Z_x1QwFmYxoSsGH80rn7pu73RzbYW8OC-AOfyyLKQKeup9sBGsoCnPtRFYOs1SulRyCo29oDxqFQgLceSD6KbRMNoV2frARJ4-IZZOgV8j1IM_0ELSRsK6BFa03Q3KHdr2nkoDqSYvcD4)

subject: 20 years of the National Memorial Day Parade
body:
It’s Gary Sinise here... I’m grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event
It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.
| | | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=85c75d7d7a0f4226bbcc274a827275b1&_e=6mUmCFjAYxenKAbr7lucjAIxsok5osFd4DnUFvSFKO8LT6RM0lKXLyAzgEffDXuVSKd8PEaoOFIY2OItO5AfH5QNP6LP7x1aQZC7Vu63XMhE4d7mlmIASOf0cP2OTHqRvNIlJ0oee0_yHx-EsamZCNqDQLrv7sujH7MigQR7l-13bNrGztVit5dTzm-FpfE6g7FjKSeqq2P1vdEIbDBiSrdTpgRzpR_xAQefbzo2oJ1SybH5yMuWUFf38Z9eCuUZJYVycsLu0Cc9CVgbc3kybPWIeFyENQpCYDs34WCOpyQr7hBzDiYbSRkkpFQEZh-S)
---
Friend, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 __and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.** This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. **[Friend, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=85c75d7d7a0f4226bbcc274a827275b1&_e=6mUmCFjAYxenKAbr7lucjAIxsok5osFd4DnUFvSFKO8LT6RM0lKXLyAzgEffDXuVSKd8PEaoOFIY2OItO5AfH5QNP6LP7x1aQZC7Vu63XMhE4d7mlmIASOf0cP2OTHqRvNIlJ0oee0_yHx-EsamZCNqDQLrv7sujH7MigQR7l-19B2vu7K9H-R0vRZgeKddkJl00FQH0SF0diiOtRIuw7r8ETupnkvt9xgSbH_cY2fsU52HJ25iyqj-sGDkgdtGhEho97ltzPEPho9KqvkdCINtZ15Lot_y0of-j0qhr4J9uDSB91h58ULkGx3-lf738)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=85c75d7d7a0f4226bbcc274a827275b1&_e=6mUmCFjAYxenKAbr7lucjAIxsok5osFd4DnUFvSFKO8LT6RM0lKXLyAzgEffDXuVSKd8PEaoOFIY2OItO5AfH5QNP6LP7x1aQZC7Vu63XMhE4d7mlmIASOf0cP2OTHqRvNIlJ0oee0_yHx-EsamZCNqDQLrv7sujH7MigQR7l-0gm-Ynfs5NOPrVuC_gl9jDv8YQOu7skE7_G-8fO7eH_4hhZ5bs3lArxwdMotIIQV9jXXbN85sJl-V0SrCTWwLhlk4M_KzALz1pZRpWfM7OR6K1fRF057LEhPzHC89N7erFF2wG_YMiQVsEclVY__OH)
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=85c75d7d7a0f4226bbcc274a827275b1&_e=6mUmCFjAYxenKAbr7lucjAIxsok5osFd4DnUFvSFKO8LT6RM0lKXLyAzgEffDXuVSKd8PEaoOFIY2OItO5AfH5QNP6LP7x1aQZC7Vu63XMhE4d7mlmIASOf0cP2OTHqRvNIlJ0oee0_yHx-EsamZCNqDQLrv7sujH7MigQR7l-1haomcb2qW70FfSmD-7qfpu9Pxc1-LxOu73pK5TrV6614_Al5hyF_7Kb4bdCMy8gbtP28ckxY60CqHQjten7DmivmQhBOhdsICOAxNkRjmZll3BCJ9Qz4ew31bK5X8hpl3Rs-JZTX6uygNl-k0Lw3v)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded _entirely_ by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=85c75d7d7a0f4226bbcc274a827275b1&_e=6mUmCFjAYxenKAbr7lucjAIxsok5osFd4DnUFvSFKO8LT6RM0lKXLyAzgEffDXuV5jxINdgPOXTqdgM7x0Fpct1qQ-q38zoZTwyY0RhAJL_FEeLdsOybWaai3JL-q8LqVGXrOyxgosVtZ1IugpJiOaFpbX6urHQAuWy2JDa5N-Bhq8NNBwuAP4-NWTjeiQbxiXQ3rVsVNjvX0FGeSOgewqEEmF0EBCzqEj8_WF9GPVRR3GORL4g8VnmrfoCN2bkM_U--UQd7CemtAXXgivk9mymzzJ39Wd0t7nxIlRN72PM%3D)[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=85c75d7d7a0f4226bbcc274a827275b1&_e=6mUmCFjAYxenKAbr7lucjAIxsok5osFd4DnUFvSFKO8LT6RM0lKXLyAzgEffDXuVSKd8PEaoOFIY2OItO5AfH5QNP6LP7x1aQZC7Vu63XMhE4d7mlmIASOf0cP2OTHqRvNIlJ0oee0_yHx-EsamZCNqDQLrv7sujH7MigQR7l-1DJ-9QlBQgyQHjOGv6voQW3mAekhAUm2aTbsOiLTMXHL9nk0DD3Ux15Bj7BcJZRaGnbc8I4jt_uZSYtI0SO8EXAMnq0FADig-1ZVf540XFvccZdIGwipvTVP52mfD5_7WylN8eZ0TeZs4_GkcM0Dup) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._** ** **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. ** So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us.
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=85c75d7d7a0f4226bbcc274a827275b1&_e=6mUmCFjAYxenKAbr7lucjAIxsok5osFd4DnUFvSFKO8LT6RM0lKXLyAzgEffDXuVSKd8PEaoOFIY2OItO5AfH5QNP6LP7x1aQZC7Vu63XMhE4d7mlmIASOf0cP2OTHqRvNIlJ0oee0_yHx-EsamZCNqDQLrv7sujH7MigQR7l-0Jo5YSLYZp8-wNyH9Gj4i7hNnQQeXjUhsh0KcX9d4ljvu-Ux2NTU8QSPpw8bNYKfd2v6jw2qffWXSKX-PoK8QnVaNuG6ff4UyHTNluyuvHzDU6O_znCGRBnsD01bgq_bxZarm3JiGyoFeyqL-OkYcx)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ _**[Friend, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=85c75d7d7a0f4226bbcc274a827275b1&_e=6mUmCFjAYxenKAbr7lucjAIxsok5osFd4DnUFvSFKO8LT6RM0lKXLyAzgEffDXuVSKd8PEaoOFIY2OItO5AfH5QNP6LP7x1aQZC7Vu63XMhE4d7mlmIASOf0cP2OTHqRvNIlJ0oee0_yHx-EsamZCNqDQLrv7sujH7MigQR7l-1JvlYEiMmHRe-Gm_wj-eg42Ber2vlBpZnZhC3tdhpOXVjuAPhsanQiGjcTdAQYbjW0alPzMD_VPxcb4ClOC2jZ6VBVT9hu7UXsQya5X_SuwU-4iKCh1ZpprEHENDr35JuLrmubYEdcJG5K28-bldYW)**_ Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=85c75d7d7a0f4226bbcc274a827275b1&_e=6mUmCFjAYxenKAbr7lucjAIxsok5osFd4DnUFvSFKO8LT6RM0lKXLyAzgEffDXuVSKd8PEaoOFIY2OItO5AfH5QNP6LP7x1aQZC7Vu63XMhE4d7mlmIASOf0cP2OTHqRvNIlJ0oee0_yHx-EsamZCNqDQLrv7sujH7MigQR7l-2kpFNIGFJnjtBfmSRNLo5DoYoats4KzOS5t9Ap5-_FSy-8cDAnd6agk0aiYDcdCyVCdniePGqipZuCW60VjoUmIIoA-wUmksLq6jSxRzYVhIgv7S2mQUWDjd5kkqhFSz5OIDv0WGSku_tv-MfbfExa)

A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center

I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event. But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded entirely by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country. Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like: Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever. Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam. Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom. If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get. You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade. That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us. And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. ** Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

subject: Let’s keep it going
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
Peter,
In case you missed it—our campaign had an incredible first week!
Grassroots supporters like you helped us hit some significant milestones (check out the details below 👇), and now we’re working to keep that momentum going strong.
If you haven’t had a chance to chip in yet, or want to help us go even further, donate today to help power week two! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2402-q2-jg-launch?refcode=250417-emailam]
Thanks for standing with Jena,
Jena for Colorado
----- Original Message -----
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2402-q2-jg-launch?refcode=250417-emailam [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2402-q2-jg-launch?refcode=250417-emailam]
Peter,
We just wrapped up our first week on the campaign trail, and we’re off to an incredible start.
Because of your support, and the support of so many Coloradans who believe in Jena’s vision for equality and justice for all, we raised over $230,000 from 1,100 individual donations in the campaign's first 48 hours.
That’s the power of a grassroots movement. People from every corner of Colorado are stepping up to support Jena’s fight.
Whether you gave $1 or $100, your support is helping us build a campaign that’s ready to take on extremists, defend reproductive freedom, and protect the rights of every Coloradan.
Thank you for being part of this movement.
Team Griswold

name: Michael Bennet
subject: I’m humbled by your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250417_launchheadlines_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250417_launchheadlines_act]
Hi folks, it’s Michael.
Last Friday, I kicked off our campaign for Colorado Governor, and I’ve been humbled by your response.
Thank you to everyone who has been an early supporter of our campaign and chipped in a few bucks. You’ve truly helped us hit the ground running and generate some real excitement for this race.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250417_launchheadlines_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250417_launchheadlines_act]
I’m running for Governor because I know Colorado can be a beacon of hope for our country when things seem at their darkest. As we’ve done before, Coloradans can provide the vision and leadership our nation so desperately needs.
It's right here in Colorado that we can most effectively fight Trump’s corruption while building a brighter future for our kids and grandkids—a future that focuses on all of us, not just the wealthy few.
We can make healthcare, housing, and childcare more affordable. We can support our entrepreneurs and help grow small businesses. We can bring our education system into the 21st century and lead the fight against climate change.
Together, we can take on the major challenges of our times. Friend, I’m going to need you with me to get it done. Can you join us by becoming a Founding Donor to my campaign now? I’d appreciate it. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250417_launchheadlines_act]

Thank you,
Michael

subject: My physical recovery was just half the battle
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shadow Warriors Project
body:
Hey, meet Rone
| | | | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a1c2ea6f42db43b8b7c343b2e04f62db&_e=HTd3G5O6JYVN7_LgnLOSSP-A2PeuHhL-X8OdyzHcgde6hLjX_Dwnfzmy3eK5LakoF_ZqlsVXjrtkTHQhSlEwSZ9OomuMyjYpa61rxfmrmaI96CSaGs2fk55Ml3j_cIvlgK-AIVw3NFIJMirzcIQ1YQO2K262E2L0NIE3k4xCkTGJYTkJG1L-E8x0zA9kmgY8Zq0qsipMWK6t8YIvGmzkM7UGC9ykHUxwtqOqFUGTleUeDO5gkkgLAlRiumIqDSO0sQHdgN4kUl1Jh30zqVTEvQ%3D%3D)
---
|
---
|
---
Friend, meet Rone.
She's 7 – and I’m proud to say she’s named in honor of Tyrone Woods, my fellow warrior who died next to me in Benghazi in 2012.
It will never come easy to talk about being abandoned by our government, _twice._
**Once for 13 hours in Benghazi, and again after I returned home without pay. **
My recovery process was long, costly and excruciating. I underwent 14 surgeries, primarily as a result of the shrapnel I took in my arms, neck and legs.
The physical recovery is just half of the battle, however. The other half was mental, but I got there, and Rone played a huge part in that.
This dog helped to bring me genuine healing and a new sense of purpose which I’ve channeled into helping other warriors facing similar challenges.
**Bonding a veteran with a service K9, and watching them train and grow together is an amazing thing to be a part of, and that’s why it’s such a big focus of ours at Shadow Warriors Project.**
Most military contractors, or “shadow warriors,” serve in classified programs for our government, and it's easy for them to be forgotten about.
Having been through it myself, I refuse to sit back when I have the power to help these warriors and their families who've given so much.
**[So here's my challenge for you today – make a tax-deductible donation, and empower us to bring healing, financial assistance and service K-9s to those who truly need and deserve it.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a1c2ea6f42db43b8b7c343b2e04f62db&_e=HTd3G5O6JYVN7_LgnLOSSP-A2PeuHhL-X8OdyzHcgde6hLjX_Dwnfzmy3eK5LakoF_ZqlsVXjrtkTHQhSlEwSZ9OomuMyjYpa61rxfmrmaI96CSaGs2fk55Ml3j_cIvl6Zb1pMIQYZ9-Q3qWr0oOCXGGiR4elj4jI3iPFE7fqeuqdovLDPvCkyIjuRkMZ8ZdO8AaHGCeQSUNwTwEqpFBYokCH8TeG5_WnlL-dJaen_Cjm14A8aYWx49y-TqVBWW1NXgFNmevaXJqrKy768Tw3w%3D%3D)**
Thanks for your time, and I hope we can count on your support.
Semper Fi,
Mark "Oz" Geist

|
---
[SUPPORT OUR WARRIORS >>](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a1c2ea6f42db43b8b7c343b2e04f62db&_e=HTd3G5O6JYVN7_LgnLOSSP-A2PeuHhL-X8OdyzHcgde6hLjX_Dwnfzmy3eK5LakoF_ZqlsVXjrtkTHQhSlEwSZ9OomuMyjYpa61rxfmrmaI96CSaGs2fk55Ml3j_cIvlvJtW69ZSgC-spNycObThjlpBOI9TIcjQUfjpRzEeTyl-AQfQfgkQ9pFI5v4Ljd_Wbmd2Tu0H0oiCsbhKpRgITeMQ_ck8-rVHkqx2Izt5XoYySPPdkhmEOFk5cBBI1UAMYS2NQqzFetLeqQc7EF5TVw%3D%3D)

name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: This is how we hold Democrats accountable
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Primary challenges aren’t a betrayal of the party – they’re how we build a stronger one.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250417-1&t=1&akid=1994%2E587540%2ESzZ1rF)
When a Democrat challenges another Democrat in a primary, there’s always someone who yells: _“You’re hurting the party!”_
**Here’s the truth, Peter: Primary challenges are part of a healthy democracy.**
🗳️ Hakeem Jeffries launched his career by primarying a sitting Democrat.
🗳️ Barack Obama did the same.
🗳️ AOC changed the game by unseating Joe Crowley.
This isn’t sabotage. It’s accountability.
At Leaders We Deserve, we’re making a **$20 million investment** to support bold, young progressive Democrats – including those taking on out-of-touch incumbents in safe blue seats.
**If a Democrat isn’t doing their job, we’re going to help elect a bold leader to take their place.**
**[Peter, this is how we revitalize our party and take back our future. Will you pitch in $5 to help us primary out-of-touch, ineffective Democrats and rebuild the party with the next generation of leaders?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250417-1?refcode=em20250417-1994&amount=5&refcode2=1994_587540_SzZ1rF&akid=1994%2E587540%2ESzZ1rF)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250417-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250417-1994&refcode2=1994_587540_SzZ1rF&akid=1994%2E587540%2ESzZ1rF)**
In solidarity,
Leaders We Deserve

subject: Act Now: Protect Our Social Security System from Corporate Overreach
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Local Democracy Project
body:
| | |
**[Tell Congress: Stop Musk and Trump from Destroying Social Security!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm396MCpkY7Ue0aOf7CTWHOaxF0PLuKHdus8zfIc4QXslPfD7FCMGXPWmlZhIpuRLyFVm_yBrh9ZmGmHya4iCKxTW-6jFd3h950QkIDqhUR2y0pbltJHXWXtPCmwH_QfzMXd2ArqLkPTumg0YJz6Gxkw8f7hQyfURD-938kHb83bY8ot4W7gwIltMxziAIBdao7Zx_Y6Xufk6Qh1JlBvocZxh8HEJMb6fTxUFIT-pMpH0MsMsbsBqk_seUmuYitOHBsYceYTg5EGO7FJgZqt0C9lPCbI0bdl5DCmOX51D4v8tv7GRtPUX_K-c-d8uNH16v17Za8zbNMpSf3YAi3ow_vzDmnOMHqojl-5pHufmw2V_cY5b4vbWQWASRb49qTpJGQwy3AK-kPa4hWEn9QyGOvEnxYqDO0Mn_o1SZSEO2G_6t2UCJuiq5eGURCqDd3NkHA4jGluk--3VML18rtZsxll0YveVMFErtkALMJz8t7lHM6czGqW-xkh0oXH7kK5vkYy5MqOpTM-UW4dgnth2a3hoceoYcL3L1yKrMtwEhpSiNh4xnNFKQBcOtPYYKD-X9a4/4fq/itDlVQFRRjSAJGXZonXRfg/h0/h001.KwJI7F7_Vt2CaN5lUXMPUQZXyZHHt1sR8uKpJy9CPUQ)**
* * *
Our Social Security system is under unprecedented threat, and we need your voice to help safeguard it. Despite their assurances. Elon Musk and Donald Trump are taking actions that could dismantle this vital program.
Musk's appointment of an unqualified DOGE affiliate as the acting commissioner has led to the mishandling of sensitive personal data and the dismissal of thousands of experienced Social Security workers.
These changes threaten the stability of benefits for millions of Americans, including our local seniors and residents with disabilities.
**Peter, we must take action to ensure that those who have faithfully contributed to Social Security receive the benefits they rightfully deserve.**
**[Join us and sign the petition in support of Social Security. Let us come together as a community and demand that Congress act to safeguard our Social Security system from corporate overreach.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm396MCpkY7Ue0aOf7CTWHOaxF0PLuKHdus8zfIc4QXslPfD7FCMGXPWmlZhIpuRLyFVm_yBrh9ZmGmHya4iCKxTW-6jFd3h950QkIDqhUR2y0pbltJHXWXtPCmwH_QfzMXd2ArqLkPTumg0YJz6Gxkw8f7hQyfURD-938kHb83bY8ot4W7gwIltMxziAIBdao7Zx_Y6Xufk6Qh1JlBvocZxh8HEJMb6fTxUFIT-pMpH0MsMsbsBqk_seUmuYitOHBsYceYTg5EGO7FJgZqt0C9lPCbI0bdl5DCmOX51D4v8tv44qzgMU5vX5UrGCcO-mMVwVos3laTZk83U1oo7awc-1O_ihAOqLmSCU0xgHVJ3JhcdkWdMFyF3JNnWL1flP9vUDDDQvppn8gFY5nJ0wjxk0r5qu-qrJJuEmNRMpjhX_EhabaGSoWcnqBhLKrKIsbXW9tyJuLVgvW1zauoTZ6LwhT-E6faTP1sSHw2FMlpFhy2fFJPijxCiuokjsGKa7l5k6euxbxeU7OiczPTxF43JZABoSYh_nWaHNrSDddziO8iLMgnzRizV4OocN5dN6UPc/4fq/itDlVQFRRjSAJGXZonXRfg/h1/h001.8Qpla_K3kj6ozafeRe734l9pXTwiVBdOg8fdjidIUh0)
**
[SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm396MCpkY7Ue0aOf7CTWHOaxF0PLuKHdus8zfIc4QXslPfD7FCMGXPWmlZhIpuRLyFVm_yBrh9ZmGmHya4iCKxTW-6jFd3h950QkIDqhUR2y0pbltJHXWXtPCmwH_QfzMXd2ArqLkPTumg0YJz6Gxkw8f7hQyfURD-938kHb83bY8ot4W7gwIltMxziAIBdao7Zx_Y6Xufk6Qh1JlBvocZxh8HEJMb6fTxUFIT-pMpH0MsMsbsBqk_seUmuYitOHBsYceYTg5EGO7FJgZqt0C9lPCbI0bdl5DCmOX51D4v8tv98hEN-zsrIFIQ60Cd46J4v5FryhNUAhME98PXMVDcqjIz7rr9kEg1Ngi0Ncspqwo9qhp363gEC5Ld85U02NNKbpDdxrogFKWGO1rikEXHFEaZsZ868splfJ1coAkqLdnYlI5i_MMhcmYMI6p7w9LySyZTVNucF33aQVY9QGtnhKTU1BqLg4lYV2xUkwkDHEXuKcJzgGY-DyTGe6c2LITo64Ba8yBYy0Uu4g4wDdSDsA-GjicCq9UhQPwJ0NTRgDzLvwLrqfY2goEQ22o1lPDJQ/4fq/itDlVQFRRjSAJGXZonXRfg/h2/h001.YCIcK74pbWgfQyqmgX09hx-4A_sWKeSJ_rO1p6nCyAU)
The closure of nearly 50 local Social Security offices exacerbates the problem, creating barriers for those who rely on in-person assistance.
Congressman John Larson has introduced a legislative package to address these urgent issues. His proposals, including the Keeping Our Field Offices Open Act and the Protecting Americans’ Social Security Data Act, aim to halt office closures and secure our personal data. Additionally, a Resolution of Inquiry seeks transparency about the actions taken by DOGE at the Social Security Administration.
**This is not just a national issue; it's a local crisis that affects our community directly. We must act to ensure that the people who have contributed to Social Security receive the benefits they deserve.**
******[We urge you to sign the petition supporting Rep. Larson’s efforts. Let’s unite as a community to demand that Congress act swiftly to protect our Social Security system from corporate overreach.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm396MCpkY7Ue0aOf7CTWHOaxF0PLuKHdus8zfIc4QXslPfD7FCMGXPWmlZhIpuRLyFVm_yBrh9ZmGmHya4iCKxTW-6jFd3h950QkIDqhUR2y0pbltJHXWXtPCmwH_QfzMXd2ArqLkPTumg0YJz6Gxkw8f7hQyfURD-938kHb83bY8ot4W7gwIltMxziAIBdao7Zx_Y6Xufk6Qh1JlBvocZxh8HEJMb6fTxUFIT-pMpH0MsMsbsBqk_seUmuYitOHBsYceYTg5EGO7FJgZqt0C9lPCbI0bdl5DCmOX51D4v8tv18manqE_f5ST2dkYG9dZMCgxmnGjkV5drN-TzRiwjDvc-fziFE86ZlWn5Xwyyp406UYJBbo6J2Fbs45sxuPhN4hPNu0hozl1m5AJYxDmO5UEDKQeKK2s6GWaqXQjuiW_BTj3P2qxWl5vxUNYNSXPPf-ZpGd_Jfiho__3tXeOXEFbRnQ8EE_KIdvLxvTkRZXDs2hm8f92ErEkKFUqm_KimNmjaOVr3uPQcK6Z3x2ttEzVEurovo4WWRqYQcb7fl09rlizVkSQIiSpiexWE70gT8/4fq/itDlVQFRRjSAJGXZonXRfg/h3/h001.43FLMEsQUO5BF-2QYvQ2OAKqE11vP-NL61gSPofWAeU) **

clean_body: | | | Our Social Security system is under unprecedented threat, and we need your voice to help safeguard it. Despite their assurances. Elon Musk and Donald Trump are taking actions that could dismantle this vital program. Musk's appointment of an unqualified DOGE affiliate as the acting commissioner has led to the mishandling of sensitive personal data and the dismissal of thousands of experienced Social Security workers. These changes threaten the stability of benefits for millions of Americans, including our local seniors and residents with disabilities. Peter, we must take action to ensure that those who have faithfully contributed to Social Security receive the benefits they rightfully deserve. The closure of nearly 50 local Social Security offices exacerbates the problem, creating barriers for those who rely on in-person assistance. Congressman John Larson has introduced a legislative package to address these urgent issues. His proposals, including the Keeping Our Field Offices Open Act and the Protecting Americans’ Social Security Data Act, aim to halt office closures and secure our personal data. Additionally, a Resolution of Inquiry seeks transparency about the actions taken by DOGE at the Social Security Administration. This is not just a national issue; it's a local crisis that affects our community directly. We must act to ensure that the people who have contributed to Social Security receive the benefits they deserve. ** Together, we can make a difference. -Local Democracy Project supports down-ballot races and empowering communities across the country. We’re rebuilding democracy from the ground up. To donate by check, please mail to: Local Democracy Project PO Box 720800 Pinion Hills, CA 92372 Paid for by Local Democracy Project. Contributions or gifts to Local Democracy Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Local Democracy Project, please .

name: Tom Fitton
subject: You Need to See This!
body:
“...A great organization run by people who truly love our country...that’s Judicial Watch. On behalf of all Americans, I thank them! They do a fantastic job!” President Donald J. Trump

| | |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

**"...A great organization run by people who truly love our country...that's Judicial Watch. On behalf of all Americans, I thank them! They do a fantastic job!" ** **President Donald J. Trump**
Judicial Watch has stood in support of **President Trump** against the lawfare against him and we appreciate his strong stance to curtail waste, fraud, and abuse in our government.
As you can see, the president thinks highly of our work as well!
[**Today, I hope you will help us with a special contribution so we can keep fighting so effectively and with such impact!**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73468&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX3Rlcm09TWF5&hash=24ba264bf954565daeac2ee37d0d2a82cb50b51bf88688fefb7acd5ba4a0eade)
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73468&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX3Rlcm09TWF5&hash=24ba264bf954565daeac2ee37d0d2a82cb50b51bf88688fefb7acd5ba4a0eade)
---

Today we are standing tall with President Trump on three critical legal policy fronts that _have long been at the heart of Judicial Watch 's mission and litigation_:

* _Ending_ illegal immigration
* _Taking_ on the Deep State
* _Protecting_ the honesty of elections

We are backing the **Trump administration 's** reversal of the Biden border invasion by enforcing our immigration laws, mass deportation of illegal aliens and securing our borders. We have had and have many lawsuits against illegal, so-called sanctuary policies.

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73468&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX3Rlcm09TWF5&hash=24ba264bf954565daeac2ee37d0d2a82cb50b51bf88688fefb7acd5ba4a0eade)
---

Our independent investigations and lawsuits forcing government transparency have gone a long way to countering the **Deep State 's** grip on critical policies...and they are continuing! Today, we have nearly 200 lawsuits on our docket...most of them against federal government agencies seeking key information that we all have every right to see.

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73468&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX3Rlcm09TWF5&hash=24ba264bf954565daeac2ee37d0d2a82cb50b51bf88688fefb7acd5ba4a0eade)
---

And no one matches our record in delivering _real_ courtroom wins in the constant battle for ballot integrity!

Our expert (and growing) team of lawyers and investigators are uniquely positioned to challenge the open borders lobby, expose any **Deep State** abuses unlawfully targeting the **Trump** administration, and lead the conservative charge to preserve **honest elections**.

But going to court is expensive!

**[That is why I hope you will help us today with a tax-deductible gift!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73468&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX3Rlcm09TWF5&hash=24ba264bf954565daeac2ee37d0d2a82cb50b51bf88688fefb7acd5ba4a0eade)**

I thank you in advance for your support of Judicial Watch!

Thomas Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73468&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX3Rlcm09TWF5&hash=24ba264bf954565daeac2ee37d0d2a82cb50b51bf88688fefb7acd5ba4a0eade)

Here are the latest, Peter:

Peter,
We’ve been sounding the alarm about Trump and MAGA’s plans to take down ActBlue.
Now it’s official:
According to a new Associated Press report, the Trump administration is preparing to use the full force of the federal government to prosecute both ActBlue and Indivisible—a group that’s organizing large protests against the Trump administration across the country.
Peter, this is no longer about public pressure or political messaging. It’s about destroying the infrastructure of the Democratic party and silencing dissent.

Here’s what we know:
The White House is preparing a formal rescission request to Congress that would trigger criminal investigations into both organizations.
ActBlue has already been forced to turn over documents and send staffers to testify behind closed doors. The group is now preparing for potential FBI and Treasury investigations over allegations that have been repeatedly debunked.
At the same time, Indivisible’s national leadership is working with lawyers to prepare for the possibility that its organizers could face criminal charges simply for organizing peaceful protests.

Trump’s far-right influencer army isn't hiding the intent. Charlie Kirk told supporters he believes the FBI will “do something on ActBlue soon.” Matt Schlapp, one of Trump’s closest confidants, said Democrats “need to get burned” so they don’t try to oppose him again.

name: Emily Randall
subject: Our new investigation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress
body:
I’m proud to be spearheading an investigation into Elon Musk’s conflicts of interest at the Department of Transportation.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106012058/540128848/2145945666?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.04.17_MuskDOT2_Wider&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTQ1NDAyNC1hYjFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rp-oxG0ob_x531idXCG4LxNeBRAlChEldyl2mTDymdY=&emci=e711f934-f11a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=9e454024-ab1b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=23483442) | Peter, **I’m proud to be spearheading an investigation into Elon Musk’s conflicts of interest at the Department of Transportation.** Musk’s companies receive $8 million of our taxpayer dollars every day. The people deserve to know exactly why our money is being steered into the bank account of the world’s richest man. Read our previous note for more details, and thank you so much for being on our team. — Emily
* * *
**PREVIOUS EMAIL:** We have an update from Congress, Peter. Along with other Democrats on the Oversight Committee, **Emily Randall just launched an investigation into Elon Musk’s conflicts of interest across the U.S. government.** [_**Elon Musk makes $8 million a day from contracts with the federal government.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106012059/540128849/-1154351202?hl=en&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.04.17_MuskDOT2_Wider&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTQ1NDAyNC1hYjFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rp-oxG0ob_x531idXCG4LxNeBRAlChEldyl2mTDymdY=&emci=e711f934-f11a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=9e454024-ab1b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=23483442) That’s our taxpayer money. Emily and Ranking Member Gerry Connolly are focusing their investigation on Musk’s dealings with the Department of Transportation (DOT): • Musk’s company, SpaceX, already had contracts with the government. But now, as head of “DOGE,” he is reportedly steering much larger DOT contracts to SpaceX and Starlink. • Musk brought in teams from SpaceX to help run the FAA, the airline safety agency, and brought in his own lawyers to run an “investigation” instead of the agency’s official watchdog. • Musk is trying to redirect a $2.4 billion communications contract the FAA had with Verizon to his own company, Starlink — using his position to sabotage his competitors. • FAA officials have specifically directed staff to work on a Starlink contract to upgrade airspace technology worth tens of millions of dollars. Look, there’s nothing “genius” about buying your way into power and using your influence to enrich yourself. **That’s corruption. That’s robbery.** As a team, Democrats on the House Oversight Committee, like Emily, Rep. Jasmine Crockett, and Rep. Maxwell Frost, are investigating Elon Musk’s conflicts of interest across the government. [_**Emily is standing up to the world’s richest man — and we’ve got to have her back! Chip in any amount to send a message that we want bold, aggressive action to take on Trump and Musk’s agenda →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106012060/540128850/1131891713?amount=6&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.04.17_MuskDOT2_Wider&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTQ1NDAyNC1hYjFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rp-oxG0ob_x531idXCG4LxNeBRAlChEldyl2mTDymdY=) clean_body: I’m proud to be spearheading an investigation into Elon Musk’s conflicts of interest at the Department of Transportation. | Peter, I’m proud to be spearheading an investigation into Elon Musk’s conflicts of interest at the Department of Transportation. Musk’s companies receive $8 million of our taxpayer dollars every day. The people deserve to know exactly why our money is being steered into the bank account of the world’s richest man. Read our previous note for more details, and thank you so much for being on our team. — Emily PREVIOUS EMAIL: We have an update from Congress, Peter. Along with other Democrats on the Oversight Committee, Emily Randall just launched an investigation into Elon Musk’s conflicts of interest across the U.S. government. That’s our taxpayer money. Emily and Ranking Member Gerry Connolly are focusing their investigation on Musk’s dealings with the Department of Transportation (DOT): • Musk’s company, SpaceX, already had contracts with the government. But now, as head of “DOGE,” he is reportedly steering much larger DOT contracts to SpaceX and Starlink. • Musk brought in teams from SpaceX to help run the FAA, the airline safety agency, and brought in his own lawyers to run an “investigation” instead of the agency’s official watchdog. • Musk is trying to redirect a $2.4 billion communications contract the FAA had with Verizon to his own company, Starlink — using his position to sabotage his competitors. • FAA officials have specifically directed staff to work on a Starlink contract to upgrade airspace technology worth tens of millions of dollars. Look, there’s nothing “genius” about buying your way into power and using your influence to enrich yourself. That’s corruption. That’s robbery.** As a team, Democrats on the House Oversight Committee, like Emily, Rep. Jasmine Crockett, and Rep. Maxwell Frost, are investigating Elon Musk’s conflicts of interest across the government. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = We’ll keep you updated! subject: Survey Results Are Here!

body:
We’ve read through the responses. |
---

| | | | At the end of last month, Lizzie asked you to share what matters most to you right now—what’s keeping you up at night and what you think we should do about it. We’re encouraged that so many Team Lizzie supporters took the time to respond. **If you haven’t taken the survey yet, there’s still time to tell us what’s on your mind. Lizzie is always listening—and your perspective helps shape our team’s priorities and plans.** | | | **[SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106012080/540128872/79071702?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWFlM2YyYS1hYjFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hDqTO7cEBHAAHO1JoU1ImU271lVzsdb97QyBNoVyecc=&emci=c74626f7-3d19-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=8eae3f2a-ab1b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=30230943)**
---
Lizzie and the team have read through your responses, and we want to share some of the key takeaways. Here are the top five issues on respondents said were on their minds, as well as the Trump administration policies and actions that are most concerning:
1️⃣ **Protecting the Constitutio** n – The administration’s defiance of court orders, attacks on judicial independence, and threats to impeach judges who rule against it.
2️⃣ **Government Stability** – The so-called “DOGE” group’s mass firings and dismantling of federal agencies under Elon Musk’s influence.
3️⃣ **Foreign Policy** – Aligning with Russia over Ukraine, abandoning key allies, and eliminating USAID.
4️⃣ **Social Security & Medicare** – Cuts to services at the Social Security Administration, threatening benefits for millions.
5️⃣ **Privacy** – Unchecked access to Americans’ data by the DOGE group, raising serious concerns about personal privacy and security.
Your responses paint a clear picture: there is deep and widespread concern about the Trump administration’s actions and their impact on our democracy, our rights, our economy, and our future. Lizzie and all of us on the team share these concerns.
But here’s the good news—we are not alone. Hundreds of you not only expressed your concerns but also offered powerful ideas for how to fight back. From legal pushback and public pressure to voter mobilization and demanding bold Democratic leadership.
**It’s also clear why winning back the House majority in 2026 is essential. Who we elect determines whether these issues are addressed—or ignored. The fight ahead won’t be easy, but it is so important that we keep going.**
[**_Please take a few minutes to share your thoughts and help shape our strategy moving forward. Your input is important and we want to hear from you._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106012081/540128873/79071702?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWFlM2YyYS1hYjFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hDqTO7cEBHAAHO1JoU1ImU271lVzsdb97QyBNoVyecc=&emci=c74626f7-3d19-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=8eae3f2a-ab1b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=30230943)

Team Lizzie

subject: A lot of people will be watching

body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1598%2E791427%2EuC1K8V)

Friend— One week ago today I launched my campaign for reelection to Congress, and the show of support has been incredible.
Over 2,500 folks chipped in over the last week to power our movement for a better future, and tens of thousands more have signed on to endorse me and my campaign.
**This is such a great start, but we have to keep up the momentum.**
You see, now that I’ve announced my campaign for reelection, lots of people will be watching our fundraising, from the press to far-right special interests to the mega-donors who may seek to fund my opponents.
If we can put up big fundraising numbers at the end of the month, we can send a message to those who seek to challenge us that our campaign will be hard to beat.
Then me and my team can spend less time campaigning and more time taking on Donald Trump’s administration and fighting for our progressive values.
It’s not even about how much money we raise, but rather the amount of folks who chip in. That’s how we show the size and strength of our campaign.
So please: **[Make a contribution of any amount and stand with my campaign today. Let’s show the competition that this grassroots team is bigger than ever and ready to win.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-april25.zbfFse&refcode=em250417-1-180&t=2&akid=1598%2E791427%2EuC1K8V)

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: Jackson-Hewitt Helps Illegals Claim $14K in Tax Refunds

| The Republican House Majority just passed the LARGEST cut to Medicaid in history!! Peter, this new budget would:
* Slash $880 billion from Medicaid – meaning states would have to severely roll back health care coverage for millions of people
* Decimate SNAP and other assistance programs that help low-income families access nutritious food
* Give major tax breaks to the 1% – while low- and middle-income Americans go without the resources they need to get by!!

[You’re not going to stand by and let Republicans do this, are you? Will you rush a donation to Blue Amp right away to help elect Democrats who will stand up for Medicaid and the lifesaving programs that Americans depend on? | Millions of Americans depend on crucial programs like Medicaid and SNAP to take care of themselves and their families. Without these services, people will go without lifesaving medical care, food, and other needs because they won’t be able to afford it! It’s absolutely ghoulish that the GOP would gut critical funding for Medicaid and SNAP – and then turn around and drop BILLIONS into Trump’s EXTREME deportation efforts!! We have to fight back now. We need to elect Democrats who can block the dangerous MAGA agenda from stripping Medicaid, SNAP, and other necessary programs Americans rely on. [Will you make an investment in Democrats today with a contribution to Blue Amp Action? Your gift will help get more Democrats in office who will stand up for the American people:](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tad8bd31b-5d09-4f97-b0b4-01d271ec9a16/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1a5bed76-250c-4cf1-b117-2c8f9ea6c6f4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Mississippi Freedom Awards – Another Announced!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/msfreedomawards-12848678?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
---
| Dear Friend, As we continue our **2025 Mississippi Freedom Awards** series, the **Mississippi Center for Public Policy** is proud to recognize a legislator who has been instrumental in the fight to modernize Mississippi’s healthcare system.

**Rep Sam Creekmore - Red Tape Reduction Hero**
---
|
---
_Rep Sam Creekmore presented with the Mississippi Freedom Award_
| Rep. Creekmore has demonstrated a deep commitment to healthcare reform by challenging the outdated regulations that hold back innovation and access in our state. His efforts to reduce burdensome red tape—particularly around **Certificate of Need (CON) laws** —have made him a vital voice in the push for a more responsive and patient-focused healthcare system. Working alongside leaders like Rep. Hank Zuber, Rep. Creekmore has helped lay the groundwork for future reform that will benefit families, providers, and communities across Mississippi. His dedication to cutting through bureaucracy and standing up for smart, conservative policy solutions earns him the well-deserved title of **2025 Red Tape Reduction Hero.** More recognitions are coming soon as we continue to highlight the lawmakers who fought for liberty this session. **The momentum is growing. The status quo is cracking.**

We’re proud to stand with leaders like Rep. Creekmore who are driving real, meaningful change.
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=279f1bd2fd&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _

Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013

| | | | | **Join Us! Campaign To Win 2026:****Team Alignment Meeting**
Be part of the **Campaign to Win 2026** this **Monday, April 21, 2025** , at **1PM** at Skyline View, St. Thomas,next to the look out. Board of Elections Barbara LaRonde will lead as Emcee.
The afternoon is about hearing from you, collecting key points, and forging a winning plan to dismantle the one-party system that has held us back for far too long.
Your voice drives this fight. Call 340-513-0265 or email admin@rpvi.org for more information. Share this event with friends and supporters to amplify our message.

name: Hillary Schneller
subject: Midwifery is sacred—and a powerful act of resistance.
body:
Black Maternal Health Week 2025 | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106014079/540136118/2141984067?sourceid=1150597&utm_campaign=25emcmu0402aaxon&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=bmhw&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTE0YzlhOS1hZTFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yn9wq235G6BNRA_3kI1z3chv6rSIpGB8jEvzVpjWkic=&emci=287557c9-971b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=ae14c9a9-ae1b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106014080/540136119/2141984067?sourceid=1150597&utm_campaign=25emcmu0402aaxon&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=bmhw&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTE0YzlhOS1hZTFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yn9wq235G6BNRA_3kI1z3chv6rSIpGB8jEvzVpjWkic=&emci=287557c9-971b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=ae14c9a9-ae1b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237)
---|---
Dear Peter, Midwifery is more than care—it’s a legacy of wisdom, resilience, and power passed down through generations. This **Black Maternal Health Week** , we’re honoring the Black midwives who are not only preserving sacred traditions but reshaping the future of birth justice.

In Hawaiʻi, our client Ezinne Dawson is among those leading that charge. [**Ezinne is the only Black licensed midwife practicing in the state. She has joined forces with Indigenous midwives to fight for pregnant people’s right to access respectful care rooted in cultural knowledge without fear their care providers will be punished or criminalized.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106014081/540136120/-341030274?sourceid=1150597&utm_campaign=25emcmu0402aaxon&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=bmhw&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTE0YzlhOS1hZTFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yn9wq235G6BNRA_3kI1z3chv6rSIpGB8jEvzVpjWkic=&emci=287557c9-971b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=ae14c9a9-ae1b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106014082/540136121/-341030274?sourceid=1150597&utm_campaign=25emcmu0402aaxon&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=bmhw&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTE0YzlhOS1hZTFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yn9wq235G6BNRA_3kI1z3chv6rSIpGB8jEvzVpjWkic=&emci=287557c9-971b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=ae14c9a9-ae1b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237) [**Our court victory last summer was an important step forward—and the passage of HB 1194 earlier this week brings additional progress.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106014083/540136122/1871635698?sourceid=1150597&utm_campaign=25emcmu0402aaxon&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=bmhw&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTE0YzlhOS1hZTFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yn9wq235G6BNRA_3kI1z3chv6rSIpGB8jEvzVpjWkic=&emci=287557c9-971b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=ae14c9a9-ae1b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237) But the bill falls short of fully protecting pregnant people’s decisions about how, where, and with whom they give birth. Everyone deserves that right. We’ll keep working with legislators and communities to make this vision a reality in Hawai‘i.

[**🎥 Watch the video on Instagram to hear Ezinne’s story and learn what’s at stake.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106014084/540136123/-1825748354?sourceid=1150597&utm_campaign=25emcmu0402aaxon&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=bmhw&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTE0YzlhOS1hZTFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yn9wq235G6BNRA_3kI1z3chv6rSIpGB8jEvzVpjWkic=&emci=287557c9-971b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=ae14c9a9-ae1b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237)

This is not just a fight over policy. It’s a fight over who gets to shape the future of care. Let’s honor the midwives who refuse to be silenced. Let’s protect the right to give and receive care rooted in dignity, culture, and community.

In solidarity,

Hillary Schneller

clean_body: Black Maternal Health Week 2025 | | | ---|--- Dear Peter, Midwifery is more than care—it’s a legacy of wisdom, resilience, and power passed down through generations. This Black Maternal Health Week , we’re honoring the Black midwives who are not only preserving sacred traditions but reshaping the future of birth justice. In Hawaiʻi, our client Ezinne Dawson is among those leading that charge. But the bill falls short of fully protecting pregnant people’s decisions about how, where, and with whom they give birth. Everyone deserves that right. We’ll keep working with legislators and communities to make this vision a reality in Hawai‘i. This is not just a fight over policy. It’s a fight over who gets to shape the future of care. Let’s honor the midwives who refuse to be silenced. Let’s protect the right to give and receive care rooted in dignity, culture, and community. In solidarity, Hillary Schneller Senior Staff Attorney | "DONATE NOW" | | | | ---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. | | **Earlier this month, I joined the Hands Off! Rally in Snohomish County.** The basic message: Donald Trump, hands off America. His indiscriminate cuts and harmful executive orders are not helping anyone. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106014428/540137536/1596212816?refcode=2025-04-17-handsoff&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=2bef307e-af1b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmVmMzA3ZS1hZjFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cnfppn8IF2YFQTQL9bA7iJPS8gJb35f2zSdbPRzeFpM=)
The Hands Off! Rally took place all over Northwest Washington - from Mount Vernon, Friday Harbor, Bellingham, Shaw Island, Oak Harbor, and all over the country. **So many people took part in this rally, and the message is loud and clear:**
* Hands off Medicaid
* Hands off Social Security
* Hands off our friends and neighbors
* Hands off our infrastructure
* Hands off affordable food
* Hands off our national security

Trump, Musk, and their Republican Rip-Off are putting families in Northwest Washington at risk, and it is about time they get their hands off. **We have 565 days until November 3rd, 2026, and we can get the House of Representatives back.** We have to keep showing up for these next 565 days and continue to stand up against this administration. Thank you for showing up, voicing your concerns, and continuing to fight back. subject: there are TWO Republican Senators LEAVING?!?!!!?!!
body:
HELP DEMS WIN TWO HOUSE SEATS IN FLORIDA >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
