Friend,
Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and the GOP aren’t wasting any time pushing for more policies that hurt American families – so I’ll keep this quick:
1.) **Trump’s** new tariffs are _wreaking havoc_ on our economy – increasing costs on imported goods, creating stock market chaos, and forcing small businesses to make impossible decisions.
2.) **Musk’s** _ _ incompetent team is continuing to fire crucial federal workers, cut staffing at Medicare and the Social Security Administration, and illegally withhold vital government funding.
3.) **Senate Republicans** are pushing for _devastating_ cuts to Medicaid and food assistance to pay for more tax breaks for billionaires.
It couldn’t be more clear that Trump, Musk, and the GOP will only continue to implement policies that hurt American families and push to enrich the ultra-wealthy, friend.
**That’s why I’m looking for 100 supporters from ****37087**** like you to respond to my new strategy survey before midnight. | | **_Meet Russell:_** Born and raised in Surfside Beach, SC, Congressman Russell Fry is the proud and homegrown Representative for South Carolina’s 7th Congressional District. Growing up in a cinder block home with no heating or air conditioning, Russell learned at an early age that hard work and perseverance pave the only true path to the American Dream. He watched his parents work day in and day out to make ends meet. And the values they instilled in him during his upbringing led Russell to self-fund both his undergraduate education at the University of South Carolina, and later his law studies at the Charleston School of Law. At Charleston, Russell served as the President of the Student Bar Association and even helped the school achieve its American Bar Association accreditation. He went on to practice law in the Grand Strand area for over a decade before entering the political arena to serve in the South Carolina House of Representatives for State House District 106 (Horry County). During his seven-year tenure in the SC House, Russell fought to safeguard Constitutional liberties, lower taxes, and put the best interests of South Carolina families above all else. He climbed the ranks to become Chief Majority Whip, and also chaired the House Opioid Prevention Study Committee. Under Russell’s leadership, 18 policy initiatives to combat the opioid crisis were signed into law. Since the first day he stepped foot in Washington, Russell has strived to shake up the corrupt status quo and deliver real change for the American people. He believes adamantly that so long as the American people stand united, we can keep the American Dream alive for every citizen of our great nation. Russell is a dedicated husband to his wife, Bronwen, and a loving father to his son, James. The family lives in Murrells Inlet with their chocolate lab, Jasper.

clean_body: They’re the new faces of the Democratic Party. | | | | | | Peter, After enduring an electoral wipeout on behalf of the American people last November, one would think that the Democrats would take a look in the mirror, reflect, and tone down their radicalism. But sadly, it would appear they have every intention of doing the opposite. Democrats are doubling down on their extreme left-wing ideology going into 2026 to the point where | | | | | | | | | | | | Peter, looking at the state of American politics in 2025 – we have no interest in playing games with the extreme leftists on transforming the U.S. into a third-world country. They believe in anarchy by prioritizing illegal immigrants and criminals over American citizens. We believe in law & order and personal accountability for one’s own actions. They believe in collectivism – they think everyone who works hard should have to take care of everyone who doesn’t. We believe in individualism – we know that those who find success worked their tails off to achieve it. Peter, AOC, Bernie Sanders, and the radical-left Democrats believe that socialism is the foundation of America’s future. We believe that freedom will always reign supreme here in the greatest country mankind has ever known. We’re asking for a minute of your time to complete our so we can gauge public opinions on the NEW faces of the Democratic Party. | | | | | Thank you for your time – and thank you for being a PATRIOT. For Liberty, Team Fry Polling | | | | | | | | | Meet Russell: Born and raised in Surfside Beach, SC, Congressman Russell Fry is the proud and homegrown Representative for South Carolina’s 7th Congressional District. Growing up in a cinder block home with no heating or air conditioning, Russell learned at an early age that hard work and perseverance pave the only true path to the American Dream. He watched his parents work day in and day out to make ends meet. And the values they instilled in him during his upbringing led Russell to self-fund both his undergraduate education at the University of South Carolina, and later his law studies at the Charleston School of Law. At Charleston, Russell served as the President of the Student Bar Association and even helped the school achieve its American Bar Association accreditation. He went on to practice law in the Grand Strand area for over a decade before entering the political arena to serve in the South Carolina House of Representatives for State House District 106 (Horry County). During his seven-year tenure in the SC House, Russell fought to safeguard Constitutional liberties, lower taxes, and put the best interests of South Carolina families above all else. He climbed the ranks to become Chief Majority Whip, and also chaired the House Opioid Prevention Study Committee. Under Russell’s leadership, 18 policy initiatives to combat the opioid crisis were signed into law. Since the first day he stepped foot in Washington, Russell has strived to shake up the corrupt status quo and deliver real change for the American people. He believes adamantly that so long as the American people stand united, we can keep the American Dream alive for every citizen of our great nation. Russell is a dedicated husband to his wife, Bronwen, and a loving father to his son, James. The family lives in Murrells Inlet with their chocolate lab, Jasper. | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | Team Fry is incredibly grateful for your generosity and support. If you’re not in a position to donate, we would NEVER want you to do so. You can still make an impact by signing up to volunteer below! | | | | | We have new merchandise lines set to release throughout the course of 2025. Click the link below to visit Team Fry’s official online store and grab your gear today! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ⬇DONATE BY CHECK⬇ Russell Fry for Congress PO Box 14641 Surfside Beach, SC 29587 | | | | | | | | | | | | | |

We're asking all of our donors to join our Red Wave Challenge. This is the BIGGEST grassroots effort we've ever launched to make sure we secure Republican victories up and down the ballot. ****** Peter, you are a dedicated grassroots conservative, and understand the stakes. Your contributions help the RNC maintain up-to-date voter records and data, crucial for maximizing resources and countering the Democrats' financial advantage. The Democrats have BILLIONS at their disposal, and they're not afraid to use it. We need to FIGHT BACK, and we need to do it NOW. That's why I'm asking you to join the Red Wave Challenge. Your donation, no matter the size, will make a HUGE difference. It will help us fund critical ad buys, mobilize volunteers, and get our message out to voters across the country. **** We MUST stand together. We MUST fight for our values. We MUST secure our future. Peter, it’s Valerie Foushee –

After _unlawfully_ cutting federal funding for North Carolina’s health services and medical research, Trump and Elon Musk are now targeting federal workers who defend our public health and safety. [Will you take a minute to sign my petition to stand up for federal health workers and protect the vital services that our children, families, and communities rely on?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106014935/540139429/320476456?source=SBD_VF_EM_PET_041725_HHSCuts_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2EzMmQwMi1iMTFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WZhbfNdBkMtHMTPCgATEJ3w9bYeo4ZVxu0slUkwjJGY=&emci=220114fc-b01b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=3ca32d02-b11b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=799895) | [SIGN ON → DEFEND HHS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106014936/540139430/320476456?source=SBD_VF_EM_PET_041725_HHSCuts_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2EzMmQwMi1iMTFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WZhbfNdBkMtHMTPCgATEJ3w9bYeo4ZVxu0slUkwjJGY=&emci=220114fc-b01b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=3ca32d02-b11b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=799895)

I know it’s a lot to take in, so let me break it down for you:
**FIRST:** Last week, **Trump eliminated 10,000 jobs** across the Department of Health and Human Services — impacting agencies like the CDC, NIH, and FDA that provide well-paying jobs, research funding, and health services in our Research Triangle.

**THEN:** Because of the massive layoffs, North Carolina’s **seniors, disabled, and low-income people are at risk of losing critical services**. Informational websites and hotlines for food safety are seeing outages, and programs like Meals on Wheels are at risk of shutting down.

**NOW:** Trump is gearing for **even more layoffs and funding cuts** at the HHS and it’s on ALL OF US to stand up for the health and well-being of our children, families, and communities.
That’s why my Democratic colleagues and I are fighting back in Congress to protect the HHS from Trump’s attacks [If you’re in this fight with me, will you sign my petition to stop the layoffs of federal health workers and protect North Carolina’s public health, safety, and jobs? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106014938/540139432/320476456?source=SBD_VF_EM_PET_041725_HHSCuts_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2EzMmQwMi1iMTFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WZhbfNdBkMtHMTPCgATEJ3w9bYeo4ZVxu0slUkwjJGY=&emci=220114fc-b01b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=3ca32d02-b11b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=799895)

clean_body: If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Peter, it’s Valerie Foushee – After unlawfully cutting federal funding for North Carolina’s health services and medical research, Trump and Elon Musk are now targeting federal workers who defend our public health and safety. | I know it’s a lot to take in, so let me break it down for you: FIRST: Last week, Trump eliminated 10,000 jobs across the Department of Health and Human Services — impacting agencies like the CDC, NIH, and FDA that provide well-paying jobs, research funding, and health services in our Research Triangle. THEN: Because of the massive layoffs, North Carolina’s seniors, disabled, and low-income people are at risk of losing critical services. Informational websites and hotlines for food safety are seeing outages, and programs like Meals on Wheels are at risk of shutting down. NOW: Trump is gearing for even more layoffs and funding cuts at the HHS and it’s on ALL OF US to stand up for the health and well-being of our children, families, and communities. That’s why my Democratic colleagues and I are fighting back in Congress to protect the HHS from Trump’s attacks Thanks for your support, Peter. Valerie Foushee * | | | ---|---|--- = Valerie is fighting to protect access to health care, working families, and to reform our criminal justice system. But she needs your help to continue to do this great work in Congress. body:
This is ridiculous...
| | Team, there are **3 things** you must know:

**1:** Republicans are ATTACKING Costco for standing up against Trump’s DEI rollback — they want to _DESTROY_ Costco’s business: [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-costco?source=VPP_20250417_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=6&akid=19557%2E878179%2EKWw5VI) **2:** Costco refuses to fall in line with Trump – but they’re facing _MASSIVE backlash_ for it, and it could cost them their _entire_ business!

name: Senate Map Update
subject: Six must-win toss up races
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
The Long Run has a proven record of success in races like these, and that’s been because of your support
#
Team — Another update here on the Senate map for the 2026 midterms.
With Democratic Senators Tina Smith and Jeanne Shaheen retiring next year, the senate races in Minnesota and New Hampshire are now officially **_toss-ups.**_
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-april25.epcG-f&refcode=em250417-1-300&t=1&akid=5524%2E196590%2EgLP-U9)
That brings the amount of toss-up races in the Senate next year to six. These are must-win races if we want to take the majority in the near future:
* Georgia
* North Carolina
* New Hampshire
* Maine
* Michigan
* Minnesota

**Team — The Long Run has a proven record of success in races like these, and that’s been because of the support of people like you.**
From Arizona, to North Carolina, to here in Wisconsin – in races for both House and Senate – we were able to provide crucial resources to candidates who won some very close races last year.
And just a couple weeks ago we helped defeat a far-right candidate for Wisconsin’s Supreme Court and protect the progress we’ve made on abortion rights, ballot access, and more.
Recommitting to our work is more important now than ever with Trump and Elon Musk pursuing their far-right agenda and the Republican party happily enabling them.
You can bet that they have been calling around to their corporate mega-donors following the news out of Minnesota and New Hampshire as they look to expand their majority and cement their extremist rule.
[**Please, help us continue to improve our track record and help deliver big wins for the fight for democracy in the midterms. Invest in the next wave of changemaking candidates by making your first contribution to The Long Run today.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-april25.epcG-f&refcode=em250417-1-300&t=2&akid=5524%2E196590%2EgLP-U9)

name: JanePAC.com
subject: we're short of our Earth Day goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Grassroots supporters are stepping up before Earth Day. Will you?

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106016281/540144480/1328794144?refcode=ea.a1cb2b1a-b41b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.a1cb2b1a-b41b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImExY2IyYjFhLWI0MWItZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UJkdxN-v9fcdm2Wwl-1kAcxgseF7cUeKxmbRAFkZAG0=&emci=9dcb2b1a-b41b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=a1cb2b1a-b41b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4823105)

If you’re sick and tired of billionaires like Donald Trump selling off our planet to the highest bidder, there’s never been a more critical moment to act. **[We have 5 days until Earth Day — and we’re racing to raise $25,000 to go toe-to-toe with fossil fuel billionaires and elect leaders at every level of government who want to protect our planet, not exploit it. clean_body: Grassroots supporters are stepping up before Earth Day. Will you? | If you’re sick and tired of billionaires like Donald Trump selling off our planet to the highest bidder, there’s never been a more critical moment to act. = Here’s where things stand: ❌ Donald Trump just signed a series of executive orders to keep toxic coal plants running and roll back protections on mercury, arsenic, and other toxic chemicals — putting the very communities he was elected to serve at risk. ❌ As you read this, Trump and Musk are working to eliminate NOAA’s climate research arm and close ALL weather and climate labs — threatening the data we rely on to track and prepare for extreme weather. ❌ And just last month, Trump’s EPA launched the most consequential environmental protection rollback in U.S. history: 31 sweeping actions to deregulate power plants, oil drilling, car emissions, and toxic air standards. The EPA’s own administrator called it “a dagger straight into the heart of the climate change religion.” There’s no sugarcoating it: Trump’s attacks are just getting started, which is why we turn to you as often as we do. Transparently, what we raise from emails like this one allows us to plan ahead and invest early in climate champions who actually give a damn about us, our futures, and our planet. But that strategy is contingent on us hitting our very real $25,000 Earth Day goal. name: Jimmy Panetta
subject: Tariffs weaken our economy and security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jimmy Panetta for Congress 2024, FEC ID# C00592154
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106016279/540144478/-2113420158?refcode=EM_NBI_JP_20250417_FR_Tariffs_0_6MO_JimmyPanetta_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2FiMDUzYS1iNDFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R2JwyYnP8x3LDMMMFjZFgb2E_EuIiK2c1B1Y61Qr7BM=&emci=a4bcbe33-b41b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=fcab053a-b41b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=6108787) | Peter,

**President Trump’s tariffs are the largest self-inflicted wound on our economy in our history.

Tariffs are essentially taxes on working families costing them _over $3,800 a year._

Tariffs triggered one of the most volatile 3-day market downturns since WWII.

Tariffs push our allies towards China.

Tariffs are taxes paid by Americans.

I’m fighting hard to stop this overreaching tariff policy and reclaim our Congressional Constitutional authority over our trade policy.

name: Teichert in the Trenches
subject: Dragon’s Definition of Leadership
body:
I’ve seen the definitions of others, and they all seem to be missing something
---
| | | | | |
---
| | 💥******Dragon’s Definition of Leadership – Creating Unique Futures, Sustainable Successes, Thriving Communities, and Flourishing Individuals**
---
I’ve been thinking about leadership my entire adult life as both a subject of it and a practitioner of it. I’ve seen the definitions of others, and they all seem to be missing something or are too complex or too wordy. What you see written above is my attempt to succinctly and completely define a practice that is critical to society. You’ll notice that the leadership bar is set high, and we must demand that it remains there! I have intentionally woven together each piece of this definition. A detailed description could fill a book – and maybe someday it will – but for now I’ll keep my top-level thoughts as brief as possible. ** _Creating_**
Leaders Create! Leadership is a creative act that brings about all of the outcomes that are described in the following phrases. ** _Unique Futures_**
Leaders Produce Something Different and Distinct! Leaders yield something that never would have happened without them! Leadership generates results that are different from current conditions. It also creates a future that is distinct from the natural extension of the prevailing trajectory. Leadership adjusts culture, climate, and output in ways that aren’t marginally different than the status quo; they are fundamentally different from it. Managers only strive to tweak the status quo to make it slightly better. Leaders positively and definitively shift the pathway of the organization and the lives of the people who are in it. Through an inspiring and compelling vision, and a passionate pursuit of that vision, they take their team to places that would have been previously unthinkable. ** _Sustainable Successes_**
Outcomes Matter! Leadership turns activity into meaningful and lasting results. It yields positive outcomes that are focused on furthering the core purpose of the organization. It exudes integrity, trust, character, and credibility. A drastically unsuccessful result – in culture, climate or output – is not leadership! Individuals who create something that is toxic to communities, that is onerous to individuals, or that falls far short of the core purpose of the organization are not leaders. Call them what you want, but they haven’t earned the esteemed mantle of leadership nor the title of leader. Those who simply “mind the store” and hope to ride out their positional tenure without the controversy that often comes from bold pursuits are also not leaders. Unsustainability is equally antithetical to leadership. Short term successes that quickly unravel are not fitting for those who are called leaders. Long-term failures often result from self-serving attempts to use a position to bring about personal glory or to yield individual promotion. None of this belittles shortcomings in the pursuit of noble goals and compelling visions. Failures are natural, and taking measured and intentional risks is a critical part of a leader’s attempts to bring about long-term success, even if it means that some of the mid-term results will suffer. ** _Thriving Communities_**
Leaders Turn Teams Into Families! A leader’s team is their primary focus. Society is plagued by a lack of employee engagement that costs trillions of dollars in lost global productivity. A leader ignites explosive engagement when they focus on doing a few things relentlessly and right: casting a bold vision, setting broad constraints in achieving that vision, properly resourcing to achieve that vision, breaking down barriers that impede that vision, and getting out of the way. In order to unlock innate human talent and propel their team, a leader creates a culture where any member of the team with an idea knows that a leader will listen to it, consider it, and act appropriately on it. This same leader prioritizes the creation of other leaders through deliberate and intentional development that magnifies their sustainable impact well beyond the present situation and the current organizational construct. They replicate their genuine care and concern for people, and model the bearing of burdens and the celebration of successes. Through their leadership, their team is better characterized as a family unit than an organizational structure. A leader, however, doesn’t neglect the broader environment in which their team operates. They scan their environment, build relationships across that environment, and seek opportunities for mutual benefit throughout that environment. They pursue win-win solutions with other teams through a broad perspective of success that dwarfs the selfish myopia of zero-sum outcomes. Their team’s success is contagious as it spreads to others. ** _Flourishing Individuals_**
Leaders Employ Genuine Care and Concern! Leaders focus on helping the members of their team become the best possible version of themselves – an act that stems from genuine care and concern for individuals and their families. The members of a team create the success of the organization in the present, and through a leader’s intentional investment, will go on to serve with oversized impact wherever they go and whatever they do. The servant-mindedness of a leader will employ a range of leadership techniques that should be applied personally, situationally, and individualistically to inspire, mold, and shape the members of their team. This process is always accompanied by communicating relentlessly while setting clear expectations, maintaining high standards, and employing regular feedback. It creates individuals who are constantly growing and who help others to grow. ** _Summary_**
I fully acknowledge that creating a definition of leadership has been done throughout history by great minds and successful leaders. Mine is unique partly because leadership must be tailored to the personality and mindset of each leader to be genuine and authentic. This one works for me (for now). I suspect that several of you may have constructive criticism and I would love to hear it. Please reach out and let me know what you think. In the meanwhile, LEAD WELL, and remember that leaders create, leaders produce something that is different and distinct, outcomes matter, leaders turn teams into families, and leaders employ genuine care and concern.
* John

| | | | **Teichert in the Trenches**
---
| Washington, DC
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com
---
| You've received this email because you've subscribed to our newsletter.
---
| [Unsubscribe](https://eufi5.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/un/sh/SMJz09a0vkbXqU0NAdDsZ4A0AXaC/_wRJBhncpXHi)
---

subject: The constitutional crisis is here

body:
|
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106016599/540145637/-1686146655?refcode=WUENE438_20250417_ConstitutionalCrisis_PL_v1s1&sourceid=1055967&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWE5ODc3ZS1iNDFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3C4mgfLU26o9pG9iTxXFEbJQmVebLSmbsV2dVcGmnfw=) Last week, the Supreme Court of the United States issued a _unanimous_ 9-0 ruling: The Trump administration must facilitate the return of Kilmar Abrego Garcia, a Maryland man who was wrongfully deported and sent to a dangerous prison in El Salvador.

Donald Trump and his top advisers have refused.

This is not a policy disagreement. This is ignoring the highest court in our land — a brazen rejection of the Constitution, the rule of law, and the balance of power that we all learned about in middle school civics. Trump is showing us that he thinks he's above the law.

But like every bully and tinpot dictator, he only wins if we give up. And that's not us. EMILYs List is committed to electing pro-choice, pro-democracy women up and down the ballot and across the country. As we build state centers of power, one focus is the courts — they're becoming the last line of defense against the tyranny of this administration. _And we can win._ Look at Justice-elect Sarah Crawford beating back Elon Musk's millions in the Wisconsin Supreme Court election this month.

We're fighting to elect women at every level who will uphold our rights, protect our freedoms, and push back against authoritarian overreach. Thanks for being part of it.

– EMILYs List | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106016601/540145639/-1686146655?refcode=WUENE438_20250417_ConstitutionalCrisis_PL_v1s1&sourceid=1055967&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWE5ODc3ZS1iNDFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3C4mgfLU26o9pG9iTxXFEbJQmVebLSmbsV2dVcGmnfw=)

clean_body: | = Last week, the Supreme Court of the United States issued a unanimous 9-0 ruling: The Trump administration must facilitate the return of Kilmar Abrego Garcia, a Maryland man who was wrongfully deported and sent to a dangerous prison in El Salvador. Donald Trump and his top advisers have refused. This is not a policy disagreement. This is ignoring the highest court in our land — a brazen rejection of the Constitution, the rule of law, and the balance of power that we all learned about in middle school civics. Trump is showing us that he thinks he's above the law. But like every bully and tinpot dictator, he only wins if we give up. And that's not us. EMILYs List is committed to electing pro-choice, pro-democracy women up and down the ballot and across the country. As we build state centers of power, one focus is the courts — they're becoming the last line of defense against the tyranny of this administration. And we can win. Look at Justice-elect Sarah Crawford beating back Elon Musk's millions in the Wisconsin Supreme Court election this month. We're fighting to elect women at every level who will uphold our rights, protect our freedoms, and push back against authoritarian overreach. Thanks for being part of it. – EMILYs List | = EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. name: Emilia Sykes
subject: Why I’m in this fight →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
This is my promise to you.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106016668/540145847/985656408?nd&amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2025.04.17_b1_es_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWQ5YmY2YS1iNTFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EQgCp3fKjImXQvtftabHAe8fKPP5fvBpDuUaZCvxruY=) Peter, it’s Emilia. I wanted to take a moment and reach out personally to let you know what serving Northeast Ohio – _my beloved hometown_ – means to me. I’ll explain more in a moment, but first: **[I am fighting everyday to deliver impactful and lasting change for our community. But I’m running in one of the most competitive elections in the country – and National Republicans are planning to spend millions to flip my seat red. Is there any amount you can please pitch in to keep fighting for OH-13?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106016669/540145848/985656408?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2025.04.17_b1_es_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWQ5YmY2YS1iNTFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EQgCp3fKjImXQvtftabHAe8fKPP5fvBpDuUaZCvxruY=)** | [**PITCH IN**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106016670/540145849/985656408?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2025.04.17_b1_es_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWQ5YmY2YS1iNTFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EQgCp3fKjImXQvtftabHAe8fKPP5fvBpDuUaZCvxruY=)
---
**I know how hard the people of Northeast Ohio work. I’ve seen it all my life.**
But growing up in Akron, I quickly learned that working families throughout our community aren’t given the same opportunities or a level playing field that others enjoy.
That’s exactly why I entered a career in public service, Peter: **to change the status quo**. That’s why I worked across the aisle in the Ohio Statehouse to fight for higher wages, working and middle-class tax cuts, and other legislation that would put more money in the pockets of Northeast Ohioans. That’s why, in 2022, I ran for – _and won_ – one of the most competitive U.S. House seats in the country. And that’s why last year, I decided to run for re-election to continue delivering for our community.
_Our community deserves an advocate on the federal level_ – someone who isn’t afraid to stand up to people who are standing in the way of progress; someone who will advocate for our jobs, healthcare, and our freedoms; and someone who will work to make the day to day a little bit easier. **And that’s exactly what I’m trying to do, every day, as your Congresswoman.**
Peter, my promise to you is that I’ll always strive to be that type of leader, and that I’ll never stop fighting for the community I love. **_And when it comes to fighting for Northeast Ohio, I’m only just getting started._**
**[It is the honor of my life to serve OH-13 in Congress. But with Republicans controlling the House, Senate, and White House, I’m going to need your help to ensure I can keep pushing for progress in Washington. Please, is there any amount you can pitch into our people-powered campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106016671/540145850/985656408?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2025.04.17_b1_es_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWQ5YmY2YS1iNTFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EQgCp3fKjImXQvtftabHAe8fKPP5fvBpDuUaZCvxruY=)**

Thank you so much. It’s an honor to have you on this team.
_Emilia_

**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country._Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results._ **

subject: God led me to share my story with the world – warts and all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish:
| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=4304e114243b4491a84eb6155048ccc9&_e=vd1YxjSD0SGdSB7VFB5QcARuP06SQeye--p6QDKx8zmvEOfbnjZbKPw4ohgUjDNd2yv1p9PfkSLliO9QUtkywmt0YSEA69JZs6IsRA-3UeUIFqxAKFCKmJbOUb8vTwLa-4tapnFg2ENOpNBFXBl0i66Vk5bzE3o6IGjFKEKAP2OeqqLyYNpo1YtJF6GhhKaxiw7xL10Phqpx40Bq2UdqZEa7VZTP4xFYqUkQbo2IEWCdTs_s1iG5KKmZ5xjPyJovzAmhGvPgRXm96qbZmdg0TGp2xrhyHjgaLObrfpDfXIj9nVjNxHiZu7jjghhAi6pF2kjq65wmj_4imDRuH-hcU6U3Nnzwv_vByCHfyZzIdkUbGm3IRotzl0rZ5nyxyUsejjYzcLoMK0X1QIchcNM9OQ%3D%3D "Vice President JD Vance")
---

My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance.

_**[This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=4304e114243b4491a84eb6155048ccc9&_e=vd1YxjSD0SGdSB7VFB5QcARuP06SQeye--p6QDKx8zmvEOfbnjZbKPw4ohgUjDNd2yv1p9PfkSLliO9QUtkywmt0YSEA69JZs6IsRA-3UeUIFqxAKFCKmJbOUb8vTwLa-4tapnFg2ENOpNBFXBl0i66Vk5bzE3o6IGjFKEKAP2OeqqLyYNpo1YtJF6GhhKaxiw7xL10Phqpx40Bq2UdqZEa7VZTP4xFYqUkQbo2IEWACYqsYkyJG150rJm8dyCsVsgBATVPcQqY_7WxjT3D8ZrPJkwq0zrbtOGmEuizQdXhHfYB4wIIsOZ5U4_GyHfXG5YQcHWAfl5oHZXNL4ITn-AwXlDcTYwkiVatA1cyuqTWoqWTmVUETR_CpdPTkCqVjORd6N7C5_-AygdlC4QuSlQ%3D%3D "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.")**_

It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.

It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.

**But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all.** I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.

_As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. _

I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.

I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.

_**[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=4304e114243b4491a84eb6155048ccc9&_e=vd1YxjSD0SGdSB7VFB5QcARuP06SQeye--p6QDKx8zmvEOfbnjZbKPw4ohgUjDNd2yv1p9PfkSLliO9QUtkywmt0YSEA69JZs6IsRA-3UeUIFqxAKFCKmJbOUb8vTwLa-4tapnFg2ENOpNBFXBl0i66Vk5bzE3o6IGjFKEKAP2OeqqLyYNpo1YtJF6GhhKaxiw7xL10Phqpx40Bq2UdqZEa7VZTP4xFYqUkQbo2IEWCW823XDPgBIWaDLqDwr0glYGNutR5puPVW5LE57jK3uPoA9_kDGJlygy7BcdLZcFD6jqKvryTRiWF1lck7MPbZHmct5bl5rr7SGNA3TcrwAmbs9pzgP7MHOzkZUY14EWyaYxtdId3HeKzfJROdMiZ6w8oVgC4e7kau3XQcKkk1aA%3D%3D "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.")**_

We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.

So now we're forced to rebuild.

The Democrat Machine is **ALREADY** crushing us in fundraising, **ALREADY** outspending us in key races, and **ALREADY** building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.

At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise - for the FIRST TIME since the election - to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=4304e114243b4491a84eb6155048ccc9&_e=vd1YxjSD0SGdSB7VFB5QcARuP06SQeye--p6QDKx8zmvEOfbnjZbKPw4ohgUjDNd2yv1p9PfkSLliO9QUtkywmt0YSEA69JZs6IsRA-3UeUIFqxAKFCKmJbOUb8vTwLa-4tapnFg2ENOpNBFXBl0i66Vk5bzE3o6IGjFKEKAP2OeqqLyYNpo1YtJF6GhhKaxiw7xL10Phqpx40Bq2UdqZEa7VZTP4xFYqUkQbo2IEWCF8T-59ww9Jq2LvNmP590DuSdVeErwU5HqIeeLZr3bx8buIer7KrVxBvfDWGrEl324gOfNA1J7AFLj0hbT5gH7Xnx9jDqZ8oEdi9Zpr7Rtgpycb3IVG_8hfuxXve7YpsRcMUsuilEElMX207nLRg_6CvzPxx6FTZIQ1aGQU_98GA%3D%3D "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.")**_ I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win.

Do you think you can help us get there?

_Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up:_
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=4304e114243b4491a84eb6155048ccc9&_e=vd1YxjSD0SGdSB7VFB5QcARuP06SQeye--p6QDKx8zmvEOfbnjZbKPw4ohgUjDNd2yv1p9PfkSLliO9QUtkywmt0YSEA69JZs6IsRA-3UeUIFqxAKFCKmJbOUb8vTwLa-4tapnFg2ENOpNBFXBl0i66Vk5bzE3o6IGjFKEKAP2OeqqLyYNpo1YtJF6GhhKaxiw7xL10Phqpx40Bq2UdqZEa7VZTP4xFYqUkQbo2IEWD2wH5aITJX5BKAqPhXOkX0k2FdtlhWam4Upf0sEk74WEIaeMKez28XBFroDrjbImxL_Zrnlql55EeE1_8T5IhS_tbEJGaJ-KiDGc2Y_yjtZvtGEi-E8K7TxqSjqHSUIlDnkMIoAPCBRKBzSpghTrRRIEnoeXtKBNrOQihNVyrBNQ%3D%3D "PLEASE JOIN US")
---
Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point.

If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win.

_**[I don't ever want you to donate more than you can afford - but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=4304e114243b4491a84eb6155048ccc9&_e=vd1YxjSD0SGdSB7VFB5QcARuP06SQeye--p6QDKx8zmvEOfbnjZbKPw4ohgUjDNd2yv1p9PfkSLliO9QUtkywmt0YSEA69JZs6IsRA-3UeUIFqxAKFCKmJbOUb8vTwLa-4tapnFg2ENOpNBFXBl0i66Vk5bzE3o6IGjFKEKAP2OeqqLyYNpo1YtJF6GhhKaxiw7xL10Phqpx40Bq2UdqZEa7VZTP4xFYqUkQbo2IEWA2eAY-8S4qOwheb5FqBAc-DEyUCf0k58qehFp-whysANysPbF3k_aSb2lDCZu_poFKsqgUiDu8l3WStKuFoivpBAygqq--_f9pmyvNKj5-LWOi_S6MEhMODWm907tKvjL1B7wwoK3yIBMR2uTnN4O0xvtitVIfu33dijOHhAhu4Q%3D%3D "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.")**_

Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you.

God bless America,
Vice President JD Vance
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=4304e114243b4491a84eb6155048ccc9&_e=vd1YxjSD0SGdSB7VFB5QcARuP06SQeye--p6QDKx8zmvEOfbnjZbKPw4ohgUjDNd2yv1p9PfkSLliO9QUtkywmt0YSEA69JZs6IsRA-3UeUIFqxAKFCKmJbOUb8vTwLa-4tapnFg2ENOpNBFXBl0i66Vk5bzE3o6IGjFKEKAP2OeqqLyYNpo1YtJF6GhhKaxiw7xL10Phqpx40Bq2UdqZEa7VZTP4xFYqUkQbo2IEWAaeeQvqjlkcm3mUMQqcD5QCWOXyTeEL29yLHQUyQ0XKABpD7oVSr7BesqWjgkVoMvOR73maJH7uKA9nsYnMpcXnhuc4eFoVBI2nLcvyLKxKn0jlQY8bYiBPcq2mfmjT2HpsdrIk93J43a2ksTcQ_wf7rRdV853SP5Vi_6uBHc1pA%3D%3D "PLEASE JOIN US")

---
| [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=4304e114243b4491a84eb6155048ccc9&_e=vd1YxjSD0SGdSB7VFB5QcARuP06SQeye--p6QDKx8zm8XfMUduqBaZZ6MT921gRm3OIlDmnq__0rMcVJyYt-7JXyjOxytjtX_XW5R3LhBEi0iUYltXEWkyAfqzGFjZ7gad6xmrjDNt3hPpXw_52fQwQ4gYxoRpYyWEGa7IAuHcUqG3m0oylot-SzztFa8DDUt3kkaE2lXxsiIIlfNrcfXjHHi2R2B3F3eCORC7DBXrGycyRBp6E2NEvtZBDFKRl4gpJ8CzagB9pGQe-u8e0tKZ7CQ8xHiJXBWu3QFXLRPwke0dcAsQNgwnBD8WFpiXjPtWz5uWuOKu4h5eTaz6KhWHfQnfSCJFqz7DQ4zcuX4uIJIEUKu4kXx7mQb0OwzQANpJrq7NjMBpH_3DcFbAMdNMvsLmoW5S8btrzAXsk_eyM%3D "First 100 Day Survey")

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. name: Voter Action Project
subject: Tell your Senator to stop the SAVE act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project
Folks -- Every eligible American deserves the freedom to vote without jumping through impossible hoops.
The SAVE Act would scare newly naturalized citizens out of voting and make it harder for millions of eligible voters to cast a ballot – especially seniors, women, students, veterans, and rural voters.
The House of Representatives has passed the SAVE Act – a cruel, calculated attack on every American’s right to vote. The Senate must REJECT the anti-voter SAVE Act and protect our right to vote.
We’ve all seen what happens when voting rights are stripped away. People lose their voice, communities lose power, and elections no longer belong to We The People – they belong to those who make the rules.
Add your name to our petition urging the Senate to REJECT the SAVE Act >> [https://act.commoncause.org/petitions/tell-the-senate-reject-the-anti-voter-save-act-2?source=041625swap-ifvap&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://act.commoncause.org/petitions/tell-the-senate-reject-the-anti-voter-save-act-2?source=041625swap-ifvap&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
It’s designed to effectively block millions of eligible Americans from casting a ballot – especially women, seniors, students, and rural voters.
Here’s how the “SAVE” Act puts your vote at risk: [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/save-the-usps-3/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
* Prove your citizenship – again: Even if you’re a lifelong voter, if you move across town, change your last name when getting married, or switch parties, you’d have to provide your passport or birth certificate with your current legal name – in person at your local elections office – just to stay registered.
* Get stuck in long lines: Election officials would face impossible workloads, causing confusion and delays.
* Lose your right to vote – without warning: If outdated records can’t verify your status, you could be purged from the rolls without even knowing it.
We still have time to pressure the Senate to stop this – but only if we speak out NOW.
Let’s show the Senate just how many of us are paying attention and demanding they protect our freedom to vote. Sign on today! >> [https://act.commoncause.org/petitions/tell-the-senate-reject-the-anti-voter-save-act-2?source=041625swap-ifvap&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://act.commoncause.org/petitions/tell-the-senate-reject-the-anti-voter-save-act-2?source=041625swap-ifvap&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=17TBegk/mOVnCVbA2LCTvY8x5XXUJC/zphi5mwxlx2yGFJgjqmb30opEzMEGH4lkUSjZowNxjY0844i6B7GsvS/7LHp7ie5rE7rCjNdiZjU= [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=17TBegk/mOVnCVbA2LCTvY8x5XXUJC/zphi5mwxlx2yGFJgjqmb30opEzMEGH4lkUSjZowNxjY0844i6B7GsvS/7LHp7ie5rE7rCjNdiZjU=]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.

clean_body: Voter Action Project Folks -- Every eligible American deserves the freedom to vote without jumping through impossible hoops. The SAVE Act would scare newly naturalized citizens out of voting and make it harder for millions of eligible voters to cast a ballot – especially seniors, women, students, veterans, and rural voters. The House of Representatives has passed the SAVE Act – a cruel, calculated attack on every American’s right to vote. The Senate must REJECT the anti-voter SAVE Act and protect our right to vote. We’ve all seen what happens when voting rights are stripped away. People lose their voice, communities lose power, and elections no longer belong to We The People – they belong to those who make the rules. Add your name to our petition urging the Senate to REJECT the SAVE Act >> [] SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [] It’s designed to effectively block millions of eligible Americans from casting a ballot – especially women, seniors, students, and rural voters. Here’s how the “SAVE” Act puts your vote at risk: [] Prove your citizenship – again: Even if you’re a lifelong voter, if you move across town, change your last name when getting married, or switch parties, you’d have to provide your passport or birth certificate with your current legal name – in person at your local elections office – just to stay registered. Get stuck in long lines: Election officials would face impossible workloads, causing confusion and delays. * Lose your right to vote – without warning: If outdated records can’t verify your status, you could be purged from the rolls without even knowing it. We still have time to pressure the Senate to stop this – but only if we speak out NOW. Let’s show the Senate just how many of us are paying attention and demanding they protect our freedom to vote. Sign on today! >> [] SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [] = [=] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [=] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). name: Vivek
subject: The Democrats have already shown their hand
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
Not for summer. Not for next year. The early days of this campaign are everything.

[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-Q)Peter - The Democrats have already shown their hand:
-> Raise your taxes-> Go soft on China-> Protect every inch of bloated government
If they seize the Governor's office in Ohio, they won't just stall progress here -- they'll put a major roadblock in front of President Trump's America First agenda across the country.
They know what's at stake. That's why their political machine is already pouring cash into this race.
We don't have the luxury of waiting. Not for summer. Not for next year. _The early days of this campaign are everything._
**Because if we wait, we lose.**
This is our moment to go all in - to show we have the energy, the backbone, and the support to win. That starts with YOU. # Tired of Financial News from Communists?
### The Capitalist is for money-minded builders who still believe in America
| | Apr 17
---|---
**Dear PolitiBrawlers,**
Are you tired of seeing hogwash from Doomberg, Business Outsider and other financial publications that hate Trump and don't believe in freedom or capitalism ?
# Meet The Capitalist
**[A daily financial newsletter](https://substack.com/redirect/ce6ece15-a7db-4c05-8230-881d1fb3ec60?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** by a pro-America team of savy financial nerds who will keep you informed on everything you need to know about shifts in the market, the business world and the economic effects of other forces effecting the money in your pocket.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ce6ece15-a7db-4c05-8230-881d1fb3ec60?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

**Don 't listen to the hysteria and Trump derangement Syndrome of other outlets trying to paint a doom and gloom picture of the economy.**
As President Trump makes bold moves to fix the chronic issues facing American business owners, investors and consumers, make sure you are getting the full picture.
The media at large is fixated on pushing an agenda down your throat, rather than informing you on the truth so you can make educated financial decisions.
**[Join The Capitalist for FREE](https://substack.com/redirect/ce6ece15-a7db-4c05-8230-881d1fb3ec60?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** with only your email today.

subject: re: North Carolina
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
In North Carolina, a court ruling paved the way to overturn the election that put a Democratic Justice on the North Carolina Supreme Court. This blatant disenfranchisement is incredibly dangerous. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**Our democracy is in crisis.** Last week, Republican judges in North Carolina paved the way for the GOP to overturn Democratic Justice Allison Riggs’ victory in the state’s Supreme Court race. This blatant disenfranchisement is _incredibly dangerous_. **This is not just a North Carolina problem. This affects every single one of us in your community _and across the country_. We’re facing an existential threat to democracy, and this is the latest Republican attempt to undermine the will of voters. ** **State legislators are on the frontlines of the fight to save our democracy.** [Will you join our movement by making a donation of $3 to elect Democratic state legislators fighting to protect free and fair elections? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDSCrqP7HuqdVbYWeROcw0Lj_aeDyT_lLKHWVFw-FG3EIzxVowtjkOwHmoNUaDKj3R3nv-84EemikwmjX0GC_85Zbm94Ki53aC3ANfn5fMy-yGzrAUAJa7uqv7aqM1c6tIr002D0I6MXG8qkGc0HYJtM8WgKhKCLQCSGhjrkg-WouKfFxbUWn3DGhEBcJK5soqM8uY3ZGG1c14r7_kkskFG8KmpyFlmjEgS1mASlrmgNoQKBjF41PnRA0nh8xoRwrZWYDRyaAINq97LIxYiVPwNj4dzUTuvNjAM1Jb3ZgHo5h0dtpZuocMgtxR4jNg5gwIAIK7mH6TlnWzyFertowbq4qnAm89kao8I91XB5X2BP0/4fq/IGy502DDRV-S-pqhNZLBQg/h0/h001.gYUyNJIemRrhdjE6IpCaUE0aI0FgpD8i293uyMEfi_A) Everybody knows that Trump and the far-right have an affinity for undermining the rule of law. We saw it on Jan. 6th, we saw it during the 2022 midterms, and we see it almost every day from the White House and Republicans in Congress. Republicans will continue to sow distrust in our elections, and they could very well destroy our democracy. **But together, we can elect enough Democratic state legislators to block the GOP’s attempts to subvert our democracy and work to expand ballot access, strengthening communities like yours.** [So what do you say? Will you help support the election of pro-democracy Democrats in places like your state and beyond with a donation of $3? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDSCrqP7HuqdVbYWeROcw0Lj_aeDyT_lLKHWVFw-FG3EIzxVowtjkOwHmoNUaDKj3R3nv-84EemikwmjX0GC_85Zbm94Ki53aC3ANfn5fMy-yGzrAUAJa7uqv7aqM1c6tIr002D0I6MXG8qkGc0HYJtM8WgKhKCLQCSGhjrkg-Wou40UJe8GKJDMc1Qq9wIgwH9ymeT-w9zNsCp4DWGehwE_golW3MyWiv21dnG-sH-x5BdI91XQUn5_GHWMDmm9K8C8UpDjpUc-xQAgtbw_uKE9ZIE87ZzkT_q1QpQXwijtB0f1Yl1I5mjVCoVNnN6LWe5WKHuKtbO51kwBmVsVMYQxgi3RLxz3cqgfMriJ1BSX0/4fq/IGy502DDRV-S-pqhNZLBQg/h1/h001.OY0cC1rTadyNXb2bRa6Je5ExHj0t6UDKZNBFBvGI0nU) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

clean_body: In North Carolina, a court ruling paved the way to overturn the election that put a Democratic Justice on the North Carolina Supreme Court. This blatant disenfranchisement is incredibly dangerous. | | | | | ---|--- Our democracy is in crisis. Last week, Republican judges in North Carolina paved the way for the GOP to overturn Democratic Justice Allison Riggs’ victory in the state’s Supreme Court race. This blatant disenfranchisement is incredibly dangerous. This is not just a North Carolina problem. This affects every single one of us in your community and across the country. We’re facing an existential threat to democracy, and this is the latest Republican attempt to undermine the will of voters. State legislators are on the frontlines of the fight to save our democracy. Everybody knows that Trump and the far-right have an affinity for undermining the rule of law. We saw it on Jan. 6th, we saw it during the 2022 midterms, and we see it almost every day from the White House and Republicans in Congress. Republicans will continue to sow distrust in our elections, and they could very well destroy our democracy. But together, we can elect enough Democratic state legislators to block the GOP’s attempts to subvert our democracy and work to expand ballot access, strengthening communities like yours. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | With you in this fight, Team DLCC | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. A Republican entered the race for governor.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=1386%2E400544%2EDBnMo3)
On Tuesday, a Republican entered the race for governor, and we need to respond _fast_.
We always knew this would be a crowded, competitive race. **Now that the field is officially growing, every dollar we raise matters more than ever.**
**[Can you help us reach our $100,000 emergency fundraising goal before midnight tonight to help us meet this moment?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250417_1_opponent?refcode=em20250417-1386&refcode2=1386_400544_DBnMo3&akid=1386%2E400544%2EDBnMo3)**

Deb is running to change the game — for everyone in New Mexico. But to go toe-to-toe in a race that will only continue to get more crowded and competitive in the weeks and months ahead, we need grassroots resources now.
Every dollar will help us build a campaign that can reach every corner of New Mexico, organize our communities, and make sure voters know what’s at stake.

name: Andrea Salinas
subject: I need to hear from you:
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
I’m committed to fighting back in any way I can, and your input will help us prioritize the most pressing issues at hand.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106019198/540155042/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGZiMzlmZS1iOTFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2MAy8zWd3c8awCAcjhxPtaZZ8IXd5SXtuazIHG5mSLs=) Folks, while it’s only been 87 days since Donald Trump was sworn into office, every week his administration finds new ways to attack our democracy, economy, and hardworking American families. Trump’s reckless tariffs are wreaking havoc on small businesses and the wallets of working families. Elon Musk’s DOGE continues to illegally fire thousands of federal workers. Trump defying a Supreme Court court order to bring back a person with no criminal record wrongly sent to prison in El Salvador — and talking about sending Americans there next. And all the while Republicans in Congress plot to rip away millions of Americans’ healthcare to pay for another billionaire tax break. **I know it’s exhausting, but we cannot afford to get overwhelmed.** I’m committed to fighting back in any way I can: I’m holding town halls across OR-06, sounding the alarm on Trump’s lawlessness in the media, and battling extreme Republican legislation on the House floor. I promise to keep standing tough in defense of our values — because the worst thing we can do right now is give in to extremism. **But to fight back more effectively, I need to hear from you.[That’s why my team put together a short survey to help me stay on top of what matters to you most. Please, will you take a few seconds to fill it out? Your input will help us prioritize the most pressing issues at hand. →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106019199/540155043/1548888867?refcode=email_041725_survey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGZiMzlmZS1iOTFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2MAy8zWd3c8awCAcjhxPtaZZ8IXd5SXtuazIHG5mSLs=&emci=a8798434-e51a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=c4fb39fe-b91b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=5643047)** | | [TAKE THE SURVEY →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106019200/540155044/1548888867?refcode=email_041725_survey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGZiMzlmZS1iOTFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2MAy8zWd3c8awCAcjhxPtaZZ8IXd5SXtuazIHG5mSLs=&emci=a8798434-e51a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=c4fb39fe-b91b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=5643047)

name: AOC
subject: I feel more like squaring up.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
This administration is much more prepared and planned this time around, in terms of the kinds of chaos that they're trying to unleash.
More than legal programs, more than policy, **they are trying to invoke _fear_**.
That is how authoritarianism works. These are the tools to get us to sacrifice and surrender our civil liberties, more than they take them.
Trump pardoned virtually all the January 6th insurrectionists, including specifically people who were arrested with threats against my life.
**I'm not going to give them my fear**. I feel more like squaring up than anything else.
When I was running in 2018, people would say, “Why should we vote for a waitress instead of this 20-year incumbent?” — understandably, right? I didn't have experience. They did. And I often talked about the story of _The Wizard of Oz_.
This was my mom's favorite movie. I know it's in the zeitgeist now because _Wicked_ is out, but genuinely: all of these big, scary things, it reminds me of the end of _The Wizard of Oz_ , where you yank back the curtain — and _it's a little guy_.
**It's a small, scared, incompetent little man**.
I think we need to remain focused. Yes, they are capable of immense amounts of damage.
It can be scary. It's not something we ignore. It's not something we check out from.
But we register it. We say, “OK.” **Then we figure out what our options are and we do the best we can, day by day**.
They're relying on us giving up. **Hell no**.
We’re going to keep standing with trans people.
We’re going to keep standing with the LGBT community.
We’re going to keep standing for the working class.
We’re going to keep fighting for a better minimum wage.
We’re going to keep fighting to guarantee healthcare.
[Help us continue the fight with a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250417.wQRHGV&refcode=em20250417-8632-P_FND_CTR_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8632%2E2526796%2EquXNUB)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250417.wQRHGV&refcode=em20250417-8632-P_FND_CTR_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=8632%2E2526796%2EquXNUB)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250417?refcode=em20250417-8632-P_FND_CTR_CTR&t=21&refcode2=8632_2526796_quXNUB&akid=8632%2E2526796%2EquXNUB)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250417-8632-P_FND_CTR_CTR&t=22&akid=8632%2E2526796%2EquXNUB)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=8632%2E2526796%2EquXNUB) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=8632%2E2526796%2EquXNUB) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=8632%2E2526796%2EquXNUB)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: This descent into an un-American America must be stopped.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| This is unacceptable in the United States of America.
Derek,
Before I ran for the U.S. Senate, I was an investigative journalist leading a team that exposed corruption and human rights abuses worldwide.
This report in The _New York Times_ reminded me of what I saw in many of those investigations:
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs-em-ossoff.coN5Ny&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250417_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=8488%2E5257348%2Enx1Y8r)
More and more, the atmosphere under Trump reminds me of countries where dissent is silenced by intimidation.
>From the article:
_Fired federal workers who are worried about losing their homes ask not to be quoted by name. University presidents fearing that millions of dollars in federal funding could disappear are holding their fire. Chief executives alarmed by tariffs that could hurt their businesses are on mute. ..._
_“When you see important societal actors — be it university presidents, media outlets, C.E.O.s, mayors, governors — changing their behavior in order to avoid the wrath of the government, that’s a sign that we’ve crossed the line into some form of authoritarianism,” said Steven Levitsky, a professor of government at Harvard and the co-author of the influential 2018 book “How Democracies Die.”_
**This is unacceptable in the United States of America.**
Derek — As Trump dismantles checks on his power and purges the government to fill every office with loyalists, more and more Americans are too afraid of retaliation to speak up.
**This descent into an un-American America must be stopped. We must regain Congressional power.**
I’m the ONLY Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won.
That means I’m MAGA’s #1 target for defeat.
Help me beat them again, just like we did in 2021.
[**Please split a contribution between Adam Schiff and my campaign today.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs-em-ossoff.coN5Ny&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250417_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=8488%2E5257348%2Enx1Y8r)
Thank you for chipping in if you can.
— Jon
[SPLIT A DONATION](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs-em-ossoff.coN5Ny&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250417_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=8488%2E5257348%2Enx1Y8r)

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: A reality I refuse to accept.
body:
|
#
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106019580/540156352/-615970119?refcode=em-4.17.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTRmODg1Yy1iYjFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KhYm0twZ2LgWlZOLf_jvcMMYCGHM7txh-zm_H7W7GT8=&emci=00f71f28-9d1b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=354f885c-bb1b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=27257697) Friend, **What percentage of hungry children are we willing to tolerate?** Is it 20%? Is it 25%? I can tell you that for me, it’s __0%.__ Right now in Michigan, nearly 1 in 5 kids are food insecure. That means thousands of our kids are living with uncertainty about when they’ll eat again. Instead of stepping up to meet this moment, President Trump, Musk, and Republicans in Washington are stepping back. This year, we’ve already seen deep and dangerous funding cuts. Grants for local food banks have been slashed, food deliveries to our communities have been halted, $1 billion has been cut from the school food program, and now they are pushing an extreme and devastating $220 billion cut to SNAP food assistance. These are real programs that real families rely on. Cutting them isn’t just irresponsible -- it’s inhumane. So we have a question to answer: as a country, how many of our kids are we okay with going hungry? My number is zero, and if you’re with me, I need your help. **[Republicans are coming after our kids’ SNAP benefits, and we need to stay loud and engaged to stop it. name: Sarah McBride HQ
subject: Do you have Sarah’s back?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
We’re almost there!
#
We’re almost there!
Yesterday, we announced our goal to raise $10,000 by midnight tonight to get our fundraising back on track and power Sarah’s work in Congress.
As of this morning, we’ve raised $8,800 toward our $10,000 mid-month goal. That means we’re $1,200 short — with just a few hours left to close the gap.
[**Can you pitch in $5 to help us reach our mid-April $10,000 goal?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250417-1?refcode=em20250417-1909&amount=5&refcode2=1909_21716_qvXyvI&akid=1909%2E21716%2EqvXyvI)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250417-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250417-1909&refcode2=1909_21716_qvXyvI&akid=1909%2E21716%2EqvXyvI)**
This goal isn’t about just a number. It’s about making sure Sarah has the resources and grassroots support to stay focused on what matters:
* Fighting to lower costs and protect healthcare
* Standing up to GOP attacks on our rights and freedoms
* Delivering real progress for Delaware

Sarah counts on folks like you pitching in when you can, as often as you can, to keep our campaign running and fuel her fight in Congress. [**If your budget allows, can you pitch in $5 before midnight to show you have Sarah’s back?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250417-1?refcode=em20250417-1909&amount=5&refcode2=1909_21716_qvXyvI&akid=1909%2E21716%2EqvXyvI)

Thank you!
– Team McBride

| | Peter: It’s Team Davis here! We wanted to take a minute to brag about our Lieutenant Governor. **When the Trump administration slashed critical federal funding, Austin Davis fought back. The Shapiro-Davis administration sued Trump and won — saving infrastructure funding for PA!** This wasn’t just a one time thing though. Standing up for Pennsylvanians is just what our LG does best: → When gun violence came to his neighborhood as a young person, he vowed to dedicate his life to public service
→ When Republicans gutted abortion access nationwide, he formed a national coalition of Lieutenant Governors committed to protecting access
→ When he found out that the leading cause of death for our young people is gun violence, he secured an $11.6 million investment in after school programs **[Put simply: he’s a doer, not a talker. But Peter, Austin can’t do it all without your support. This wasn’t just a one time thing though. | **ABOUT MARTY**
**Marty O’Donnell isn’t a politician** and he’s not taking any corporate PAC money. Marty will give us a voice – not special interests or Wall Street. It’s time to turn our nation around to make life better for Nevadans.

clean_body: Maintaining momentum this early in our campaign is absolutely critical, and even small contributions from supporters like you make a HUGE impact as we build our campaign. | Hey there, friend. Marty here with a quick update. First quarter fundraising reports were just released... My opponent in NV-03, Susie Lee, just raked in over $400,000 in Q1 2025 and has a cash pile that will make her tough to defeat. But here’s the deal: this isn’t about who’s got the bigger war chest—it’s about who’s got the grit to fight for YOU. Unlike my opponent–or even other conservatives–I’m not backed by corporate PACs or insider cash. I’m powered by everyday Nevadans and grassroots warriors. We’re building a movement to secure our borders, cut wasteful spending, and shrink D.C.’s overreach—one donation at a time. Maintaining momentum this early in our campaign is absolutely critical , and even small contributions from supporters like you make a HUGE impact as we build our campaign. Let’s show Susie’s big-money machine that heart, hustle, and a killer soundtrack can win this fight. Thanks! -Marty | ABOUT MARTY Marty O’Donnell isn’t a politician and he’s not taking any corporate PAC money. Marty will give us a voice – not special interests or Wall Street. It’s time to turn our nation around to make life better for Nevadans. Marty O’Donnell has an ear for solving problems. He’s an award-winning composer who wrote the iconic soundtracks for the video games Halo and Destiny. Marty will cut through the noise in DC. Marty O’Donnell will be a champion for Nevada families. As a husband, father, and grandfather, Marty can’t sit on the sidelines as local families struggle because of the problems created by Big Government. | PAID FOR BY MARTY FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

name: Team Miyares
subject: They lied about Jason Miyares.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miyares for Virginia |
body:
Someone tell Jay Jones that two lies don’t make a truth.| | | Friend, _They lied—and they got caught._

A reporter was forced to admit he fabricated a quote from Attorney General Jason Miyares. The fake quote was deleted. The outlet retracted it.

__**[But that didn’t stop liberal Democrat Jay Jones.](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/s/c/vZUumiQsOSx3jvdbVfM5u7-pglw95ck3wSnTcR_kG6fZEICCa3mSm0AIc5dUJW-jPKau4SzR8y2gsbHSX08I7WXHKxxjaF3nb7ou--gO0zxHKs6uggemiqB6hLhkKm8PsrQtmHm0eH64yLLiBy0QNTSianjS4gccojU1DJdpasNJRo16I55YmEkzvfRB1NnTx83rmtoiOw-26OHXtKeMTaKNGDtKCbPsjtObh3RytvetycQ2BwgX8F4Bf7ByFjP8tgceLqKohFm5lFOOjtPXwSwtJbpV7pB1tWhhFBecufwRmJ_10ectDf-R-sgr1RFOw3sHBqs09r0S2OtGkF_I-EtWngbgoU7Ihu6bL53tbicU9bjeEcMuBhjED2Y/aLRr0in7UvWLZWOKWGTkbiOP1eXm7HD9/8)**__

Instead of backing down, he just kept repeating the lie, hoping Virginians wouldn’t notice. But we did.

Jay Jones and his radical allies will say anything, do anything, and spend whatever it takes to take Jason down—because Jason tells the truth, enforces the law, and delivers results as Attorney General they simply can’t compete with.

They want to smear him. We’re going to stand with him.

But Jason needs your help. While the left floods Virginia with out-of-state money from deep-pocketed progressive donors, Jason is counting on grassroots supporters like you.

clean_body: Someone tell Jay Jones that two lies don’t make a truth.| | | Friend, They lied—and they got caught. A reporter was forced to admit he fabricated a quote from Attorney General Jason Miyares. The fake quote was deleted. The outlet retracted it. Instead of backing down, he just kept repeating the lie, hoping Virginians wouldn’t notice. But we did. Jay Jones and his radical allies will say anything, do anything, and spend whatever it takes to take Jason down—because Jason tells the truth, enforces the law, and delivers results as Attorney General they simply can’t compete with. They want to smear him. We’re going to stand with him. But Jason needs your help. While the left floods Virginia with out-of-state money from deep-pocketed progressive donors, Jason is counting on grassroots supporters like you. Thank you,Team Miyares P.S. name: Forward Party
subject: 2025 Is A Time To Focus On Party Building
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Help us build what we need for future cycles

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_donation_ask_1_a&n=1)
---
| Peter -- 2024 was a big year in politics. _Any_ presidential year is a big year in politics, but last year felt particularly momentous. It was also, in many ways, bizarre and absurd. There were no real primaries. But there were assassination attempts, intraparty defections, and a candidate who dropped out after a disastrous debate performance. It was an election season that highlighted how dysfunctional our system has become. Political parties are people who work together to get candidates who reflect their values elected. If you’re on this list, you know that the legacy parties are no longer doing this in a way that represents you. | [](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_donation_ask_1_a&n=2 "Chip In Another $25 To Help Build Forward In
2025!") [Chip In Another $25 To Help Build Forward In 2025!](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_donation_ask_1_a&n=2)
---
In the last two years, the Forward Party has grown rapidly, thanks to support from people like you. We've:
* Gained ballot access in 4 states, and partial access in 4 more
* Elected 52 Forward candidates or Forward affiliated candidates to office
* Organized 27 state level groups with full executive committees
* Last month, website signups increased by 400% - people are tired of politics as usual

2025 is an off-cycle year, without any federal races drawing focus, so it’s a chance to lean into party building. We are building out leadership teams at the state and county level. We’re working to recruit good candidates in key districts. We’re engaging in polling to better understand you, our membership, and what issues you care most deeply about.
All of this takes money. We don’t send out many email solicitations, but we’re sending one out today so we can start to make the investments we need to lean into our party building efforts this year.
Americans no longer feel the legacy parties represent them. We are all, together, building a party that can do a better job listening to our members and delivering solutions that make the American dream a reality for more of us.
A donation today helps us get a little closer to that goal.
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_donation_ask_1_a&n=3 "Chip In Another $25 For '25!") [Chip In Another $25 For '25!](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_donation_ask_1_a&n=3)
---
**Not Left. Not Right. Forward.**
Forward Party

| Peter,

For the last 20 years, Emerge has been building a powerful movement centered around helping strong Democratic women win elections by providing them with the training and support they need to run, win, and lead — _and the results speak for themselves!_

In a year where Democrats faced tough losses up and down the ballot, around 70% of our more than 600 Emerge alums running for office won their races. Our alums are bringing bold, inclusive leadership to every level of government.

This kind of success doesn’t happen by accident. [_**Our team is working year-round to identify strong women leaders across the country and make critical investments as early as possible, and your support today will help us continue recruiting and training even more Democratic women!**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106021256/540161805/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-04-17_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE2Nzc3ODI5LWJlMWItZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pLZAQqHwtCqqB8m7pVzQv1oonkumT6Cen50vr21pVTU=)

With critical elections on the horizon in 2025 and beyond, women across the country are stepping up to take action and fight back against Trump and his allies' extreme agenda. Our alums leave our training with the tools and skills they need to _win elections, fight for our values, and drive real change in their communities!_

Your support today will help us tap into this incredible grassroots energy and ensure we have what it takes to identify, recruit, and train women leaders to win elected positions where they can be the most effective.

clean_body: Our alums leave our training with the tools and skills they need to win elections, fight for our values, and drive real change in their communities! | = | Peter, For the last 20 years, Emerge has been building a powerful movement centered around helping strong Democratic women win elections by providing them with the training and support they need to run, win, and lead — and the results speak for themselves! In a year where Democrats faced tough losses up and down the ballot, around 70% of our more than 600 Emerge alums running for office won their races. Our alums are bringing bold, inclusive leadership to every level of government. This kind of success doesn’t happen by accident. = | = | = With critical elections on the horizon in 2025 and beyond, women across the country are stepping up to take action and fight back against Trump and his allies' extreme agenda. Our alums leave our training with the tools and skills they need to win elections, fight for our values, and drive real change in their communities! Your support today will help us tap into this incredible grassroots energy and ensure we have what it takes to identify, recruit, and train women leaders to win elected positions where they can be the most effective. = | = | = Onward, A’shanti F. Gholar President, Emerge = P.S. = * | | = Paid for by Emerge America Emerge America 818 Connecticut Avenue NW, Suite 450 Washington, DC 20006 United States | = =
