name: Vice President JD Vance
subject: Raised by my Mamaw
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish:
| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=128f59ffa80445e1876d4d453068ac7f&_e=pM5zniyepJy-9tqV3H7mF47I7uS4RvcygvkSDC4kCc2nWzEd4yHYLZXFFfWQLvAg9vK1Kd3tZMhsAVBgYM0J21Ry0x9f8mVmNnMfjXTERpq194tSIfRoRU86hzy68vVQMmzZs5_t-WcUOUluZwGn5qDnrjCsnDvvyZKGtdMyIxtIWb943r2S-YfHL-lbWtxmtq5RXPRC4I6el3Li8v5yBGnlqd7aowcuTT731aH1RBoKEOU5vhcSwcIc_AJ6RFpuPX4XrN2-AgsjJrz5BDGpvQHzfioY2iPEV1MxXJm79E8--T20YUFNxW2D42oQBUK3hg5u36t8yJkRtdv8EEqarFgHDC2UwOIyFWKk04DBhU9WNUi2Wb47DWGsWGmxYl1ggr8x2fTzZBrxmZkBOBlIgw%3D%3D "Vice President JD Vance")
---

My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance.

_**[This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=128f59ffa80445e1876d4d453068ac7f&_e=pM5zniyepJy-9tqV3H7mF47I7uS4RvcygvkSDC4kCc2nWzEd4yHYLZXFFfWQLvAg9vK1Kd3tZMhsAVBgYM0J21Ry0x9f8mVmNnMfjXTERpq194tSIfRoRU86hzy68vVQMmzZs5_t-WcUOUluZwGn5qDnrjCsnDvvyZKGtdMyIxtIWb943r2S-YfHL-lbWtxmtq5RXPRC4I6el3Li8v5yBGnlqd7aowcuTT731aH1RBoKEOU5vhcSwcIc_AJ6RFpu5yBAVYtkikxH7XHIpXyLzn7_8UaG0oEhtvIzFwmUwA8CKbcsB69BoklNuMzC5S4PXZIDk_JUw4dbAaKo3n6sGXlumUKawNzzfViAmRMc70vBCS_0TjyH0_ZkBE1yLP_y070nYL6VgoTunI1obCsxyQ%3D%3D "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.")**_

It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.

It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.

**But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all.** I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.

_As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. _

I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.

I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.

_**[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=128f59ffa80445e1876d4d453068ac7f&_e=pM5zniyepJy-9tqV3H7mF47I7uS4RvcygvkSDC4kCc2nWzEd4yHYLZXFFfWQLvAg9vK1Kd3tZMhsAVBgYM0J21Ry0x9f8mVmNnMfjXTERpq194tSIfRoRU86hzy68vVQMmzZs5_t-WcUOUluZwGn5qDnrjCsnDvvyZKGtdMyIxtIWb943r2S-YfHL-lbWtxmtq5RXPRC4I6el3Li8v5yBGnlqd7aowcuTT731aH1RBoKEOU5vhcSwcIc_AJ6RFpuP0FpAPCW0OLebjjOmpzIpzWcwqhpa6vSjFKFnq7sPz6UZILq7d9BZbgAZQWV-JBS5FK3Fp3kltMYs8499rVlI9e6mfbCJrRUXqBkPZIYf09ZX6vEM6NlTIDbkYlBsOStXQNOnabSWqP_FKMm3emGVQ%3D%3D "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.")**_

We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.

So now we're forced to rebuild.

The Democrat Machine is **ALREADY** crushing us in fundraising, **ALREADY** outspending us in key races, and **ALREADY** building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.

At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise - for the FIRST TIME since the election - to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=128f59ffa80445e1876d4d453068ac7f&_e=pM5zniyepJy-9tqV3H7mF47I7uS4RvcygvkSDC4kCc2nWzEd4yHYLZXFFfWQLvAg9vK1Kd3tZMhsAVBgYM0J21Ry0x9f8mVmNnMfjXTERpq194tSIfRoRU86hzy68vVQMmzZs5_t-WcUOUluZwGn5qDnrjCsnDvvyZKGtdMyIxtIWb943r2S-YfHL-lbWtxmtq5RXPRC4I6el3Li8v5yBGnlqd7aowcuTT731aH1RBoKEOU5vhcSwcIc_AJ6RFpuSGbvCLrkU2xy7NbUwvnS6TVWpHH8e8AWN5LePxAoG3CKelLqPZnaPi2XAn-1kTsKzYQsYwiU2vpSd3rsfF3NRcyo_Seu7YktZW5HDPUzmiVr43q77MU25mSeNhJdS3tzRJ0coZS3SKNhKOV_pBtpIQ%3D%3D "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.")**_ I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win.

Do you think you can help us get there?

_Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up:_
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=128f59ffa80445e1876d4d453068ac7f&_e=pM5zniyepJy-9tqV3H7mF47I7uS4RvcygvkSDC4kCc2nWzEd4yHYLZXFFfWQLvAg9vK1Kd3tZMhsAVBgYM0J21Ry0x9f8mVmNnMfjXTERpq194tSIfRoRU86hzy68vVQMmzZs5_t-WcUOUluZwGn5qDnrjCsnDvvyZKGtdMyIxtIWb943r2S-YfHL-lbWtxmtq5RXPRC4I6el3Li8v5yBGnlqd7aowcuTT731aH1RBoKEOU5vhcSwcIc_AJ6RFpuHh6DrSkdJTRr_6Fnungo5aNE2iynq5MZh7FlLdFBRWZGkurw8B_jYOtjlBvtH1JlQfUVUk7szhORsrze0WYrAB2B9S7htEtC0ll5iaKBZjsquRx0eXQb1_nfuUQTGUtudmJOMShR1N5FXPGqvZo9Xw%3D%3D "PLEASE JOIN US")
---
Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point.

If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win.

_**[I don't ever want you to donate more than you can afford - but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=128f59ffa80445e1876d4d453068ac7f&_e=pM5zniyepJy-9tqV3H7mF47I7uS4RvcygvkSDC4kCc2nWzEd4yHYLZXFFfWQLvAg9vK1Kd3tZMhsAVBgYM0J21Ry0x9f8mVmNnMfjXTERpq194tSIfRoRU86hzy68vVQMmzZs5_t-WcUOUluZwGn5qDnrjCsnDvvyZKGtdMyIxtIWb943r2S-YfHL-lbWtxmtq5RXPRC4I6el3Li8v5yBGnlqd7aowcuTT731aH1RBoKEOU5vhcSwcIc_AJ6RFpuJujbOBn4S1MA2aAj3eLxYQhoeeWttASRgc9zBrTJkJm4QClc1WJL_kkjZ_6lghupG1UK9fpfEp3lzOABLnOnN2n7oREvBPUucvDYCUo2wwHFxdRPzZxHcHRABgvc5hMi_A4frW7ChYUPWlYRz8tdDg%3D%3D "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.")**_

Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you.

God bless America,
Vice President JD Vance
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=128f59ffa80445e1876d4d453068ac7f&_e=pM5zniyepJy-9tqV3H7mF47I7uS4RvcygvkSDC4kCc2nWzEd4yHYLZXFFfWQLvAg9vK1Kd3tZMhsAVBgYM0J21Ry0x9f8mVmNnMfjXTERpq194tSIfRoRU86hzy68vVQMmzZs5_t-WcUOUluZwGn5qDnrjCsnDvvyZKGtdMyIxtIWb943r2S-YfHL-lbWtxmtq5RXPRC4I6el3Li8v5yBGnlqd7aowcuTT731aH1RBoKEOU5vhcSwcIc_AJ6RFpuIcoVisvp23fgqsm7RaTu5PJ8ZtgCtJXL9hCZyaf7wQDz8eybD7Kdep4Lo_EPFeO-trOEUULXODfzu_8DsOy4X-QCh0-kx-gj942UvILYcYWzyA4Q34Pm-QKHVAyRpn2pwP81RbQ59nu48z6T4ZIxJA%3D%3D "PLEASE JOIN US")
---

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=128f59ffa80445e1876d4d453068ac7f&_e=pM5zniyepJy-9tqV3H7mF47I7uS4RvcygvkSDC4kCc0LBrqBfoRUAxYo_csbjDooNvIJGFadavheurKWf3-ly3aoLuZTNkake7R9SLe13odq3vEq_jKMWobiuVHbvFHtve2fkNAtm-O8-D-Y0XxXSJ2-d7nRspUeI_CmGS6wA4WkGHJeMrFbBbBoNnzWBe9DdIeCX-ZkBrjwCFed4G13_UIvLUz94dgZ53CMdgomF1ULn_rBvMDniRhd-2026gg2OM7MoKDkt3T1Z4QxHjsG_euF5RfcCOnU7qsDyRKADk2P4Oy0e0n-XAeMz8be7jQ57JuY-lGe7UT94s1q83gFdVvlCkA6mJb5ksUH36bDN1-TAbZda9Vs2DT26aD4RVJKtJ8sckIVdHTiTeGGOdIpcSW2IUnuhEl-0QYd-PnWTI0%3D "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=128f59ffa80445e1876d4d453068ac7f&_e=pM5zniyepJy-9tqV3H7mF47I7uS4RvcygvkSDC4kCc0LBrqBfoRUAxYo_csbjDooNvIJGFadavheurKWf3-ly3aoLuZTNkake7R9SLe13odq3vEq_jKMWobiuVHbvFHtve2fkNAtm-O8-D-Y0XxXSJ2-d7nRspUeI_CmGS6wA4WkGHJeMrFbBbBoNnzWBe9DdIeCX-ZkBrjwCFed4G13_UIvLUz94dgZ53CMdgomF1ULn_rBvMDniRhd-2026gg2OM7MoKDkt3T1Z4QxHjsG_aQIUAL7hURs6pnaGHNNbvHZiPZ7xqT_tKgKeKpmroGGhd9EREfIZ_mSYWSqGJqCvVk-XTWRwljsQUUQUUj-zSDstbSMKuayaFh-yVP_CWUHlRxSXeBpphQZGltS4H5UG5Y8Uf0E-IaMPin3oHwBwLk%3D "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.
---

It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win. So now we're forced to rebuild. The Democrat Machine is ALREADY crushing us in fundraising, ALREADY outspending us in key races, and ALREADY building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections. At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable. So here's my final pitch to you: "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month." I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win. Do you think you can help us get there? Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up: | | | "PLEASE JOIN US" Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point. If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win. "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated." Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you. God bless America, Vice President JD Vance | | | "PLEASE JOIN US" | | | "First 100 Day Survey" It 's Majority Leader Scalise. We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my "First 100 Days Survey"** so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first. | | | "CLICK TO BEGIN" - STEVE SCALISE | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.combecause you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network. Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year. You can donate via mail by sending a check to: 320 First Street SE 2nd Floor Washington, DC 20003

name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: This is a campaign not just to win an election, but to change our politics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta013d393-2b80-4eef-a55a-b4b03aa9b319/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4e560bf3-c22d-4297-b9ab-b88b7c0dbe3f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, I want you to hear it from me first: I’m running to be Michigan’s next U.S. senator. [If you’re ready to send a fighter to the Senate, will you split a donation of $10 between me and Blue Amp Action to become a founding donor of our campaign?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6eafb780-cc33-41c1-a780-7a0a2217c4f2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $10 >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T74b5e212-076e-4e27-a9d7-60e9d05caedb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| I never set out to be a politician. I wanted to be a doctor — and became one. I studied medicine and public health and became the youngest health official in a major U.S. city at 30. But I learned something pretty quickly: while a doctor can prescribe medicine to help sick people get better, you can’t prescribe away poverty. You can’t cure what corporate greed does to us in a political system that’s rigged to put profits over people. It's no longer about left versus right — it's about the very top against the rest of us. That’s why I’m running. When I ran in 2018, I kept saying something that people didn’t want to believe at the time: Donald Trump, himself, wasn’t the disease. He was just the symptom of the disease. What’s the disease? Our corrupted politics. Billionaires and mega-corporations are doing more than poisoning our air and water. They’re poisoning our democracy. They use their power to jack up prices, screwing over workers, and driving our costs through the roof. Then, they use their profits to buy access to politicians, leaving our political system too compromised to stop them. That’s the disease that Donald Trump is a symptom of. And our campaign – you, me, our vision for change – is the antidote. Things aren’t going to get better until we take our country back from the billionaires and corporations who are rigging our economy and our politics. And let’s be honest. Right now, the truth is, there aren’t enough leaders in the Senate who are willing to stand up and fight. But it’s not just about fighting back. It’s about what we fight for. Fighting for us is what I’ve done my entire career — whether it was to erase $700 million in medical debt, to test every Detroit school for lead after the Flint water crisis, or to hold corporate polluters accountable. Together, we'll take our fight to Washington. We’ll refuse the terms set by the oligarchs, raise the minimum wage, and fight to bring down costs, protect Social Security and Medicaid for every Michigander, and champion Medicare for All to guarantee every American affordable, accessible healthcare. This is a campaign to change our politics, not just win an election. But first, we need to come out on top in this competitive race — and I can’t do it alone. [Will you split a donation of $10, or any amount, between me and Blue Amp Action today? We’re refusing every penny from corporate PACs because this campaign belongs to you, not the billionaires.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T354492dc-43c1-432e-9d3b-d5611db7d7cb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $10 >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T71290c38-adb9-4943-837d-29878b0ef7b7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE MORE >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T763415af-ecb4-4973-ba02-6c8ba9205c20/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| More soon, Abdul
---

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td1c7dbc1-36aa-48d3-aa77-9cbfbfbb3bd1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Response pending [Team Gillibrand]
subject: Minimum wage increase to $17 an hour?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
No one should be living in poverty.

Across the country, Americans are still making a minimum wage of $7.25 an hour.

That’s not enough to live on — and Black and Hispanic workers are especially feeling the burden.

But there’s a glimmer of hope: Kirsten Gillibrand, Bernie Sanders, Mark Kelly, Cory Booker and other Democratic leaders just introduced a bill that would finally increase the federal minimum wage to $17 an hour. It’s called the _Raise the Wage Act._

[**We’re polling our most engaged supporters in Toledo to gather data on support for raising the minimum wage. Will you respond before midnight?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106022196/540164845/150183345?refcode=LOC_EM_POLL_2025.04.17_Minimum-Wage_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjc0OWM2OS1iZjFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ncy9QfYB9M7-mG9KNEC8GmGAUB9LhSBHEgPMWvGlUEk=&emci=80efd755-f71a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=b2749c69-bf1b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=7659029) clean_body: No one should be living in poverty. Across the country, Americans are still making a minimum wage of $7.25 an hour. That’s not enough to live on — and Black and Hispanic workers are especially feeling the burden. But there’s a glimmer of hope: Kirsten Gillibrand, Bernie Sanders, Mark Kelly, Cory Booker and other Democratic leaders just introduced a bill that would finally increase the federal minimum wage to $17 an hour. It’s called the Raise the Wage Act. | | | | | | | | | Please let us know, Team Gillibrand * = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I am truly honored to have won reelection, and I promise to continue the critical work toward bipartisan solutions for New Yorkers as we enter this new term. While we had many victories in New York this election season, our fight to retake control of the Senate is far from over. = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

Jersey deserves a Governor who fights for them—who won’t take no for an answer, and who stands up to Trump’s chaos and reckless tariffs that are already raising taxes and costs for Jersey families.

I'm a problem solver who has always worked to do what others say is impossible. I’ve spent my career solving problems and delivering real results—bringing new jobs to New Jersey, expanding workforce training, and fighting for economic policies that help middle-class families, not just the wealthy.

**Now, I’m ready to do the same as Governor. With the primary, and the race, getting closer and closer, every dollar we raise will help us talk to voters, put up ads, and more before then. [Anything you can pitch in will help us keep our momentum going.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106022404/540165605/-486314421?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JG_20250417_FR_ProblemSolver_0_3MO_JoshGottheimer_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDVjODA0Ni1jMDFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y1tvkexqRsWuNfyBFxjE9ViOxFkeh3UaHvj1Om5qzAg=&emci=5e635840-c01b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=905c8046-c01b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=37438246)**

name: John Fetterman
subject: re: Republicans' Medicaid cuts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
[ https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50678?t=1001&akid=10043%2E434096%2EOu9lvK ]John Fetterman

Derek, it’s John. I know you're busy, so I'll keep this quick:

🛑 Republicans want to give tax cuts to billionaires, so they’re trying to pass a budget that would gut Medicaid. 🛑

We’re talking about a health insurance program that covers 3 million people in PA alone – that’s well over a third of kids and more than half of nursing home residents. No bullsh*t – this is life-or-death stuff here.

So I need to know what you think, Derek. Will you please take my Medicaid survey now? It’ll only take like 60 seconds:

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51009?email=&zip=&t=1002&akid=10043%2E434096%2EOu9lvK

I’ve always been a hard NO on this GOP budget. They wanna cut $1.5 trillion in federal spending to give their billionaire cronies a tax cut, which basically *guarantees* cuts to Medicaid.

I'm not playing political games; that’s just the math.

And it'll hurt working folks in PA and across the country – millions of people, especially in rural areas, use Medicaid to see an urgent care doctor or just fill their kid’s asthma medication!

So we gotta put a real fight against these cuts *now* – before it gets to a vote – and I need to know yinz are with me. Please click here to take the Medicaid survey now.

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51009?email=&zip=&t=1003&akid=10043%2E434096%2EOu9lvK

Thanks for your help,

John ❤️

--------

This email was sent to EMAIL.

To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here: null

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. You asked for me to do these events all over the state and I will deliver. Our next TIME TO DITCH DURBIN fundraiser will be in Kane County on April 30th at Global Brew in St. Charles. It's also a great opportunity to get to have a beer with a candidate.

name: Logan Spena
subject: “Fake news you can trust”
body:
Some elected officials can't take a joke.
| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/tydCTLLLS0aMdo-GFx5Ah2t5PrFjoMX3zp5YDqKJo6Q4_ulOC6-gOFINalKAQ4DAWEy36sXqrZ09WVVVL5KX8XZzdAbx_28xi9CMaILbLeFmCu75lTzYIAdn4myiUYRlSVHcaZ10QvdUS46tdh97l1-XEEPTWKZKcp4sJYOPI3zKTZ5Sg76X345P/svIlcR2W4MyuK2NTsEUxFtr7Xq4KyEkJ/8)_
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/bfgfULGfs38FyoZ7eK7t5z_FuXgw8sLdtutOPrijkfGmh43FiWLmfnrNopZR_xeunZvRpttWBVJ9T__flYg8tcVN0WrZbMk4ni9VePgO-hVbN2o7fwyMC-U89Dbj5a8-4MznHia03Jvd3Sv60k8k8AADIGWOoqV1LmMmktyujtcrQTgV2w9xEq7su6_1wbMXIGu1deXihPw98qwYxyG0j2bCc7NMAf65Xa6u82cKO0IEL8gVdvlO58D-PTIPTn2gYnbR9lt-JbRfzO7Ppop3rESQ7rsSgrCweKeDO9L7efO9N9uN7wqdVGWi5wudEa8jiKrvVt461AXqG6v2n9lSZN6PqqoPCljtLKewapvI-mfxMIxPrFagVwVp_qatLCFhxPKAc-ypmFNf4VZDO7_AZcHkL-0FVuPBbc2xXXLOKyIApaR7IPRxm_R6erpljY1D1VeKOztp/TqODPVcmpKEc_OEGE6-6FkhZsTFacDky/8)
Dear Fellow American, Some elected officials can't take a joke.

And unfortunately, they think they have the power to do something about it.

After the governor of California saw a video parody of a politician, he responded by saying the video should be "illegal." Then the California legislature fast-tracked and passed two bills, banning certain political speech.

_The Babylon Bee_ and other plaintiffs filed a lawsuit against California officials because the bills censor free speech and punish people for posting certain political content online, including political memes and parodies of politicians.

Your voice today can tell government officials you believe the Constitution protects humor whether or not they find it funny.

Will you stand with _The Babylon Bee_?

Click this link and stand with _The Babylon Bee_ today to advance free speech for all: [https://adflegal.org/support/humor-first-amendment-statement](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/neMh8junVDseI0fXC3OtuMkZ-hJZUYZiTraolAaqkxXoHrD6Xb6e4ZcNl5KV4PFvZK1VXMcVPuIsas6p6mDyUIv7KbA0wzhxNkVg3sSN7e6uUpbHuyV7hmZ-yN_0hssR38531f93e7SwReo2oTThJI6HrXC6jkMBQGgsbJmFEI2SQaWdxnk8yRXEI8wQe1VNGZ05FYgkywH4cpph-SDfwqzrTB20bCsgH5EavY2gaoUABl5qSiySMfhmwHzlrYSZwM5s731UbgdZKhBg5cH6JPPCqoGQZ9-QT6t3AJBIYSmjULTL5qo_MsnONjZvmOgEwQVGfnWRlJFo0IDfsGCARqd4HadEe9ICSePJIdNPZOPy445Eu__a5wB2f37ZyV-FLD7pIp0F4GNm42VI05qju7kb7e2xysZDGtksKqGDv7mcIGdBn2uWncYH1p07HwY10RyKDGhc/fl0kUaMVkS2eMY6y8kDuUh9OmZeBsmY2/8).

For freedom, **Logan Spena** Legal Counsel [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/QSKab4uRnOA1VuwwzT7kQcfheTv1jHVNnTJJvmLOOT4aiKO8352oYYkX5i0kyh8UlHtsa2s-7Ma1S1b5fPeuoSxV6ys7unbbVvebR8cPF30L7FTS16BDmqTLY453tki25IM6TyoaEnv4fqaD3vAxf9yO0DsQvVTA9NfqScf_rhEmLzvTL9qmS_c_mDwwQ_-QzkDHmD0cY96_LN8MMn4JPFadkY_IYLodlL5orrUSOQKtqam4GKKmuF2EONZCXACdZa7u4txTEI202JZay_-fr3ACUo6YYR-2TsjkqtG8v03HI65uSaPBDZV2n5EwDJy1Z8wm9XW5sQZ03C8JEWnOoNDaPmmi7cW84ho7NYBTkwVPxoGcLKl6qRD4Pz0WqYQ2SjAlloPfP0tTjwsdbYQ-Tz4hFGm3PEYxu3YpJ3ugmnvFF76KtcxcIB62m4ecIyk8yKRXsrG7/z-4wA4X2kxCRbvs7M42R7FwKlzd6qaDf/8)

Jon Ossoff is running for re-election in 2026, and you can bet Trump’s allies are ready to spend whatever it takes to flip this seat. name: Hillsdale College via Victory News
subject: “Understanding Capitalism” | Watch the Trailer
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj1lmvh867d833g8ovs9m88qxn8m8xtg8ultuaa7a0ycmwhf4yywpwzfasgkbbfuo2yd1j3mex9lytfs5k0p7&__stmp=suvo4s&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suvo4s&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6dkbkdbh2zapervuzd6q76q50lb7lzkwoer7jga5nlo206g8jurbozlsop19v5oyqzx2b6c61fb1qwuahoaubymontldgmtxm1mq9qdb7witu4r10irljqg7ikigay63bv20d4pzkxzkfglvl14p6&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suvo4s&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suvo4s&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suvo4s&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suvo4s&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6dkbkdbh2zapervuzd6q76q519omrhcu7worpvgul5azh14kh8zouguigvwp8xk1svu5179xiiohbiyqc5fyx8iy26iwf7ri9k19499bfjov0roc7kp3w1fg6zg4y2lz9hnc3igmksbavoaz9kef2&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suvo4s&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suvo4s&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

Far-right extremists are actively trying to tear it down, going after the benefits that seniors spent their lives earning and counting on. name: VoteVets HQ
subject: A Military parade is something special...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
The United States Military does not march in parades to honor any elected office, or any person. The United States Military marches for the American people, their comrades in arms, and the country they serve.
#
There are a few things we throw big Military parades for in the United States.
Winning a global conflict with fascism, for instance.
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-april25.G9aCQU&refcode=em250417-1-120&t=1&akid=34355%2E3013755%2EMRtwKc)
Or defeating Sadam Hussein and liberating Kuwait.
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-april25.G9aCQU&refcode=em250417-1-120&t=2&akid=34355%2E3013755%2EMRtwKc)
Fourth of July, you’ll get some of the Troops showing up in your local parade.
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-april25.G9aCQU&refcode=em250417-1-120&t=3&akid=34355%2E3013755%2EMRtwKc)
They’ll be around for Memorial Day as well, to honor the fallen.
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-april25.G9aCQU&refcode=em250417-1-120&t=4&akid=34355%2E3013755%2EMRtwKc)
The United States Military does not march in parades to honor any elected office, or any person. The United States Military marches for the American people, their comrades in arms, and the country they serve.
A Military parade is something special.
In some cases it’s a celebration of victory — the victory of democracy over tyranny, liberation over repression. In others it is to celebrate our nation — the ideals we stand for, the things our forefathers fought for, the future we hope for. It allows a grateful nation to remember the men and women who gave their lives for freedom, too.
A Military parade is **_NOT**_ a birthday gift for a dictator bent on destroying everything the Military fought for. And we’ll be damned if we’re going to let Trump turn the finest armed forces in the world into his toy without fighting back.
If you’re in a position to make a donation, please: [**Chip in to VoteVets as we work against Trump and his administration. This is going to take an absolutely massive team, and we need you to be a part of it.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-april25.G9aCQU&refcode=em250417-1-120&t=5&akid=34355%2E3013755%2EMRtwKc)

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: My new bill to hold big pharma accountable
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| I am always working to make life easier and more affordable for Wisconsinites.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4672%2E35263%2EMQs_CQ)
I know times are tough, Peter. Costs are going up, and it’s hard to catch a break on our pocketbooks. **That’s why I introduced the _Lower Drug Costs for Families Act_ — legislation that will hold big pharma companies accountable when they increase drug costs. ** With my bill, pharmaceutical companies will no longer be able to hike up drug costs faster than the rate of inflation across all insurance providers. I am _always_ working to make life easier and more affordable for Wisconsinites — and this bill is an important step in easing burdens that far too many families are facing. **[If you’re able to pitch in, your support would mean a lot to me as I work to hold big pharma companies accountable to the millions of Americans who rely on prescription drugs. Click here to chip in today.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4438?c0=stb-em-apr25.iHS26B&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250417_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4672%2E35263%2EMQs_CQ)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3664?c0=stb-em-apr25.YbSOLB&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250417_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4672%2E35263%2EMQs_CQ)

name: Young Democrats of America
subject: YDA Statement: Young Democrats of America Call On Schumer, Jeffries to Fight for Illegally Deported Maryland Man
body:
For inquiries contact: comms@yda.org | |
---
|
---
**YOUNG DEMOCRATS OF AMERICA CALL ON SCHUMER, JEFFRIES TO FIGHT FOR ILLEGALLY DEPORTED MARYLAND MAN**
---
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** **April 17, 2025**
**For inquiries contact: comms@yda.org**
---
**WASHINGTON, D.C.** -- In the days since Kilmar Armando Abrego Garcia was kidnapped from his Maryland home and illegally deported by the Trump-Vance Administration to a prison in El Salvador-- known for its violent human rights abuses-- the Young Democrats of America are calling on Democratic Leaders Hakeem Jeffries and Chuck Schumer to stand up to the White House: "While Donald Trump and the GOP weaponize the federal government against communities of vulnerable, innocent, law-abiding people for political gain, young people everywhere are begging Democratic leadership in Congress to do something--_anything_ --to stand up to the Trump White House and protect the rule of law," **said Quentin Wathum-Ocama, President of the Young Democrats of America**. "The Trump Administration is violating the Constitution in more ways than we can count: deporting migrants without due process, erroneously detaining Americans, blocking detained Americans' access to lawyers and their families, paying foreign governments to hold deported migrants in brutal prisons without access to lawyers, and defying a unanimous order by the Supreme Court--the list goes on. "Now more than ever, our party--_our country --_needs leadership that will stand up against tyranny. It is shameful that those we trust to lead our party remain so silent in the face of an unprecedented national crisis. So far, only a small number of national Democrats have had the courage to act-- like Maryland Senator Chris Van Hollen, who traveled to El Salvador in an effort to find Mr. Garcia and confirm whether he is even alive. We are grateful to Senator Van Hollen, but we need more action. To any federally elected Democrat reading: we urge you to find your courage now, in the face of fear. "Trump and his Administration could care less about the harm they're causing other human beings to suffer through, the rule of law, or the blood on their hands. It's time for Jeffries, Schumer, and every single elected Democrat to shut this shit down and block everything they can, _whenever_ they can. "Democrats may not have a lot of political power right now, but we're not powerless. It's time for our Democratic Congressional leaders to stop acting like we are, or it's time for them to make way for Democrats who are willing to oppose the fascism we see growing every day in our federal government. The fate of American democracy depends on it."
---
###
---
|
---
The Young Democrats of America (YDA) is the official youth wing of the Democratic Party of the United States and the oldest partisan youth organization in the country. To learn more about the YDA visit: **[www.yda.org

### **Deadline for November Elections**
There are huge opportunities in Pennsylvania this November. Below are some of the local offices that may be available in your area. The filing deadline for a 3rd party candidate for the 2025 Elections is August 1st, but to be eligible to file that paperwork, the candidate must be not registered as an R or a D as of 30 days before the primary.
#### If you are considering running for office this year, change your voter registration to "None (No Affiliation)" by April 20th.
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=Qq1f-_efxn4B2fVu7Zwq9RrVHSQ8NTVH5hCbMJX9qQd9ej9TV6csUrMgozd4mYomM_rTMy7BzbiQbD8vmto59RdKiFWzpeuByPsEJrscapw&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_april_statewide&n=4 "Click here to change voter registration") [Click here to change voter registration](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=Qq1f-_efxn4B2fVu7Zwq9RrVHSQ8NTVH5hCbMJX9qQd9ej9TV6csUrMgozd4mYomM_rTMy7BzbiQbD8vmto59RdKiFWzpeuByPsEJrscapw&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_april_statewide&n=4)
---
**If you are concerned about what you see coming from our current 2 party system? There is absolutely nothing you can do that will have as much impact this year as running for one of these offices as a Forwardist.**
**Judge of Elections-** Have you been a poll worker? This is an elected position that has important responsibilities and oversees the election. Small commitment of time. Tens of Thousands of districts across PA and many go completely unfilled. **This is a great opportunity to be your first public elected office.**
**Township Auditor-** The Township Auditor is a member of a multi-person Board of Auditors charged with auditing, settling, and adjusting the accounts of all elected or appointed officials of the township received or disbursed township funds in the preceding calendar year. Small commitment of time. **Often goes unfilled and is appointed by the people who are supposed to be audited.**
******School Board-** The Local School Board member is responsible for overseeing school operations within the district, and often for hiring/firing of school superintendents. Can be a great way to impact your community.
**City Legislature-** The City Legislature is the municipality's governing body, responsible for voting on ordinances and policies, and often is in charge of hiring a city manager.
**Township Supervisor-** The Township Supervisor is a member of a multi-person Board of Supervisors charged with general governance of the township and execution of legislative, executive and administrative powers. The Supervisor is responsible for setting and enacting policies and resolutions, levying taxes, and setting budgets.
**Tax Collector**
**County Treasurer**
**County Court Judge**
**Mayor**
### **Resources**
Please reach out if you would like help researching open offices in your area. There are people who want to help. We at Pennsylvania Forward Party have spent a lot of time learning about resources to help people just like you step up to run and serve.
[](https://www.forwardparty.com/runforoffice/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_april_statewide&n=5 "Forward Party Candidate Info") [Forward Party Candidate Info](https://www.forwardparty.com/runforoffice/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_april_statewide&n=5)

clean_body: Join us Monday | | | Join us April 21st at 8pm for our Monthly Statewide call. This is our time to talk with folks from across the state that are working to build a new political structure outside of the 2-party system. You can help. | "Click here to join the call" Deadline for November Elections There are huge opportunities in Pennsylvania this November. Below are some of the local offices that may be available in your area. The filing deadline for a 3rd party candidate for the 2025 Elections is August 1st, but to be eligible to file that paperwork, the candidate must be not registered as an R or a D as of 30 days before the primary. If you are considering running for office this year, change your voter registration to "None (No Affiliation)" by April 20th. "Click here to change voter registration" If you are concerned about what you see coming from our current 2 party system? There is absolutely nothing you can do that will have as much impact this year as running for one of these offices as a Forwardist. Judge of Elections- Have you been a poll worker? This is an elected position that has important responsibilities and oversees the election. Small commitment of time. Tens of Thousands of districts across PA and many go completely unfilled. This is a great opportunity to be your first public elected office. Township Auditor- The Township Auditor is a member of a multi-person Board of Auditors charged with auditing, settling, and adjusting the accounts of all elected or appointed officials of the township received or disbursed township funds in the preceding calendar year. Small commitment of time. Often goes unfilled and is appointed by the people who are supposed to be audited. ****School Board- The Local School Board member is responsible for overseeing school operations within the district, and often for hiring/firing of school superintendents. Can be a great way to impact your community. City Legislature- The City Legislature is the municipality's governing body, responsible for voting on ordinances and policies, and often is in charge of hiring a city manager. Township Supervisor- The Township Supervisor is a member of a multi-person Board of Supervisors charged with general governance of the township and execution of legislative, executive and administrative powers. The Supervisor is responsible for setting and enacting policies and resolutions, levying taxes, and setting budgets. Tax Collector County Treasurer County Court Judge Mayor Resources Please reach out if you would like help researching open offices in your area. There are people who want to help. We at Pennsylvania Forward Party have spent a lot of time learning about resources to help people just like you step up to run and serve. "Forward Party Candidate Info" "Good Party Office Explorer \(Doesn't show Judge of Elections\") "PA.GOV Running for Office" Reach us at Pennsylvania@ForwardParty.com * And Join in a conversation with other PA Forward Supporters on Slack Pennsylvania Forward Party Copyright © 2025 Forward Party®, all rights reserved. Our mailing address is: 1701 Rhode Island Ave NW, Washington, DC 20036, United States Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ForwardParty.com

name: Team TOP PAC
subject: This is chaos

body:
Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.everyaction.com/p/_pdeZq7FqkSM3uHo3kegbw2?unsubscribedata=Peqj9ECgi6dZFg%2BdKw1qGsLmwsPnS7GT55wc%2Be1kMoRcPddHjcT7wolWbipmmv66Di9j6my3HBf%2FGcu95tPZ5ijkbR746l1LtP%2FbRdtiw0dR6ijcbbexuw2Rq6XuZcagrhm3e6wxZXUwUkgED6pw4wSKwj29xIYQ%2FVjFN%2B1xmdCcCMAqfwECLSiFwAg17oRJDpIWe6lNfJ8tgdvP3SXMHhH5eqdy8kp0DHx6T2uKbryLuv%2Bj4GvqmbkGbR0Okz4YzMVX%2BRQTgWS4AQBceFyHydZzzTAUOR7cP65%2FFgaN9zXln9ETE3Wcz%2F0lx1j0lDmzEC2fUVOzLTQdbrmK%2BtjPLqF%2B2V1pJ96ytm2BdmUX%2FJzD2C6HJ9K0u6Ms%2BvfKk%2FT%2BWjjR2rwk4e2sAZCRV2%2Bn8ca1F7kCrfK2%2BksNNrRLJkM%3D]

# [#]
Since Donald Trump took to the Oval Office at the start of this year, he’s seized every opportunity to undermine our fundamental rights and freedoms. So far, he has:

❌ Attacked immigrant communities and birthright citizenship
❌ Continues to threaten funding for Social Security and Medicare
❌ Gutted the Department of Education
❌ Undid years of climate progress to “drill, baby, drill!”

Most recently, he imposed his disastrous “Liberation Day” tariffs, only to double back, helping his rich friends get richer while the chaos and cost fell to the rest of us.

Here at TOP PAC, we refuse to concede to Trump’s extremist agenda and illegal power grabs that threaten the livelihood of millions. This trade war is just another way for him to sell out the American people. We have to fight back.

That’s why we’re organizing working Black and Latino communities across Texas to win progressive campaigns that create a Texas that works for everyone — no matter our age, race, gender, or preferred language .

Will you chip in $, or even just $, before our mid-month deadline tomorrow? Every contribution helps fuel our fight for progressive reform in Texas! [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbd-top-fr-apr25-em?amount=]

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

This week Bruce Blakeman didn’t say his job was to help Nassau residents, improve our communities, or make life more affordable. | | Friends,

This week Bruce Blakeman didn’t say his job was to help Nassau residents, improve our communities, or make life more affordable.

Nope. He said: **“We have a job to do. Our job is to support Donald J. Trump.”**

**[Seth Koslow’s running for County Executive – and his ONLY job is delivering for the people of Nassau. Chip in now to power his campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106024724/540173500/-1414184198?contactdata=IdVTbdvFkMdS/Mm4z4W4iWRwUfM+h4TQ61HIw/UtNOGdedw/5JFRTbccm8P2qNCVwAbQ3iXW0EuUWaLbxQDUbe29lsur9Q8LuV43fnnePvg=&am=25.00&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTYyMTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmZiMDI2M2YtYzgxYi1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7QRyYPygONsU80PEKzgb0sDCUG0e1H9f-aOr1_Z_FsI=&emci=ff8d08fa-c21b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=6fb0263f-c81b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=17551891)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106024725/540173501/-1414184198?contactdata=IdVTbdvFkMdS/Mm4z4W4iWRwUfM+h4TQ61HIw/UtNOGdedw/5JFRTbccm8P2qNCVwAbQ3iXW0EuUWaLbxQDUbe29lsur9Q8LuV43fnnePvg=&am=25.00&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTYyMTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmZiMDI2M2YtYzgxYi1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7QRyYPygONsU80PEKzgb0sDCUG0e1H9f-aOr1_Z_FsI=&emci=ff8d08fa-c21b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=6fb0263f-c81b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=17551891)
**Seth Koslow is a former prosecutor and lifelong Nassau resident who knows what real public service looks like – and it’s not whatever Bruce Blakeman is doing.** Seth’s running for County Executive to actually solve problems: lower property taxes, safer neighborhoods, better schools, and support for working families and small businesses.

Meanwhile, Bruce Blakeman is busy chasing MAGA headlines instead of doing the job he was elected to do. He’s used taxpayer dollars to push political stunts and grab national attention – while ignoring the real issues facing Nassau.

**We deserve better than a County Executive who’s more focused on Donald Trump than the people who live here. We deserve a leader who puts Nassau first.**

Let’s make it happen.

Sara Castelli

body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39644%2E3422442%2EDnHGxl)
Hi, Derek. It’s Katie.
This week, I’m going to be calling grassroots supporters to thank them for chipping into my campaign. **[Donate any amount today for a chance to get a call from me!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250417_1_ak?refcode=em20250417-39644&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39644_3422442_DnHGxl&akid=39644%2E3422442%2EDnHGxl)**
A lot of political candidates spend a lot of their time doing “call time,” in which they call corporations and ask for a big check.
I do a different kind of call time. Whether you chip in $5 or $5,000, you have just as much a stake in our democracy as anyone else, and you have just as much a chance of getting a call from me.
Talking directly with people and hearing their ideas for how we build a better future are some of my favorite parts of campaigning. So I’m excited for the chance to chat with you!
**[Make a contribution through this email, and I just might be calling you in the near future.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250417_1_ak?refcode=em20250417-39644&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39644_3422442_DnHGxl&akid=39644%2E3422442%2EDnHGxl)**

Talk soon,
Katie

Five people are hospitalized and one person is dead after a gunman open fired on the campus of Florida State University today around noon.
Today, I made my second trip back to Florida since moving away in 2023. I arrived less than an hour before the shooting started.
I'm here to give the keynote at an academic conference at a college on the other side of the state.
My heart is with all of the FSU community.
The news said that the Bellamy and HCB buildings at FSU are "active crime scenes" on campus.
Bellamy was my building. My office was on the third floor. Room 319.
I taught in HCB more than once.
Worse still, there are kids who went through the Parkland shooting while they were in high school who are now students at FSU and I can't even imagine what that feels like for them.
This is the second shooting for FSU since 2014.
I've heard from most of friends on campus, but there is at least one family whose entirely world ended today.
And one is one too many.

The news said that the Bellamy and HCB buildings at FSU are "active crime scenes" on campus. Bellamy was my building. My office was on the third floor. Room 319. I taught in HCB more than once. Worse still, there are kids who went through the Parkland shooting while they were in high school who are now students at FSU and I can't even imagine what that feels like for them. This is the second shooting for FSU since 2014. I've heard from most of friends on campus, but there is at least one family whose entirely world ended today. And one is one too many. ###############################################
| Friend,
---
As the new Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership, one of my first orders of business is to ensure that our Party’s Voter File is 100% verified – _not 90%, not even 99%, but _100%_._
---
_Since I spent the last 5 months focused on becoming America’s Ambassador to the United Nations, I was not in charge of overseeing our Party’s voter file._
---
And so, when I officially became Chairwoman, I was briefed on the state of our records following that 5-month pause...
---
**_...Needless to say, I was shocked to learn just how far behind we were, both in terms of our voter file and fundraising numbers – a surefire recipe to lose the midterm elections._**
---
_We broke down our voter file by zip code and found massive underrepresentation in yours – which is why you’re on my list to reach out to today._

| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

name: Senator Jennifer Boysko
subject: Boysko Bulletin: Post Reconvene Catch Up
body:
| | |
---
**Boysko Bulletin:****Post Reconvene Catch Up**
---
Dear Peter, Martin Luther King wrote, _“And one of the great problems of history is that the concepts of love and power have usually been contrasted as opposites—polar opposites, so that love is identified with a resignation of power and power with a denial of love. Power at its best is love implementing the demands of justice, and justice at its best is power correcting everything that stands against love.” _ Those words ring true today just as they did in the 1960’s. The Trump Administration has chosen to use power as a lever to invoke fear and anxiety. Stripping people of their jobs, eliminating important and life-saving programs, invoking fear into individuals for using their First Amendment rights. The time is now to stand together to reject these actions to use our voices to say **Not On My Watch. ** I’ve been heartened that people all over Virginia and across the nation have begun to mobilize and organize to help federal workers who’ve recently lost their jobs, to stand up for students and our colleges and universities being stripped of funding or worse, those who are being deported for using their voices to oppose human rights atrocities. We have begun to see an outcry about the harm that comes with the end of federal grants to fund important health care research, safe drinking water, substance abuse and addiction recovery services, and for our public health departments. Every day I hear from my constituents who are being directly affected. My responsibility is to speak truth to power and as Dr. King stated so eloquently, to use the power and influence given to me by my community as he envisioned. “ _Power at its best is love implementing the demands of justice, and justice at its best is power correcting everything that stands against love.” _The time is now to be brave and clear about our values. I value freedom of speech; I value a robust public education; I value access to quality healthcare; I value the right make decisions about when and with whom a person chooses to marry or start a family; I believe that diversity and equity makes us stronger; And I believe that we gravely harm the economic standing of our nation when we strip individuals of the services and basic support systems that we have had in place for decades and create extraordinary tariffs on our allies around the world. We await the Governor’s signature on the bills with his amendments that the General Assembly rejected at the Reconvene Session, including the budget bill. The Governor has until May 2 at 11:59 pm to sign or veto [these bills](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106025712/540176779/-1457881058?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTIwODA2ZDctY2IxYi1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_bsdPW8QmpIuN0Td2tAU_xyDVIV_DEx7WEgzdLTpxx0=&emci=1d2324bd-330b-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=120806d7-cb1b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=22486556). Many of the bills, particularly the budget bill, impact our daily life and it is frustrating that votes are partisan. The [Commonwealth Fiscal Institute’s chart](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106025713/540176780/-1714473152?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTIwODA2ZDctY2IxYi1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_bsdPW8QmpIuN0Td2tAU_xyDVIV_DEx7WEgzdLTpxx0=&emci=1d2324bd-330b-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=120806d7-cb1b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=22486556) shows the difference between the General Assembly budget and the Governor’s budget amendments. Some major issues stand out. The governor proposes to reduce money that the legislature provided to remove the arbitrary cap on state funding for support staff - one of my budget amendments. Support staff keep schools clean, keep technology running, and much more. In lieu of supporting our public schools, the Governor’s amendments would fund private school vouchers and lab schools. The governor’s amendments also include eliminating funding to increase the minimum wage. At a time when the divide between the wealthiest few and those with the least continues to grow, his action dismisses an opportunity to protect Virginia’s workers and ensure a more fair wage for hundreds of thousands of working people across Virginia. The governor’s budget choices also include efforts to harm our immigrant neighbors and our communities by coercing local jails to enforce federal immigration detainers or face state funding cuts. This harms immigrant families and would be costly for localities by making facilities hold people up to two days after they would otherwise be released. The General Assembly was not able to override the Governor’s vetoes of legislation which requires a two-thirds vote. Six of my bills were vetoed. There are bills awaiting further action by the Governor following our rejection of his amendments. Despite overwhelming public support for contraception, nearly all Republicans voted against bills to protect women’s right to contraception, the Contraceptive Equity Act (HB2371 & [SB780](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106025714/540176781/-1412170916?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTIwODA2ZDctY2IxYi1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_bsdPW8QmpIuN0Td2tAU_xyDVIV_DEx7WEgzdLTpxx0=&emci=1d2324bd-330b-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=120806d7-cb1b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=22486556)) and Right to Contraception Act (HB1716 & [SB1105](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106025715/540176782/178840722?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTIwODA2ZDctY2IxYi1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_bsdPW8QmpIuN0Td2tAU_xyDVIV_DEx7WEgzdLTpxx0=&emci=1d2324bd-330b-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=120806d7-cb1b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=22486556)) and the Governor’s amendments would have gutted the bills. I will continue to fight to keep Virginia safe for women and families. My work in Richmond is supported by passionate, intelligent advocates who are experts in their fields. Teamwork is critical to legislative success, as is listening to and respecting constituents. I am honored to be recognized by several groups for my work. I’ve been named Legislator of the Year and a 2025 Affordability Champion by Freedom Virginia. This year, we again fought to establish a Paid Family and Medical Leave program in Virginia. No one should have to choose between caring for themselves or a family member and their financial security.
---
---
I have also been named [Legislator of the Year by ReproRising Virginia](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106025716/540176783/-1376902615?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTIwODA2ZDctY2IxYi1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_bsdPW8QmpIuN0Td2tAU_xyDVIV_DEx7WEgzdLTpxx0=&emci=1d2324bd-330b-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=120806d7-cb1b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=22486556). I have worked alongside ReproRising, formerly known as NARAL Virginia, for decades. I carried legislation fighting for women’s reproductive freedom when serving in the minority party. With control of the House and the Senate, I passed the constitutional amendment for reproductive freedom. The amendment must pass in a second post election session and then the voters of Virginia will have the opportunity to amend the constitution by passing a referendum. It is critical that Virginia remain safe for women and families to make their own decisions about when, if, and with whom they wish to have children. I’m also grateful for the support of the No Fairfax Casino advocacy group who spoke up early, did their research, and showed up for town halls in the district and in Richmond to reject a casino in their community. We’ve been successful for two years. The battle is likely not over but we will keep fighting because we do not believe that a casino is a good fit for the Tysons area. I appreciate their support at my recent town halls in McLean and in Reston.
---
---
---
Often as we approach the next election, I remind everyone to vote and that their voice matters. This has never been clearer given the actions of the federal administration and the Governor's decision to veto and amend bills that would have helped working families. Hardly a day passes without new actions taken by the federal administration to dismantle our federal government. I have included information for those impacted by their actions below. Our November election is critical as the power to provide support to our most vulnerable Virginians, to provide funding for basics like maintenance of our roads, for our schools, for healthcare, for clean air and water, and responses to extreme weather events, will fall to the states. We must remain resilient. It’s not easy but we will work together. We will remember why we have a government - that pooling our resources is an efficient and cost effective way to provide services, educate our children, protect our environment and provide a safety net for the most vulnerable members of our communities. This past month, I have enjoyed meeting with many of you at meetings in our community and at two town halls. My next town hall is Monday, April 21 at the Reston Community Center at Lake Anne at 6:30 pm. I will be presenting commendations with Delegate Keys-Gamarra. I will have a second town hall to present commendations with Delegate Shin on May 21 at the Herndon Community Center at 6:30 pm. Please call my office or email if you need help with a state issue. Kindest regards,
---
---
Jennifer B. BoyskoMember, Senate of Virginia Representing the newly created 38th Senate District making up the northernmost portions of Fairfax County (Great Falls, Herndon, McLean, Reston, WolfTrap, parts of unincorporated Vienna and a slice of Falls Church) PS If you would like to support my work, please visit [my fundraising page](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106025717/540176784/1617457950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTIwODA2ZDctY2IxYi1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_bsdPW8QmpIuN0Td2tAU_xyDVIV_DEx7WEgzdLTpxx0=). **Photo Gallery**

The **Women Giving Back (WGB)** Store is filled with donated clothing, shoes, accessories, and other essentials for both women and children. Clients are qualified by their case managers and social workers; most are typically living in shelters or part of a transitional program in and around the DMV area. Many clients leave their crises with only the clothing on their backs. WGB helps them restock basic necessities free of charge. WGB is currently fundraising to expand their facility in Sterling. Donate [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106025718/540176785/2084352842?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTIwODA2ZDctY2IxYi1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_bsdPW8QmpIuN0Td2tAU_xyDVIV_DEx7WEgzdLTpxx0=&emci=1d2324bd-330b-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=120806d7-cb1b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=22486556).

**Legislative Updates** [**Senator Boysko’s 2025 Legislative Slate - 13 Bills Through the 2025 GA Session, with 6 Vetoed by the Governor**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106025719/540176786/17978256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTIwODA2ZDctY2IxYi1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_bsdPW8QmpIuN0Td2tAU_xyDVIV_DEx7WEgzdLTpxx0=&emci=1d2324bd-330b-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=120806d7-cb1b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=22486556) **SJ247 Constitutional amendment; fundamental right to reproductive freedom (first reference):** Passed the General Assembly! Resolutions do not go to the Governor. This Resolution needs to pass again following an election of the House of Delegates and then goes to the voters for a referendum. **SB1002 Campaign finance; prohibited personal use of campaign funds; complaints, hearings, civil penalty, and advisory opinions:** Passed the General Assembly! Approved by Governor-Chapter 537 (Effective 07/01/26) **SB1004 Trailer franchise requirements; applicability to certain trailers** : Passed the General Assembly! Approved by Governor-Chapter 579 (Effective 07/01/25) **SB1005 Services for sexual assault patients; provision of information for sexual assault patients; Task Force on Services for Survivors of Sexual Assault; work group; report** : Passed the General Assembly! Approved by Governor-Chapter 491 (Effective 07/01/25) **SB1013 Affirmative defense or reduced penalty for a neurocognitive disorder or intellectual or developmental disability** : Passed the General Assembly! Vetoed by the Governor. **SB1122 Paid family and medical leave insurance program; notice requirements; civil action** : Passed the Senate; failed in the House after it was brought to the Floor as a revenue bill requiring more than a simple majority vote. While frustrating, I am glad that Delegate Sewell's identical bill passed in both the House and the Senate. House bill vetoed by the Governor. **SB1123 Extreme Weather Relief Act established:** passed by in the Senate Agriculture, Conservation and Natural Resources Committee with a letter for further study - Workgroup underway with report due 11/1/25. **SB1124 Board of Education; driver education programs; computer-based driver education courses; requirements** : Passed the General Assembly! Vetoed by the Governor. **SB1125 Department of Wildlife Resources; propagation of wildlife without a permit unlawful; premature separation; hybridization:** Passed the General Assembly! Vetoed by the Governor. **SB1126 Students with individualized education programs or Section 504 Plans; emergency protocol and guide:** killed in the full Senate Education and Health Committee although I am pleased that Delegate Cohen’s version passed the General Assembly **SB1127 Animal testing facilities; public notification:** Passed the General Assembly! Approved by Governor-Chapter 579 (Effective 07/01/25) **SB1129 National Teacher Certification Incentive Reward Program and Fund; eligibility; incentive grant awards:** reported from the Senate Education and Health Committee and killed in the Senate Finance and Appropriations Committee. **SB1132 Prohibiting employer seeking wage or salary history of prospective employees; wage or salary range transparency; cause of action:** Passed the General Assembly! Vetoed by the Governor. **SB1133 Restaurants and catering operations; notice of food containing pork products; civil penalty:** Passed the Senate; killed in the House Health Subcommittee of the Committee on Health and Human Services **SB1134 Storage of firearms in a residence where a minor or person prohibited from possessing a firearm is present; penalty:** Passed the General Assembly! Vetoed by the Governor. **SB1135 Board of Pharmacy; regulation of COMP360:** Passed the General Assembly! Vetoed by the Governor. **SB1136 Local anti-rent gouging authority; civil penalty:** killed by the Senate General Laws Committee **SB1137 Office of Data Governance and Analytics; oversight; Chief Data Officer; duties:** Approved by Governor-Chapter 23 (Effective 07/01/25) **SB1237 Department of Medical Assistance Services; appeals of agency determinations (Admin Bill):** Passed the General Assembly! Enacted, Chapter 621 (Effective 07/01/2025) **SB1483 Regulated hemp product retail facility registration; fee:** passed the Senate; killed by the Agriculture Subcommittee of the House Agriculture, Chesapeake and Natural Resources Committee **Also Passed 17 Commendations during the 2025 Session and 4 more at the**[**2024 Special Session wrap up on Reconvene Day**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106025720/540176787/2132561409?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTIwODA2ZDctY2IxYi1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_bsdPW8QmpIuN0Td2tAU_xyDVIV_DEx7WEgzdLTpxx0=&emci=1d2324bd-330b-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=120806d7-cb1b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=22486556)**! ** **SJ419 Commending Fellowship Square.****SJ420 Commending the Virginia chapter of the American Association of University Women.****SJ421 Commending Sheila A. Olem.****SJ422 Commending Namaste Club.** **SJ423 Commending Spring Hill Elementary School.****SJ424 Commending Virginia Banton.****SJ425 Commending Kaiya Amani Williams.****SJ426 Commending Lina Liakakos.** **SJ427 Commending Donielle M. Scherff.****SJ428 Commending Susy Reyes.****SJ429 Commending Pradip Dhakal.****SJ430 Commending Mia Mortman.** **SJ431 Commending Kian Tatsuo Linam.****SJ432 Commending the Langley High School golf team.****SJ433 Commending Renee Shi.****SJ435 Commending the Langley High School girls' volleyball team.****SJ436 Commending John Ulfelder.****SR651 Commending Cornerstones, Inc.****SR656 Commending St. Timothy's Episcopal Church Preschool.** **SR661 Commending the Scouting America Programs of the All Dulles Area Muslim Society Center.****SR673 Commending Dulles Area Democrats.** **Transportation Updates** **Opportunity to Comment on Over $7 Billion of Planned Transportation Investments** The Virginia Department of Rail and Public Transportation (DRPT) has released its draft Fiscal Year (FY) 2026–2031 Six-Year Improvement Program (SYIP), which outlines planned investments of $7 billion in public transportation, and freight and passenger rail across the Commonwealth over the next six fiscal years. The SYIP details DRPT’s funding priorities for FY 2026, allocating $332 million to local and regional public transportation providers, $442 million to WMATA’s Metrorail and Metrobus services, and $17 million to the Virginia Railway Express (VRE) operating and capital budget. The program also includes continued investment in freight rail for $20 million and $232 million for the Virginia Passenger Rail Authority to expand and sustain passenger rail service in Virginia. The draft program is now available for public review on [DRPT’s Open Data Portal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106025721/540176788/1000821357?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTIwODA2ZDctY2IxYi1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_bsdPW8QmpIuN0Td2tAU_xyDVIV_DEx7WEgzdLTpxx0=&emci=1d2324bd-330b-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=120806d7-cb1b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=22486556). For additional resources, including how to submit a comment online and view the CTB public meeting schedule and locations, [click here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106025722/540176789/1074139716?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTIwODA2ZDctY2IxYi1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_bsdPW8QmpIuN0Td2tAU_xyDVIV_DEx7WEgzdLTpxx0=&emci=1d2324bd-330b-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=120806d7-cb1b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=22486556). **Now available on YouTube: the Environmental and Energy Study Institute Congressional Camp Briefing on YouTube: **[**The Process and Path Forward for a Bipartisan Surface Transportation Bill**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106025723/540176790/-991271816?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTIwODA2ZDctY2IxYi1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_bsdPW8QmpIuN0Td2tAU_xyDVIV_DEx7WEgzdLTpxx0=&emci=1d2324bd-330b-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=120806d7-cb1b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=22486556)** ** I was on the panel speaking about the importance and impact of federal transportation funding in Virginia. The Surface Transportation bill is reauthorized every five years. Federal funding makes up 17% of [Virginia’s transportation budget](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106025724/540176791/1331453920?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTIwODA2ZDctY2IxYi1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_bsdPW8QmpIuN0Td2tAU_xyDVIV_DEx7WEgzdLTpxx0=&emci=1d2324bd-330b-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=120806d7-cb1b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=22486556). Funding for our highways, bridges, bike and pedestrian paths, and transit all depend on federal funding. For as long as I’ve been serving on the Senate Transportation Committee, the Northern Virginia Transportation Authority, and the Metropolitan Washington Council of Governments Transportation Planning Board, we have had more project proposals than available funding. Virginia is fortunate that we have systems in place to evaluate and weigh projects to ensure the greatest benefit from every transportation dollar spent.

The site includes suggestions for federal workers seeking to rewrite their resumes for the private sector, plus region-by-region links to major employers’ corporate career pages and links to region-specific job searches on Indeed and LinkedIn. **Additional Resources for Federal Employees Facing Unemployment:**
* **NOVA New Employment, Exploration and Transition (NOVAnext)** , is a new program to help recently unemployed federal workers and federal contractors transition to their next careers. The first in the region to provide new, dedicated training funds for unemployed federal workers and federal contractors, NOVA is committing up to $1 million in scholarship aid to allow approved participants to enroll in one of 14 courses at no charge and access NOVA-sponsored online workshops on resume-writing and job search techniques. Many classes prepare students for industry-recognized certifications in specific IT specialties, program management and human resources. To be eligible, federal workers and federal contract workers must have been laid off on or after February 1, 2025, reside within the NOVA service area, meet a residency requirement and fill out an online application, which will be reviewed by Virginia Career Works. For additional information, please call the Substance Use Disorder Prevention program case manager at 703-866-2121. **Know Your Rights - Resources for Immigrants** I will continue to work to ensure that our communities are welcoming, diverse and provide opportunities for all people to live with dignity and safety. Working together, we can build good lives for our families and our communities. The news of deportations is distressing and we can prepare. **If you or a loved one encounter immigration enforcement officials, it is essential that you know your rights and have prepared your household for all possible outcomes** : **Ask for a warrant** : The Fourth Amendment of the Constitution protects you from unreasonable search and seizure. You do not have to open your door until you see a valid warrant to enter your home or search your belongings. **You have the right to remain silent** : The Fifth Amendment protects your right to remain silent and not incriminate yourself. You are not required to share any personal information such as your place of birth, immigration status or criminal history. Respectfully say, “I am exercising my right to remain silent.” **Always consult an attorney** : You have a right to speak with an attorney. You do not have to sign anything or hand officials any documents without speaking to an attorney. Try to identify and consult one in advance. Please share this information from the ACLU, available in multiple languages: [“Know Your Rights.”](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106025759/540176826/-939671523?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTIwODA2ZDctY2IxYi1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_bsdPW8QmpIuN0Td2tAU_xyDVIV_DEx7WEgzdLTpxx0=&emci=1d2324bd-330b-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=120806d7-cb1b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=22486556) We are also working with the Legal Aid Justice Center which has asked that we share their [Rapid Response Toolkit](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106025760/540176827/1464008473?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTIwODA2ZDctY2IxYi1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_bsdPW8QmpIuN0Td2tAU_xyDVIV_DEx7WEgzdLTpxx0=&emci=1d2324bd-330b-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=120806d7-cb1b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=22486556).
