name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Devastated and angry
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Team -
Once again, I am left devastated and angry. Our hearts are broken and we are enraged after tragedy struck again this afternoon in Tallahassee, Florida.
Around lunchtime, a man entered Florida State University’s campus and opened fire at the student center. The shooter killed 2 people and injured at least 5 others. Hundreds of students were left shaken or forced to shelter in place, not knowing what was next.
Our schools should be a safe space for our children to learn. Students should be worrying about studying for their exams. Instead, they were left living through a nightmare that we know all too well.
And unfortunately, this isn’t the first time Florida State University has been wrecked by a shooting either. In 2014, a gunman shot three people at the campus library, just steps away from today’s tragedy.
When will enough be enough?
I’m heartbroken that another community has to experience this pain. It doesn’t have to be this way.
We do not have to accept these horrific acts of violence as normal. We cannot let the gun lobby intimidate us from taking action. And we must _never_ stop raising our voices to demand our leaders step up to keep our students safe.
At GIFFORDS, we will continue fighting for change from our elected officials and will not rest until we have a future free from gun violence.
We must act.
Thank you,
Gabby Giffords
* * *

👋 Wait — please take a second to read this... 🙏
Gabby Giffords has led the fight against the gun lobby for more than a decade, but she can't do it alone.
If everyone reading this donated just $17, we'd have the resources to take on the gun lobby in Congress and states across the country. But not everyone gives — making it even more important for people who care and understand the stakes of our struggle to pitch in what they can.
If $17 seems worth it to you to change our gun laws in order to make our communities safer from gun violence, we're asking you to contribute to GIFFORDS PAC today.

clean_body: Team - Once again, I am left devastated and angry. Our hearts are broken and we are enraged after tragedy struck again this afternoon in Tallahassee, Florida. Around lunchtime, a man entered Florida State University’s campus and opened fire at the student center. The shooter killed 2 people and injured at least 5 others. Hundreds of students were left shaken or forced to shelter in place, not knowing what was next. Our schools should be a safe space for our children to learn. Students should be worrying about studying for their exams. Instead, they were left living through a nightmare that we know all too well. And unfortunately, this isn’t the first time Florida State University has been wrecked by a shooting either. In 2014, a gunman shot three people at the campus library, just steps away from today’s tragedy. When will enough be enough? I’m heartbroken that another community has to experience this pain. It doesn’t have to be this way. We do not have to accept these horrific acts of violence as normal. We cannot let the gun lobby intimidate us from taking action. And we must never stop raising our voices to demand our leaders step up to keep our students safe. At GIFFORDS, we will continue fighting for change from our elected officials and will not rest until we have a future free from gun violence. We must act. Thank you, Gabby Giffords 👋 Wait — please take a second to read this... 🙏 Gabby Giffords has led the fight against the gun lobby for more than a decade, but she can't do it alone. If everyone reading this donated just $17, we'd have the resources to take on the gun lobby in Congress and states across the country. But not everyone gives — making it even more important for people who care and understand the stakes of our struggle to pitch in what they can. | Peter,

Thanks to you, we had one of our strongest fundraising quarters yet, and we couldn’t have done it without you! And that’s why I wanted to reach out today and share some exciting numbers from our first-quarter fundraising:

**✅ ****We received more than 50,000 contributions that were $100 or less.**
**✅ ****The average grassroots donation was less than $30.**

These numbers are proof that our message of leadership that puts Virginians first and focuses on the issues that truly matter — stronger schools, safer communities, lower costs, and more opportunities for our kids — is resonating with people across our Commonwealth.

But we can’t slow down now. With Virginia as a key battleground, we know Republican special interests will do whatever they can to try and flip this seat. That means we have to keep up our momentum, reach more voters, and make sure our message continues to resonate across Virginia.

clean_body: Thanks to you, we had one of our strongest fundraising quarters yet, and we couldn’t have done it without you! And that’s why I wanted to reach out today and share some exciting numbers from our first-quarter fundraising: | = | Peter, Thanks to you, we had one of our strongest fundraising quarters yet, and we couldn’t have done it without you! And that’s why I wanted to reach out today and share some exciting numbers from our first-quarter fundraising: ✅ We received more than 50,000 contributions that were $100 or less. ✅ The average grassroots donation was less than $30. These numbers are proof that our message of leadership that puts Virginians first and focuses on the issues that truly matter — stronger schools, safer communities, lower costs, and more opportunities for our kids — is resonating with people across our Commonwealth. But we can’t slow down now. With Virginia as a key battleground, we know Republican special interests will do whatever they can to try and flip this seat. That means we have to keep up our momentum, reach more voters, and make sure our message continues to resonate across Virginia. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Abigail Spanberger * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. name: Mark Kelly
subject: Hey, it’s Mark. Is there anything I can say to convince you to make a quick donation to my campaign?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
What if I told you that we’re working across Arizona and the entire country to support the candidates we’ll need to fight back in Washington?
#

Hi folks, Mark Kelly here.
I know things are busy for a lot of people between Easter and Passover, so I want to be respectful of your time.
I’ve got a simple question here: Is there anything I can say to convince you to chip in to my campaign?
What if I told you that Elon Musk’s on a warpath against federal workers and services, and we’re standing in his way?
What if I told you that we’re working across Arizona and the entire country to support the candidates we’ll need to fight back in Washington?
And what if I told you, honestly, that it’s been a tough month for fundraising?
I get it — I know that it’s tough for a lot of people right now. But to fight back against Elon, to build the infrastructure we need to win, we need some folks to chip in (if they can afford it).
That’s why I’m writing, and it’s why I’m asking:
[**Please, make a donation of $3 or any amount that feels right for you today. It’d mean a lot.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-apr25.P7mRSa&refcode=em250417-1-500&t=1&akid=6045%2E6688874%2E4A4b5j)

name: Sen. Tina Smith
subject: EMILYs List has been by my side
body:
|
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106030656/540193158/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE437_20250417_TinaSmithSign_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1055969&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGQ4NzM4MC1kYjFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pvlz6-L8MiK9JC6DTBGKSDtU2eVWP6sGzPQDuJm1mZI=) Peter,

It's Tina Smith, proud U.S. senator from the great state of Minnesota. I've been doing a lot of reflecting lately, on my career and the values that have guided it. And I simply can't think about my time in the U.S. Senate without thinking of you — my friends and supporters in the EMILYs List community.

Before running for office, I was a vice president at Planned Parenthood of Minnesota, where I heard stories confirming just how important it is for women to have control over if, when, and how we grow our families. When I went on to serve as Minnesota's lieutenant governor and then its senator, I carried those stories with me.

That's why it meant so much to me when EMILYs List, the only team in politics focused entirely on electing Democratic pro-choice women, endorsed me. This team has been by my side every step of the way, and [**I'm here to say thank you — and to ask that you support my friends at EMILYs List with a donation to power their work for years to come. Can you make a donation today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106030657/540193159/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE437_20250417_TinaSmithSign_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1055969&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGQ4NzM4MC1kYjFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pvlz6-L8MiK9JC6DTBGKSDtU2eVWP6sGzPQDuJm1mZI=) | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106030658/540193160/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE437_20250417_TinaSmithSign_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1055969&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGQ4NzM4MC1kYjFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pvlz6-L8MiK9JC6DTBGKSDtU2eVWP6sGzPQDuJm1mZI=)

It is a challenging time to be a Democrat, Peter — I won't sugarcoat it. We're facing the very real threat of authoritarianism from a corrupt president, his billionaire backers, and a Republican-backed Congress that will do whatever he wants. I'm fighting back every day — and I'm staying strong in the fight because I've got supporters like you in my corner.

[**Now is the time to take a stand, Peter. clean_body: | = Peter, It's Tina Smith, proud U.S. senator from the great state of Minnesota. I've been doing a lot of reflecting lately, on my career and the values that have guided it. And I simply can't think about my time in the U.S. Senate without thinking of you — my friends and supporters in the EMILYs List community. Before running for office, I was a vice president at Planned Parenthood of Minnesota, where I heard stories confirming just how important it is for women to have control over if, when, and how we grow our families. When I went on to serve as Minnesota's lieutenant governor and then its senator, I carried those stories with me. That's why it meant so much to me when EMILYs List, the only team in politics focused entirely on electing Democratic pro-choice women, endorsed me. This team has been by my side every step of the way, and = | = It is a challenging time to be a Democrat, Peter — I won't sugarcoat it. We're facing the very real threat of authoritarianism from a corrupt president, his billionaire backers, and a Republican-backed Congress that will do whatever he wants. I'm fighting back every day — and I'm staying strong in the fight because I've got supporters like you in my corner. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, = Tina = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Box 96612 Washington, DC 20077 United States | ---|---

name: Mazie Hirono
subject: Trump is lying — again.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
Peter — Donald Trump promised the American people lower costs and a stronger economy. But here’s what’s actually happened: Prices keep rising. Families are struggling. And Trump’s biggest priority? Cutting taxes for billionaires and dismantling the basic systems that keep our country running. He’s not even trying to help working people — he’s helping himself and his ultra-wealthy friends. That’s the truth. While Trump and his MAGA allies try to rewrite history and gaslight the American people, I’m doing everything I can to hold them accountable, protect your privacy from Elon Musk and other tech billionaires, and defend the government programs that millions of people rely on every day. But I can’t do it alone. If we’re going to keep fighting back, it’s going to take a strong, sustained grassroots movement. **[So I’m asking: Will you chip in $5 — or whatever you can — to support my campaign and help power this work?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106030940/540194030/-1348676356?amount=5&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250417_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmZkYjVlMS1kYzFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m-kJ_lSVjfj9ngvkwOiXiI_xAiTJ9d6MGUgMUl1RZW8=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106030941/540194031/-1348676356?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250417_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmZkYjVlMS1kYzFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m-kJ_lSVjfj9ngvkwOiXiI_xAiTJ9d6MGUgMUl1RZW8=)

name: George Latimer
subject: The current state of our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by George Latimer for Congress
body:
In the past few months, we’ve seen firsthand what happens when our leadership decides to prioritize rhetoric and personal agendas over results and progress.

George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-Phg2RhDIEGJVPbb5vK87g2?unsubscribedata=oAHr9Fk2IWcDibEjJXRYadHb1oE%2FgYmHrjrTOfpyErOIpv7dpq7mi20scn6dcpSagygPyGbzGmg%2FJgKM0ZkY4BG1ka5XoWjQrgzi2aXG2Kpo0wIPya94BWyDBhl3fVG3GYpcRngjBtPtmoDHJKnts1qzQDjUcRWbn0PbFj4q6DVgDCYRhmiZJohlm%2F8k3Z0g%2BCQfejvH1xzKCa2lKM4rFvGBY0%2BbyW8d5utdnM0hlnNjh5NJcJG4buF7PMAzsqC5L9IkXoA6xeF5bUmk4CiFBsAbaIPXM%2BFRiqmtVgHXYxjLnlaBJ8QCCvnfe4ZfS8Xcxinv%2BIGz8ma20XcFI3SnNGvVK80o9%2B3atrNatX5HVVnj%2FfkkJumZyLnZTIZYr4OR2TjDwJdilGxPF%2B%2FbDH4IggGoUcg1GO%2BgM37792wS3psDy5t1y51I2dJ%2FNz2%2FZCm2)
---
| |
---
Peter – I think I speak for many of us here in NY-16 when I say that I’m concerned about the current state of our democracy. In the past few months, we’ve seen firsthand what happens when our leadership decides to prioritize rhetoric and personal agendas over results and progress. We’ve seen how it threatens the integrity and stability of the systems we rely on to protect and guide our nation. Despite the constant chaos, my Democratic colleagues and I have been working across the aisle to deliver for the American people, but House Republicans would rather play partisan politics than work with us to find solutions. **We were sent to Congress to govern, not play political games. ** **[Can you chip in $10 before Saturday at midnight? We’ve seen how it threatens the integrity and stability of the systems we rely on to protect and guide our nation. Friend,

Donald Trump just crossed another dangerous line.

He’s demanding that the FCC investigate and fine CBS News and 60 Minutes – **all because they aired a segment he didn’t like.** A story featuring Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky set him off, and now he wants to use the government to punish journalists for doing their jobs. This is what authoritarianism looks like. When Trump doesn’t like the truth, he tries to silence it. And it’s part of a much larger pattern: Trump has gone after voters, marginalized communities, independent agencies, universities, the arts, even foreign allies – **and now, the free press.** At DASS, we’re fighting back. Because if Trump gets away with this, nothing is off-limits. **Not the truth. Not your vote. He’s demanding that the FCC investigate and fine CBS News and 60 Minutes – all because they aired a segment he didn’t like. name: Democrats.org
subject: Feel the change, Derek?
body:
---
Feel the change, Derek? The tide is turning. There’s a sweeping wave of momentum behind the Democratic Party, and we cannot let this moment slip by. Voters in Wisconsin rejected Elon Musk’s chosen candidate for the Wisconsin Supreme Court. And in Florida, two Democratic candidates overperformed significantly in conservative districts. Constituents — from both sides of the aisle — are showing up across the nation to People’s Town Halls hosted by Democrats because their Republican representatives refuse to do their jobs. Across the nation, Americans are standing up and saying no to the anti-American policies, illegal executive orders, and extremist agenda championed by Trump and his MAGA allies. **This momentum is real, and it’s on our side, which is why we need to do everything in our power to strengthen it.** Every day that goes by is a day closer to elections this year and next. While we are committed to building the strongest Democratic Party to elect Democrats everywhere, we need your help to keep up the energy. name: David Hogg
subject: We are done waiting, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
We just announced a $20 million effort to primary out-of-touch, ineffective incumbent House Democrats to replace them with young leaders.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250417-2&t=1&akid=2000%2E587540%2ETSHxCK)
Did you see our major announcement yesterday, Peter?
**Leaders We Deserve just announced a $20 million effort to primary out-of-touch, ineffective incumbent House Democrats to replace them with young leaders who are ready to bring the urgency this moment requires.**
The reason we’re doing this is to get the Democratic Party into fighting shape — because it’s become abundantly clear that the base of our party feels like we are not doing anywhere near enough to stand up to Donald Trump.
**[The fight to elect the next generation of leaders starts today, Peter. Please donate $5 or whatever you can to support our urgent work.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250417-2?refcode=em20250417-2000&amount=5&refcode2=2000_587540_TSHxCK&akid=2000%2E587540%2ETSHxCK)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250417-2?amount=5&refcode=em20250417-2000&refcode2=2000_587540_TSHxCK&akid=2000%2E587540%2ETSHxCK)**
We know that not everyone will agree with this decision — especially the D.C. consultants who’ve gotten rich by doing things the old way.
But we know people like you understand we have no other choice. Because we are done waiting.
Waiting for more of our students to get gunned down in math class.
Waiting for our planet to burn up before our eyes.
Waiting for someone else to save us — because nobody will save us, _except_ us.
**We are done waiting for out-of-touch, ineffective politicians to step aside.**
When the same politicians keep failing us year after year, it’s time for us to stand up and say get on board or get out of our way. Because if we’re being honest, _waiting_ looks a lot like _doing nothing._ And you and I both know we cannot afford to do nothing.
**[Donate $5 right now to elect the young, progressive leaders we deserve. When Gen Z leaders step up to run for office, Leaders We Deserve will be right there to help them win because of generous supporters like you.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250417-2?refcode=em20250417-2000&amount=5&refcode2=2000_587540_TSHxCK&akid=2000%2E587540%2ETSHxCK)**
Thank you for being a part of this big moment,
David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250417-2&t=2&refcode2=2000_587540_TSHxCK&akid=2000%2E587540%2ETSHxCK)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=2000%2E587540%2ETSHxCK)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2000%2E587540%2ETSHxCK)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE

Washington, DC 20003

clean_body: Peter, This is NOT a drill. We've reached out multiple times. Top Republicans have personally asked for your response. Our team wouldn't be bugging you so much about the unless it was critically important to our country's future. Senate Republicans are fighting tooth and nail to support President Trump's agenda and Make America Great Again, but without your cooperation, it could be all for naught. If you don't act NOW, we may have to remove you from our Republican voter database. That means you won't be counted in critical polling, and the Democrats will gain the upper hand. This is your LAST CHANCE, Peter. Do NOT let this message pass you by. Thank you, Voter Verification 2025 Polling Team ******************************************************************************************************** | | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. |

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: I’m in the fight
body:
| | | | |
---
Peter, I wanted you to hear this straight from me.
_**After much thought, I’ve made the decision to stay in the House of Representatives, right here fighting for the America First agenda.**_
Serving as U.S Ambassador to the UN would have been a great honor and I was humbled when President Trump asked me to step up and serve in his administration in that capacity.
But I knew from the start that serving the American people and fighting for America First would come with sacrifices. So, when it became clear that I was needed most in the House of Representatives, **_my decision to stay on and keep fighting for the America First agenda was easy_** _._
With President Trump back in the White House and our House GOP majority razor-thin, every single vote counts. I couldn’t walk away from the fight to **secure our borders** , **strengthen our economy** , and **protect our values from the radical left’s attacks**. President Trump needs every fighter in the House that he can get, **_and I am here to deliver_**.
But here’s what’s happened since I made that choice: the left has come after me harder than ever. They see me as a threat, a conservative _**willing to do anything and everything necessary to get America First across the finish line**_. They’re pouring resources into smear campaigns, flooding dark money into efforts to take me down, and plotting to flip my seat in the next election.
**_They’re desperate to silence me because they know I’ll keep fighting for you._**
The problem is this: **I haven’t been fundraising recently** _._ I’ve been preparing for the next phase of my life and getting ready to fight for President Trump in an entirely new way. **_But with the left’s attacks ramping up, I need to rebuild our resources now to counter their moves and keep our momentum strong._****____**
**__[That’s why I’m reaching out to you today](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/269o3nyZO1dIQpc3CEWkeoobt0FbBWYhc6dqQF1cmBxg0MGbi2krTrWZWPsP0OmE7tqVUV2A3INYDGWq-YVbCygwExnczekPHpqEXwOurfGK5n7l3Fp5NPjQkVBeDyWOrOIU1QpoRuRY38EcZOGgSx6XQ2tiED4fnk7PbTuMeqsbyUJT5x7ENnX569hHIEKTZnAzRumJDK-7q3Wq0L5XdreL54BL-n4P4gzi1KTdNhUG83LiGz-TzQcEK3ImULgSBR3kpijr40eH7tAQdOANCFRJTq0lk8KqAlraPlVvUw3CIQ6X6vt6yRGWSyVGQ5E8MglkDNoCOoSR19avbELVO1_z-xou2x5F5wd6X4dbpE305AsgOmn0_uM4UPgTrMzplWIhGkE7i6LWLErnJB8F7K5RtDAhMAInSh-cBRxYVAf5bWSD8-1CaQDSXdfD4U18LoTXYwQzDrX9cw_4D7DhynU/V_cuQPbZQ52NHhomGh2D_oW1lEF54XWt/8)_._**
_**We just passed the first quarterly deadline of 2025 and the Democrat running against me has already raised $2,000,000.**_

[STAND WITH ELISE](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/naKEj638Gox7LHQT3c1Zmu3FI1M4MAZ6xm7HkHt54kMxIdDaJdBTpHTjIeXaGdwwFEa7tiA-EcLwEoew-uSWGmNI3SX1LY4n71b7EC5msjLFhNc27Vi4e4e1nGz_q5tcX0ObSdv90__cAnZCpNIgO3yhQeOPMiQaGCg97OY19YF24RxUpeEANKloaOvLxkbuG9B0XZzf5W2sRRcSvrCgi5jW4RT_sJ7U15HNHoXYLlCMtLFX647-UWGUKelYEj6KvYffIW4kbMXpfTtmCYYmZ06u-iOW5iQgjUrKdhS3e0WUeFX6ZqeOFH_MXp8_V4YslnUeR0y5p1IZd2BGuRw6mpFj0ywPsOEA2vWYOsYq8pgWgHVBgF654r_fn7ghtN0IMp1E-FhQb7dLFbHd8WWdadg6_y8Sod-igVKTeQ5FDf3YmpiGKZC8FXZ_69N_wK1E_vnOz678IyA_TnwzGercPOg/EcViMho9b-CPo7zkCiZ034dVxNuovaDQ/8)
**__[I’m asking you to stand with me today by making a critical donation to my efforts to defend the House](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/7bdrRmI1idnTrokXNhal88a0s_tkmi9-04Ho_RxazWQyxaw0ciNbl0dV2eHnn8wthYkX3Ck2pAFqsBOrur1Ht7iBPnCgT3xYsoG6H1pVbxrIPgnlch2kyJl_c4JAO2KX4b4ZrkFWBjLN_DxMEC54jvFxEc_LVxergoI-OmwU_rhVfeZEnmsnHYpO-h5ga7eXauewuhVAS8WRaPXLv7W1FDNU6ynKLd_CCRxZ-ILH-CxK6iVcC4jtrIfDPU4IgiV1B4eQc_mbFTURDCTHrH16ppTP0nWQ7XKYSQrHwq5VaFqDxqfvJC4OrD-zTrtSFy1r88-UwhJlpADbvL4yUspVXxG7MpNUsmxMHY8FAHkHYVExXyoAfzTf4LOIDgHWyy-IKzyrmU16tQsMKEn9z3DeEWFYLQ8lEyi-zQmetVdIlJEBIZ7x3xlXrPWa3RnEtG-zarz90bTYQInTW0K2m_0ZeJY/vUlMMJtjfB1Mh3y42XbYHqTlIf1-xVfl/8)_._**
Thank you for your time and continued support.

clean_body: | | | | | Peter, I wanted you to hear this straight from me. After much thought, I’ve made the decision to stay in the House of Representatives, right here fighting for the America First agenda. Serving as U.S Ambassador to the UN would have been a great honor and I was humbled when President Trump asked me to step up and serve in his administration in that capacity. But I knew from the start that serving the American people and fighting for America First would come with sacrifices. So, when it became clear that I was needed most in the House of Representatives, my decision to stay on and keep fighting for the America First agenda was easy . With President Trump back in the White House and our House GOP majority razor-thin, every single vote counts. I couldn’t walk away from the fight to secure our borders , strengthen our economy , and protect our values from the radical left’s attacks. President Trump needs every fighter in the House that he can get, and I am here to deliver. But here’s what’s happened since I made that choice: the left has come after me harder than ever. They see me as a threat, a conservative willing to do anything and everything necessary to get America First across the finish line. They’re pouring resources into smear campaigns, flooding dark money into efforts to take me down, and plotting to flip my seat in the next election. They’re desperate to silence me because they know I’ll keep fighting for you. The problem is this: I haven’t been fundraising recently . I’ve been preparing for the next phase of my life and getting ready to fight for President Trump in an entirely new way. But with the left’s attacks ramping up, I need to rebuild our resources now to counter their moves and keep our momentum strong._ . We just passed the first quarterly deadline of 2025 and the Democrat running against me has already raised $2,000,000. . Thank you for your time and continued support. Your fellow patriot, Elise Stefanik | | | | | | | | | | | | %unsubscribeurl% |

name: GOTV PAC
subject: Let’s embarrass them in every race they thought no one was watching.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25]
Peter,
After the last election, we know a lot of folks are feeling frustrated.
You want to know that your support is going somewhere that matters . When you chip in $25, it isn’t just vanishing into a black hole — it’s fueling campaigns and causes that actually move the needle. Especially now, with the economy this uncertain, that kind of trust means everything.
We just want you to know — that’s the kind of question that also keeps us up at night.
At GOTV PAC, we aren’t chasing headlines or hype. We’re tracking the races that matter — even when they’re not flashy. Local legislative fights. State Supreme Court races. Special elections in overlooked districts where we can flip a seat or stop the far-right from consolidating power.
And here’s the thing: those are exactly the races that Donald Trump and Elon Musk are watching, too. They’re flooding them with dark money and billionaires’ backing — because they know that’s where real power starts.
Our mission is simple: Out-organize them. Out-vote them. And beat them on every battlefield.
Sometimes that means backing a legislative race that no one’s talking about — until it becomes a national headline. Sometimes it means turning out voters for a state House race that decides the fate of voting rights or public education in a region.
It’s not always sexy. But it’s real. And it works.
So if you’re still in this fight — and you want to be part of something that’s learning, adjusting, and laser-focused on impact — we’re asking :
Can you chip in $25 or more today to help GOTV PAC go where it counts? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email04172025&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

OTHER AMOUNT → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email04172025]
Let’s embarrass them in every race they thought no one was watching.
GOTV PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email04172025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email04172025&amount=25]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]
PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
GOTV PAC
712 H St NE
PMB 96591
Washington, DC 20002
United States
Get Out the Vote PAC is registered with the Federal Election Commission as a hybrid Political Action Committee (PAC) with FEC ID C00839407. Our mission is to Flip the House by supporting targeted Congressional districts and down-ballot races within those districts. Our internal research evidences that the impact of a Dollar invested in this manner amplifies the top and bottom of the ticket.

_Begin Forwarded Message From Dr. Raul Ruiz:_
It’s Dr. Ruiz.
I’ll get right to it: **Republicans are leaving the American people behind.**
1. Donald Trump is openly talking about pursuing a third term in office, violating the Constitution he took an oath to protect.
2. House Republicans are gutting programs like Medicaid and Social Security to give tax cuts to billionaires and the ultra-wealthy.
3. Elon Musk is firing thousands of federal workers by the day and destroying Social Security.

My team and I set out to raise $10,000 by midnight on Friday to fight back against Donald Trump’s agenda and keep CA-25 blue. I need you in this fight with me. [Can you chip in $10 right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106032142/540198288/191266269?amount=10&source=SBD_RR_EM_FR_041725_MM_30DO30DNTL_D2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDZiOGEzODEtZTAxYi1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uomEqJfQFeXHiTZgMg88YvoiuFBBrNZ9fFxDhK5GXdk=)

I have dedicated my life to serving the communities that raised me, and I won’t stop fighting until every American is safe from the threat posed by Donald Trump’s agenda.

The Daily Wire's Michael Knowles clashed with LGBTQ pastor Brandan Robertson in a heated and unfiltered abortion debate on Saturday.
**[Knowles showed him](https://substack.com/redirect/f9c35674-5244-4611-ab10-f9ab6ec53a94?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** _**[NO MERCY!](https://substack.com/redirect/f9c35674-5244-4611-ab10-f9ab6ec53a94?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[ Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/f9c35674-5244-4611-ab10-f9ab6ec53a94?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/f9c35674-5244-4611-ab10-f9ab6ec53a94?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"You're side calls things black and white that I don't think we can know in humility as human beings, there are things we cannot know to be absolutely true," Robertson told Knowles. "I do think 'when does life begin?' is something we have been debating in Christianity since the beginning,..."
**["All I'm saying is the Catholics have been consistent,](https://substack.com/redirect/f9c35674-5244-4611-ab10-f9ab6ec53a94?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**... certain other flavors of Christianity have not been," Knowles clarified his earlier point.
The LGBTQ pastor fired back, "I'm willing to say, I think abortion is a very tricky ethical issue and I don't think we should be drawing firm black and white lines on this!"
Knowles had the perfect knockout response... "If a little orphan shows up to your door and is very hungry, do you think the person should feed that little orphan?"
"There's a lot of things that could be going on there, but let's say yes," the pastor answered.
**["So you're drawing a clear black and white distinction](https://substack.com/redirect/f9c35674-5244-4611-ab10-f9ab6ec53a94?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in all of your hubris,... where do you get off?!!" Knowles snapped, sarcastically.
Watch the moral clash on abortion here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/f9c35674-5244-4611-ab10-f9ab6ec53a94?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[Together With Mode Mobile](https://substack.com/redirect/944dbc55-31d9-4190-95eb-233c9d4ca7cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[Meet the founder that's revolutionizing smartphones](https://substack.com/redirect/944dbc55-31d9-4190-95eb-233c9d4ca7cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/944dbc55-31d9-4190-95eb-233c9d4ca7cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
A black turtleneck, a game-changing product, and an industry-shifting vision. But no, it's not Steve Jobs. Meet Dan Novaes, the visionary behind Mode Mobile - the company redefining smartphones.
Mode's revolutionary EarnPhone transforms phones into income streams, **[already paying out $325M for day-to-day activities](https://substack.com/redirect/944dbc55-31d9-4190-95eb-233c9d4ca7cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and generating over $60M in revenue from +45M users.
And Dan has no plans of letting up now, recently reserving the Nasdaq ticker $MODE with the goal of taking the company public. But the real opportunity is now...
**[You can still invest in their pre-IPO offering at just $0.26/share and secure 2X bonus shares.](https://substack.com/redirect/944dbc55-31d9-4190-95eb-233c9d4ca7cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/944dbc55-31d9-4190-95eb-233c9d4ca7cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# _**Resurfaced:**_**Trump Treasury Sec SHUTS UP angry old Bernie with genius comeback**
Trump Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent **[SHUT DOWN angry socialist Sen. Bernie Sanders](https://substack.com/redirect/fda79b2e-6f01-40b0-810c-b0b1266bb227?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during heated questioning in his senate confirmation hearing; all he had to do was mention George Soros.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/fda79b2e-6f01-40b0-810c-b0b1266bb227?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/fda79b2e-6f01-40b0-810c-b0b1266bb227?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Sanders railed against wealth inequality, naming a handful of billionaires who had more wealth than the bottom half of America combined, before asking Bessent if he agreed with former President Joe Biden that "an oligarchy is taking shape in America of extreme wealth, power and influence that threatens our entire democracy, basic rights and freedoms."
"I agree with him, do you?" Sanders pressed Bessent.
Bessent first pointed out that three billionaire Sanders listed by name and criticized in his opening remarks, Elon Musk, Jeff Bezos, and Mark Zuckerberg, **[had all made their money themselves.](https://substack.com/redirect/fda79b2e-6f01-40b0-810c-b0b1266bb227?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
"Forget how they made their money!" Sanders snapped. "Do you think that when so few people have so much wealth and political power that that is an oligarchic form of society?!"
"I would note that President Biden gave a Presidential Medal of Freedom to two people who I think would qualify for his oligarchs," Bessent replied.
Biden presented a Presidential Medal of Freedom to far-left Democrat financier George Soros in January.
"It's not a condemnation of any one individual!!" Sanders snapped again, more frustrated than before.
Watch the tense questioning here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/fda79b2e-6f01-40b0-810c-b0b1266bb227?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Exciting news, team!

It’s about the work we’ve done together — fighting for working families, holding President Trump accountable and standing up to MAGA extremism, and cleaning up corruption in Washington. It’s great to see Team Crow’s work being recognized across Colorado!

If you’ve been proud to be part of this fight — and you believe in lifting up servant leaders like Jason Crow who won’t back down from a fight — we would be honored if you would cast your vote for Jason today. name: Team Benson
subject: Our rights and freedoms are on the line
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
If Tudor Dixon runs for governor again, she will run on the same anti-freedom agenda that would rip rights away from millions of Michiganders.
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=229%2E181023%2EPwthYD)
Let’s take a trip down memory lane, team.
Tudor Dixon ran for governor of Michigan in 2022 — the same year that the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ and paved the way for far-right legislators to attack reproductive rights.
While millions of Michiganders were speaking out and organizing all across the state to defend their rights, Dixon was running for governor to take them away.
She called an inactive Michigan abortion ban passed in 1931 that would make performing an abortion a felony for doctors a “good law.” And she opposed abortions even in cases of rape or incest — going so far as to say that teenagers who are victims of rape and incest should be forced to carry their pregnancy to term.
**She may have lost her election then, but the threat remains.** If Dixon runs for governor again, she will run on the same anti-freedom agenda that would rip rights away from millions of Michiganders.
That’s why having leaders who stand up for our reproductive freedoms has never been more important, and Jocelyn is that leader.
As Secretary of State, she has been at the forefront of the fight to defend our rights. After voters in Michigan passed a constitutional amendment guaranteeing the right to reproductive health care, Jocelyn fought back against extremists who tried to overturn the will of Michiganders.
[**But this fight isn’t over. We need a leader who will stand up to any threats to our right to choose when and how to grow our families. If you can, please chip in to Jocelyn’s campaign today to ensure she can continue fighting for our rights as Michigan’s next Governor >>**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q22025.rGq0NW&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250417_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=229%2E181023%2EPwthYD)

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Democrats need a plan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2272%2E135344%2E82qXSf)

I come from a world of war planning. I come from a world where you can't just play defense and expect to succeed.
What senior Democrats owe the country is a strategy that does more than just wait for bad things to happen. And this is just the start.
To me, that means getting back to the fundamentals. A strong middle class is the anchor of American life. We need to grow and expand it. And we need to focus on the three big things that most Americans can agree on, which is strong economic security, strong national security, and a strong democracy.
As a Midwesterner Democrat who won on the same ballot as Trump in 2020 and in 2024, I'm going to be banging pots and pans about the economic message over and over and over again, because I think, as a party, we've drifted away from a central focus on the economy and on families – and that needs to be to our center of gravity.
A lead foot in whatever we do has to be pushing back on the complete fallacy that Trump is gonna save you money. He's going to cost you money in every part of your life.
And he may walk us into a self-inflicted recession. In Michigan, we know what it's like to live through a recession – in 2008, the recession was pretty damn close to a depression. And I'm not gonna stand silent while the President threatens that again in my state.
[**If you agree with me and want to move forward together, please consider supporting my work with a contribution.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-apr25.NJ6rxh&refcode=em250417-1&t=2&akid=2272%2E135344%2E82qXSf)

name: Powered By People
subject: What we saw looked a lot like our democracy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Last weekend in Wichita Falls, over 400 Texas came together for a town
hall. Not because their elected officials showed up — but because they
didn’t. The state representative, James Frank, and the Congressman, Ronny
Jackson, refused to meet with their constituents in open forums.

When Kay from Wichita Falls asked for help bringing her community
together, Team Powered By People jumped in. And what we saw looked a lot
like our democracy. Democrats, Republicans, Independents — real Texans,
ready to fight for their future.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250417._ASALN&refcode=ema20250417-240069&t=1001&akid=240069%2E444211%2EYP95ar ][IMG]

We talked about the Governor’s plan to drain our public schools, cuts to
Medicaid, and the threats to veterans at the VA. One woman stood up and
said,

“They’re trying to overwhelm us. We need to whelm ‘em the other way!” We
couldn’t agree more.

That’s what Powered By People is here to do — help Texans organize, show
up, and fight back. When people connect at town halls, protests, and the
Capitol, we build the power to protect our communities and take action
right now, not years from now. We don’t have to wait until 2026 or 2028.
Getting organized, taking action, coming together — that’s where it’s at.

Here are two things we can do this week to keep up the fight:

📬 Texas school board elections are taking place across the state. Early
voting begins April 22nd and Election Day is May 3rd. You can find a list
of candidates for your school district at this link. Do your research and
make a plan to vote.
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/64760?t=1002&akid=240069%2E444211%2EYP95ar ]https://ballotpedia.org/School_board_elections_in_Texas

🗳️ Join us in Denton for a town hall. Another community where we can’t get
the member of Congress or a state rep to show up. We’re holding the town
hall for them on Saturday April 26 in Denton. Republicans, Democrats,
Independents — all are welcome. Sign up here:
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/64761?t=1003&akid=240069%2E444211%2EYP95ar ]https://www.mobilize.us/poweredxpeople/event/776596

Keep the faith and keep up the fight!

- Team Powered By People

P.S. The ocotillo are in bloom 🌵 — and so is our movement.

Powered By People needs grassroots support to help keep Beto on the road,
connecting with voters across Texas.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250417._ASALN&refcode=ema20250417-240069&t=1004&akid=240069%2E444211%2EYP95ar ]Will you chip in $3 or more right now to fuel this
movement?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250417._ASALN&refcode=ema20250417-240069&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=240069%2E444211%2EYP95ar ]DONATE

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=240069%2E444211%2EYP95ar

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: Bring Kilmar home
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
|
---
Peter — Last month, Maryland resident Kilmar Abrego Garcia was abducted off the street, torn away from his family and home, and deported to a notoriously brutal Salvadoran mega-prison. This is an assault on the core principles we value as Americans: on the fundamental right to due process and on the checks and balances that hold our democracy together. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106032441/540199115/-1866165361?refcode=AU_YA_CL_GEN_RES_AC_20250417_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWE1ZTdjOC1lMTFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C844bcR26J8gBolz9VEcuZ6MK3nyORMcht5IandGV1k=) It’s an assault on our very freedoms as Americans, and I’m outraged that this is happening. But this moment demands more than outrage. It demands action. **Democrats on the House Oversight Committee, on which I serve, have formally asked the Republican chairman to approve an official trip to El Salvador. We intend to visit Mr. Garcia and demand the Trump Administration return him home — as the Supreme Court has ordered.** **I hope Republicans will grant approval for this trip, but I’ve made clear that I intend to go no matter what.** This is a turning point in Trump’s presidency. He’s openly defying a unanimous Supreme Court order to facilitate Mr. Garcia’s return home, blatantly lying about his abduction, and is threatening to illegally deport “home-growns” next. We’re witnessing the erosion of the very systems meant to protect us. **It is a constitutional crisis.** And if we let it play out, we may not get another chance to stop it. That’s why we’re taking urgent action _now_. **Let this be the moment where we draw the line — where we say enough is enough and join together to fight.** As the daughter of immigrants who fled an authoritarian regime, I know what happens when people stay silent and when justice goes unchecked. This moment matters. Your support makes it count. — Yassamin | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106032442/540199116/-1866165361?refcode=AU_YA_CL_GEN_RES_AC_20250417_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWE1ZTdjOC1lMTFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C844bcR26J8gBolz9VEcuZ6MK3nyORMcht5IandGV1k=)
---

* * *

PO Box 13524
Phoenix, AZ 85002
United States ****[yassaminforcongress.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106032443/540199117/1625509068?refcode=AU_YA_CL_GEN_RES_AC_20250417_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWE1ZTdjOC1lMTFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C844bcR26J8gBolz9VEcuZ6MK3nyORMcht5IandGV1k=&emci=f5da7284-d11b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=c1a5e7c8-e11b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=45157234) ** | [info@yassaminforcongress.com](mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com)** | **Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.**

name: Blue Dog PAC
subject: Our members are under attack!
body:
False and misleading ads.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106032444/540199120/1219929396?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlhMjJlZmVkLWUxMWItZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3zw-9cClcYV63zMicxSxmKh_It8_CEUBoKch17M9nSM=) | Peter, Last week, every single Blue Dog in Congress voted against the GOP’s reckless budget. _We will not cosign their plans to cut healthcare in order to pay for giant tax breaks for the wealthy while adding trillions of dollars to the national debt. name: Laura Gillen
subject: I refuse to stand by
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY
body:
Last week, the House passed the so-called “SAVE Act,” a dangerous voter suppression bill that puts up even more barriers for Americans trying to exercise their fundamental right to vote.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106032733/540200248/800699251?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-04-17_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTRhYjExMC1lNDFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qR_mdy0iBxAPQDUwyRwE-BLUAAzX75VAm0bV63a-5bM=)
---
| Peter,

Last week, the House passed the so-called “**SAVE Act** ,” a dangerous voter suppression bill that puts up even more barriers for Americans trying to exercise their fundamental right to vote.

House Republicans are attempting to make it even harder for eligible American voters – _including our service members overseas and married women who changed their last name_ – to cast their ballots!

**Let’s be clear: noncitizens are _already_ prohibited from voting in federal elections, and this bill will only further restrict access to the ballot and silence the voices of millions of eligible voters.**

The **SAVE Act** isn’t about protecting our elections – it’s about disenfranchising American voters and giving Republicans an edge as they work to hold onto their _razor-thin_ House majority in the midterms.

I voted ‘**NO** ’ because I refuse to stand by while extreme Republicans play political games with our democracy. [_**Will you stand with me and add your name to our growing list of supporters so we can show undeniable grassroots momentum?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106032734/540200249/-1225592528?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTRhYjExMC1lNDFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qR_mdy0iBxAPQDUwyRwE-BLUAAzX75VAm0bV63a-5bM=&emci=474ab110-e41b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=494ab110-e41b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=7377580)

body:
Help us show Trump and the GOP that New Mexico is ready to fight back.

Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. Trump’s economic policies are a disaster for the country and the world — and not one single Republican is standing up to him. Instead, they’re falling in line and remaining silent. They are letting Trump drag our economy into chaos with his self-serving economic agenda, no matter what it costs to the people we are meant to serve. But I will never back down from the fight for NM-02’s working families. Just last week, I partnered with Sen. Cory Booker to introduce legislation to hold Elon Musk accountable for the damage DOGE cuts have done to New Mexico’s farmers and ranchers. We need to do everything we can to send a clear message to Trump and the GOP: **The people of New Mexico will not stand by. name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: President Trump Preached A Sermon To Us Pastors Last Night At The White House
body:
Last night, I had the TIME OF MY LIFE by getting to have dinner w/President Trump and other Pastors at the White House to celebrate Easter. President
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20792613.11362.1.ae086e4304cd8fd18f6b74a36ce75349) |
---
Last night, I had the **TIME OF MY LIFE** by getting to have dinner w/**President Trump** and other Pastors at the **White House** to celebrate **Easter**. **President Trump** spoke and literally preached a _flawless_ Resurrection Sunday Sermon to us Pastors in attendance. You can watch it here: [https://x.com/WhiteHouse/status/1912642968248270988](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20792613.11363.1.94b4c179829f4e95fc9d70fdd3141736) **Things have changed in America from Easter 2024 to Easter 2025!** I will be doing a video here shortly to share some cool stories of where POTUS took us in the White House and I will share some things I learned last night that I did not previously know. Let me take a moment to encourage you to **attend church this Sunday**. Nearly 2000 years ago on the first Resurrection Sunday the Tomb was **EMPTY** so that now the churches can be **FULL** this Sunday! Happy Easter! Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ Watch: President Trump's Easter Message ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20792613.11364.1.fdc36f4eede7b0ed9d59aaabc207e3bb)
---
---
---

name: Scott Peters
subject: Young people have the power
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Peters for Congress
body:
---
| | Peter,

**I am proud to announce that my campaign will be participating as a partner in the 2025 National Democracy Summer School!** This one-of-a-kind Democratic Fellowship—founded by Congressman Jamie Raskin and expanded across the country in an historic partnership with the DCCC—is dedicated to recruiting thousands of high school and college-age students and training them as the next generation of Democratic political activists and leaders.

[As part of this educational and political initiative, I am looking for dedicated high school and college students to join me here in CA-50 as Team Peters Democracy Summer Fellows!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106033058/540201128/-1934056411?refcode2=fe41acae-e51b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&refcode=SP_EM_EN_90DO_250417_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODA2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTQxYWNhZS1lNTFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tTdE63KUo5g_lBHdiifiiPW8j1Kd859f1lCx5BOzJK0=&emci=7781d1a7-e51b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=fe41acae-e51b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=5258741)
| | [APPLY HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106033059/540201129/-1934056411?refcode2=fe41acae-e51b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&refcode=SP_EM_EN_90DO_250417_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODA2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTQxYWNhZS1lNTFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tTdE63KUo5g_lBHdiifiiPW8j1Kd859f1lCx5BOzJK0=&emci=7781d1a7-e51b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=fe41acae-e51b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=5258741)
---

**This six-week program will take place from Monday, June 23rd to Friday, August 8th and requires a commitment of 15-20 hours per week.** Fellows will participate in exciting online seminars and a powerful curriculum designed by Congressman Raskin, while also organizing on-the-ground with my reelection campaign here in CA-50.

Throughout the academic portion, Fellows will learn from academic luminaries, inspiring political leaders, policy experts, issue advocates and top community organizers from all across the country. Past Democracy Summer speakers have included House Speaker Nancy Pelosi, Professor Laurence Tribe, Senator Elizabeth Warren, Rep. Bennie Thompson, Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, and the late Rep. John Lewis.

Not to mention, Fellows will also learn state-of-the-art skills in phone-banking, text-banking, canvassing, on-line organizing, low-dollar fundraising and voter registration—all the necessary ingredients for a thriving field operation! [Sign on here and join Scott in fighting for continued support and resources for the ongoing repairs and recovery of our region:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106033060/540201130/-1934056411?refcode2=fe41acae-e51b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&refcode=SP_EM_EN_90DO_250417_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODA2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTQxYWNhZS1lNTFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tTdE63KUo5g_lBHdiifiiPW8j1Kd859f1lCx5BOzJK0=&emci=7781d1a7-e51b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=fe41acae-e51b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=5258741)

**If you know a student who may be interested in this life-changing and America-changing program, please forward them this email—they won’t want to miss out!**

Thank you for your support and solidarity,

clean_body: | | Peter, I am proud to announce that my campaign will be participating as a partner in the 2025 National Democracy Summer School! This one-of-a-kind Democratic Fellowship—founded by Congressman Jamie Raskin and expanded across the country in an historic partnership with the DCCC—is dedicated to recruiting thousands of high school and college-age students and training them as the next generation of Democratic political activists and leaders. | | This six-week program will take place from Monday, June 23rd to Friday, August 8th and requires a commitment of 15-20 hours per week. Fellows will participate in exciting online seminars and a powerful curriculum designed by Congressman Raskin, while also organizing on-the-ground with my reelection campaign here in CA-50. Throughout the academic portion, Fellows will learn from academic luminaries, inspiring political leaders, policy experts, issue advocates and top community organizers from all across the country. Past Democracy Summer speakers have included House Speaker Nancy Pelosi, Professor Laurence Tribe, Senator Elizabeth Warren, Rep. Bennie Thompson, Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, and the late Rep. John Lewis. Not to mention, Fellows will also learn state-of-the-art skills in phone-banking, text-banking, canvassing, on-line organizing, low-dollar fundraising and voter registration—all the necessary ingredients for a thriving field operation! If you know a student who may be interested in this life-changing and America-changing program, please forward them this email—they won’t want to miss out! Thank you for your support and solidarity, Scott Peters P.S. = | | | = | As a leader among Democrats in Congress, Scott Peters has one of the strongest track records of achieving progressive reforms and getting things done. He’s committed to protecting our environment, improving access to affordable healthcare, implementing compassionate immigration reforms and protecting reproductive freedom. Democrats in swing districts like Scott’s rely on grassroots supporters like you.**= | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Scott Peters for Congress Scott Peters for Congress PO Box 22074 San Diego, CA 92192 United States

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=a00396abc2d547458b3a2454f68338ac&_e=bq0GoLItp37A0zKuuHDXD3yaPm8IwzEMoJF9Ci28a4ekMZiN8nZeZwdrhApGCQ3J4co8YADYJpotBXrtuPAdVzNqK-GomcHDgbzU4FKx2lNcwCrfgUWi9mDXbfOxV6eTvTzs_TUqo2E-tZ9XzH1Y5CnUrO5sJBHyxXmjnkHpJXZY64sBL0ZtTEPwrTr2M9_U-5c4C5L2xLK7Pyx2IeKz_ZoIwAXBMaWAPcL3Uv9WgFBa4V5fD4YOnQmUo_xEhXDLvFAKfAPO1hB6ChyGmye3gUTSCwpOv4t-XSRpSFvcNmKiKXnjmyCcpLTXCQAHnKCdm71QiM5sEa2sGh6kPnuj3g%3D%3D)

name: Rob Bonta
subject: re: social security
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
I filed an amicus brief challenging this administration’s harmful changes to the Social Security Administration.
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250417&t=1&akid=1744%2E1088799%2Eq-Ijhc)
Donald Trump and Elon Musk have caused massive delays and disruptions at the Social Security Administration (SSA) that have prevented Californians and people across the country from being able to access critical benefits.
**That’s why I joined a coalition of attorneys general to file an amicus brief challenging their attack on our seniors and people with disabilities.**
The administration's reckless policy changes and budget cuts have resulted in staff layoffs, closed field offices, and the illegal shutdown of departments – making it harder _(at times impossible)_ for the SSA to provide lifesaving benefits and services to the 6 million Californians who count on them.
Those calling to check on their benefits now have to wait about 50% longer to speak with an SSA representative over the phone than they did last year. Since Trump and Musk took power, the SSA website has suffered multiple crashes.
To make matters worse, the administration just announced they’re making X, the social media platform owned by Elon Musk, the SSA’s primary method of public communication, _even though the majority of seniors do not use social media and many lack access to broadband internet at all._
**Social Security is a sacred promise we have made to our seniors and people with disabilities – these chaotic delays and disruptions are completely unacceptable.**
**[Can you help me protect seniors and people with disabilities, and end the Trump administration’s unlawful and harmful attacks on our most vulnerable communities with a donation of $5 today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250417?refcode=em20250417-1744&amount=5&refcode2=1744_1088799_q-Ijhc&akid=1744%2E1088799%2Eq-Ijhc)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250417?refcode=em20250417-1744&amount=5&refcode2=1744_1088799_q-Ijhc&akid=1744%2E1088799%2Eq-Ijhc)**
In solidarity,
Rob

name: Ron Wyden
subject: Trump's betting we won't care about his authoritarian and Orwellian tactics
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106033252/540201759/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmQ2ODRhZC1lNjFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9D0wi6YKSy1aJmzm-wgGKt-BQLi3d2p6l3Q2d4qwWDs=&emci=7676e1b4-ca1b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=2bd684ad-e61b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=9818364)
---

| | Last month, Kilmar Abrego García, a legal resident of Maryland, was swept up in the Trump administration's deportation raids. Abrego Garcia was sent to a notorious prison in El Salvador, despite the fact that he's never been charged with a crime. **The Trump administration has admitted that Abrego Garcia's deportation was due to an "administrative error," but they refuse to rectify the situation — even after the Supreme Court**** _unanimously_****directed them to do so. And perhaps** most alarming, Trump has doubled down on his authoritarian ambitions. During a cozy meeting in the Oval Office with El Salvador's president, Nayib Bukele, he suggested that he would start sending U.S. citizens to Salvadoran prisons. **Make no mistake: when a president**** _ignores_****a court order, we are in a full-blown constitutional crisis.** This is not up for "normal" political debate. This is a fundamental question of whether we as a country will tolerate our president flouting the courts and scheming to _disappear_ people he doesn't like into foreign prisons. Trump is making two bets:
1. That the courts have no way of enforcing their order.
2. That the public at large will see this whole matter as just another "Trump controversy" and soon forget about it.

On the first matter, **every member of Congress must do everything within their oversight and legislative power to help the judiciary enforce an order.** They took an oath to uphold the Constitution, and have a duty to stand up to an out-of-control executive. On the second matter, **I urge Oregonians – and folks across the country – to raise their voices**** _loudly._** Trump is betting on our outrage fatigue. But now is exactly when we need to get angry, and get loud. Together, we must mobilize and show that we value freedom and due process over the whims of a would-be dictator. This moment will test our country. Let us meet it with strength, honesty, and courage. Onward, _Ron_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Ron Wyden instantly:

clean_body: | | | | Last month, Kilmar Abrego García, a legal resident of Maryland, was swept up in the Trump administration's deportation raids. Abrego Garcia was sent to a notorious prison in El Salvador, despite the fact that he's never been charged with a crime. The Trump administration has admitted that Abrego Garcia's deportation was due to an "administrative error," but they refuse to rectify the situation — even after the Supreme Court unanimouslydirected them to do so. And perhaps most alarming, Trump has doubled down on his authoritarian ambitions. During a cozy meeting in the Oval Office with El Salvador's president, Nayib Bukele, he suggested that he would start sending U.S. citizens to Salvadoran prisons. Make no mistake: when a president ignoresa court order, we are in a full-blown constitutional crisis. This is not up for "normal" political debate. This is a fundamental question of whether we as a country will tolerate our president flouting the courts and scheming to disappear people he doesn't like into foreign prisons. Trump is making two bets: 1. That the courts have no way of enforcing their order. 2. That the public at large will see this whole matter as just another "Trump controversy" and soon forget about it. On the first matter, every member of Congress must do everything within their oversight and legislative power to help the judiciary enforce an order. They took an oath to uphold the Constitution, and have a duty to stand up to an out-of-control executive. On the second matter, I urge Oregonians – and folks across the country – to raise their voices loudly. Trump is betting on our outrage fatigue. But now is exactly when we need to get angry, and get loud. Together, we must mobilize and show that we value freedom and due process over the whims of a would-be dictator. This moment will test our country. Let us meet it with strength, honesty, and courage. Onward, Ron | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Ron Wyden instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. subject: Does anybody else see the irony here?

Peter, Donald Trump recently called me a “totally corrupt politician” and demanded that I resign.
Does anybody else see the irony here?
**This is the same man who ran a fraudulent university. The same man who used his charity like a personal piggy bank. The same man who's faced dozens of criminal charges – including trying to overturn a free and fair election.**
And he’s calling me what?
Let me be very clear: I will not be bullied. I will not be silenced. And I will not back down from holding the powerful accountable – no matter who they are or how powerful they might be.
If Trump thinks name calling will stop me from doing my job, he’s in for a rude awakening.
**But here’s the truth:_Because_ I am holding him accountable and blocking so many pieces of his MAGA agenda, he's trying to discredit me.

That's why I need fearless fighters like you to have my back. [So I’m personally asking: Will you chip in $5 or more right now to help me keep fighting for justice, the rule of law, and our Constitution – no matter what Trump throws my way?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106033263/540201772/-2022258813?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1905-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGQ2ODRhZC1lNjFiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DdOZ7T0vLOjhP1GnPiSCN_e1_CsHl7s_wa3pqLQ9NsE=)**

Patriot,

I don’t do this often, but I had to email you with an urgent request. And I promise you, it’s not all doom and gloom!

Here’s the situation:

For the last decade, our nation’s institutions have abandoned our youth to radical ideologies. You could go to the most conservative state in the nation, but once you step foot on a college campus, you are bombarded with radical leftwing politics.

But right now, you and I have a tremendous opportunity to change course. The wind is at our back.

_In fact_ , the youth vote supported Trump in the last election.

This is unprecedented.

There’s one organization leading the charge to identify, recruit, and train the next generation of young people to become champions for liberty - **Young Americans for Liberty (YAL)**.

I attended a Young Americans for Liberty conference last summer, and what I witnessed shocked me. A community of **young adults fighting for freedom** in our country.

The revolution taking place on college campuses will surprise you.

Young Americans for Liberty has a proven method of recruiting and training college students to become the boots on the ground that win elections and pass pro-liberty legislation.

**But I must admit... I spoke with Jeff Frazee, the founder of Young Americans for Liberty, and YAL is falling short of the fundraising needed to expand their operations.**

Here’s how you can help:

[Please join me in supporting Young Americans for Liberty by donating $10, $35, $50, $100, $250, or even $500 today. My goal is to help them raise $24,000 in the next 24 hours.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxUj1FvmzAUhX-NeQuyr7GBBx7askzT1mVqNU15Qsa-NO5sILZJmv36iSiLtNfvfLrnHuVnZ4dLQ8pHAnCwJhIAwh8IwHF_9mF5918_b_bzx25zlN-9WFN4uqknuMujVnt3fHV_XuxjZL_Cz3dXP5_YXU-XGe_yrTRHr6xbadlmpuGDoUWGDSuLouYFk1V2aKiUZa9FP1BNtUCjVSWg1uWAZmCiHjLbAAVBC1YCF5KKnFVm4L1kRS2plFVFCnrtyZXHYLViMZ1VCNPkcz35zDWHlOZ4fWxLYBtRLwFzNaKZ0moQ2F6U08Wa9Rulk53GVeVbNc-oXKcng4S3u6fux8vutfv0_PDlW0cBRAeCAgUCckm-08rPyr6NhLf_cY_GLp7wNuApHlTAG08YVnoO7AbitAS9NsX-38lpTDgmwtuEH6lzdvzNstCY-Wyds1GWpKBv1-3r0lMDfwMAAP__6hWZNw)
[Donate](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxUj0GPmzAQhX-NuQXZY2PgwGF3aaqq3abaVVXlhIw9bBzZmBiTNP31FVEaqdfvfZo3T_nJ2eHakPKZABysmQkA4U8E4LS_-Lgc_dfPm_30e7c5ye--WFN4uatneMijVnt3end_3uzzzH7Fn0dXv57ZQ0_XCR_yvTRHr6xbadlmpuGDoSLDhpVC1FwwWWWHZmC1EpURlcCir4XpEauyGlRZy1pQDZltgEJBBSuBF5IWOavMwHvJRC2plFVFBL315MpjtFqxOV1UjCH4XAefueaQ0jTfHtsS2M6ol4i5GtGEtBoEtlfltFizfqN0smFcVb5V04TKdToYJLzdvXQ_3nbv3afXpy_fOgpQdFBQoEBALsl3WvlJ2Y-R8PY_7tHYxRPeRjzPBxXxzhPGlV4iu4M5LFGvTXP_72QYE46J8NaEUSXs-iWlMLIsNma6WOfsLEsi6Mdt_7r23MDfAAAA__-NN5oy)
Here’s how Young Americans for Liberty is Making Liberty Win:

STEP 1: YAL’s network of over 500 chapters reaches hundreds of thousands of students in universities across the country. These chapters’ leaders work to recruit new members, introducing them to the principles of liberty. To date, YAL has recruited 26,450 YAL members and received more than 327,000 student sign-ups.

STEP 2: YAL identifies the top student leaders and trains them to be effective activists to promote the ideas of liberty on their campuses. YAL chapters and members have made major policy changes on free speech, self-defense, and defunding woke campus programs, which now impact more than 3,100,000 students every year!

STEP 3: OPERATION WIN AT THE DOOR. YAL’s top activists put their training to work fighting for liberty in their state legislatures. These activists knock on doors and phone bank to help elect pro-liberty legislators and pass constitutional legislation. In 2024, these student activists knocked on over 1 MILLION doors!

The youth vote is the reason liberty prevailed in the last election. But what we do today will have even bigger impacts in the future.
