clean_body: | | Patriot, I don’t do this often, but I had to email you with an urgent request. And I promise you, it’s not all doom and gloom! Here’s the situation: For the last decade, our nation’s institutions have abandoned our youth to radical ideologies. You could go to the most conservative state in the nation, but once you step foot on a college campus, you are bombarded with radical leftwing politics. But right now, you and I have a tremendous opportunity to change course. The wind is at our back. In fact , the youth vote supported Trump in the last election. This is unprecedented. There’s one organization leading the charge to identify, recruit, and train the next generation of young people to become champions for liberty - Young Americans for Liberty (YAL). I attended a Young Americans for Liberty conference last summer, and what I witnessed shocked me. A community of young adults fighting for freedom in our country. The revolution taking place on college campuses will surprise you. Young Americans for Liberty has a proven method of recruiting and training college students to become the boots on the ground that win elections and pass pro-liberty legislation. But I must admit... I spoke with Jeff Frazee, the founder of Young Americans for Liberty, and YAL is falling short of the fundraising needed to expand their operations. Here’s how you can help: Here’s how Young Americans for Liberty is Making Liberty Win: STEP 1: YAL’s network of over 500 chapters reaches hundreds of thousands of students in universities across the country. These chapters’ leaders work to recruit new members, introducing them to the principles of liberty. To date, YAL has recruited 26,450 YAL members and received more than 327,000 student sign-ups. STEP 2: YAL identifies the top student leaders and trains them to be effective activists to promote the ideas of liberty on their campuses. YAL chapters and members have made major policy changes on free speech, self-defense, and defunding woke campus programs, which now impact more than 3,100,000 students every year! STEP 3: OPERATION WIN AT THE DOOR. YAL’s top activists put their training to work fighting for liberty in their state legislatures. These activists knock on doors and phone bank to help elect pro-liberty legislators and pass constitutional legislation. In 2024, these student activists knocked on over 1 MILLION doors! The youth vote is the reason liberty prevailed in the last election. But what we do today will have even bigger impacts in the future. Believe it or not, these students are the single biggest factor in shaping our nation. Not just through elections but by building the very culture of our nation. They are our next generation of leaders, and we cannot turn them over to the radical leftwing anymore. Thank you, Kyle Rittenhouse P.S. I said I was shocked by the level of enthusiasm when I attended the Young Americans for Liberty conference. These are the students who are going to make the biggest impact in the future. I wanted to share a few photos with you from the conference. Young Americans for Liberty, Inc. is a nonprofit organization formed under 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Donations or gifts to Young Americans for Liberty, Inc. are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Tell Congress: Get billionaire money out of politics!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

In a democracy, every person should have an equal voice in their
government. But billionaires and corporations have never accepted that the
working class deserves an equal voice to theirs, and they’re spending
billions to rig the system in their favor and grow their power in
Washington.

The Supreme Court’s Citizens United decision in 2010 opened the floodgates
by ruling that corporations have the same rights as people and letting the
1% skirt campaign contribution limits and flood our political system with
cash through dark money super PACs.

In 2024 alone, just 100 billionaire families spent a staggering $2.6
billion to influence our elections. That’s more than one in every six
dollars spent in all federal races last year — and that doesn’t even
include dark money funneled through super PACs!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140767?t=1002&akid=36595%2E1203867%2EC_5bkL ]It’s time to get billionaire money out of politics for good: add your
name if you agree!

Just look at Elon Musk, the richest man in the world: he dropped $278
million to help re-elect Donald Trump, and has since been rewarded with an
unprecedented level of control over federal policy, including targeting
regulatory agencies meant to regulate him.

To end corporate and billionaire control of our political system, we must:

* Overturn the disastrous Citizens United decision;
* Pass real campaign finance reform;
* Make millionaires, billionaires, and corporations finally pay their
fair share in taxes and stop them from buying power.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140767?t=1003&akid=36595%2E1203867%2EC_5bkL ]Organized people CAN beat organized money. Add your name to tell
Congress: get billionaire money out of politics — our democracy depends on
it.

Add Your Name

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250417-36595-footer&t=1004&refcode2=36595_1203867_C_5bkL&akid=36595%2E1203867%2EC_5bkL

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=36595%2E1203867%2EC_5bkL

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com
